name: Dean Heller
subject: re: the Left’s war on guns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
We have seen that the radical Left will stop at nothing to diminish our constitutional right to bear arms. | |
---

[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=45e0fa4ce661482a9fc45a2090822ed5&_e=uujxWZqxQZTN8itP5yzK9pAeG30_YJ_GtL-okqMd2E6weOTu6Ab-VQrx2_bFdAuT5NhxdH3xVX8QISTq1xQQVamjLxoC5_h6BiufVAWfsJv764_08o7ZiUT09VCrhLJqmsXT6WYZQIaTVU6e9MAVvPl-lzmKSEn3SUSUMpibL6sTcuMupafI_YqQ9iVIlPiJTRc88jpVc-qWPn5dZIB77Ii9OVvKm5zQeHodDtK9xG6slPnnkTCsQ6CoGm5U3Am6ShX584PyOlB3Pl-K-7pQCmvDTZzRs4MRrNvptnFbih5i_k5ytRgaGkUin1A1fT11o6kC9tkhp3cH1ycyfB5cLEy1gCkJpmJCtbqIzToBaCRcwJuVr4ul64-I8VKf_Bt5jmOj4OuN6ddK7UsHOdA3YlP6pb9h6cAJM3dAUmBg6EsUTfRYFSYmq3KpoeA0b42Omocb8zkXjVLAVStuKPyd_xEgeBHWHU4Bd8sK0P0xkxYIYfxJI1cz2L6xXVNowg-a)

We have seen that the radical Left will stop at nothing to diminish our constitutional right to bear arms. They wrongfully target responsible gun ownership, and I will not stand for it.

As a lifelong gun owner, I know the importance of the Second Amendment. Liberal elites think that the Second Amendment is all about hunting. While hunting is important, the Second Amendment is so much more than that: It’s about defending our homes and our families from criminals and defending our freedoms from those who would take them away.

As Governor of Nevada, I will veto any legislation that restricts your right to defend yourself, including assault weapons bans, magazine size restrictions, and support Constitutional Carry.

I have a long history of supporting the Second Amendment and that won’t stop anytime soon.

But I need to know where the people of Nevada stand.

Will you share your insight on the Second Amendment with me and my team?

[_**HELLER 2021 GUN RIGHTS SURVEY**_](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=45e0fa4ce661482a9fc45a2090822ed5&_e=uujxWZqxQZTN8itP5yzK9pAeG30_YJ_GtL-okqMd2E6weOTu6Ab-VQrx2_bFdAuT5NhxdH3xVX8QISTq1xQQVamjLxoC5_h6BiufVAWfsJv764_08o7ZiUT09VCrhLJqmsXT6WYZQIaTVU6e9MAVvPl-lzmKSEn3SUSUMpibL6sTcuMupafI_YqQ9iVIlPiJTRc88jpVc-qWPn5dZIB77Ii9OVvKm5zQeHodDtK9xG6slPnnkTCsQ6CoGm5U3Am6ShX584PyOlB3Pl-K-7pQCmvDTZzRs4MRrNvptnFbih7DHofkb_CIKhFgbYmf-Ar_pIf7F2XFyQWgGtgkPtFtUpcRuU0O8kTs65LgxUcw-GUuYklIulBPHnYDTsKDfNJ4_vTxcA002x-34J0q6-B0QK00JJ1wI2Rnr6NvTZvK5zm-XyD9nIQm1tlqe2ksn-mClsPcI-sUM2YxuAg6N_jGrxEaPuIxcpcSjzYnqghn5PRsafRYW5v5eNuVqNPsxz8W)

You can expect questions like the one below...

Your constitutional rights are under attack from the radical Left but I will ALWAYS stand up for you.

Thanks,

Dean Heller

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: DOJ and FBI investigating Henry Cuellar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, earlier we
told you the news about the FBI raiding Rep. Henry Cuellar’s house AND
campaign office, and hauling out boxes of evidence.

Now, CNN is reporting that the Department of Justice is involved —
specifically, the DOJ’s Public Integrity Unit, which oversees the
investigation and prosecution of crimes like bribery of public officials
and election crimes.

We still don’t know much about the investigation, but we know it’s
serious. And we know this could be a turning point in Jessica Cisneros’
campaign to defeat the corporate-backed incumbent. Cuellar has millions in
corporate PAC money, and this is an absolutely critical moment when we
need to flood Jessica’s campaign with grassroots donations.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/89498?refcode=em20220120-21588&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=21588%2E1203867%2Em9yO-T ]Peter, can
you rush a donation of $3 directly to Jessica’s campaign,
as she makes a final push to win this primary race. With 25 days until
in-person early voting, we must take this opportunity to lift Jessica and
her campaign to victory.

- Team JD

-----Forwarded Message-----
Sent: Today, January 20, 2022
From: Alexandra Rojas
Subject: Henry Cuellar’s home raided by FBI agents

Peter,

Local reporters in Texas just broke the news that FBI agents raided Rep.
Henry Cuellar’s house and campaign office, collecting and carrying out
evidence.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/89498?refcode=em20220120-21588&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21588%2E1203867%2Em9yO-T ]Two FBI agents outside Henry Cuellar's house

Peter, we
don’t know much about the FBI raid yet. But it can’t be good news for
Henry Cuellar’s campaign.

Two days ago, things were looking very good for Cuellar’s reelection. He
reported having $2.3 million in corporate-backed campaign cash — far more
than Jessica Cisneros, who isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money.

Honestly, we were worried that we might get outspent badly and lose this
race.

Now, the race is blown wide open. With this news on the FBI raid, we have
an opportunity to get voters to reconsider Cuellar before they start
casting ballots in just four weeks.

There is a very good chance that Jessica Cisneros can win this race if we
see a huge surge in fundraising for her campaign right now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/89498?refcode=em20220120-21588&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21588%2E1203867%2Em9yO-T ]Rush a $3 contribution straight to Jessica Cisneros
right now to help her seal the deal. Your contribution today could mean
the difference between victory and defeat.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/89498?refcode=em20220120-21588&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21588%2E1203867%2Em9yO-T ]Contribute $3

Last time, Jessica lost by only 2,746 votes — just 3%. This time, we can
seal the deal and elect another fighter for working families to the U.S.
House. But it’s going to take an enormous surge in these next few weeks to
make it happen.

We’ll keep you updated when we know more on the FBI raid and
investigation. For now, the most important thing you can do is [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/89498?refcode=em20220120-21588&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21588%2E1203867%2Em9yO-T ]donate
to Jessica’s campaign to give her the resources she needs to reach as many
voters as possible.

Thanks for everything you do for our Justice Democrats
slate, Peter.

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=21588%2E1203867%2Em9yO-T ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=21588%2E1203867%2Em9yO-T ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220120-21588-footer&t=1026&refcode2=21588_1203867_m9yO-T&akid=21588%2E1203867%2Em9yO-T

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=21588%2E1203867%2Em9yO-T

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Fellow Conservative,

**Do you support the inherent right to life?**

I know I do.

Radicals, like my Democratic opponent, have voted in lockstep with Bernie Sanders and Chuck Schumer to further their pro-abortion agenda. **That includes heinous acts like late-term abortions, which no one in their right mind could defend.**

body:
Falling short isn’t an option.
#

The Senate majority is on the line, the fate of America hangs in the balance, and reports say my radical opponent could report raising over $10 MILLION last quarter. I'll do whatever necessary to make sure that Conservatives take back the Senate this election. "FACT: My race will determine control of the Senate, and the fate of Trump’s legacy. I’m humbly and earnestly asking, will you give $18 to retake the Senate?" | | | "HELP TAKE BACK THE SENATE>>" My opponent has outraised me almost ALL OF 2021. If we don't do something and start this year off strong, Conservatives are going to be in grave danger to start off the new year. "I’m pleading for your help! I need 24 more Patriots to take a stand. Please, don’t let me down:" | | | "<< DONATE $15>>" | | | "<< DONATE $30>>" | | | "<< DONATE $45>>" | | | "<< DONATE $75>>" | | | "<< DONATE $150>>" | | | "<< DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT>>" I'll talk to you soon with some updated numbers, Marco Rubio | | * | | "MarcoRubioFooter" | A personal note from Marco Rubio : Peter, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race? Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress. So here's the deal: "Footer Gif" I really do need your help, Peter. People think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need folks who can give $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 today. You know I've reached out a lot, so don't complain if we lose. I'm committed to winning. Are you? | | "I'M COMMITTED TO WINNING" | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. Box 661537 Miami, FL 33266 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

I’m honored to be leading the pack in this most crucial of races and that so many people are resonating with my campaign. _Do you know the reason I’m leading in this fight?_
* **I’m actually from Pennsylvania, lived here my whole life** , not a bored celebrity from NJ or a lost opportunistic Californian.
* I’ve spent countless days and miles traveling to every Main Street, every village, and every town, of our great commonwealth and talking with voters, which means **I know the issues that Pennsylvanians care about**.
* **I have an actual plan to ‘Put Pennsylvania First Again** ’ not just a list of Fox News talking points.

That’s why I think I’m the right guy for the job. I'm from here, I care about PA and I know what it’s going to take to fix it, but I also have no desire to stay in Washington longer than it takes to get the job done, **that’s why I’ve signed the U.S. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: I Just Had Covid
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_had_covid&n=1)
---
Peter \-- My number was up last week. I finally got COVID. You can probably imagine how many of the COVID Cultists and their friends in the Political Class would have loved to see it take me out. After all, I very publicly don't follow any of their advice. **They wish ill will on me and they wish it on YOU as well. Our defiance is not okay.** In reality, vaccination status makes no difference in getting or passing on the disease. Even some in the corporate media are [starting to admit that](https://www.action4liberty.com/largest_search_engine_spreading_propaganda_against_newest_data?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_had_covid&n=2). When mask wearing, fully vaccinated and boosted politicians like Tim Walz, Keith Ellison and Steve Simon test positive - the talking points begin to crumble. So why are we still playing this game of mask and vaccine mandates? _Neither one of them STOP you from getting COVID. So it's not about safety._
## It's all about CONTROL!
Peter, it's always been about control this whole time. And that's what we have been fighting against for the last 22 months! We knew it was critically important to End Walz' Emergency Powers. Which is why our team **knocked on 40,000 doors** , made **over 55,000 phone calls** and ran **digital ads that reached hundreds of thousands** of Minnesotans. That effort ended up stripping Walz of his powers last June. But Senate Republicans failed to pass the Never Again Bill, so the threat is not gone. The Political Class is not done coming after you and me. They will continue forcing mandates on us, while also destroying our cities by wrecking our economy and allowing crime to skyrocket. **That's why we have no choice but to continue this FIGHT against the corrupt Political Class. And to do that I need your help to fund our expansive field operations.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_had_covid&n=3 "HELP US FIGHT THEM") [HELP US FIGHT THEM](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_had_covid&n=3)
---
We had to spend a substantial amount of our resources in 2021 fighting against these cronies. So it's leaving us in a more vulnerable position in 2022.
**And as you well know, this election year is not the time to be left without a real fighter on your side.**
Our enemies in the political class are well funded and have the institutions and corporate media in their pocket. We're up against tremendous odds.
I'm afraid if we don't continue raising money to fight back against them, we're doomed to live under mask and vaccine mandates for the foreseeable future.
**BREAKING: MINNEAPOLIS VACCINE MANDATE GOES IN EFFECT**
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_had_covid&n=4)
You know by now that we don't mess around. Our team works around the clocks to protect your liberty. Our field operations team is making thousands of phone calls a day across Minnesota to win this battle.
I need [**need YOUR help**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_had_covid&n=5). We must replenish our war chest to fight this battle.
**Action 4 Liberty will**
**\- Knock tens of thousands of doors**
**\- Make one hundred thousand phone calls**
**\- Advertise digitally to over one million Minnesotans**
Don't let the Political Class win. We can't afford to allow our children to grow up in a state that forces compliance.
**[Support Action 4 Liberty's field operations by donating $100, $50 or even $25 IMMEDIATELY! If you can afford to help more, please consider a donation of $500 or higher.](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_had_covid&n=6)**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_had_covid&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_just_had_covid&n=8).

They wish ill will on me and they wish it on YOU as well. Our defiance is not okay. In reality, vaccination status makes no difference in getting or passing on the disease. Even some in the corporate media are . When mask wearing, fully vaccinated and boosted politicians like Tim Walz, Keith Ellison and Steve Simon test positive - the talking points begin to crumble. So why are we still playing this game of mask and vaccine mandates? Neither one of them STOP you from getting COVID. So it's not about safety. It's all about CONTROL! Peter, it's always been about control this whole time. And that's what we have been fighting against for the last 22 months! We knew it was critically important to End Walz' Emergency Powers. Which is why our team knocked on 40,000 doors , made over 55,000 phone calls and ran digital ads that reached hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans. That effort ended up stripping Walz of his powers last June. But Senate Republicans failed to pass the Never Again Bill, so the threat is not gone. The Political Class is not done coming after you and me. They will continue forcing mandates on us, while also destroying our cities by wrecking our economy and allowing crime to skyrocket. That's why we have no choice but to continue this FIGHT against the corrupt Political Class. And to do that I need your help to fund our expansive field operations. | "HELP US FIGHT THEM" We had to spend a substantial amount of our resources in 2021 fighting against these cronies. So it's leaving us in a more vulnerable position in 2022. And as you well know, this election year is not the time to be left without a real fighter on your side. Our enemies in the political class are well funded and have the institutions and corporate media in their pocket. We're up against tremendous odds. I'm afraid if we don't continue raising money to fight back against them, we're doomed to live under mask and vaccine mandates for the foreseeable future. BREAKING: MINNEAPOLIS VACCINE MANDATE GOES IN EFFECT You know by now that we don't mess around. Our team works around the clocks to protect your liberty. Our field operations team is making thousands of phone calls a day across Minnesota to win this battle. I need . We must replenish our war chest to fight this battle. Action 4 Liberty will \- Knock tens of thousands of doors \- Make one hundred thousand phone calls \- Advertise digitally to over one million Minnesotans Don't let the Political Class win. We can't afford to allow our children to grow up in a state that forces compliance. ** Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · United States

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: It’s shameful, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

It’s shameful,
Peter.

Last night, Democratic Senators Kyrsten Sinema, Joe Manchin, and their GOP
colleagues including Rand Paul voted no on abolishing the filibuster and
then blocked the passage of the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis
Voting Rights Advancement Act.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220120-2?refcode=em20220120-1473&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1473_346206_qo4FIB&akid=1473%2E346206%2Eqo4FIB ][IMG]Rand Paul and his colleagues know what they’re doing. They know
that the only way they’re going to keep seats in states like Kentucky is
by cheating, lying, and suppressing as many of our voices as they can.

Let’s show Rand that his plan isn’t going to work this time around. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220120-2?refcode=em20220120-1473&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1473_346206_qo4FIB&akid=1473%2E346206%2Eqo4FIB ]It
costs $0.05 for us to reach a voter in Kentucky. Will you chip
in $5 right now to support our voter outreach efforts and
show Rand Paul that this movement is mobilizing all to turnout a record
number of voters this year?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220120-2?refcode=em20220120-1473&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1473_346206_qo4FIB&akid=1473%2E346206%2Eqo4FIB ]Contribute $5

The struggles that working families face in Kentucky are immense. We
deserve bold, meaningful solutions that match the scale of challenges we
currently face. We deserve a Kentucky New Deal.

But politicians like Manchin, Sinema, and Rand Paul have made it clear
that they couldn't care less about our needs: they will continue using the
filibuster to block voting protections, the Women’s Health Protection Act,
the Build Back Better Act, climate action, and so much more.

With this next election, we have the power to come together and finally
elect someone who will fight for us. That’s why Charles is in this race —
because he knows exactly what it feels like to be abandoned by our
politicians.

Charles knows what it’s like to choose between paying rent and refilling a
prescription.

Charles knows what it’s like to be homeless – to watch his mother skip
meals so that he had enough food on his plate.

And Charles knows that he’s not the only one who’s gone through these
challenges. Kentuckians have been suffering for decades. Not because we’re
lazy, not because we don’t want a better life for our children. Because
our politicians aren’t willing to fight for us.

Not anymore.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220120-2?refcode=em20220120-1473&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1473_346206_qo4FIB&akid=1473%2E346206%2Eqo4FIB ]Your contribution today will help build our powerful, grassroots
movement to take back Kentucky’s seat at the table and elect a senator who
works for all of us — can we count on you to chip in $5
today?

Let’s do this,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220120-1473-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1473_346206_qo4FIB&akid=1473%2E346206%2Eqo4FIB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1473%2E346206%2Eqo4FIB

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Mullin?=
subject: A personal invitation and some big news…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Kevin Mullin here. I wanted to share with you some exciting updates from the campaign trail. | | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Kevin Mullin here. I wanted to share with you some exciting updates from the campaign trail.
**Please join us this Saturday, January 22, for our field campaign kick off!** Swing by and talk with me directly about why I’m running for Congress and hear from special guest speakers, including Congresswoman Anna Eshoo, Assemblymember Marc Berman, and former State Senator Jerry Hill. **To attend, meet us at Courthouse Square in Redwood City on the steps of the San Mateo County History Museum (2200 Broadway, Redwood City, CA 94063) at noon!**

In case you missed the announcement, I was honored and humbled this week to receive the sole endorsement from Teamsters Joint Council 7. Being the proven progressive candidate, Teamster brothers and sisters know my track record inside out and that I have always stood strong for the rights of organized labor, and always will. That’s why they endorsed my campaign.

**Peter****, as we continue to receive support from over one hundred current and former elected officials from around the district and various organizations, we are building momentum to fight for a better future for all.[Do I have your support as well?](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=452a6651cc&e=292fde286a)**

All of the momentum our campaign has built wouldn’t be possible without you. Let’s keep it going! Onward to victory,
— _Kevin_

subject: Poll: How do you rate Biden's first year?

body:

Will you take our [TAKE THE POLL >> HOW DO YOU RATE JOE BIDEN'S FIRST YEAR?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuhjyjl-yuhdluddtl-y/) America is tired of Joe Biden's failures.We are tired of going to the grocery store and seeing _empty shelves and a higher bill. _We are tired of the same tank of gas growing more and more expensive, leaving us with _less pay to take home at the end of the day. _We are tired of feeling unsafe in our own communities as crime rises and _support for law enforcement from the White House falls. _We are tired of seeing the wrong priorities from our government, as they crack down on Americans with unconstitutional mandates, _but leave the border wide open._**With so many problems facing our country today, Congressman Fitzgerald wants us to find out EXACTLY what you think of Joe Biden's first year.** [YOU HAVE BEEN CHOSEN TO TAKE OUR EXCLUSIVE POLL >>>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuhjyjl-yuhdluddtl-j/) [_**TAKE THE POLL - WHAT DO YOU THINK OF BIDEN 'S FIRST YEAR IN OFFICE?**_](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuhjyjl-yuhdluddtl-t/)_**Congressman Fitzgerald asked us for a quick turnaround, so take the poll now before it closes to make sure your opinion is reflected in the results!**_Thank you, Team Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuhjyjl-yuhdluddtl-h/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuhjyjl-yuhdluddtl-k/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuhjyjl-yuhdluddtl-u/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

subject: RE: Cresco's Post Office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
We can’t lose this American institution. | | |
---
Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTgyXNidoo81HZ58TboBskHtPysgV7t-ptpOxwu5B1pg4ds8AyU-Bm7WvapgZoLEekTOdWbf0nwv7CxoxiRkMB6UlAAMdj3NNq_8aFqJHRFLlBbF06eO9d5Kv23e_y_vEEr1NpNEaTlmajCxT0S56NDDsx9bUARD4dJvmqyZuYWGU89YV8dHXhcYAoaW6gmsyihQ/3iw/j7-r0WDsSjaNsN1XOk_UBQ/h0/eeHNMIvpenHGkJiWOjwZzDfvwlYwiCT2s9fKf1qVzCA) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.

clean_body: We can’t lose this American institution. | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. FIRST: Trump's Postmaster General Louis DeJoy vowed to SABOTAGE the Post Office. THEN: Mitch McConnell threatened to veto USPS funding to crush Vote-by-Mail! | | | If we don’t step up right now, the Postal Service will go under -- This can’t happen. We’ve fought too hard to let McConnell and his pawns win another election. If we’ve learned anything while standing up to McConnell and his cronies, it’s that there’s power in numbers. If everyone reading this chips in just $5, we can save the Post Office and Vote-by-Mail!! | | | | | | Thanks for standing with Postal Workers! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: Matt Jacobs
subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: Endorsed by Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Together, we can take back the House of Representatives. Friend, Last year, I made the decision, with my wife Julie, to run for U.S. Congress because the people of California’s 26th District deserve better. We deserve safe neighborhoods, an economy that rewards hard work, and schools that teach kids _how_ to think, not _what_ to think. We deserve to be represented by a homegrown public servant – not an absentee career politician. The grassroots campaign you helped us build is now squarely in the national spotlight. Because of your support, today I can proudly announce that House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy is endorsing our campaign! “ _Matt Jacobs is a proven public servant. As a federal prosecutor, Matt investigated and prosecuted America's enemies. He won high-profile cases against terrorists and opioid traffickers, upholding the rule of law and protecting our neighborhoods and communities. We need proven public servants in Congress, and that's why I'm proud to join many Members of our Congressional Delegation and endorse Matt Jacobs for Congress. Matt will help us Take Back the House, Fire Pelosi and end the Democrats' One Party Rule of our federal government._” For the most senior Republican in Congress (and my fellow Californian) to back our campaign is the strongest possible signal that we’re on the path to victory. But there’s still a lot of hard work to do. And I need your help right now. [**Can you donate $25 today to keep up the momentum?**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=41c135b81bc8450c88de9b93b118a53b&_e=KE6am8PkQrf1E1xEKDLv6kZd2HDID47QFwuPDolhitqiFP9JksSijq4Z5m-N-BYEz3Xl2TFON_IJCROUVCUR8vP-RJi8iXvQAheuXr8eLh1oFRTgNeCT9QzWazUKaA_Pv0Sv_QM1FN_BmYrUQ-MUgrA3Z_epUN9I7VfIEI-DXn_U8qrbtbitFGXH4qM_cnoSuIYFPkUdO1Y4riGYg53P7iEnoNjyzhe3ruQhxM-eXZb1OOJwaGkTZR0bVYFS3FWiVy7fuEO7a8cm-jL_eULdX6UgkpMXIoFufDVo-Kdya7_wZSY_PdlCFqv1BSc8SjjA1Zx3DuyOdQgC8c7_9Zcpr4zUSpZxA0FOmLTCxGCcpkAzQvcFIS1XJEtBz5YOF5NKLDau1tsMTb5AAfgHHXKBiOA7h01-FH9hvI127nMRgT9ku7vMwU3teaOjZyyrUbkGDc9f-qi1clqAGKc4pcSacfLawhWELpwzmQ91Cjv4xxEXz_mRTxGsc4TnF0tHJZme) [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=41c135b81bc8450c88de9b93b118a53b&_e=KE6am8PkQrf1E1xEKDLv6kZd2HDID47QFwuPDolhitqiFP9JksSijq4Z5m-N-BYEz3Xl2TFON_IJCROUVCUR8vP-RJi8iXvQAheuXr8eLh1oFRTgNeCT9QzWazUKaA_Pv0Sv_QM1FN_BmYrUQ-MUgrA3Z_epUN9I7VfIEI-DXn_U8qrbtbitFGXH4qM_cnoSuIYFPkUdO1Y4riGYg53P7iEnoNjyzhe3ruQhxM-eXZb1OOJwaGkTZR0bVYFS3FWiVy7fuEO7a8cm-jL_eULdX6UgkpMXIoFufDVo-Kdya7-vyt2bpPUhxS2I6Y62kLZQkUoCMPUfx83CXbuYaKjT2LgA61R2fEDuYH6yNO_jOazmIlV8YiI2HoHubZyCDpn2T2VAwjPLqZ3zFbO_UP9AzD64g2rHqc_3zqDaXoz8Z_OjPtvTdfGWGim6NYslfhAqBY2l9xlEQ2iKHlhJW4NWcstZ_DThBFEkwVKtXKzzJoA2Vr0NohKN8t0frbw-bG-z) Together, we can WIN this seat and take back the House of Representatives. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff?=
subject: More GREAT News!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Don't Miss This Update From Jeff Warner For Congress | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-January Vol. 2, #2**
---
| | |
##
21 January 22

The campaign, the movement, continues to grow...Thank You for your support to restore America. Jeff Warner is humbled by and deeply appreciates your support.

This past week, it was announced that inflation hit a 40 year high, unemployment numbers rose again and Russia appears to be preparing to invade Ukraine. Even with all the vaccines & therapeutics, more people have died under Joe Biden’s administration than the previous administration during Covid. It’s hard to believe that 1 year ago, on the day of Joe Biden’s inauguration, inflation was under 2%, gas prices were under $2 per gallon, store shelves were full, our nation was making progress with Covid and America was respected around the world. Policies do matter.

This is in part why our campaign is so important. We need Jeff Warner to help restore common sense policies and ease the burden that our District and our nation is experiencing.

Jeff Warner has had the honor and privilege to speak to several groups over the past few weeks. People are unsettled and many who have never been involved in the campaign process are getting involved. In fact, nearly all of the Jeff Warner For Congress volunteers are first time campaign volunteers. They are appropriately channeling their frustrations and concerns into action. Please help enlist other like-minded people.

The campaign is working hard to unveil an online system to impact and mobilize voters. No matter where people live, they have the opportunity to make a difference in the campaign and we’re working to provide the tools and training to make each volunteer successful at whatever level they can serve.

**[Volunteer Here](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=d421f60559&e=12a37459a2)**

The campaign has been blessed with nearly $19,000 in a short time. Thank You So Much for your generosity. You have made the campaign the third highest fundraising campaign in the last 35 years in District 4. Something unique appears to be happening. While this is an amazing start, we still have a long way to go. We need your help to invite others to be a part of this incredible adventure.

We're asking everyone who shares our concern for our country to give something. There is no such thing as a small gift. If everyone who is troubled by the direction of our country and wants to restore it gave something, anything... $5, $10, $20 per month, the campaign would be in GREAT financial shape.

By law, the maximum a person can give is $5800 ($11,600 per couple).
We're praying for people who can help jumpstart the campaign with this level of support.

**[Donate Here](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=c9ee519498&e=12a37459a2)**

We’ll be announcing the campaign launch date soon and will begin holding fundraising events. These events will be a lot of fun and intended to inspire and motivate us all to a great November victory.

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "_We The People_ " can make a _real_ difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Please share this newsletter with others.

Standing with you,

Jeff
---

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People " can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope. Please share this newsletter with others. Standing with you, Jeff | "Jeff Warner For Congress Website" | | | | © 2021 Jeff Warner For Congress, All rights reserved. We knew this was coming.

**_Pelosi's Congress has subpoenaed me._**

There's nothing I can even say to Congress! As President Trump's personal attorney, I have attorney-client privilege and executive privilege.

subject: THIS liberal governor is on thin ice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
All eyes are on Nevada this year, and Republicans can’t afford to come up short [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8463%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9GF1PceL7ddN7JZx9BpE8w&sysid=1)

|
---
Friend,

**Governor Sisolak is on thin ice.**

Crime is up, jobs are down, our schools are failing, and our 2nd Amendment freedoms are at risk more than ever before under his watch.

Sisolak’s radical agenda is coming back to haunt him -- he’s trailing behind Dean in the polls, and he was just declared one of the **MOST vulnerable governors** up for reelection this year.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12059%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vr2dywVOyiybp74DUZq6ZQ&sysid=1)

[**FIRE SISOLAK: DONATE $20.22**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12050%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mqPNCPysF1YvrZekw5VblA&sysid=1)
It’s time to fully open our economy, protect the Constitution, support our police, and put education back in the hands of parents.

_None of that will happen if Sisolak wins in November._

We have ONE chance to get Nevada back on track, and we can’t afford to waste this opportunity.

**[We need a strong conservative Governor to bring the RED WAVE to Nevada, and Dean is the only Republican in this race who can get the job done.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12051%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s4E3TgsSy5x8gqDg85R%2ftg&sysid=1)**

Thanks,
Team Heller

name: Great America Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6763%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=T%2fQ2uGEzClZJD1W8Xg%2bvsQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69797%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VPVKV6oheaSwwG1gmLp7iw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69798%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RAYEICq59c4JXKmoCD5ytw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69798%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RAYEICq59c4JXKmoCD5ytw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6763%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=T%2fQ2uGEzClZJD1W8Xg%2bvsQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6763%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=T%2fQ2uGEzClZJD1W8Xg%2bvsQ&sysid=1)

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

House Conservatives

* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3c1ei-1u79v-4qqlpo6/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

I have been subpoenaed by Pelosi's Congress.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59311782:Jdy1_dECN:m:1:3253819041:616C09BBC0C6EF391B06180F2B1F675C:r)
---
Peter,
---
We knew this was coming.
---
**_Pelosi's Congress has subpoenaed me._**
---
There's nothing I can even say to Congress! As President Trump's personal attorney, I have attorney-client privilege and executive privilege.
---
And Congress damn well knows that! This is nothing but a political witch hunt to try and take down each and every one of President Trump's loyal allies.
---
After the FBI raid on my apartment last year failed, the Deep State has unleashed its latest weapon to take me down. You're my only hope of fighting back.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59311782:Jdy1_dECN:m:1:3253819041:616C09BBC0C6EF391B06180F2B1F675C:r)

name: Council for Citizens Against Government Waste
subject: Join the fight – STOP IRS overreach!
body:
The IRS is at it again. After countless revelations about the IRS’s politicization, leaks of confidential taxpayer information
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2hglcd6kafqi5fgpiqdcqmscuunr79cv14ufm9g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6ppgs9pb4ob46up7ccb5c2qr4pdheeo7dclmc2qm3ddgehij1odksthredbkm3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm1cr56up70pjgeaqr8ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm4pr3c3j6eo724no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zud75iake0fk7k5lb9l64udom6i3d8hj2gtfeqc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1pj7c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, _The IRS is at it again._ After countless revelations about the IRS’s politicization, leaks of confidential taxpayer information, and abuse of authority, Joe Biden’s tyrannical tax collectors are again planning to infringe on our Constitutional rights... **_... by threatening to look at every detail of your personal bank account!_** The President has proposed to increase the IRS budget from $12 billion to $80 billion to massively ramp up enforcement and hire more than 80,000 deputized federal agents to comb through your bank records. It’s all part of Joe Biden’s radical transformation of the federal government – [**and we must stop it.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z73atk6m0se2odvjpqcrsfkqhtsf7ha12q2mg3f8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1pj7c3h2bs) [**Please take a moment right now to sign the Council for Citizens Against Government Waste’s petition to DEFEAT Joe Biden’s proposed IRS policing and monitoring scheme today****!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpbf9bqpvqif3foujqraib0aekuhs9dude04c138_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1pj7c3h2bs)
---
[**Sign the Petition**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zru51on263lbjj7o05er2vlpvh362rqpdei33qj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1pj7c3h2bs)
---
Among the many wasteful and overreaching proposals Joe Biden has proposed, this one may be the worst. It would require banks to provide records to the IRS for any bank account that has more than $600 in transactions in one year. That means every single person in America would be under the heavy hand of the IRS. Their agents would then use these records to chase down everyday Americans like you and me for more taxes based on our transactions. Should the federal government have the authority to spy on your bank accounts and know every time you make a deposit or spend money? Absolutely not! But that's EXACTLY what President Biden wants to give the IRS the authority to do. [**Thankfully, we still have time to stop this radical intrusion by our federal government, but we'll need to work together to do it. Please take a moment right now to sign the petition and urge all of your concerned friends and family members to do the same!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4hdct9psskr250e82272rhhof0o4p019kg1ceoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1pj7c3h2bs) The Biden radical Far-Left agenda puts FDR’s New Deal to shame, and it would set us on an irreversible path to socialism. Your relationship with the federal government will change forever at the stroke of Joe Biden’s pen. We already know that Joe Biden is fighting to expand the size, scope, and power and of the federal government and limit our personal rights and freedoms, and now he wants to expand that same tyrannical power to the IRS. Joe Biden is centralizing executive authority at an alarming rate – millions of hard-working, law-abiding Americans are coming under scrutiny for questioning the progressives’ radical agenda, and even more will be targeted under this expansive IRS power grab. This financial “stop-and-frisk” is a clear violation of the Fourth Amendment and presumes every American’s guilt until you can prove your innocence. That’s not how our legal system is supposed to work! As someone who has been fighting government waste and creeping socialism for more than 30 years, I have never seen such a rapid and alarming shift toward bigger, all-powerful federal government. Joe Biden has shown his willingness to enforce his radical agenda by empowering federal agents to target innocent Americans. What more will he do to fully-implement his agenda? [**You and I can’t afford to wait around and find out.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsf8gmf62gp7iom24au2pe31o6raccu00o99k7r8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1pj7c3h2bs) [**Help us send a message to Joe Biden loud and clear – we will NOT be targeted over innocent financial transactions. Please sign CCAGW’s petition to DEFEAT Joe Biden’s proposed IRS spying scheme today!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbolahj26njr2ikcvv41pqo163eiuoa48nnf4br8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1pj7c3h2bs)
---
[**Sign the Petition**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi4t09s9a7m1hvnl4qd2ho3v4vfc4ktt5pov29po_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1pj7c3h2bs)
---
I’m counting on you to join us in this battle to protect freedom, liberty, and privacy of every American. Sincerely,
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4nf9ovtj1qhdnrqt614u3kd2kl7evbagifepopg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1pj7c3h2bs)
---
Thomas A. Schatz, President
Council for Citizens Against Government Waste P.S. Joe Biden’s radical agenda includes further weaponizing the IRS against hardworking, law-abiding American citizens. His latest move would deputize tens of thousands of new federal agents and give them unprecedented oversight into your private financial life. [**Join thousands of Americans by adding your name to our petition to DEFEAT Joe Biden’s proposed IRS spying scheme today****!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zinhh7jktcfu4s2m4lhcfial85nu4p9k44qc9aso_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1pj7c3h2bs)
---
The Council for Citizens Against Government Waste (CCAGW) is the lobbying arm of Citizens Against Government Waste (CAGW), the nation's largest taxpayer watchdog organization with more than 1 million members and supporters nationwide. CCAGW is a 501(c)(4) nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that lobbies for legislation to eliminate waste, fraud, abuse, and mismanagement in government. Contributions to CCAGW are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes. For more information about CCAGW, visit [www.ccagw.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9vcdui9k33bik1li0d4gq4au9p7kgig25rfapjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1pj7c3h2bs). [Make a contribution today to support CCAGW's efforts to rein in wasteful deficit spending.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd0efg5e35bhn8o860uiaqfprtfors946607r1qg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1pj7c3h2bs)
---
| | **1100 CONNECTICUT AVE., N.W. #650
WASHINGTON, D.C. 20036**

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: Sign the National Petition to Defund Planned Parenthood
body:
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I help
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9i5d9nvfu0faqluviqajv5ougljegpkl4ev3qio_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthmeor2chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf7d5l61qe2pb3eeom2ppncgpbcs3jepge7dhi68r6fddlm1jbaptnmhob9p1hcsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8p6ccbgmmqjfcjicoob1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgja4j34l1jq5gef6g006ioh4sqaevldktdqvojo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthmeor2chh2bs) Fellow Pro-Life American, Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I helped uncover their cash-for-baby-body parts scheme five years ago. But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act. **Far from it! ** While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — **_was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing._** [**We MUST demand that Congress act NOW to Defund Planned Parenthood and end the senseless murder of unborn children and STOP using these innocent lives in the name of "research." Please sign the petition right away!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8a1dp54r075ubr500mo167i317ckjur0gu8rhg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthmeor2chh2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhfsm949r2u7b6ks93r9i27hnu2i8mm1c8mpok4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthmeor2chh2bs) Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. On top of it all, they’re working to **DESTROY** threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time. My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and **SHUTTING THEM DOWN** , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters. [**To help save innocent lives and ensure our tax dollars don’t fund Planned Parenthood in ANY manner, I need you to sign this national petition today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3lk3k41jcafjj2bs97rqjk01r0ofb1h4dlg16ao_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthmeor2chh2bs) Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics **decreased by 35 percent**. While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently _shifted strategy._ [**_Medication abortion facilities —_** **_which are dispensaries for abortion-inducing drugs — have become the reliable “cash cow” for the abortion industry. And they’re popping up at an alarming rate!_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcujqnl6kus1c7kbalpugbif3toe1blno4a77qk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthmeor2chh2bs) That is why we must **INCREASE** our efforts this year to ensure that we can keep up with the pace of murder-pill mills AND pressure Congress to take every taxpayer dollar away from Planned Parenthood. [**Please help today by signing this national petition. It will only take a moment of your time and the impact will be huge.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3kj5dbvq2vsoj35ub1pqgecfchulghb9kuc8gdo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthmeor2chh2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1dbe92gpsgqvl8gve7h9rh45tqp8sb1e0977kh0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthmeor2chh2bs) Thank you for your support, God bless you, Troy Newman President P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278
---

But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act. Far from it! While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing. Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. On top of it all, they’re working to DESTROY threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time. My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and SHUTTING THEM DOWN , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters. Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics decreased by 35 percent. While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently shifted strategy. name: ICYMI News
subject: Jefferson has a place here
body:
Earlier this year, President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations told her fellow ambassadors from around the world that
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7d6hdrfv5jqi76qvc01fr3covgsmopjmgm37gt0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1oj3cjh2bs)
---
| |
Fellow American, Earlier this year, President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations told her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” I couldn’t believe what she said when I read it.

As my boss and mentor, Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn, has mentioned, a person has to be totally blinded by anti-American ideology to believe that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy!

Still, that’s what our children are learning in far too many K-12 schools, colleges, and universities—not to mention Hollywood and our popular culture.

Perhaps it’s fitting then that the January image of our calendar is our statue of Thomas Jefferson (a very different sort of ambassador!) dusted with frost.

After all, he’s the one who penned the words of the Declaration of Independence, and now there’s a cold wind blowing in our nation.

Education is where this attack on America began—and it is the battlefield where we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and limited constitutional government.

That’s why I hope you’ll support our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions today with a tax-deductible gift.

We’ll send you our FREE 2022 Hillsdale College calendar as a “thank-you” for your gift of any amount.

Your tax-deductible gift will support expanding educational outreach efforts that combat destructive anti-American ideologies like critical race theory and socialism.

And your giving will help the College remain proudly INDEPENDENT of all federal and state funding—even of indirect aid such as student grants and loans.

When you look at your calendar to check appointments, birthdays, or family events, I hope you’ll remember how your faithful giving is supporting the cause of liberty through education.

You can easily and securely give a gift and reserve your calendar using this link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/reserve-2022-calendar](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3pmaetc93jo15gpr659jqsk402706utdjorjdc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1oj3cjh2bs)**

However, I checked with my staff, and there are only a limited number of calendars remaining. So, I hope you will get your calendar before they’re gone.

The Jefferson statue is one of my favorites on the Hillsdale College campus. It sits right next to Central Hall by the cornerstone dated July 4, 1853.

At the base of the statue is a quote from Abraham Lincoln. It says:

_“All honor to Jefferson—to the man who, in the concrete pressure of a struggle for national independence by a single people, had the coolness, forecast, and capacity to introduce into a merely revolutionary document, an abstract truth, applicable to all men and all times, and so to embalm it there, that today, and in all coming days, it shall be a rebuke and a stumbling-block to the very harbingers of re-appearing tyranny and oppression.”_

Even though the news gets me down sometimes, the “abstract truth” Jefferson wrote in the Declaration fills me with hope. I hope Lincoln’s words do the same for you.

To close, thank you again for reaching and teaching millions of Americans about our nation’s history and heritage of liberty.

With thanks,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
---

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhpqo0ovnutsr6hpo5rlajq4d5k4f1sijig48u0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1or4shh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6s5e87f8i7qeoqv82unv9j20rb3rtg232jpvb7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1or4shh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4honhfm23l21p7t05qsora14j3t73f3vj9ta2rg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1or4shh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

The direction of America under Democrat control is worse than I could have ever imagined. This is all because of the radical Dems in Congress and Joe Biden. This campaign isn't about winning another term - it's about saving AMERICA.

The future of our children and grandchildren are at stake. **[Will you join me in this battle to save America, Friend?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfgpnukaul70dll1lsjgrb3r2p4vr6l69ss1u9q8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cthm1or4sph2bs)**

Ron Johnson

body:

---
## Promise Made, Promise Kept
---
On September 9, 2021, former Vice President Joe Biden declared **WAR** on the Freedoms we have as Americans. He issued a "mandate" requiring companies with more than 100 employees to force the COVID19 Vaccine upon their employees. The night Biden issued the "mandate" was the same night I held a [**#LahmeyerForSenate**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.1998.1.7a4abde2e43a089fcd7b827d98a63e88) rally in Tulsa, OK with **Senator Wendy Rogers**. At that rally I promised to fight back, and I did. Click [here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.1999.1.910aa0da4137343e602c8dee10e3e8dc) to watch that [promise](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2000.1.0520abbc595a76bce8924c1d668ed309). The following day, I launched the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition that over 100,000 people have signed at [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2001.1.0e645cf7b1c70dc7242f3fc2d42396db) I also included a [COVID19 Religious Exemption Form](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2002.1.0704ea4472f595236baf071b2a0c6f29) that is totally FREE to download. Since September 10, 2021, I have signed OVER 53,000 of those exemptions as the Pastor of [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2003.1.f80ff335adf926609dedf43ace6cc58c) in Tulsa, OK and thousands of people have been able to keep their jobs without getting the jab. Promise Made, Promise Kept! When I arrive in DC here are **three promises** of what I will do on day one:
**1.** Sponsor legislation to cut off all federal funding to any school district in America that teaches **Critical Race Theory**.
**2.** Sponsor legislation to **ban Chinese Nationalists from purchasing American farmland**. Currently, Chinese Nationalists have purchased over 300,000 acres of Oklahoma farmland. We cannot allow this.
**3.** Continue to go after the greatest mass-murderer of our generation, **Anthony Fauci**. I believe that Fauci needs to be FIRED, ARRESTED and CONVICTED of crimes against humanity. I need your help in this fight: Share the [NO VACCINE MANDATE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2004.1.0007077e0574f124f742e907523e50a9) petition link w/5 people right now and inform them they can download the COVID19 Religious Form to fight back!
Text them this link to sign the petition and download the exemption: [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2005.1.d39dae42b9423b7390381c73e70b0a8c) Also, if you live in Oklahoma and would be willing to host me at your home or business with 10+ friends for a meet & greet in 2022 that would be incredibly helpful. If you live outside of Oklahoma but would be willing to host a fundraiser that would be great. To arrange a meet & greet or a fundraiser please email caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2006.1.f3203f92bd53b95e9db5000407d82c4e), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2007.1.3e3c841aecfdf27c232b4141f5eeae6b), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2008.1.6c6a5fac572e98df2d87ab8761628f5f), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2009.1.bcac4062fb031e6ecabfa9b6aba09833), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2010.1.ab77ccb552f4e7bbb51012ca4cb82131)).
---

---
The legendary, **Roger Stone** , is joining me in **Tulsa** and **Edmond**!
Mr. Stone now leads the **Lahmeyer For Senate** campaign to oust _RINO_ Senator James Lankford.
I would like to invite you to a **private Meet & Greet** to hear what I call, "_Inside Baseball_." Space is very limited to each event.
**[Tulsa](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2013.1.c959711c07a91d80870a5a67c3eaa02f)** : Monday, January 31st at 6pm
Reserve Your Spot [Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2014.1.1ffd8fce5a5a30ea9b199569a31ca27d): [www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/639001](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2015.1.99d95224e1a64cddadb4f4000843ba53)
Email Caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com for more information
**[Edmond](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2016.1.2d738667e4c2fc4cecb4cec856bc887c)** : Tuesday, February 1st at 6pm
Reserve Your Spot [Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2017.1.e5d8852d8f72b8a06d59769d616e0f3c)
[www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/639007](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2018.1.d13d73320858ef6f5ad5869b267c2361)
Email Subrina@jacksonlahmeyer.com for more information
## Updates:
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2019.1.4d58bd8a18b2b1ef94efaa8afeff190b)
---
I spent this last weekend in _Phoenix, Arizona_ at the **Re-Awaken America Tour** event and I had some incredible conversations with many great heroes such as **Eric Trump** , **General Michael Flynn** and **Mike Lindell**.
_Mike Lindell_ wanted me to specifically let you know how grateful he is for the support great Americans like you have shown him and [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2020.1.fa9319523fdf6a17fc10085baa769540) over the last year in this fight to #SaveAmerica.
Right now, the Patriot movement is under attack, and we must stand **UNITED**! We have to recognize this is a fight between good and evil.
**Mike Lindell** has just found out that his bank, Minnesota Bank & Trust, has **cancelled the accounts of his business and his charities**.
This is UNBELIEVABLE!
We need to **support Mike in this fight**.
We must use our **3 Ts** to fight back:
1\. **Time** \- Attend events with other like-minded Patriots such as the Re-Awaken Tour (Ohio in February, San Diego in March. Get more info at www.timetofreeamerica.com )
2\. **Talent** \- Use the gifts and abilities that God has given you to contribute to saving of America. _America needs you_!
3\. **Treasure** \- We must stop funding Deep State companies and start funing America First companies. Every dollar we spend is a bullet in this war.
**If we will fight, we will win.**
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2021.1.760941174cb23ab434599dd466d46883), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2022.1.fe694c342957b2828dba24034d843742).
I want to encourage you to visit [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2023.1.93a6a0acdca3e0d9a7717e670caa4968) and look at all of the great America First products available (much more than just great pillows).
We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.
Use the Promo Code **JACKSON** at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2024.1.cd2bb3cca29ff8640d42283811c9f67f)
Kendra and I love all of our [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2025.1.fe4d7cda26691f52b37ab1f4252a3071) products and we TOTALLY support Mike Lindell! I hope you will too...
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2026.1.524bdf5a21a1fe1a76f85097451fd3a8)
---

Canton, OH | Feb 18-19
San Diego, CA | Mar 11-12

Request Tickets at: [www.TimeToFreeAmerica.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3056582.2027.1.e7bc6d977c02168b1b94dfc498f0edc5)

body:
Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points
| | |
---
Friend,

I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. **And right now, as I'm coming up short of my daily goal, I have nowhere else to turn. **
Polling in my race shows the numbers are close (I'm just two points behind Marco Rubio!). That's a statistical tie, but The Cook Political Report also increased my chances of winning. I need to surge _ahead_ , friend – _ _ and the only way to do it is by hitting my midnight fundraising goal. Missing tonight's goal isn't an option.
Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points (_10,033 votes_), so every dollar will make a difference. With the Senate Republican campaign arm pulling in over $28 million last quarter, **missing my goal could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win.**
Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. _Your_ support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio.
So, friend, here I am, writing to you again. I know you hear a lot from me, but it's only because I _trust_ you and _believe_ that I can't do this without you. Please, if you can spare any donation before midnight to close our fundraising gap, it would mean the world to me.
Here's the best link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40901625/326454231/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2208-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDhmODdlNi1jNTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nLrX7EWQaEIHhNq9j-p4BXoTE_LffYSsronxf-EXaIs=)

name: Maria Brewer
subject: Defending Roe in Tennessee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Peter,

January 22, 1973 — the date Roe vs. Wade was decided, nearly 50 years ago tomorrow. But here in Tennessee, it might soon be 1972 all over again, because my right to have an abortion is holding on by a thread. And if people like me don’t have the right to control our own bodies and make our own decisions about our most fundamental life and health choices, then the state is poised to strip basic human rights from anyone. Republicans have been using the abortion fight for years as a wedge issue, a weapon for demonizing woman and Democrats, but they truly began escalating when they passed House Bill 2263 in the dead of night in 2020 without notice to the public. At the time it was the most restrictive abortion ban in the country, prohibiting abortions once a heartbeat is detected and criminalizing the procedure by making it a Class C felony.

But close isn’t good enough for the repressive theocrats in our state legislature. They have three bills still in play right now, two of which would be total abortion bans. Republicans will stop at nothing to ensure the right to an abortion is obliterated for Tennesseans. The right to bodily autonomy, to make a personal decision about our health is ours alone, and we will not let Republicans take that away from us.

Not only does this legislation have devastating consequences once signed into law, but Republican rhetoric also fuels violence against organizations like Planned Parenthood who not only offer abortion services, but provide inexpensive, necessary healthcare to women and underserved groups across the state. Just weeks ago, an arsonist burned down a Planned Parenthood building in Knoxville.

Tennesseans must have the right to choose — and we will fight to defend that right against Republicans in who are working to take it away. We have a hard fight before us, but we will not back down. 50 years from today, I don’t want our children writing emails like this one. Let’s finish this now.

Thanks for fighting with us,

Maria Brewer
she/her
Party Affairs Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
https://www.facebook.com/tndem [https://www.facebook.com/tndem]
https://twitter.com/tndp [https://twitter.com/tndp]
https://www.instagram.com/tndems [https://www.instagram.com/tndems]

CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

Today is Eddie’s birthday, friends!
**All he wants for his 38th year is to bring new leadership to Florida’s 15th District, so we want to raise $3,800 by the end of the weekend. Now, Eddie _insisted_ that we _completely_ ignore his birthday and _not_ make a big deal out of it. So, of course, we are now obligated to make it a Thing.
But in all seriousness, Eddie’s giving it all he has to serve his home district. He’s in this race for all the right reasons: because he cares about you, your families, and the future of our communities. He never complains about what it takes to keep this fight going, but we thought it would be good to rally a little more encouragement, especially ahead of what will be a tough — but winnable — election in November.
So, we're asking those who can to help us surprise Eddie with an influx of campaign contributions for his birthday. **Ideally, we'd like to tell him we raised $3,800 from people who believe in him by midnight on Sunday.[Can you chip in and help us hit this goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40904395/326464171/2068940174?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220121eddiebday_EGweb_op_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTQxMTU1Ni1jYTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OKw9mpida93uulNnDmORW-A9j_1rkz-dk8tljexq4_o=)**
