clean_body: | | = Today is Eddie’s birthday, friends! All he wants for his 38th year is to bring new leadership to Florida’s 15th District, so we want to raise $3,800 by the end of the weekend. = = Now, Eddie insisted that we completely ignore his birthday and not make a big deal out of it. So, of course, we are now obligated to make it a Thing. But in all seriousness, Eddie’s giving it all he has to serve his home district. He’s in this race for all the right reasons: because he cares about you, your families, and the future of our communities. He never complains about what it takes to keep this fight going, but we thought it would be good to rally a little more encouragement, especially ahead of what will be a tough — but winnable — election in November. So, we're asking those who can to help us surprise Eddie with an influx of campaign contributions for his birthday. Ideally, we'd like to tell him we raised $3,800 from people who believe in him by midnight on Sunday.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = Thanks for all you do to support Eddie. He regularly talks about how fortunate he is to have such a strong network of friends and supporters. We're going to keep doing our part to elect him to Congress, and we hope you'll join us! — Team Eddie | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good-paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. Folks,
To start off the year, my team and I asked if you’re still feeling confident about Democrats’ chances of winning in the 2022 midterms – and the results were... mixed.
Some folks are still feeling confident, while others are doubtful that Democrats can pull off wins up and down the ballot.
But, there was one piece of heartening news from this survey – despite doubts about the 2022 midterm elections as a whole, **a majority of you are still _very_ confident in my chances of holding my seat!**
As long as I have all of you in my corner, I know there’s nothing that we can’t achieve. But we need to start ramping up our campaign for 2022 right now.
Early investments are crucial for preparing for anything our opponents throw at us. As a top target of the National Republican Congressional Committee, I’m already getting attacked and national Republicans are prepared to spend millions to unseat me.

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Biden’s Disasterous First Year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Hi Peter, President Biden has shown an inability to lead. After just one year in office, he has reversed much of the progress we made over the past several years.
Hi Peter,Today marks the one-year anniversary of President Biden's inauguration.**So far, we have seen a myriad of failures from the Biden Administration: rising prices, high energy costs, foreign policy disasters, unconstitutional mandates, increasing crime, and an unsecured border. **Enough is enough. We've seen the impacts of the Democrats' one-party rule in Washington. It's time to retire Pelosi and pressure the Biden Administration to work for all Americans. [**With the Democrats controlling Congress and the Presidency, they have the power to push through their radical agenda.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-ztuduz-idtjvlhlh-r/)**There must be a change in Washington. I vow to help bring that change, but I cannot do it alone.**[**If you agree that Democrat leadership has made America weaker and more vulnerable, please donate now so we can work to take back the House and provide a necessary check on the Democrat 's power.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-ztuduz-idtjvlhlh-y/)Thank you,Bryan
**--
Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-ztuduz-idtjvlhlh-j/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-ztuduz-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-ztuduz-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-ztuduz-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-ztuduz-l-k) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

_**–Begin forwarded message–**_

Earlier this week President Biden called on the U.S. Senate to take bold action to protect the integrity of our elections. It is a sad reality that voting rights are under attack in this country.

[Add your name if you believe protecting the right to vote is essetial to democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40908142/326479520/-1819057209?refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220121_1_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjcwMjQ2OS1jZjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7zVuCYmRZxiBH1A0650RYry4TYASGQy0eiAD15sNTG4=&emci=e157c0f6-5f79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1b702469-cf7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2432894)

We felt that urgency this week in Kansas when our Kansas Legislature presented their plans for redistricting. Did you see their blatant attempt at partisan gerrymandering? _They want to divide our cities right down the middle and place them in rural districts, making one district meander hundreds of miles across the state._

[We cannot afford to lose our democracy because of archaic Senate rules that allow for a minority of senators to block the will of the majority of Americans. Add your name if you agree that democracy is too important to allow voter suppression tactics to spread! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40908144/326479522/-1819057209?refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220121_1_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjcwMjQ2OS1jZjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7zVuCYmRZxiBH1A0650RYry4TYASGQy0eiAD15sNTG4=&emci=e157c0f6-5f79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1b702469-cf7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2432894) | | [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40908146/326479524/-1819057209?refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220121_1_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjcwMjQ2OS1jZjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7zVuCYmRZxiBH1A0650RYry4TYASGQy0eiAD15sNTG4=&emci=e157c0f6-5f79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1b702469-cf7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2432894)

As the 2022 midterms are fast approaching, it is even more important to protect the Senate majority, which is why this race is so critical. _**We need leaders in Washington that are willing to reform old rules and protect democracy.**_

name: Eric Lynn
subject: A plan for COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
We all want to go back to normal, and we need to do better https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-covid-policy-01 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-covid-policy-01]Dear friends,
We’re nearly two full years into this pandemic, and daily cases are higher than ever. We all want to go back to normal, and it’s time to shift our COVID-19 policies at the federal and state levels to handle this new lifestyle long-term.
I’m running for Congress to bring sensible solutions to our community, and if you support these efforts, please click here to help us win so that we can implement some of these proposals. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-covid-policy-01]
Easy access to testing is important so that people know how to prevent spreading the virus to others. Starting this week, the Biden Administration is shipping tests for FREE to anyone who requests them. Visit www.COVIDtests.gov [http://www.covidtests.gov/] to get yours. We also need access to high-quality masks, and I'm thankful that President Biden is working on this as well.
Governor DeSantis has banned schools from implementing mask policies, and this is a major contributor to the spread of COVID-19 among our children. This decision affected my family personally, and after going through that, I want to make sure no one else has to!
We need to be better prepared for the next surge to prevent it from getting out of control like Omicron has. We need federally backed, locally implemented systems and standards that can quickly scale up as cases spike with a new variant.
We also need to provide more funding to local governments, hospitals, schools, and other entities to support prevention and treatment programs and upgrade systems that would make our communities safer. Improving ventilation systems would have a major impact on reducing spread of the virus.
No one wants to be talking about COVID-19 after two years, and I understand that. But if we don’t address some of the key vulnerabilities in our community, this pandemic will continue to worsen. I will always follow the science and work for the safety of our community.
When elected to Congress, I’ll continue fighting for solutions to our most difficult issues. Please click here to support our efforts if you believe that elected officials should listen to scientists, not politics, to better serve your needs. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-covid-policy-01]
Thank you,
Eric Lynn
Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-covid-policy-01]https://www.facebook.com/voteericlynn/ [https://www.facebook.com/voteericlynn/] https://twitter.com/ericlynnfl [https://twitter.com/ericlynnfl] https://www.instagram.com/ericlynnfl/ [https://www.instagram.com/ericlynnfl/] https://www.ericlynnforcongress.com [https://www.ericlynnforcongress.com]
Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
Eric Lynn for Congress
PO Box 16991
St. Petersburg, FL 33733
United States

name: Meg Platt (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: Maggie Hassan is counting on you, everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, I’m Meg, Senator Hassan’s finance director. My job is to make sure that the Senator’s campaign has the funds to talk to voters in every corner of the state. I keep close tabs on our progress, and I have to say, I’m alarmed at our numbers from the last couple of days. To be frank, our fundraising has slowed down, and we’re at risk of missing our goal this month. | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40909671/326484079/-1281091919?refcode=e20220121_mp-48&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2I2YzczMy1kMTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FXwufP1PQ0RsRMoXhh4mH-NwYSBiqu_RGvsfLL6uKMA=)

clean_body: | | | Hi there, I’m Meg, Senator Hassan’s finance director. My job is to make sure that the Senator’s campaign has the funds to talk to voters in every corner of the state. I keep close tabs on our progress, and I have to say, I’m alarmed at our numbers from the last couple of days. To be frank, our fundraising has slowed down, and we’re at risk of missing our goal this month. | | = Republicans have already spent over $7 MILLION to flip New Hampshire, and Maggie’s last race was the closest in the country. That’s why it is IMPERATIVE that we fill our $10,000 fundraising gap in the next 48 hours. Look, Maggie asked me to reach out to you specifically because you’re a top Democrat, and she is counting on your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = This is pretty urgent, so thanks for helping. –Meg | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: the underdog candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910129/326486246/1053214558?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220121_1_1&refcode2=abc1d60b-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmMxZDYwYi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtNiiO1slHpZxpfCO6srzrpDFJ3DHvuyf4haxBRTUq8=) I am the underdog, grassroots candidate for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. I know this isn’t the first time you’ve read that in these emails.

I’m up against candidates with billions in wealth and millions in name recognition. **_But I have you_ — and really, that’s all that matters.** [Chip in now to support my campaign→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910130/326486248/1053214558?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220121_1_1&refcode2=abc1d60b-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmMxZDYwYi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtNiiO1slHpZxpfCO6srzrpDFJ3DHvuyf4haxBRTUq8=)

But that’s not all we’re up against — Ron Johnson has the full support of Wisconsin’s disgraced ex-Governor. Last week, in an article expressing his support for Ron Johnson’s reelection, Scott Walker — _who has lost many elections_ — called me a loser!

_That’s right._ A loser. He was talking about some of my previous runs for office.

It made me think of the late-Senator Bill Proxmire of Wisconsin. Prox was the hardest working U.S. Senator in history. His campaigns were legendary — one year he logged 1,200 miles jogging and walking around the state shaking hands and meeting voters.

Before he won his seat in the U.S. Senate, he lost three times. In his last run, no one gave him a chance, many didn’t want him to run in the first place. Near the end of the campaign, Prox said:
_My opponent doesn't know what it is to lose. I do. And I'll welcome the support of voters who do, too. I'll take the losers. I'll take the debtors. I'll take those who've lost in love, or baseball, or in business._
He won.

**Scott Walker is many things but he is no statesman. And that goes double for Ron Johnson. Ron Johnson has embarrassed our state. He incited an insurrection, spread conspiracy theories, and cut taxes for the rich the rest of us are stuck paying.**

[He needs to lose — and together, we can make it happen. Please, chip in now to support my campaign→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910132/326486249/1053214558?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220121_1_1&refcode2=abc1d60b-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmMxZDYwYi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtNiiO1slHpZxpfCO6srzrpDFJ3DHvuyf4haxBRTUq8=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. clean_body: | | = I am the underdog, grassroots candidate for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. I know this isn’t the first time you’ve read that in these emails. I’m up against candidates with billions in wealth and millions in name recognition. But I have you — and really, that’s all that matters. = But that’s not all we’re up against — Ron Johnson has the full support of Wisconsin’s disgraced ex-Governor. Last week, in an article expressing his support for Ron Johnson’s reelection, Scott Walker — who has lost many elections — called me a loser! That’s right. A loser. He was talking about some of my previous runs for office. It made me think of the late-Senator Bill Proxmire of Wisconsin. Prox was the hardest working U.S. Senator in history. His campaigns were legendary — one year he logged 1,200 miles jogging and walking around the state shaking hands and meeting voters. Before he won his seat in the U.S. Senate, he lost three times. In his last run, no one gave him a chance, many didn’t want him to run in the first place. Near the end of the campaign, Prox said: My opponent doesn't know what it is to lose. I do. And I'll welcome the support of voters who do, too. I'll take the losers. I'll take the debtors. I'll take those who've lost in love, or baseball, or in business. He won. Scott Walker is many things but he is no statesman. And that goes double for Ron Johnson. Ron Johnson has embarrassed our state. He incited an insurrection, spread conspiracy theories, and cut taxes for the rich the rest of us are stuck paying. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Tom | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

body:
Are you on board? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910308/326487584/1561815853?refcode=ea.7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE1Y2IyZC1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrlvnC_6PdlqZDwi_MiEM2rafEJfGCmkHZLZdhWnVuE=&emci=0c8b163a-2c7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12666102)

| | Peter,

This weekend I had a chance to stop by my local King Soopers on 120th and show support for the UFCW Local 7 members in their fight for fair wages and fair treatment. **[Join them in the fight — we need 1,000 supporters to sign our petition demanding King Soopers come to the bargaining table in good faith >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910310/326487586/899064445?refcode=ea.7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE1Y2IyZC1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrlvnC_6PdlqZDwi_MiEM2rafEJfGCmkHZLZdhWnVuE=&emci=0c8b163a-2c7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12666102)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910313/326487589/899064445?refcode=ea.7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE1Y2IyZC1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrlvnC_6PdlqZDwi_MiEM2rafEJfGCmkHZLZdhWnVuE=&emci=0c8b163a-2c7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12666102) **Even before COVID-19, Colorado workers were underpaid and under-appreciated.** But this public health crisis has brought these issues to the forefront. It has never been more critical that we treat our frontline workers how they deserve to be treated. That means providing them with fair pay, better benefits, and better treatment from their employers.

King Soopers refuses to value their workers’ labor. These employees have already been on the picket line — standing in freezing temperatures — for a week.

These are the same workers who kept our stores open throughout the entire pandemic. The people who kept our fridges stocked and our bellies full when we were scared to even leave the house. Their demands are not unreasonable. They’re simply asking to be paid a living wage, so they don’t have to sleep in their cars or sacrifice critical time with their loved ones.

I understand how important it is to prioritize our workers. In the state legislature, I delivered paid sick leave for every single worker across the state. But that was just a first step in creating a critical safety net for Coloradans, we still have a lot of work to do.

The greedy executives at King Soopers would rather get rich off the hard work of their employees who are struggling just to make ends meet.

Enough is enough.

**[I need 1,000 supporters to sign my petition demanding King Soopers and their parent company Kroger do the right thing and meet their workers' needs. Add your name now >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910314/326487591/899064445?refcode=ea.7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE1Y2IyZC1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrlvnC_6PdlqZDwi_MiEM2rafEJfGCmkHZLZdhWnVuE=&emci=0c8b163a-2c7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12666102)** | ****[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910315/326487592/899064445?refcode=ea.7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE1Y2IyZC1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrlvnC_6PdlqZDwi_MiEM2rafEJfGCmkHZLZdhWnVuE=&emci=0c8b163a-2c7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7ea5cb2d-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12666102)****

Dr. Yadira Caraveo

name: Arizona Senate Update
subject: Donald Trump & Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910413/326487720/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2E1Y2IyZC1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZhTtiaJEtUu47dfARbpDSDYhrWAQ2IjpjG5_DkLgUCI=)
Friends — In case you forgot, the last time Donald Trump was in Arizona he had this to say about Mark Kelly: _"Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate."_ Unfortunately, just last week Trump was back in Arizona again because he knows Arizona’s Senate race is going to be a battleground we can’t afford to lose in 2022. And just remember that Senator Kelly won his race in Arizona by only 2 points in 2020, and now he’s one of the GOP's top targets. So we have to have Mark’s back...full stop. It’s going to take a big grassroots team to keep battleground states like Arizona blue in 2022. Which is where you come in, friend. Team —

Last week, Karen rolled out her policy plan to address the homelessness crisis in Los Angeles — a crisis that has reached a boiling point in our city.

In her first year as mayor, Karen will take aggressive emergency action to create 15,000 housing placements, reduce street homelessness by 30 percent, and end street encampments. **Karen's plan is comprehensive, ambitious, and completely necessary.**

Right now, Karen is the _only_ candidate in this race with a homelessness policy that addresses the full spectrum of unique challenges facing our city. And we need your help to make her vision a reality.

With the primary only months away, this is still anyone's race. That's why today, we're launching our Monthly Recurring Donor program. Recurring monthly gifts are the funds we can count on — and a donation of even $3 a month could help us lay the groundwork to elect Karen as L.A. mayor.

name: Kat Cammack
subject: I’m Fighting to Keep Kids in School!
body:
Over the past year, Florida has become the gold standard for freedom and liberty during the COVID-hysteria narrative pushed by the Far-Left.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CmQnMQ7g9cKS7Zo7Zz3lHvgNtiaCsjGNcNqoAumBPy3g3qArjNAldlVokfJJEDfmGa_orKeGxrYU1BRPqlBey-Rv66aBJPfyoQVcDLAZ2GJF3Bo6ezPoPn-tNPzolvVT6-NU1tWn7362Qxj1DVptGkFcgRpvFH3NdSr2ua4xhKT_JFnoR-uBI4bNNSVCzekRPX14ks8A_2l5lcUbeGtgow==&c=b4zaQGezhnkPzFnYNfM8dUp-khBWbcSFcHQbPxVcsSx_-PMdU1_wCQ==&ch=L2Ms_Wr9cNmm8KPRbCo2dKzBHe5t4X5BrYbk7eWrp5U3rImdqXubfw==)
---
| Friend,
Over the past year, Florida has become the gold standard for freedom and liberty during the COVID-hysteria narrative pushed by the Far-Left. When I was elected to be a member of Congress, I promised to protect Florida and America from an overbearing federal government trying to control us.
The Radical Left has been trying every which way to keep our kids locked at home and out of school. Their growth and wellbeing have been ground to a halt thanks to COVID hysteria and fear mongering.
I have been hard at work drafting legislation alongside Republicans that puts our kids back in school and keeps leftist bureaucracy out of their lives. However, we need to regain the House majority if we are to save America's children.
---

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: My Commitment to America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3c3sg--fgxr-4qqlpo8&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative, I just previewed my new Commitment to America — the game plan and agenda upon which a Republican majority will act to put America First again.

You see, as leader of the Republican Conference, I know that majorities aren’t just given — they are earned. By showing patriots like you _how_ I plan to make America better, I’m hoping I can earn the support we need to do it.
**Here’s what we’re going to do:** ✅ Rein in the IRS
✅ Fund the police
✅ Secure the border
✅ Put American energy first
✅ Stop the runaway spending
✅ Pass a Parents Bill of Rights
✅ Hold China accountable for COVID-19
✅ Hold Biden accountable for his Afghanistan DISASTER

This is only the beginning, Fellow Conservative. These are only some of the Day 1 action items I will take to put YOU and put America First again. **[Are you in?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3c3sg-1u9o6-4qqlpo2/ "Are you in?")**

---
| | [YES, PUT AMERICA FIRST AGAIN](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3c3sg-1u9o7-4qqlpo3/)
---

Do you want the party that has brought us inflation, open borders, unsafe communities, and a supply chain where products are scarce, or do you want something that’s going to make our economy stronger, our streets safer, our border secure, and the next century the American century?

---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3c3sg-1u9o8-4qqlpo4/)
---

I can’t do this without you, Fellow Conservative. Critical campaigns need YOUR support.
**CHIP IN NOW TO GET OUR COUNTRY BACK ON TRACK:**

---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3c3sg-1u9o9-4qqlpo5/)
---

Thank you,

Leader McCarthy

---
**A note from Kevin:**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3c3sg-1u9oa-4qqlpo5/ "Kevin McCarthy urgently needs YOU to take action")
---

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- **[ EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3c3sg-1u9ob-4qqlpo6/ "EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>")**

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy
Leader, House Republicans

name: Letitia James
subject: Roe v. Wade is in danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
| | **_ROE V. WADE IS IN DANGER_**
---
On the 49th anniversary of this historic case, backwards laws across the country threaten to undo all our hard-won progress.
**I need 744 more fearless fighters to take this urgent survey before midnight TONIGHT to fight back against the GOP's rampant spread of draconian laws against reproductive rights.**

**[_Take the survey now:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910920/326489380/-1126962631?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk307-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGUzYWZlMC1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-TacSR2J85ZDFQDuVF_rpysvEdA6vx6ZXc72gPqea78=&emci=c36452f1-e478-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=b4e3afe0-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)**

**Should Roe v. Wade be protected?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910921/326489381/-1126962631?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk307-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGUzYWZlMC1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-TacSR2J85ZDFQDuVF_rpysvEdA6vx6ZXc72gPqea78=&emci=c36452f1-e478-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=b4e3afe0-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910922/326489382/-1126962631?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk307-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGUzYWZlMC1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-TacSR2J85ZDFQDuVF_rpysvEdA6vx6ZXc72gPqea78=&emci=c36452f1-e478-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=b4e3afe0-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter,

Forty-nine years ago tomorrow, the Supreme Court made the groundbreaking decision to recognize the constitutional right to have an abortion.

**Fast-forward to today:** GOP-majority state legislatures have passed thousands of backwards, dystopian restrictions that gut our autonomy over our own bodies, our access to quality health care, and our hard-won progress for the democracy of this country.
On the eve of the anniversary of this revolutionary case, we simply cannot sit idly by and let Republican legislatures dictate our reproductive rights, or lack thereof.

Just last month, I continued my staunch, tireless opposition to the coordinated and unconstitutional attempts to roll back reproductive rights by challenging Arizona's "reason ban," which prohibits abortion when sought due to a fetal abnormality.
Reproductive rights are under constant assault, and Arizona is just the latest in a long line of conservative-led states, from Mississippi to Texas and beyond, seeking to control our bodies and our choices. I will never stop fighting them.

But our voices are louder – and stronger – when they rise up together. That's why it's so crucial I have people like you by my side in this fight for our democracy and our rights.

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: If majority of Congress voted like Bergman, no funding for Soo Locks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
If the majority of Congress voted like Jack Bergman, there would be no full funding for Soo Locks in his own district. I'm pleased and grateful this project is finally moving forward, but I share constituents' disappointment that our current Representative did not see the value in working with Republicans and Democrats to accomplish this through bipartisan agreement. **Nearly half a billion invested in Soo Locks, without Jack Bergman's support** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910939/326489562/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjRhZGVmZi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEE_nkVeMDQsBCf0fJpJt8LCqSdX6Ri_qru_VMiCnwk=) _**I am pleased this is moving forward and thankful for the critical investment in the district. I share constituents' disappointment that our current representative did not see the value in joining Republican and Democratic colleagues to improve Michigan's aging infrastructure with the bipartisan agreement.**_ [HELP US REPLACE BERGMAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910940/326489563/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjRhZGVmZi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEE_nkVeMDQsBCf0fJpJt8LCqSdX6Ri_qru_VMiCnwk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910941/326489564/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjRhZGVmZi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEE_nkVeMDQsBCf0fJpJt8LCqSdX6Ri_qru_VMiCnwk=) [DONATE FOR INTEGRITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910942/326489565/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjRhZGVmZi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEE_nkVeMDQsBCf0fJpJt8LCqSdX6Ri_qru_VMiCnwk=) WASHINGTON — Michigan Senators Gary Peters and Debbie Stabenow announced the Army Corps of Engineers will receive $479 million from the bipartisan _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ to invest in modernizing the Soo Locks. With this investment, there is now enough funding to fully fund the Corp’s budget to finish building a new lock. U.S. Rep. Jack Bergman, who represents constituents in and around this crucial shipping gateway, voted 'No' on the bipartisan infrastructure investment, a no-vote Dr. Bob Lorinser deeply condemned. Through the Soo Locks, Great Lakes freighters carry agricultural products and materials our manufacturers and military depend on. The new lock will mean there is a modern lock to handle larger vessels and will prevent failure of the locks, which would have devastating consequences for the economy and national security. Michigan senators have led the effort for years to secure enough funding to complete this new lock—$1.3 billion in total. _**If the majority of Congress voted like Jack Bergman, there would be no final funding for the Soo Locks in his own district.**_ “After a hard-fought effort, we finally have full funding of the Corp’s budget to finish building the new lock at the Soo Locks," said Senator Stabenow. "In Michigan, we know how vital the Locks are to our economy and our national defense. We also know that we are on borrowed time until something happens that shuts them down. Thanks to our bipartisan efforts in Congress, and with the President’s leadership, we are able to finish this project as soon as possible,” “The bipartisan infrastructure law is delivering for Michiganders with this significant investment in the Soo Locks – an economic and national security priority for Michigan and our nation,” said Senator Peters. “With some of the pumps operating the locks being more than 100 years old, it was long overdue that we modernize such a critical piece of our infrastructure and ensure sustainability for the future. Building a new lock will make our supply chains more resilient and bolster commerce on the Great Lakes – and I was proud to help pass the legislation making this necessary upgrade closer to a reality.” **Working with Republicans and Democrats,** Senators Stabenow and Peters were instrumental in passing the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. The Act is transformational for Michigan. It includes unprecedented funding—to finish modernizing the Soo Locks, rebuild our long-neglected roads and bridges, keep our drinking water safe, bring high-speed internet to communities across Michigan, invest in electric vehicles, and make the largest single investment ever in the Great Lakes. The Act also strengthens our Buy American laws. | |
---
**_The improvements of the bipartisan infrastructure package will be the most significant single infusion into our country’s infrastructure in over a decade._**

As the $1.2 trillion bipartisan infrastructure package traveled through Congress with bipartisan support, Dr. Bob Lorinser, a candidate for US Congress in Michigan’s First District, said Northern Michigan must focus on what the investment can do for the area. Dr. Lorinser said the federal funding will be the most significant single infusion into our country’s infrastructure in over a decade.

“This investment is desperately needed,” said Dr. Lorinser. “This bill creates family-sustaining jobs, advances careers, and will help small businesses grow. It upgrades crumbling infrastructure. The bipartisan agreement ━ which my opponent opposed ━ will ignite the economy and put money in working families’ pockets and food on the table, all without raising taxes.”

The most recent report card on Michigan’s Infrastructure by the American Society of Civil Engineers gave the state an overall GPA of D+. Michigan’s civil engineers studied 13 infrastructure categories. Of those 13, nine infrastructure categories are in mediocre condition, and four are in poor condition.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910944/326489566/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjRhZGVmZi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEE_nkVeMDQsBCf0fJpJt8LCqSdX6Ri_qru_VMiCnwk=)
Dr. Lorinser says this could be a “game-changer” for the First District. “It could help Northern Michigan build a robust energy grid, advance public transportation, provide access to clean drinking water for hundreds of thousands, and start to meet the broadband needs of rural Michiganders, many of whom live in the First District. It’s truly a transformative, historic bipartisan investment.”

**A Historic Investment in Michigan:**

* $7.3 billion for highway repairs for Michigan
* $1 billion for environmental protection of the Great Lakes
* $563 million for bridge replacement and repairs
* $100 million to provide broadband coverage and connect at least 398,000 residents to the Internet

The legislation would provide $65 billion in investment to improve broadband, with at least $100 million directed towards providing broadband coverage to at least 398,000 residents in Michigan. It aims to lower the price of internet services, create price transparency, and help more low-income households access the internet.

**Investment in Broadband**

“My opponent has been trying to invite broadband expansion to the area since he took office, but he is exclusively concentrating on attracting private corporate investment, and although there’s certainly a role for private enterprise, so far, his efforts have been unsuccessful,” said Dr. Lorinser. “Approximately **1.2 million households****,** many of whom live in the district, do not have a permanently fixed broadband connection. This is unacceptable.”

Dr. Lorinser says he applauds several organizations, specifically Michigan Broadband Cooperative, Connected Nation Michigan, and Center for Change, which are leading the way in advancing the conversation of broadband access in rural Northern Michigan.

“At a local level, rural broadband can significantly improve our students’ learning,” said Dr. Lorinser. “It can assist our daughters to pursue their passions in STEM programs to become engineers, scientists, and world leaders. It can help our sons realize their dreams of studying international business and communicating around the globe. Access to consistent, reliable broadband will also enable Northern Michigan residents to work from home, which positively transforms our economy and attracts opportunity and investment to the area.”

At a state level, the infrastructure bill would provide $100 million to extend broadband coverage and provide nearly 2.5 million low-income Michigan households the opportunity to apply for funds to help afford internet access, a goal Dr. Lorinser champions.

**Investment in Infrastructure**

Michigan stands to receive $7.3 billion in federal highway aid and $563 million for bridge replacement and repairs, as well as the opportunity to compete with other states for billions more in bridge and road projects. Dr. Lorinser says investment in our infrastructure is vital as our great state has received poor marks for years for its infrastructure. A report from five years ago stated that much of Michigan’s infrastructure is reaching the end of its useful life.

**Jobs – “The bottom line.”**

“The way to attract new jobs is to be a place where people can work and live, where healthcare and education are superb, and where we welcome innovation,” said Dr. Lorinser. “Infrastructure improvement will help. Thousands of jobs could result from this project throughout our district for years to come. Unfortunately, the [**recent Census**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910945/326489567/1683482359?fbclid=IwAR3tsNfQkbiHre-5ys-uVX3nLBdE7zvOQJ4CFZNx7dXev5KuCzpaMfouDuw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjRhZGVmZi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEE_nkVeMDQsBCf0fJpJt8LCqSdX6Ri_qru_VMiCnwk=&emci=0b94eb6f-d07a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=364adeff-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427)**** highlights that the largest population loss by percentage in our state was in the Upper Peninsula. Jobs, population growth, and infrastructure improvement go hand in hand.”

Lorinser commends both sides of the Congressional aisle for achieving compromise. The bill does not represent all that Democrats want, nor everything the Republicans seek. Senator Mitt Romney (R-UT) stated the legislation “provides a once-in-a-generation investment in our country’s physical infrastructure without raising taxes.”

“Whenever I evaluate federal legislation, I’m looking to ensure each community in Northern Michigan is a priority,” said Dr. Lorinser. “Investments in broadband and infrastructure━two primary components of this historic legislation━are investments I support.

“My opponent has mislabeled this legislation and voted [**no**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910946/326489568/-1772730941?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjRhZGVmZi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEE_nkVeMDQsBCf0fJpJt8LCqSdX6Ri_qru_VMiCnwk=&emci=0b94eb6f-d07a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=364adeff-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427) on [**H.R.3684 – Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910947/326489569/-604293686?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjRhZGVmZi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEE_nkVeMDQsBCf0fJpJt8LCqSdX6Ri_qru_VMiCnwk=&emci=0b94eb6f-d07a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=364adeff-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427)**.** Unfortunately, his focus is not on the crucial necessity and positive attributes of the overdue investment. If I were Northern Michigan’s Congressman, I would have voted for this bill because it undoubtedly will help thousands of our citizens economically thrive.”
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910948/326489570/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjRhZGVmZi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEE_nkVeMDQsBCf0fJpJt8LCqSdX6Ri_qru_VMiCnwk=)
[HELP US REPLACE JACK BERGMAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910951/326489571/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjRhZGVmZi1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEE_nkVeMDQsBCf0fJpJt8LCqSdX6Ri_qru_VMiCnwk=)
**_We have five upcoming town halls before February 5th. This level of engagement and travel can be expensive for the campaign. clean_body: If the majority of Congress voted like Jack Bergman, there would be no full funding for Soo Locks in his own district. I'm pleased and grateful this project is finally moving forward, but I share constituents' disappointment that our current Representative did not see the value in working with Republicans and Democrats to accomplish this through bipartisan agreement. Nearly half a billion invested in Soo Locks, without Jack Bergman's support = I am pleased this is moving forward and thankful for the critical investment in the district. I share constituents' disappointment that our current representative did not see the value in joining Republican and Democratic colleagues to improve Michigan's aging infrastructure with the bipartisan agreement. = = = WASHINGTON — Michigan Senators Gary Peters and Debbie Stabenow announced the Army Corps of Engineers will receive $479 million from the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act to invest in modernizing the Soo Locks. With this investment, there is now enough funding to fully fund the Corp’s budget to finish building a new lock. U.S. Rep. Jack Bergman, who represents constituents in and around this crucial shipping gateway, voted 'No' on the bipartisan infrastructure investment, a no-vote Dr. Bob Lorinser deeply condemned. Through the Soo Locks, Great Lakes freighters carry agricultural products and materials our manufacturers and military depend on. The new lock will mean there is a modern lock to handle larger vessels and will prevent failure of the locks, which would have devastating consequences for the economy and national security. Michigan senators have led the effort for years to secure enough funding to complete this new lock—$1.3 billion in total. If the majority of Congress voted like Jack Bergman, there would be no final funding for the Soo Locks in his own district. “After a hard-fought effort, we finally have full funding of the Corp’s budget to finish building the new lock at the Soo Locks," said Senator Stabenow. "In Michigan, we know how vital the Locks are to our economy and our national defense. We also know that we are on borrowed time until something happens that shuts them down. Thanks to our bipartisan efforts in Congress, and with the President’s leadership, we are able to finish this project as soon as possible,” “The bipartisan infrastructure law is delivering for Michiganders with this significant investment in the Soo Locks – an economic and national security priority for Michigan and our nation,” said Senator Peters. “With some of the pumps operating the locks being more than 100 years old, it was long overdue that we modernize such a critical piece of our infrastructure and ensure sustainability for the future. Building a new lock will make our supply chains more resilient and bolster commerce on the Great Lakes – and I was proud to help pass the legislation making this necessary upgrade closer to a reality.” Working with Republicans and Democrats, Senators Stabenow and Peters were instrumental in passing the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. The Act is transformational for Michigan. It includes unprecedented funding—to finish modernizing the Soo Locks, rebuild our long-neglected roads and bridges, keep our drinking water safe, bring high-speed internet to communities across Michigan, invest in electric vehicles, and make the largest single investment ever in the Great Lakes. The Act also strengthens our Buy American laws. | | The improvements of the bipartisan infrastructure package will be the most significant single infusion into our country’s infrastructure in over a decade. As the $1.2 trillion bipartisan infrastructure package traveled through Congress with bipartisan support, Dr. Bob Lorinser, a candidate for US Congress in Michigan’s First District, said Northern Michigan must focus on what the investment can do for the area. Dr. Lorinser said the federal funding will be the most significant single infusion into our country’s infrastructure in over a decade. “This investment is desperately needed,” said Dr. Lorinser. “This bill creates family-sustaining jobs, advances careers, and will help small businesses grow. It upgrades crumbling infrastructure. The bipartisan agreement ━ which my opponent opposed ━ will ignite the economy and put money in working families’ pockets and food on the table, all without raising taxes.” The most recent report card on Michigan’s Infrastructure by the American Society of Civil Engineers gave the state an overall GPA of D+. Michigan’s civil engineers studied 13 infrastructure categories. Of those 13, nine infrastructure categories are in mediocre condition, and four are in poor condition. = Dr. Lorinser says this could be a “game-changer” for the First District. “It could help Northern Michigan build a robust energy grid, advance public transportation, provide access to clean drinking water for hundreds of thousands, and start to meet the broadband needs of rural Michiganders, many of whom live in the First District. It’s truly a transformative, historic bipartisan investment.” A Historic Investment in Michigan: $7.3 billion for highway repairs for Michigan $1 billion for environmental protection of the Great Lakes $563 million for bridge replacement and repairs $100 million to provide broadband coverage and connect at least 398,000 residents to the Internet The legislation would provide $65 billion in investment to improve broadband, with at least $100 million directed towards providing broadband coverage to at least 398,000 residents in Michigan. It aims to lower the price of internet services, create price transparency, and help more low-income households access the internet. Investment in Broadband “My opponent has been trying to invite broadband expansion to the area since he took office, but he is exclusively concentrating on attracting private corporate investment, and although there’s certainly a role for private enterprise, so far, his efforts have been unsuccessful,” said Dr. Lorinser. “Approximately 1.2 million households, many of whom live in the district, do not have a permanently fixed broadband connection. This is unacceptable.” Dr. Lorinser says he applauds several organizations, specifically Michigan Broadband Cooperative, Connected Nation Michigan, and Center for Change, which are leading the way in advancing the conversation of broadband access in rural Northern Michigan. “At a local level, rural broadband can significantly improve our students’ learning,” said Dr. Lorinser. “It can assist our daughters to pursue their passions in STEM programs to become engineers, scientists, and world leaders. It can help our sons realize their dreams of studying international business and communicating around the globe. Access to consistent, reliable broadband will also enable Northern Michigan residents to work from home, which positively transforms our economy and attracts opportunity and investment to the area.” At a state level, the infrastructure bill would provide $100 million to extend broadband coverage and provide nearly 2.5 million low-income Michigan households the opportunity to apply for funds to help afford internet access, a goal Dr. Lorinser champions. Investment in Infrastructure Michigan stands to receive $7.3 billion in federal highway aid and $563 million for bridge replacement and repairs, as well as the opportunity to compete with other states for billions more in bridge and road projects. Dr. Lorinser says investment in our infrastructure is vital as our great state has received poor marks for years for its infrastructure. A report from five years ago stated that much of Michigan’s infrastructure is reaching the end of its useful life. Jobs – “The bottom line.” “The way to attract new jobs is to be a place where people can work and live, where healthcare and education are superb, and where we welcome innovation,” said Dr. Lorinser. “Infrastructure improvement will help. Thousands of jobs could result from this project throughout our district for years to come. Unfortunately, the ** highlights that the largest population loss by percentage in our state was in the Upper Peninsula. Jobs, population growth, and infrastructure improvement go hand in hand.” Lorinser commends both sides of the Congressional aisle for achieving compromise. The bill does not represent all that Democrats want, nor everything the Republicans seek. Senator Mitt Romney (R-UT) stated the legislation “provides a once-in-a-generation investment in our country’s physical infrastructure without raising taxes.” “Whenever I evaluate federal legislation, I’m looking to ensure each community in Northern Michigan is a priority,” said Dr. Lorinser. “Investments in broadband and infrastructure━two primary components of this historic legislation━are investments I support. “My opponent has mislabeled this legislation and voted on . Unfortunately, his focus is not on the crucial necessity and positive attributes of the overdue investment. If I were Northern Michigan’s Congressman, I would have voted for this bill because it undoubtedly will help thousands of our citizens economically thrive.” = = We have five upcoming town halls before February 5th. This level of engagement and travel can be expensive for the campaign. Will you consider = to help fund our town hall series?** = = PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: SELLOUTS: Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I have some thoughts...
| | |
---
Peter: this past Wednesday night, Sens. Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin joined with every Republican senator – including my opponent, Chuck Grassley – in opposing filibuster reform to pass critical voting rights legislation. To put it mildly, I have some thoughts on that.
I am shocked by the absolute absurdity of Sens. Sinema, Manchin and the entire GOP. They talk about the filibuster as if it's some tool of civility or compromise when the GOP is actively exploiting it to block legislation that would protect our most fundamental, cherished right – the right to vote.
**Let's be honest with ourselves here: The Senate is broken.** When I served in the House, I watched as countless bipartisan bills that would move our country forward died in McConnell's Senate time and time again. Now, Democrats technically have control, but two senators used their powers to join Republicans in obstructing policies that the vast majority of Americans support.
I won't mince words, I don't know what compelled Sens. Sinema and Manchin to serve in Congress, but I do know that they _refuse_ to do anything – anything at all – for working families like the one that I grew up in. **I don't know if they forgot where they came from or who they're there to fight for.**
**But I do know that I'm done with having our entire Democratic agenda rest in the hands of two people. It's time that we expand our Senate majority. **Now, with Sen. Grassley facing record-low approval ratings, we've got a real chance to do it right here in Iowa.
**Peter, you have my word: Send me to the Senate, and I will be the 50th vote we need to reform the filibuster.** I'll fight tooth and nail to protect voting rights, raise the federal minimum wage, and pass the PRO Act to strengthen workers' rights and our unions.
**I'm doing everything within my power to defeat Sen. Grassley and move our country forward, I just need you with me. [So please, can you donate $5 right now to defeat Sen. Grassley, expand our Senate majority, and pass critical legislation to move our country forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910937/326489559/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk613-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWUzYWZlMC1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cYb0dFnXXmTFi9-xVzoAnR8lZoZwBn4iDwIpHNy_8o=)**
I know days like this can be frustrating and hard. So thank you so much for standing with me and fighting today.

– Abby
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40910938/326489560/496662621?refcode=jtk613-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWUzYWZlMC1kMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cYb0dFnXXmTFi9-xVzoAnR8lZoZwBn4iDwIpHNy_8o=&emci=0778c649-217a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=b1e3afe0-d37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=13784334#!).

name: Bo Hines
subject: A Tsunami's Coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Hines for Congress_**
body:
Peter:

There is a Red Wave... no, a Red Tsunami coming.

And I plan on riding that tsunami all the way to Capitol Hill!

When I get there, my very first vote will be to fire Nancy Pelosi and replace her with an America First Conservative to be the next Speaker of the House.

But, to make it there, I simply must have your help right away.

**The Fake News media is attacking me because I dared to say the 2020 election was stolen.**

Leftwing journalists, Democrats, and RINOs alike are terrified that a 100% pro-Trump, 100% pro-Life, and 100% pro-gun conservative is running for Congress in North Carolina to take up the fight against Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's socialist agenda. **[CHIP IN TO HELP BO HINES
RIDE THE RED TSUNAMI! ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59519880:WlkcPhHNf:m:1:2365227053:58A8D3F44C574AC6FEB36AC9B5F38DDB:r)** And the liberal media is trying to take me out with a smear campaign.

Because, unlike my opponents, I know putting America first means always going on offense - and never backing down.

**That's why it's vital that my campaign continue to post the biggest fundraising numbers possible to show the RINOs, the radical Democrats, and their socialist allies in the Fake News that I am THE America First conservative who is unafraid to back down from a fight.**

And, that I have the backing of patriotic Americans like you!

**[So please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $50, $100 or $250 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59519880:WlkcPhHNf:m:1:2365227053:58A8D3F44C574AC6FEB36AC9B5F38DDB:r)!**

I know I'll never get a fair shake from Fake News reporters that hate Donald Trump, hate conservative values, and - most of all - hate conservative voters like you.

**But, I also know the only reason the Fake News singled me out for destruction was that they fear America First patriots taking our country back in 2022.**

I can feel the Red Tsunami building to sweep the Democrats out of power in November.

Poll after poll shows that Americans are fed up with Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandates, open borders agenda, and socialist spending binge.

**But, swapping out one set of big spending, swamp insiders for another just because they happen to have an "R" after their name will not end the assault on our liberties and the constitution.**

I'm proud to have earned the endorsement from all corners of the MAGA movement such as Congressman Paul Gosar and Turning Point Action.

**[Will you join them by chipping in a contribution to my campaign for Congress today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59519880:WlkcPhHNf:m:1:2365227053:58A8D3F44C574AC6FEB36AC9B5F38DDB:r)?**

Any amount you can afford - $10 $25, $50, $100, $250, or $500 -- will help me prove to the fake news media and D.C. swamp creatures that the America First movement is stronger than ever.

Sincerely,

Bo Hines

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59519880:WlkcPhHNf:m:1:2365227053:58A8D3F44C574AC6FEB36AC9B5F38DDB:r)

name: Brooke Zindulka
subject: anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Team,

I just wanted to make sure you saw it is the 12th anniversary of _Citizens United_! Even today, we feel the effects of this ruling in our race – and we’ve seen record amounts of dark money flood this district.

body:
Not only is this post-Citizens United world we’re living in undemocratic — it is unmistakably corrupt. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40912494/326495146/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzVkZWI2Mi1kNjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KdIjbTmK9Dq0RH3xlbM5MPJfBGK8NNck0Zx3POqh0Y=&emci=8adbd763-c27a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ec5deb62-d67a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25515813) | Team, 12 years ago today, the Supreme Court’s _Citizens United_ decision changed politics forever – giving the green light to corporations, special interest groups, and wealthy billionaires to contribute unlimited sums of money to the candidates of their choosing. As a result, the floodgates opened for mega-donors like the DeVos family and the Koch Brothers to spend millions of dollars influencing politicians and promoting ultra-conservative ideologies across the country. And in Wisconsin alone, political spending from outside groups and Super PACs have increased by 500% in the decade after _Citizens United_ – giving out-of-state millionaires and extremist groups outsized influence over our elections. Not only is this post-Citizens United world we’re living in undemocratic —** _it is unmistakably corrupt_.** **That’s why I’m rejecting this system by refusing all corporate PAC money and running a real, people-powered campaign powered by grassroots donors like you.** [**As Wisconsin’s next Senator, I won’t be beholden to special interests or wealthy billionaires – just the small donors who are supporting our campaign $3, $5, and $10 at a time. You can help us beat the special interests and send a people-powered Senator to Washington by chipping in $5 to our campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40912495/326495147/1029110635?refcode=E13555-20220121-CitizensUnited-SL-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzVkZWI2Mi1kNjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KdIjbTmK9Dq0RH3xlbM5MPJfBGK8NNck0Zx3POqh0Y=) [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40912496/326495148/-945847804?refcode=E13555-20220121-CitizensUnited-SB-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzVkZWI2Mi1kNjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KdIjbTmK9Dq0RH3xlbM5MPJfBGK8NNck0Zx3POqh0Y=) Thank you for your commitment to our movement, Dr. Gillian Battino

clean_body: Not only is this post-Citizens United world we’re living in undemocratic — it is unmistakably corrupt. | | Team, 12 years ago today, the Supreme Court’s Citizens United decision changed politics forever – giving the green light to corporations, special interest groups, and wealthy billionaires to contribute unlimited sums of money to the candidates of their choosing. As a result, the floodgates opened for mega-donors like the DeVos family and the Koch Brothers to spend millions of dollars influencing politicians and promoting ultra-conservative ideologies across the country. And in Wisconsin alone, political spending from outside groups and Super PACs have increased by 500% in the decade after Citizens United – giving out-of-state millionaires and extremist groups outsized influence over our elections. Not only is this post-Citizens United world we’re living in undemocratic — it is unmistakably corrupt. That’s why I’m rejecting this system by refusing all corporate PAC money and running a real, people-powered campaign powered by grassroots donors like you. = = Thank you for your commitment to our movement, Dr. Gillian Battino It’s time for a new kind of leadership in Wisconsin. 1. **There’s nothing more critical to our democracy than securing voting rights.**
2. **GOP legislators are trying to make it harder for some of us to cast a ballot.**

The future of our country depends on making sure each of us is able to have our voices heard in elections to come. **[Help Roy Cooper fight for voting rights in NC! clean_body: We’ll shout this from the rooftops: | Two things we NEED you to know, Peter: 1. There’s nothing more critical to our democracy than securing voting rights. 2. GOP legislators are trying to make it harder for some of us to cast a ballot. We know we've said this before, but the fact is, we’ll shout it from the rooftops for as long as it takes. The future of our country depends on making sure each of us is able to have our voices heard in elections to come. = Peter, Republicans aren’t being subtle about it. They plan to hold onto power by choosing who is able to cast a ballot and taking partisan gerrymandering to the extreme. Roy and Democrats WILL keep fighting no matter what, because we know that our country works best for everyone when all of us have a say in who our leaders are. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thanks for all you do, Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Why your contribution makes a huge difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Today, you can do something important. You can make your first contribution to my campaign. And all I’m asking for is just $3. Here’s why your contribution makes a huge difference. Your donation helps us print campaign literature, support grassroots door-to-door campaigning, invest in our digital program and advertising, send mailers, hire staff, and support Democratic candidates running for office across the country. Most important, it will help us overcome any new voting disenfranchisement efforts put in place by Republicans. Running a campaign is an expensive and hard endeavor. Especially when we’re running this one relying on grassroots donations from folks reading our emails — like this one — instead of asking corporate lobbyists and super PACs for big checks like Republican candidates. It means that none of what we do is possible without a critical mass of people who not only believe in me, but in each other, and the commitment we share to reaching voters, mobilizing supporters, and getting out the vote to save our democracy. If we’re going to make the big changes this country needs to protect voting rights, address the climate crisis, make health care universal, and more, we need to fight with everything we’ve got to defend the House and Senate. Just the other day Senate Republicans announced their campaign arm raised over **$100 million** last year. And their only goal is to stop all of our attempts at passing legislative reform in the final two years of Biden’s presidency. We can’t let that happen when there’s so much on the line. **Derek, can I count on you to chip in your first donation right now and fuel our work protecting our democracy?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | **[EXPRESS DONATE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40913396/326499019/1138271422?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20220121_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGM5YjEwYS1kOTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1I8Joii6ATO1Rk-k_KpPygfXdFvslJLVhxAQFom6-s=)**

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

| Peter,
No one in America is more inconsistent and unreliable than Dr. Anthony Fauci. First, he was anti-mask. Then, he was pro-mask. He told the public 50% of Americans needed to be vaccinated and we would be done with COVID surges. Then the number increased. Then it increased again. body:
My family legally immigrated to the United States when I was an infant. As Christians, we had to escape the persecution of an oppressive religious reg | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=b6fcc7ddd9d04da0bc341932a26d5428&_e=vt7XLgow9LdwG7duRHfuzl7uzjmcpDj5CnD1j_MK2glh4wOHK4pMBvMnrWRTEY38cTDJMEHOjtYFoMtbF2s4CA2itJP4rIIM_fnkfWWVemSpLu2MczfmerT08HxbxSQj1WPVsRCrlqHWwgukFIWKtFSBOjAUt22YsuN7O1ggngWPPX8FDV1V6not_ZHZhPlH0brT5QaCwCYs1nQygt6Sosh4_3mIgYoRQGZ4dvA3FfpfyAcwmOJRXm5O_XZwpaH4oYHh7tOJYSdkdJUBujP-V3oic0H_meHW6YSAYqcqc5Ga_QecRMZ-Eb6cDJiU1hXNolHs5D47EVj3zPKFjfmFwSHBvRuVQfZgFcv4QjCA8LnjRGLRwhc9v6MVpDTjpFyIzQpaJf60rDbgZW6Iixzu_7VZElBoiVQsiXhOFhGwiAnmqdc0J67kI8cQTTFNBmTRLVlZxlwpZVT59jwEvcfrQLIkw142ZR7CAAUqZN1XiQk%3D)
---
Peter -

I'm Amanda Makki. I'm a proud, America First Conservative running for the 13th Congressional District in Florida.

**My family legally immigrated to the United States when I was an infant to escape the persecution of an oppressive regime in Iran. My parents scraped together whatever resource they could to immigrate to the land of opportunity.**

[](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=b6fcc7ddd9d04da0bc341932a26d5428&_e=vt7XLgow9LdwG7duRHfuzl7uzjmcpDj5CnD1j_MK2glh4wOHK4pMBvMnrWRTEY38cTDJMEHOjtYFoMtbF2s4CA2itJP4rIIM_fnkfWWVemSpLu2MczfmerT08HxbxSQj1WPVsRCrlqHWwgukFIWKtFSBOjAUt22YsuN7O1ggngWPPX8FDV1V6not_ZHZhPlH0brT5QaCwCYs1nQygt6Sosh4_3mIgYoRQGZ4dvA3FfpfyAcwmOJRXm5O_XZwpaH4oYHh7tOJYSdkdJUBujP-V2VRTedE4FcCnhMEO7u4fu0mgZoC1Vg337NvET1xYDifgKNtKMptzfJINNk5AnVVHcW_0z6Z8YgBXCiuX4w5U8Es0k1IgcyyX1iFIf3epLY1dUZxXDWM3y74LRh-4CcNw3-0gThj9MW4RTCgJzpmElBkUHY_iEhPGcEg8MiDj5qR5rv3hYfXBWRnqWPngT9KbNxIgxYa0Awz2bNB4679lvE%3D)
While my father studied to become a surgeon in the U.S., my mother delivered Yellow Pages and was a nanny to support our family. I witnessed my parents work hard to make their American dream come true. They are the inspiration for everything I do.

A few weeks after September 11, 2001, I went to work in the Army General Counsel's office in the Pentagon. **As a native Farsi speaker, I knew I had to do whatever I could to protect my adopted country.**

From there, I went to work fighting against Obamacare as a Republican Healthcare Advisor in both the House and the Senate. **And in 2020, I stood up to the Democrat lawyers who tried to have ballots mail-in ballots counted that we know shouldn’t have been!**

I love this country, and I have spent my career standing up for the values and principles laid out in the Constitution. [**That's why I've decided to run for Congress in Florida.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=b6fcc7ddd9d04da0bc341932a26d5428&_e=vt7XLgow9LdwG7duRHfuzl7uzjmcpDj5CnD1j_MK2glh4wOHK4pMBvMnrWRTEY38cTDJMEHOjtYFoMtbF2s4CA2itJP4rIIM_fnkfWWVemSpLu2MczfmerT08HxbxSQj1WPVsRCrlqHWwgukFIWKtFSBOjAUt22YsuN7O1ggngWPPX8FDV1V6not_ZHZhPlH0brT5QaCwCYs1nQygt6Sosh4_3mIgYoRQGZ4dvA3FfpfyAcwmOJRXm5O_XZwpaH4oYHh7tOJYSdkdJUBujP-V0jsFFyfeNu1a9lRaaZG3EsAVTxGQMd8Rom0KSk7uWhEBfiSiOXy9VKG8enAJ-5d_3pWnIW6vwpi1J4qeVV6_p6QVuxxpUzV1Y8HfyjJvOsRi8aVOnmlwjQ6c8gr9IP7lrWv0f3KHrN8nhtBbFEJvOhbSbr__wKsuz8LkV7alg5B2hFFcIdyYGRv8by4XwyfHulEPU2ALFyo5PXPv6rpB8E%3D)

[](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=b6fcc7ddd9d04da0bc341932a26d5428&_e=vt7XLgow9LdwG7duRHfuzl7uzjmcpDj5CnD1j_MK2glh4wOHK4pMBvMnrWRTEY38cTDJMEHOjtYFoMtbF2s4CA2itJP4rIIM_fnkfWWVemSpLu2MczfmerT08HxbxSQj1WPVsRCrlqHWwgukFIWKtFSBOjAUt22YsuN7O1ggngWPPX8FDV1V6not_ZHZhPlH0brT5QaCwCYs1nQygt6Sosh4_3mIgYoRQGZ4dvA3FfpfyAcwmOJRXm5O_XZwpaH4oYHh7tOJYSdkdJUBujP-V1g1vnpMVgtc_zm1vOlejiWnhTPQmSbwR6_IwWZyCPf4BRzqogNSkSEKguVHOjILhUZXAlVRKrCEPBsH5nK0xRVK6EfWg6MvjMWqasDjfYVC-B5e4h_gfMKcS2d276g-0AaaynU19RVFpp2voVfnBfrahEwJiiLOSNyTKETn_tBhOklYRimfxUTDKQg_IFzTyva4pmEGXuSe5Sd55tA6dJQ%3D)
I experienced the American Dream firsthand, and I'm sickened by now the Leftists in Washington are trying to destroy it. **My RINO opponent was an “avid” two-time Obama supporter. There's no telling who she'll side with if Florida elects her to the House.**

RINO's and Democrats want to turn our beautiful nation into their socialist dreamland. My family didn't sacrifice everything and leave Iran to live in a country where we could be persecuted for our thoughts and canceled for not agreeing with the Woke.

The reality is that this election could be our last chance to save this nation from the Left's destruction.

I have fought for this American dream. I will not stand by and let the radical-Leftist agenda destroy it.

[**If you are with me, let me know by standing up and fighting alongside me today. Please, pitch in $25, $50 or even $100 right now to help me win.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=b6fcc7ddd9d04da0bc341932a26d5428&_e=vt7XLgow9LdwG7duRHfuzl7uzjmcpDj5CnD1j_MK2glh4wOHK4pMBvMnrWRTEY38cTDJMEHOjtYFoMtbF2s4CA2itJP4rIIM_fnkfWWVemSpLu2MczfmerT08HxbxSQj1WPVsRCrlqHWwgukFIWKtFSBOjAUt22YsuN7O1ggngWPPX8FDV1V6not_ZHZhPlH0brT5QaCwCYs1nQygt6Sosh4_3mIgYoRQGZ4dvA3FfpfyAcwmOJRXm5O_XZwpaH4oYHh7tOJYSdkdJUBujP-V7kDl7s9TdamwZ0m-NZRx5ITXi4mZwQ9SG-djuPAeghZcv4Qo2oZeJvP4yz26HSg0PuVte2qUQQyAdLE5QPASHtc9jJFgOtTSfpMHXm4kYlmmAGQEKyqOl3cmTWfss5303ssoYXS8-uW_nIjAFPy8h3jU0ZsuL5ZUQnVGvrcb44aq6GImfBuz_X38JJE7W_cmSj8L1J-GLHhBZi3UmfCL0I%3D)

clean_body: My family legally immigrated to the United States when I was an infant. As Christians, we had to escape the persecution of an oppressive religious reg | Peter - I'm Amanda Makki. I'm a proud, America First Conservative running for the 13th Congressional District in Florida. My family legally immigrated to the United States when I was an infant to escape the persecution of an oppressive regime in Iran. My parents scraped together whatever resource they could to immigrate to the land of opportunity. While my father studied to become a surgeon in the U.S., my mother delivered Yellow Pages and was a nanny to support our family. I witnessed my parents work hard to make their American dream come true. They are the inspiration for everything I do. A few weeks after September 11, 2001, I went to work in the Army General Counsel's office in the Pentagon. As a native Farsi speaker, I knew I had to do whatever I could to protect my adopted country. From there, I went to work fighting against Obamacare as a Republican Healthcare Advisor in both the House and the Senate. And in 2020, I stood up to the Democrat lawyers who tried to have ballots mail-in ballots counted that we know shouldn’t have been! I love this country, and I have spent my career standing up for the values and principles laid out in the Constitution. I experienced the American Dream firsthand, and I'm sickened by now the Leftists in Washington are trying to destroy it. My RINO opponent was an “avid” two-time Obama supporter. There's no telling who she'll side with if Florida elects her to the House. RINO's and Democrats want to turn our beautiful nation into their socialist dreamland. My family didn't sacrifice everything and leave Iran to live in a country where we could be persecuted for our thoughts and canceled for not agreeing with the Woke. The reality is that this election could be our last chance to save this nation from the Left's destruction. I have fought for this American dream. I will not stand by and let the radical-Leftist agenda destroy it. Did you hear Geoff Diehl on Howie Carr's radio show last night?
If not, you missed a great discussion about Geoff's campaign for Governor and why he's a better candidate than any of his challengers.
Howie and Geoff talked about out-of-control government spending, excessive mandates, and a lack of affordability in our state.
"That's Maura Healey: big government. I don't see her cutting government regulations. As for me, I'm about individual freedoms and liberties, and a free market that helps drive down costs." \- Geoff Diehl

When it comes to the Democrat candidates running against him, Geoff has one simple message:
"Bring it on!"

Peter,
This week, President Biden and his administration celebrated one year in office – and together, we've already achieved so much.
**In just one year, **President Biden passed the American Rescue Plan to provide badly needed pandemic relief for struggling families, took executive action on gun violence, fought to protect voting rights – and got millions of shots in the arms of Americans to end this devastating pandemic.
The Biden administration is swiftly moving America forward in a time of crisis, and Americans are grateful. A recent poll shows that over 82% of Democrats approve of President Biden's first year in office.
**But we want to hear your opinion, Peter. Tell us how you feel about President Biden before our survey ends at midnight tonight:**
| | **Do you approve of President Biden?**
