name: Rev. Warnock
subject: I have incredible news for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I can’t win this fight without you.
#
Team, I have incredible news:
Even after GOP super PACs spent millions to smear me with attack ads, polls show our people-powered movement **2 POINTS ahead of Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker (R).**
**But we have a problem:** Donald Trump held a massive rally in Georgia to prop up Walker, and Mitch McConnell is lining up to flood our state with MILLIONS to defeat me.
**Republicans know that their BEST chance at taking back Senate control is turning Georgia red** – so they're pulling out all the stops to make it happen. I'm worried that if we let their attacks go unanswered, we could lose our lead and put our razor-thin majority in serious danger.
**I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, which means I fully depend on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign to victory. But right now, we're falling short of our midnight fundraising goal – so I urgently need you to rush your grassroots support right now:**

subject: I need you February 1st
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
We won't win without you | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3579c0f9af10/i-need-you-february-1st?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

You've been so helpful to our campaign. I'm blown away by the support we've received in our mission to defeat Tim Walz and HEAL Minnesota, _but now it all comes to this: Caucus night on February 1st at 7PM_.

We need you and your neighbors there, otherwise the old guard political powers may determine our next candidate - NOT the people of Minnesota. Please, make a plan to caucus! Here are some resources to help you prepare:
* [Find your caucus location](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=78803cc9a1&e=33b11688c1) February 1st at 7PM
* Watch our training videos on how to become a delegate: [Step 1](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=e87e015828&e=33b11688c1), [Step 2](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=9f33691475&e=33b11688c1), and [Step 3](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=6d53c773a0&e=33b11688c1)
* Get regular email updates about [caucusing here](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=f4aa180869&e=33b11688c1).
* Get there early and don't be intimidated! If you have ANY questions, email [endorse@DrScottJensen.com](mailto:endorse@DrScottJensen.com) and our dedicated team will be there to help you.

Caucusing is the first step to picking our candidate to beat Tim Walz. The momentum we've built over the past year may all be lost if we don't have a great turnout Caucus night! Our campaign is the best one to beat Tim Walz and the far-left political machine knows it. We've been running for almost a year with an inspiring message of hope and healing! **Now it's time to WIN**!

Show up, raise your hand and say "I want to be a delegate for Dr. Scott Jensen!"

Thank you again for your support. I'm so humbled by it!
**I'll see you February 1st at 7 PM.[Don't forget to find your location](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=aae54838c5&e=33b11688c1)!**

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota

You can be part of making history in Illinois on Election Day.

Peter,
Here's something every political expert in Illinois missed.
The latest statewide poll shows Anna Valencia running even until one fact is disclosed to voters.
Anna would be the first woman to be elected Secretary of State in the history of Illinois.
How big a deal is that fact?
Anna jumps into a 17 point lead over the two men she's running against.
Anna's challenge?
Two out of three voters don't know her or her opponents.

Federal Election Commission case. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40916737/326514184/54677820?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220121citunited_C4PA17_90da_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjIyNjYxMS1lMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aai-BqWB4qg9h9hI690SnicI2BJ-sWm9amM_f_Ra1pE=)

Derek — Twelve years ago, a 5-4 majority of the Supreme Court ruled in favor of corporations in the disastrous _Citizens United v. Federal Election Commission_ case. The decision gave corporations and special interests the green light to pour unlimited sums of money into elections under the guise of free speech. Corruption and dark money have flooded our political system ever since, creating a government that serves the interests of corporations over people. **Our democracy belongs to the American people, not the highest bidder.** That’s why Chris doesn't take any corporate PAC money. We’re building a grassroots campaign the right way — one donation at a time from folks like you. Since the ruling, corporations and special interests have dumped billions of dollars to influence our elections and lobby for policies that benefit the wealthy. Tax cuts for the rich? Slashes to social programs? Weaker union rights? Looser regulations? You name it, they get it.
Chris is running on a bold platform of corporate accountability and defending our democracy because he will always fight first and foremost for the people of Western PA in Congress.
Thanks for being on our team.
Chris for PA-17

| Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/54f71625e98a/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-6670105?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=5c82344d5e&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear friends,

Thank you to everyone who has signed a signature packet! We have loved meeting you and are so proud to have you on Team Becky. Last Saturday we had **twelve** public signature gathering events, and tomorrow we'll have **fifteen **from Bear Lake to Saint George!

If you have not yet had a chance to sign, you can find the full list of signature gathering locations with times and dates [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=ea84b412d5&e=10c1db3257).

In addition to our public events, we have a team of volunteers knocking on doors and holding their own private events to gather signatures. You can volunteer to gather signatures [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=2db2050767&e=10c1db3257). Or if you simply want to sign a packet, you can find a volunteer in your area [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a2fe1c8126&e=10c1db3257).

We need 28,000 signatures to get on the primary election ballot. Every individual who signs a signature packet for Becky must meet the following qualifications:
---
|
---
| If you have volunteered to gather signatures, **please return your packet as soon as possible so we can collect 10,000 signatures by the end of January**. Use the self-addressed stamped envelope, drop it off at an event or, contact our campaign if you need someone to come pick it up.

Thank you for supporting this campaign by signing a signature packet, volunteering to gather signatures, and encouraging others to do the same! Together we can bring more proactive, productive, and inclusive leadership to Washington.

---
|

|
---
|
---

Friend,

Our Bikers rolled up in force to Pres. Trump’s Arizona Rally and made it clear - _**President Trump and his supporters will not be canceled by Leftist thugs!**_

We’re the only grassroots organization with the determination to take on the violent Left at a moment’s notice. _**Now we’re being called to rally behind Trump and his supporters in Texas in _less than 8 days!_**_

Friend, we have a major problem. After Arizona, our Bikes are running on empty. If we can’t keep our gas tanks filled, our Bikers aren’t going anywhere.

Because of Bidenflation, our biggest cost is the gas to fuel up our Bikes. name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq68kpsgncvosq3njde5bqeq8qkb6julaghk8c1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctge1o30cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmebk80v1l78n6915san0rnn7n9qqs3g6cv322lo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctge1o30cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlmkfu3ruiq4o1lh7cm9p7d5cmpkbsifoc5uu92g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctge1o30cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zj8n6stm0lr73jmvjffc672b4s31mod9juebolno).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhjhoaii5te1e6fcpfe0m8k0eqhpovj7a02vft6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctge1o30cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: Nothing about the road ahead is easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
But I'm never one to tire from a challenge
| | |
---
Friend – it wasn’t exactly easy growing up as a Black girl from a poor family in the South, the youngest of seven children and in segregated schools.
It wasn’t easy for my parents – Dad a janitor, Mom a maid – but they did whatever they could to support us. While none of it was particularly easy, I’m very proud to have been the first in my family to graduate from college.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40918810/326522940/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2207-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2MwNDJkMy1lODdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhk0DJWab2xsxLcGvC4_IN2GZSzTGAsZAI2VyQGQ8BE=)
Much like my past, nothing about the road ahead – taking on an incumbent like Marco Rubio, whose seat the entire Republican establishment is pouring millions into protecting – will be easy. **But I’m never one to tire from a challenge, and I know that if I have grassroots support from people like you, we’ll win.**

**That’s why I’m personally asking when it matters most:** [**Will you make a grassroots donation to help me win this battleground Senate race? Whatever you contribute will build up our resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40918811/326522941/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2207-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2MwNDJkMy1lODdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhk0DJWab2xsxLcGvC4_IN2GZSzTGAsZAI2VyQGQ8BE=)
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40918812/326522942/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2207-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2MwNDJkMy1lODdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhk0DJWab2xsxLcGvC4_IN2GZSzTGAsZAI2VyQGQ8BE=)
---
I'm proud of this team for the momentum you've helped me build so far, but I'm counting on supporters like you to contribute just $5 or more now if we're going to keep going – together.

Thank you, as always, for your support,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40918813/326522943/1804727444?refcode=jtk2207-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2MwNDJkMy1lODdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhk0DJWab2xsxLcGvC4_IN2GZSzTGAsZAI2VyQGQ8BE=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40918814/326522944/1804727444?refcode=jtk2207-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2MwNDJkMy1lODdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhk0DJWab2xsxLcGvC4_IN2GZSzTGAsZAI2VyQGQ8BE=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40918815/326522945/-460395862?refcode=jtk2207-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2MwNDJkMy1lODdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhk0DJWab2xsxLcGvC4_IN2GZSzTGAsZAI2VyQGQ8BE=&emci=61a5e7ec-6379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=d7c042d3-e87a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Dahm for Senate** ](https://em

# Peter,

I still remember when Republican candidate Donald J. Trump became the greatest American President of my lifetime... I attended President Trump's Inauguration in DC five years ago, and I can still remember his America-First message echoing through the nation's Capital: _"Together, we will make America strong again. We will make America wealthy again. We will make America proud again. We will make America safe again. And yes, together, we will make America Great Again!" _

##
## The corrupt political establishment in Washington, DC and fake news mainstream media wanted to see President Donald Trump fail from the moment he announced his candidacy for President...
As a proven, conservative fighter, I knew that he was the candidate that was going to drain the swamp and Make America Great Again.
---
[ ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VWdGlN3j6CmvW5MXzsf1rRx7PW8fXtNV4DBgTgMBB8Tk3lLBmV1-WJV7CgLlwW2gDfhw7DpHXdW3Ds5dp94bGVwW5Y__nX7DxRXPW1Rqkjz34SlDpW3M21KB6z5dRWW1Rdf9X4SRnrcVx_k8J58Qn3fW3RTRqz27CmcYW8ND9x979mbPlVMJVwx9dKvy6N7xvRZ-_Sgz1W3KLtVk8lVlj0W4_bc8t9m1vvrVsD35Z59TNyDW2q55D11Mh_l3W6v-rbQ1s6gGTW17lm7M5xhBywW288S_J8pyT35W5rSrjF6mZ3PGW50ZgZJ2DjFvJW3g9k611M3K56VLLszs7lPV8c3p2z1)

Hello,
I’m Michael Edwards, the campaign manager on the ground here in Iowa for Admiral Mike Franken’s campaign against Chuck Grassley. _(I know... having two Michael’s can get confusing, so people just call me ‘Edwards’ around campaign HQ.)_
Since the Admiral announced he was running against Chuck Grassley to turn Iowa blue, we’ve had an incredible outpouring of support from thousands of grassroots donors like you. Thank you.
**But I just opened ActBlue to check on our January fundraising progress, and our donations have slowed way down:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40919756/326526838/-42398318?refcode=em20220121mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTYzYWU1MS1lYzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTQeTZjGG_l3L4JfLrDWTlc63rChmhh5ri5rol8PdSE=)

**But if this current trend continues, we are not going to hit our January goal and have what we need to fight back against McConnell’s Super PACs and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**
There’s still time to raise the money it’s going to take to defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue, but we need grassroots donors like you to give now:
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford today – to help Admiral Mike Franken defeat chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40919758/326526840/-42398318?refcode=em20220121mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTYzYWU1MS1lYzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTQeTZjGG_l3L4JfLrDWTlc63rChmhh5ri5rol8PdSE=)

clean_body: Hello, I’m Michael Edwards, the campaign manager on the ground here in Iowa for Admiral Mike Franken’s campaign against Chuck Grassley. (I know... having two Michael’s can get confusing, so people just call me ‘Edwards’ around campaign HQ.) Since the Admiral announced he was running against Chuck Grassley to turn Iowa blue, we’ve had an incredible outpouring of support from thousands of grassroots donors like you. Thank you. But I just opened ActBlue to check on our January fundraising progress, and our donations have slowed way down: = If Admiral Mike Franken is going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, he’s counting on grassroots donors like you to fund this campaign. We’re not taking one dime from Corporate PACs. But if this current trend continues, we are not going to hit our January goal and have what we need to fight back against McConnell’s Super PACs and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. There’s still time to raise the money it’s going to take to defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue, but we need grassroots donors like you to give now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you so much for being a part of the Admiral’s team, Michael Edwards Campaign Manager Mike Franken for Iowa Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Team ODP
subject: Ending this cycle of corruption once and for all.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Team,

Right now, too many politicians in D.C. are beholden to corporate special interest groups. They'd rather work for their deep-pocketed donors from the gun lobby or the fossil fuel industry than represent the people who elected them in the first place.

This endless cycle of corruption didn't come about by accident. Twelve years ago today, the Supreme Court's infamous _Citizens United_ decision ruled corporations and foreign governments are people in the eyes of the law.

Corporations aren't people. Money is not speech. But the _Citizens United_ ruling has left the American people with a government where money can flow into any mailbox, computer, or TV screen, and we have no idea who or how much was spent to influence our democracy.

**Our democracy should NOT be for sale.** If we want to actually make progress on the things that matter to working people, we have to remove big money out of our politics. It's why we're working to build the infrastructure to elect Democrats who will support pro-democracy reforms like the For the People Act, the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, and the Protecting Our Democracy Act.

[**The system is broken right now, but we have a chance to turn the tides. On today's anniversary, join us in demanding Congress put voters -- not donors -- back in charge. Add your name now if you agree we need to overturn the _Citizens United_ ruling.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40919867/326527504/136897651?ms=em22_220121_ecu_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&refcode=em22_220121_ecu_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&source=em22_220121_ecu_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_ecu_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=%2Fjozya%2BPP4583FoO0RYRFC1w563DnNJLm8mVRaXf%2Bihzfjnyyu2CEt%2FlKrixS%2BwMFNKxFhOKF7H8sZ0kZGhbHdAT%2Bf%2BQfGp%2FG6vDgvtfOYamRQ3C0UKT1OVNwPK9lm4OrBqtNZEVPLQV%2FkjPU9pSXA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDgxZDViZS1lYzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S57FQrTJEV-6FtdsqxvcnZQJX3V1beNeawqTfL_USvw=&emci=0cba66c3-db7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7d81d5be-ec7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25291327)

Team ODP

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40919868/326527505/1636697581?refcode=em22_220121_ecu_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_ecu_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDgxZDViZS1lYzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S57FQrTJEV-6FtdsqxvcnZQJX3V1beNeawqTfL_USvw=)

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Democrats Target Conservative Senator
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

Senate Conservatives Fund is proud to endorse Sen.
Ron Johnson of Wisconsin for a third term in the United States
Senate.
Johnson has been a principled fighter on key issues
like spending, debt, and immigration. That's why we supported him
in 2010 when he took on the DC Establishment in the Tea Party
revolution.
We're jumping in to help him again because he needs
the support of every conservative in the nation to win. The Left
has him in their sights and the GOP establishment cannot be
trusted to defend him.
In 2016, Mitch McConnell and the GOP's top brass
abandoned Johnson late in the campaign when the "experts" thought
he was done. But thanks to the grassroots in Wisconsin and Ron's
fighting spirit, he won anyway, without the Swamp's money and
support!
Now, he needs help again. Please join us in
supporting Senator Ron Johnson today.
You can donate directly to his campaign through our
website and we will pay all processing fees so he can spend 100%
of your contribution on voter contact.
Few leaders in Congress have done more than Johnson
in the last two years to fight for the truth and stand up to the
Covid fanatics.
▶︎ Johnson was an early leader on the need for
effective early Covid treatments. The media and the Democrats
laughed, but now many have been forced to agree with him!
▶︎ Unlike many Republicans, Johnson has defended
the rights of people who choose not to be injected with the new
Covid shots - protecting their jobs, their health care, and their
educations.
▶︎ He led Congress's most vigorous investigation
of Hunter Biden and the corruption inherent in his "family
business."
▶︎ He has fought back against the false media
narratives about the January 6 riot and asks the right questions
about what the FBI knew, and when they knew it.
These are fights that establishment Republicans have
ducked, sidestepped, and even joined with the other side. Ron
Johnson has stood tall and that's why the woke socialists are
coming for him.
Democrat campaigns and PACs will spend tens of
millions of dollars in Wisconsin to destroy Sen. Johnson. He
knows - and we know - the GOP can't be trusted to defend him.
Conservatives will have to do it ourselves.
Please support Ron Johnson today with a generous
contribution to his campaign.
Johnson has been a champion for election security
since before the outrage in 2020. He knows that local Democrat
election officials can be just as corrupt as anyone else, and has
urged Wisconsin Republicans to fight for real reforms to prevent
rigged elections.
He has been a tireless advocate for the unborn, for
gun rights, and for free speech in the fight against Big Tech
censorship. On issue after issue, when woke elites have tried to
trample Americans' liberty, Ron Johnson had stood in the breach,
upholding his oath to support and defend our Constitution.
He has earned our trust and won our support. SCF is
proud to stand with Johnson again in 2022.
Johnson is the Democrats' top Senate target this
year. They don't want him back in the Senate, with a majority and
a gavel to start subpoenaing the FBI, Dr. Fauci, the teachers'
unions, and the rest of the bullies who have put their party
ahead of our country. They're going to tap billions from their
cronies on Wall Street and in Silicon Valley.
Conservatives have to fight back. And we have to
start fighting today - for Ron Johnson and for America.
Thank you for considering this urgent request and
for doing so much to help build a conservative Senate.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

2022 SENATE CANDIDATES

Donate directly to multiple candidates with one
online transaction. SCF will pay all processing fees and transfer
100% of your contributions directly to their campaigns.

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: Angela Valvano, Keystone Progress
subject: A new PA coalition is fighting for abortion liberation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

It's been 49 years since the U.S. Supreme Court made the landmark decision in Roe v. Wade, making abortion a constitutional right nationwide.

But in recent years, we have seen abortion rights erode in states around the country, and now it looks like the Supreme Court is planning to overturn Roe in an upcoming case around a terrifying Mississippi abortion ban at 15 weeks of pregnancy.

Here in PA, we are stepping up the fight for abortion liberation for ALL.

To do just that, we are working in coalition with three other Pennsylvania organizations — the ACLU of Pennsylvania, the Women’s Centers, and the Abortion Liberation Fund of PA — to form the Pennsylvania Abortion Liberation+ (PAAL+). TOGETHER, we will work to amplify abortion liberation work in PA and mobilize the community to make abortion accessible to everyone, all the time.

Through community organizing, political education, legislative, and electoral tactics, PAAL+ plans to build community power, eradicate abortion barriers — including the Pennsylvania Abortion Control Act — decriminalize all pregnancy outcomes, and ensure abortion is accessible for everyone, particularly individuals most harmed by anti-Black white supremacy. The coalition will prioritize those who are most impacted by abortion restrictions and reproductive injustices.

We are committed to anti-oppressive, anti-racist practices, honesty and transparency, staying community centered, and directly addressing the root causes of systemic inequities and marginalization.
Community Engagement Coordinator at the Philadelphia Women’s Centers, Lizbeth Rodriguez, explained “The ‘+’ at the end of the coalition’s name is to reflect that we must go beyond fighting to ensure abortion access. We have to use an intersectional approach to this work because access to abortion is connected to other issues like having access to food, stable housing, effective education, and being able to raise your family in thriving communities.”

On this day of remembering Roe v. Wade, as we look forward to possibly tragic times for abortion rights, let's stand together and FIGHT! This is a critical moment, and we cannot waste another second.

DONATE to support our abortion liberation work TODAY!
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=012121]

In solidarity,

Angela Valvano
Western PA Organizer
Keystone Progress

P.S. To read more on Pennsylvania Abortion Liberation+, please visit abortionliberation.org [https://abortionliberation.org] .

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress

clean_body: Dear Friend, It's been 49 years since the U.S. Supreme Court made the landmark decision in Roe v. Wade, making abortion a constitutional right nationwide. But in recent years, we have seen abortion rights erode in states around the country, and now it looks like the Supreme Court is planning to overturn Roe in an upcoming case around a terrifying Mississippi abortion ban at 15 weeks of pregnancy. Here in PA, we are stepping up the fight for abortion liberation for ALL. To do just that, we are working in coalition with three other Pennsylvania organizations — the ACLU of Pennsylvania, the Women’s Centers, and the Abortion Liberation Fund of PA — to form the Pennsylvania Abortion Liberation+ (PAAL+). TOGETHER, we will work to amplify abortion liberation work in PA and mobilize the community to make abortion accessible to everyone, all the time. Through community organizing, political education, legislative, and electoral tactics, PAAL+ plans to build community power, eradicate abortion barriers — including the Pennsylvania Abortion Control Act — decriminalize all pregnancy outcomes, and ensure abortion is accessible for everyone, particularly individuals most harmed by anti-Black white supremacy. The coalition will prioritize those who are most impacted by abortion restrictions and reproductive injustices. We are committed to anti-oppressive, anti-racist practices, honesty and transparency, staying community centered, and directly addressing the root causes of systemic inequities and marginalization. Community Engagement Coordinator at the Philadelphia Women’s Centers, Lizbeth Rodriguez, explained “The ‘+’ at the end of the coalition’s name is to reflect that we must go beyond fighting to ensure abortion access. We have to use an intersectional approach to this work because access to abortion is connected to other issues like having access to food, stable housing, effective education, and being able to raise your family in thriving communities.” On this day of remembering Roe v. Wade, as we look forward to possibly tragic times for abortion rights, let's stand together and FIGHT! This is a critical moment, and we cannot waste another second. DONATE to support our abortion liberation work TODAY! [] In solidarity, Angela Valvano Western PA Organizer Keystone Progress P.S. To read more on Pennsylvania Abortion Liberation+, please visit abortionliberation.org [] . [] Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees. Keystone Progress 354 S Atlantic Ave Pittsburgh, PA 15224 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Wes Moore
subject: re: climate change
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920520/326530689/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220121climate_wm_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWJkZjY0OC1lZjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0DJKFeb34GFJz6deCu1Hp7BrCrAmUldxJ5jsWtpn90=)
---
Team, Climate change is real, it’s here, and it continues to pose a tremendous threat to our state. **[As your next governor, I’m committed to doing something about it: add your name to show your support for making Maryland a cleaner, more prosperous, and climate-resilient state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920521/326530692/1528432064?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220121climate_wm_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWJkZjY0OC1lZjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0DJKFeb34GFJz6deCu1Hp7BrCrAmUldxJ5jsWtpn90=&emci=7e3ae442-ef7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=dabdf648-ef7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=24635485)** The impacts of climate change — from increasingly severe storms, worsening pollution, poorer air quality, and more frequent extreme heat events — have already cost Maryland $10 billion over the past decade, and are expected to cost us $19 billion in real estate damage alone this century, burdening low-income communities and communities of color the most. Once a national leader on climate change, Maryland continues to fall behind, putting our health, safety, and economic future at risk. **It’s time to re-establish Maryland as the national and global leader on climate, and I have a plan to get us there.** The Moore-Miller Administration will take an informed approach and leverage every available resource to implement solutions to these challenges. Our plan will:
* Employ an entire-government and stakeholder-inclusive process whereby government agencies, local leaders and climate experts work hand-in-hand to solve our greatest challenges;
* Prioritize environmental justice for the low-income communities and communities of color facing the worst effects of climate change;
* Ensure that Maryland generates 100% clean energy by 2035;
* Reduce 60% of dangerous greenhouse gas emissions by 2030 and achieve net-zero emissions by 2045;
* Preserve the Chesapeake Bay and protect our waterways;
* Combat sea level rise and recurrent flooding;
* And more!

Scientists and economic experts have warned us repeatedly that time is running out to avert the worst impacts of climate change and prepare ourselves for a cleaner, sustainable future. **[I’m ready to put my climate plan into work on Day 1 as Maryland’s next governor. Help me do it by adding your name in support of bold action on climate change today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920522/326530693/1528432064?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220121climate_wm_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWJkZjY0OC1lZjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0DJKFeb34GFJz6deCu1Hp7BrCrAmUldxJ5jsWtpn90=&emci=7e3ae442-ef7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=dabdf648-ef7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=24635485)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920523/326530694/1528432064?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220121climate_wm_90da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWJkZjY0OC1lZjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0DJKFeb34GFJz6deCu1Hp7BrCrAmUldxJ5jsWtpn90=&emci=7e3ae442-ef7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=dabdf648-ef7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=24635485)
---
Elevate,
Wes
P.S. — [You can read my full plan to address climate change here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920524/326530695/-1165977136?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWJkZjY0OC1lZjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0DJKFeb34GFJz6deCu1Hp7BrCrAmUldxJ5jsWtpn90=&emci=7e3ae442-ef7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=dabdf648-ef7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=24635485)

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.

name: Paxton's Patriots
subject: Holding Big Tech Accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign
body:
Paxton's Patriots Daily Update January 21, 2022

|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update January 21, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** Over and over again Texas consumers have been victimized by Big Tech giants like Google and this case of deceptive trade practices is part of a pattern. Ken Paxton will hold Google accountable because no conglomerate is above the law in Texas.

**Link: **[https://www.foxbusiness.com/politics/texas-sues-google-deceptive-trade-practice-pixel](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=60f1966a230a4bde984ca99b10707219&_e=kI6A_Qh5-VLEc93mHlYps7gLa0FMrhtvBBvs_LfAQpWTGLLmwL1qwE9WUJCYBRCUIduIODuBVRT9_mhA_Pg1bcvGXGBZnYQlarzSSYIrzReeQkTwWvzriTM-n0gSEeMlujUpsMh-1BhCf_i45C6YU_hpF4NswYgUqrNwulqcmr1O_v0IMD-z9nKmii1_lwYhI9-8gZW1OXUdrUO03N4pXsoJ2b6lQ4CE1PopSec_bfOqA847y0WwsyFoZv3MuJcpJUQTdbIANGJ2tJnzQvX7flzo7AAeMQ7YyUntTzPLCMwYEKoIUgBpNUlgVXMd4LiwrmmBzHQD7jOGBeYbUR3L_Q%3D%3D)

**Theme of the Day: Holding Big Tech Accountable**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ We know that Big Tech has consistently used its immense power to silence conservative voices. Now, [Google has victimized Texans with misleading endorsements](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=60f1966a230a4bde984ca99b10707219&_e=kI6A_Qh5-VLEc93mHlYps7gLa0FMrhtvBBvs_LfAQpWTGLLmwL1qwE9WUJCYBRCUIduIODuBVRT9_mhA_Pg1bcvGXGBZnYQlarzSSYIrzReeQkTwWvzriTM-n0gSEeMloYC_2veNzwkZt-QrAR61it5FUNOo_S3livDjswWWOAuBj5eIVn9vvq61NVFuOCXRKNmrvhFUjzwgfrCtL74Tr52rSuKDd94V3SIpSMvMV8zJF8SBuL4we3feWllHMSQe-m9FKzF4vhoJLBSIH5bt5hYDTb-mQBPrOk00mBzV5XGCjI6kjV8AP4gK10pcCpgBS5UUFApvYUra9CoNKbAxSw%3D%3D) by producing, scripting, and paying for advertisements that were blatantly false. Google and any other Big Tech company should be held accountable for committing fraudulent acts, and Ken Paxton will ensure every company knows nobody is above the law in the State of Texas.

~ In the wake of the Colleyville Synagogue hostage situation, more and more questions arise about how this dangerous individual came to our country. Ken Paxton is deeply concerned about the FBI’s preoccupation with political battles instead of keeping America safe. The FBI is clearly focusing on prosecuting or investigating parents who are speaking at school board meetings, not genuine threats. When the FBI diverts resources to political efforts as opposed to real efforts, it’s dangerous. Ken Paxton will continue to do everything in his power to protect Texans and hold the federal government accountable for their repeated failures. [Ken Paxton joined Newsmax to discuss this dangerous situation. ](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=60f1966a230a4bde984ca99b10707219&_e=kI6A_Qh5-VLEc93mHlYpsyZNTa5eMtZ-pFTCw0jHlaPqaYx4UOLAwhoVnBu5Ky8gNyK_jMZZmU223G7dz_LqCRv8ZcfEGvsijvU6az6FvVNiXM-yQimvuhxaRzb6A1ikrpWZR897jiJJCgfFj2Lp6AXL_IiSq4CYStNsPRzBQnlcULAgh7tS-FTy9ltIE66W3dPz52g2VyeDuNkIZYQ8f8nJRXS386h5e-0We9RXnj9_eUUiUQSdiUgBd38iLct1OqCZAaJJ5rsE8praROq5zhbLcEpqgjQpQNDT6TSd32uT1tYVLlsVhzE7kChdxjwleeC4zYBjsdLz8sgXQIwTQA%3D%3D)

~ Joe Biden’s reckless administration is now allowing illegal immigrants to fly across the country by presenting their arrest warrants to TSA in place of identification. This is an egregious threat to our national security. We should not be allowing unvetted individuals to fly in America that have not been vetted by the proper law enforcement authorities. [Ken Paxton joined Fox Business to discuss this travesty and the latest regarding the border crisis](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=60f1966a230a4bde984ca99b10707219&_e=kI6A_Qh5-VLEc93mHlYps8HWma_jvTbs4n-SLIeFrkdvte4Cv_OCf4yHR9l1nwMc0F3AJ8KCoiCOAx4sxNqEX0WHbqH7sbJ2oyc-YdZIUTLpOJUqTglyNis3xsTWNi5RXQhIEGMAEnADvro9kHWe-OxTPfCTCSAmvvMcS09wEBTSvzwYtRBPH8g89HbIpy4HEFP8ULUASoacItbfoSlR7uR50TQLAsPb7Fss_4X7D-JyPPCobcCA2JdkCbQ9ViEqyhI2QMpHnQUgmeM7gmFILWkvL94tZfVcCRmZqy015VIWiIZ2sCR0xomO1_BLzuak).

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=60f1966a230a4bde984ca99b10707219&_e=kI6A_Qh5-VLEc93mHlYps4VXMX4n-vxj5sTV6Emj11eaWsp0egjjdHAbMPxjaZBG87rK1ERo-vY5E-XCmG4Qh4BhZSnLgrykuh9d9ZryP92ZTMW0fTr_YUNTPsNUxz19GXa1c7tG-Suzr_BKvQOHjnbCwji1FcnBqKZkt-B2bfvI2UVnK2q8w02neub3Dhmm-iG6PHbz5dU2ji8cUA-QdHh9jnxB11pWr-zckFm8swnmnnAZmvsbonZcLOw3zRJ5Mgxwm-rzs6dk7SV3_nMv1w%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. # [URGENT: Tell the January 6th Committee to subpoena Donald Trump >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T861f41c1-85ef-4202-80d8-452ed740c69f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | On January 6, 2021, Donald Trump incited a violent mob to storm the U.S. Capitol after spreading the Big Lie about the integrity of the 2020 election. But so far he has faced ZERO CONSEQUENCES for his crimes. Enough is enough. We must know the truth about Trump’s level of involvement that day. The only way we can do that is to get the January 6th Committee to subpoena Trump and force him to testify under oath. If Trump refuses to comply, he can be prosecuted. We can’t let him get off scot-free – it's time to prove he’s guilty once and for all. Trump must be held accountable for this attempt to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Our democracy depends on it. [Sign now to tell the January 6th Committee to subpoena Donald Trump >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74e6a0ff-1362-46f1-a122-aefc238e286c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Greater Georgia
subject: NEW QUESTIONS ARISE OVER SECRETARY OF STATE’S NO-BID, $3.5M DEAL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, JAN. 21, 2022
NEW QUESTIONS ARISE OVER SECRETARY OF STATE'S NO-BID, $3.5M DEAL
ATLANTA - This week, the Georgia Secretary of State's office [announced](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H03z2HUy08_FYxarVjtZKtqkRw6fr3AGx-I8c0cKE9JwQKLhj4Os8HzcW2lVI4-zSBgxiC3aZlnnrCio81XQarwjsEhOjvqpuHKzFmTMRd7GJ5MWs7S09738iUT-VxzWSIeifHr1UcTb2BnO0hUpBR9MMMyoGEH2fE3G5xgCUbfT2JRFjdsj_VZHeuIuBgBbpBfHNeSlCKHaA-I32dd0zw-2_wmjtlBpoMY8PQ6c_JdEFzxr7O_mvQueUEi3Wrrb8Ceb1cd4ilnkF3Fk5vYiWpxAHWdxQoNx_a4oCmRGNaF5ojHi4HiTwlSRBGDys27lRdupJ49QJ4rg2Z_BB8216SBERpFzlCQNkaVHK64bIZw=&c=StA_uGzuaFqMKJeux3WBHoJel8iL-WJokDaSxBI7DT9A7LO5V5812g==&ch=EVWu_c1IjC1yaPy3G-OnXE3fbJ34cl5GgkA2hkBcIV7DdRRZKta1TA==) that it has awarded a $3.5-million contract to a technology company for new voter registration software. The contract, which was awarded in a [no-bid process](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H03z2HUy08_FYxarVjtZKtqkRw6fr3AGx-I8c0cKE9JwQKLhj4Os8HzcW2lVI4-z8c5Q-E5f8jzni3036IpY87LibDlOCW-HlH7ZLsdyc4dZoTwdBRncQq9dJZs5XZFDtmDOrM6740cn8-N1Y6FeOASfLbnAKB_dGHsNcuZxQuT6aRAJRcU762bVokUl6BH-zHWvmwawXICdM7xUrQl_69mLgkiZqO3GbrgtOgp7svz6AW6m5TxEAZtmfhKAXUaPbvO067J00r_nFY1MoXU0RIupyKjt9sSE&c=StA_uGzuaFqMKJeux3WBHoJel8iL-WJokDaSxBI7DT9A7LO5V5812g==&ch=EVWu_c1IjC1yaPy3G-OnXE3fbJ34cl5GgkA2hkBcIV7DdRRZKta1TA==), will put the company in charge of verifying the voting eligibility of Georgians at the polls - a critical component of Election Day infrastructure.
The Secretary of State's office has previously [touted](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H03z2HUy08_FYxarVjtZKtqkRw6fr3AGx-I8c0cKE9JwQKLhj4Os8HzcW2lVI4-zLtFMCsAf-6julDy8TyZW1HD5GmASvOWAAAisv2DTXqYDKLUZtKMlfvb6z2P2nrXV5RfGQiBC72dK7HSScCV5mFybI-DXSmDdesQHzcKgNRr_j0iFG1p00chUiWWxx77TJc35BPGVhgM=&c=StA_uGzuaFqMKJeux3WBHoJel8iL-WJokDaSxBI7DT9A7LO5V5812g==&ch=EVWu_c1IjC1yaPy3G-OnXE3fbJ34cl5GgkA2hkBcIV7DdRRZKta1TA==) the importance of transparency in elections. But the recent decision to hand over a major state contract without any kind of competitive bidding process, for a product that will be instrumental to our elections, raises serious questions.
After a tumultuous election year that has robbed millions of their confidence in Georgia elections, voters have the right to know: why did the Secretary of State's office [refuse to open up a standard bidding process](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H03z2HUy08_FYxarVjtZKtqkRw6fr3AGx-I8c0cKE9JwQKLhj4Os8HzcW2lVI4-z8c5Q-E5f8jzni3036IpY87LibDlOCW-HlH7ZLsdyc4dZoTwdBRncQq9dJZs5XZFDtmDOrM6740cn8-N1Y6FeOASfLbnAKB_dGHsNcuZxQuT6aRAJRcU762bVokUl6BH-zHWvmwawXICdM7xUrQl_69mLgkiZqO3GbrgtOgp7svz6AW6m5TxEAZtmfhKAXUaPbvO067J00r_nFY1MoXU0RIupyKjt9sSE&c=StA_uGzuaFqMKJeux3WBHoJel8iL-WJokDaSxBI7DT9A7LO5V5812g==&ch=EVWu_c1IjC1yaPy3G-OnXE3fbJ34cl5GgkA2hkBcIV7DdRRZKta1TA==) for this particular government contract? Why did they choose to knowingly award a multimillion-dollar contract for critical election infrastructure to a vendor with a history of [opposing Georgia's election laws](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H03z2HUy08_FYxarVjtZKtqkRw6fr3AGx-I8c0cKE9JwQKLhj4Os8HzcW2lVI4-zkXpjCIp3IRzHXKuPDzlrth3mVam3pjj35JCOPNJoqH6ozHCanm4M_0-r84v_oy3AMHXlJZ2oFgA8K8qYb7AE25HJfZuVGV3lwFvfq2tKj1XwPZ66uLN9O57kXdqqn7EO&c=StA_uGzuaFqMKJeux3WBHoJel8iL-WJokDaSxBI7DT9A7LO5V5812g==&ch=EVWu_c1IjC1yaPy3G-OnXE3fbJ34cl5GgkA2hkBcIV7DdRRZKta1TA==)? The Secretary of State's office hand-picked a vendor in a closed-door, no-bid deal. The voters of this state will never know how the deal came to be, whether this vendor offers the best possible services, or if the company will be able to impartially manage our elections.
The Secretary of State's office should aspire to the highest degrees of integrity, not the lowest possible standards. If Georgians are to believe in their elections again, and to have confidence that their votes count, the Secretary of State's office must pull back the curtain - and begin conducting their dealings with the full transparency that our voters deserve.

name: Team Lira
subject: Pushing for immigration reform
body:
| Peter, there is no other district in the country that includes more of the U.S.-Mexico border than TX-23. So when immigration issues come up in Congress, it should be the TX-23 Representative whose voice should be the loudest. It’s our communities and families that are affected. And John is ready to be that representative. He’s ready to advocate for long-term, humane immigration reform with an attainable pathway to citizenship. The answer is not to militarize the border and treat immigrants as humans without rights. Together we can reform border policy that improves our protection of the people of TX-23 and immigrants alike. [_**Can you make a donation to elect the Representative who is ready to get to Washington for bold, meaningful border legislation that treats immigrants with respect?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920806/326531868/1615379381?refcode=em20220121&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDg2YmQ2NC1mMTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3EDGjZr2Xe4KNoXWw5d2hpc2VXHOhaG7wg4mZJd6Z1w=) **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920807/326531869/1615379381?refcode=em20220121&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDg2YmQ2NC1mMTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3EDGjZr2Xe4KNoXWw5d2hpc2VXHOhaG7wg4mZJd6Z1w=)** Immigrants are a part of what makes this country so special and built this country in the first place. name: Michele Rayner
subject: The fight for women's health is just getting started, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920879/326532191/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIwNDJlOS1mMTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VfSZejmd0CR4Uf0SDyMhRtelAT0SMdP9mdBO0KrhMA=)

I'll get straight to the point, Peter: **Reproductive rights are in _serious_ trouble.**

Right now, the conservative majority Supreme Court is showing every intention of overturning _Roe v. Wade_ – the _incredibly_ important ruling that established the right to a safe, legal abortion.

**This is an attack on the bodily autonomy and health care of countless women, and we need Congress to step up right now.**

**[Peter, we need national leadership to fight for abortion access and the fundamental right to health care _now_. Will you sign on to our petition demanding that Congress protect _Roe v. Wade?_ >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920880/326532192/1202210509?ms=em22_220121_roept&refcode=em22_220121_roept&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIwNDJlOS1mMTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VfSZejmd0CR4Uf0SDyMhRtelAT0SMdP9mdBO0KrhMA=&emci=58c9ef02-2b7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=20b042e9-f17a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=34271788)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920881/326532193/1202210509?ms=em22_220121_roept&refcode=em22_220121_roept&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIwNDJlOS1mMTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VfSZejmd0CR4Uf0SDyMhRtelAT0SMdP9mdBO0KrhMA=&emci=58c9ef02-2b7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=20b042e9-f17a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=34271788) Abortion directly impacts the health and safety of women everywhere – and we can't allow it to be stripped away overnight.

And as with most injustices in this country, Black women, who are already routinely denied resources, services, and vital reproductive health information, will be hit the hardest. **If Congress falls short on protecting _Roe v. Wade_ , then once again, our government will be failing Black women everywhere.**

We know that when abortion access is restricted, the number of unsafe, at-home abortions increase. **_This is a life or death issue_ , and we need leaders in Congress to do what's right by women and pregnant folks everywhere.**

**[It's disgusting that after 49 years of _Roe_ , legislators are still waging this war on women's reproductive rights. Safe and legal abortions are at stake – click here and demand Congress protect Roe v. Wade >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920882/326532194/1202210509?ms=em22_220121_roept&refcode=em22_220121_roept&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIwNDJlOS1mMTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VfSZejmd0CR4Uf0SDyMhRtelAT0SMdP9mdBO0KrhMA=&emci=58c9ef02-2b7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=20b042e9-f17a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=34271788)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920883/326532195/1202210509?ms=em22_220121_roept&refcode=em22_220121_roept&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIwNDJlOS1mMTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VfSZejmd0CR4Uf0SDyMhRtelAT0SMdP9mdBO0KrhMA=&emci=58c9ef02-2b7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=20b042e9-f17a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=34271788) Thanks for rising to meet this moment, Peter. Together, we _will_ make our voices heard.

– Michele [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920884/326532196/1870454853?refcode=em22_220121_roept&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIwNDJlOS1mMTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VfSZejmd0CR4Uf0SDyMhRtelAT0SMdP9mdBO0KrhMA=)

If Congress falls short on protecting Roe v. Wade , then once again, our government will be failing Black women everywhere. We know that when abortion access is restricted, the number of unsafe, at-home abortions increase. This is a life or death issue , and we need leaders in Congress to do what's right by women and pregnant folks everywhere. Thanks for rising to meet this moment, Peter. Together, we will make our voices heard. – Michele = *

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Citizens United has obstructed progress for 12 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Twelve years ago today, the Supreme Court's _Citizens United_ decision changed our campaign finance system for the worse. Since that ruling, America's elections have been flooded with dark money. And accountability in our democracy has diminished. Trust in our government is continuing to erode, and people are becoming increasingly (and rightfully) frustrated with how broken our politics are.

Last year, Derek and his colleagues in the House voted to pass the For the People Act (H.R.1) to restore trust in our political process by enacting essential campaign finance reform. Derek wrote two of the provisions in the legislation that increase transparency in elections and crack down on politicians who cheat.

While we're still waiting on the Senate to take this critical reform legislation up for a vote, Derek and the House majority passed another democracy reform package last week: the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act. This legislation will strengthen the voice of the American people in our democracy and end the dominance of big money in the political process.

[**Derek and the Democratic House majority have been working to defend our democracy. It 's time for the Senate to take action on campaign finance reform. Add your name to our petition today and help us strengthen American democracy so it works for the people again »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-OQMSecdec2HBl2HHhkxKqB62CZtsHkxTZvKBsFBYbM=/LcraHBb5KPkFpkB818C8ONo9d6A89sUMyaNobTKNLYI=?ms=em22_220121_CU_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220121_CU_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220121_CU_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_CU_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)

Our politicians should work for the people, not the other way around. But with unlimited dark money spending, too many politicians are beholden to special interests instead.

There's far too much at stake for our country to let special interests continue to obstruct progress - voting rights, health care, climate change, reproductive freedom, and more are all on the line. We can't wait any longer for campaign finance reform if we're going to preserve our democracy.

[**Derek needs to know you 're with him in the work to strengthen our democracy and reform campaign finance laws. If you agree it's time to root out corruption in our politics by restoring accountability, sign on now >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/-OQMSecdec2HBl2HHhkxKqB62CZtsHkxTZvKBsFBYbM=/LcraHBb5KPkFpkB818C8ONo9d6A89sUMyaNobTKNLYI=?ms=em22_220121_CU_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220121_CU_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220121_CU_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_CU_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/-OQMSecdec2HBl2HHhkxKqB62CZtsHkxTZvKBsFBYbM=/UrL8lB_jU5Wk4Nk4PaOCvD5EFBxsj0abAye9aff-I0g=?refcode=em22_220121_CU_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_CU_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Ann Roe
subject: Our reproductive rights are being threatened
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920924/326532403/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ2YjU4YS1mMjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prU7IAqiPvyTRC8lIL6TM_2LE6sOr76kAXqZQX2g5R4=&emci=f40f6f4a-427a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=db46b58a-f27a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15639879)

Hi friends,

Today marks the 49th anniversary of the _Roe v. Wade_ decision recognizing the constitutional right to access safe, legal abortion.

We have come so far from that ruling, but there are people looking to set us back and strip away our rights.

The rights guaranteed by the landmark _Roe_ ruling are being threatened. In states across the country, Republicans are hard at work to overturn this ruling and are looking to take away this fundamental human right.

**We need to fight these challenges to our rights every step of the way.**

I cannot emphasize enough how important _Roe_ has been in normalizing abortion, empowering women with the agency they have over their own bodies, and prioritizing women's healthcare as a whole. We cannot let this freedom be taken away.

**[I fully support the right to choose. Donate $5 so that I can take this fight to Congress and protect our rights not just for Wisconsin, but for our country](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920925/326532404/-1425244157?refcode=em22_2201121_roeanniv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ2YjU4YS1mMjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prU7IAqiPvyTRC8lIL6TM_2LE6sOr76kAXqZQX2g5R4=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920926/326532405/-1425244157?refcode=em22_2201121_roeanniv&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ2YjU4YS1mMjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prU7IAqiPvyTRC8lIL6TM_2LE6sOr76kAXqZQX2g5R4=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920927/326532406/-1425244157?refcode=em22_2201121_roeanniv&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ2YjU4YS1mMjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prU7IAqiPvyTRC8lIL6TM_2LE6sOr76kAXqZQX2g5R4=)

[Express Donate $250](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920930/326532409/-1425244157?refcode=em22_2201121_roeanniv&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ2YjU4YS1mMjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prU7IAqiPvyTRC8lIL6TM_2LE6sOr76kAXqZQX2g5R4=) | [Donate Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920931/326532410/-1425244157?refcode=em22_2201121_roeanniv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ2YjU4YS1mMjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prU7IAqiPvyTRC8lIL6TM_2LE6sOr76kAXqZQX2g5R4=)
In Wisconsin, it is extremely difficult for women to get an abortion. There are so many obstacles in place before a person can access services: parental consent is required for minors, there is a ban on almost all abortions after 20 weeks, TWO TRIPS are required with a 24 hour waiting period after receiving biased counseling.

These obstacles are all set in place to deter women from accessing basic healthcare services that they should not have to go through counseling to prove their seriousness of this personal and private choice.

There are also insurance restrictions. Our most vulnerable suffer the most from these restrictions that are put in place. **The right to choose shouldn't just be for those who can afford it, it should be available to anyone.**

If the Supreme Court overturns _Roe_ or severely limits abortion protections, our state COULD enact some of these archaic and outright biased laws, like our 172-year-old law banning all abortions that would go into effect the second _Roe_ is overturned.

Wisconsin is one of the 8 states that _still_ has a law in place banning any abortion -- from 1849, long before _Roe_ was decided in 1973. Even if that law stays on the books, the Republicans in this state won't stop attacking our rights. Our governor had to veto FIVE anti-abortion bills just last month!

**[We need Representatives in office that will champion women's rights -- not remove them. If the right to choose is important to you, we need you to chip in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920932/326532411/-1425244157?refcode=em22_2201121_roeanniv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ2YjU4YS1mMjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prU7IAqiPvyTRC8lIL6TM_2LE6sOr76kAXqZQX2g5R4=)**
[CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40920933/326532412/-1425244157?refcode=em22_2201121_roeanniv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ2YjU4YS1mMjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prU7IAqiPvyTRC8lIL6TM_2LE6sOr76kAXqZQX2g5R4=)
The fight for women's rights is far from over. We need to stay vigilant to protect this basic right.

In solidarity.

– Ann Roe

subject: How I secured more affordable housing for San Diego 🏘
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gómez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884
body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]One of my core beliefs is that housing is a RIGHT.
That's why I fought so hard to secure more affordable housing while on the San Diego City Council.
I made it illegal to discriminate against renters with Section 8 housing vouchers, and when COVID-19 happened, I sprung into action to ban evictions and create rental relief.
In Sacramento, I'll make sure we pass common-sense housing reform because everyone deserves a roof over their head and a place to call home.
You can support my campaign to expand affordable housing and end homelessness in California by chipping in >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgettegomezsp-digital_generalemail?refcode=X_012122_Housing]
Thank you!
-- Georgette

*Help Melissa Martz get on the Ballot *

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/282379cb68c1/volunteers-needed-for-gun-shows?e=77bc5297c6)

** VOLUNTEER AT THE GUN SHOW!
------------------------------------------------------------

Dear Fellow Patriots!

We need 2,600 signatures to get Melissa Martz on the ballot. One way we are doing this is to collect signatures at the GUN SHOW. Our goal is 50-75 each day. If you are able to volunteer your time for one or more of the dates listed BELOW --- PLEASE REPLY to this email.

*If you are able to volunteer for an entire day --A stipend for lunch will be provided*

Have another idea about how to collect signatures?? The forms can be printed from the Campaign website OR we can mail them out to you!

THANK YOU to all who have given of their time and talents to help us in the fight to preserve our Republic! We ARE doing it!!

name: Hillsdale College via Backing America
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says

[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=e9a95a7544964da089fee73a7378111f&_t=wPONNsUIpU1HJR-bpk0fuWi6h5TJlHkm-8AqHltetNzj-j03FZFxVYBvyntJiyz8-X0i1BFcS7p1ghdq2ZDwWAToSemxrpkXQTijRTvwNAfpPK77b4yPf-JiWtBXCMs3cVfXlxb08eB0vfIQaQklQTykuJ9pNr5bmXxZHD7wVjBmZIa_4G82GmA66APKLANnXpL7uw1VvQDnKk35__1g6UR7im_M1uxQhpbgeJF40yQ%3D)
_Please see a message from our sponsor:_
---
| | | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=e9a95a7544964da089fee73a7378111f&_e=S8uhRMA3CJ04BJdgr0hYAARjctndYvlzdRs3eCGR5DZreAsh41eQ5lmKCjdxGpn37T2lT2y67vkLbT8AJN_RU7dG0EwT_o-6Q8zliLn-ZNbu3Md2iXxExJsId3ndvYcs-JUfksHyoC9pp-hZbBN4f8of4R75jd1xW7h37nnsxvhYguK0pzFK-XokCjZJ_eB9bTiMVOqujEftAlIBppc1CYioaWLoMC17yE2UqzWksMk7Ow4_Evxl1M4Og6vNv_ZIhfkuXset37Lwmj4JphAJsfi5LCUV7fhsLJ14s4zKg9oY1cM-QVLVcInQt_ISj9jOy9Z_i2WTWs4xQtHMHzrwa0CYVmT4wSUkE9Ndywzl44fE-EADZgUdR7jEsOE4T0lEhi-VQ5-ARWTXIOYF6GJ3_E1ZnPhjW3cyJvWxOuih9UatNtry44Z6gykRoghdFNye0wMweqqn7tlaRHxqkJJF3QJ6URHSVAExEpflnGiZCKU%3D)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=e9a95a7544964da089fee73a7378111f&_e=S8uhRMA3CJ04BJdgr0hYAARjctndYvlzdRs3eCGR5DZreAsh41eQ5lmKCjdxGpn37T2lT2y67vkLbT8AJN_RU7dG0EwT_o-6Q8zliLn-ZNbu3Md2iXxExJsId3ndvYcs-JUfksHyoC9pp-hZbBN4f8of4R75jd1xW7h37nnsxvhYguK0pzFK-XokCjZJ_eB9bTiMVOqujEftAlIBppc1CYioaWLoMC17yE2UqzWksMk7Ow4_Evxl1M4Og6vNv_ZIhfkuXset37Lwmj4JphAJsSKyTb-3ke0e_KNL-sDhNgqMDs8GuG0Voj10xa8-6i7U1WOwHeMS5KfTHd1LrsFjRsO9hVqA4aQjIH92jtfr0icbSmcZnlZBo8rkqR2eziVz8d2zt67NR1CsqSi2aPIlc6QTm-1eTRIhN1cPZStFgTj2LrWMuU3vDCm2LTJcTejuATLIecllLtbwUeqinCCaalNO_VordMwmVtCvQ4rx7fs%3D)**_
## Do you believe the American education system is failing millions of young Americans?
[YES](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=e9a95a7544964da089fee73a7378111f&_e=S8uhRMA3CJ04BJdgr0hYAARjctndYvlzdRs3eCGR5DZreAsh41eQ5lmKCjdxGpn37T2lT2y67vkLbT8AJN_RU7dG0EwT_o-6Q8zliLn-ZNbu3Md2iXxExJsId3ndvYcs-JUfksHyoC9pp-hZbBN4f8of4R75jd1xW7h37nnsxvhYguK0pzFK-XokCjZJ_eB9bTiMVOqujEftAlIBppc1CYioaWLoMC17yE2UqzWksMk7Ow4_Evxl1M4Og6vNv_ZIhfkuXset37Lwmj4JphAJsSf4YTvVuG68XumHyeHJas0hnxjqy9XVp_10GH4evt9Y6-kleLMivztDBYyKmpBO4Xq7RROYQmGCekymLWHk4c_jCtHmgqrj7IWx_c7rmzG_iQYqCPj5P1Snnru-UqerLykKCxmRj90EdiC7cLU_r6dIjy6ugROpiakyIuSY4wpWmPAqsHFZzNQqhUy5TmdkWSlaL_9RYzvtocHPNmxswy8%3D) [NO](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=e9a95a7544964da089fee73a7378111f&_e=S8uhRMA3CJ04BJdgr0hYAARjctndYvlzdRs3eCGR5DZreAsh41eQ5lmKCjdxGpn37T2lT2y67vkLbT8AJN_RU7dG0EwT_o-6Q8zliLn-ZNbu3Md2iXxExJsId3ndvYcs-JUfksHyoC9pp-hZbBN4f8of4R75jd1xW7h37nnsxvhYguK0pzFK-XokCjZJ_eB9bTiMVOqujEftAlIBppc1CYioaWLoMC17yE2UqzWksMk7Ow4_Evxl1M4Og6vNv_ZIhfkuXset37Lwmj4JphAJsfxp3ktlsKvnO4T9gMRo92HeITiAQff9e08gROMOk7UfUDIthopTKbeY1-c1lK__Vzx_xiIg6zORN6Og5ktbY_5HOFqi8qOqGA4Zt83eipltEeIrtv_BQxmfPK1ec5s8xhZIeS01Hc5KiCWCAfLcjyk2WNCHcWXbbP5zGYHL3MT0t-qwqkiJrACWa0oMAvff1WK__6_bnxU5vj6RvX1KVOs%3D) We need more citizens like you— _informed citizens_ —because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative—the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand:
* WHAT the Constitution says
* HOW it relates to current issues and events
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable.** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=e9a95a7544964da089fee73a7378111f&_e=S8uhRMA3CJ04BJdgr0hYAARjctndYvlzdRs3eCGR5DZreAsh41eQ5lmKCjdxGpn37T2lT2y67vkLbT8AJN_RU7dG0EwT_o-6Q8zliLn-ZNbu3Md2iXxExJsId3ndvYcs-JUfksHyoC9pp-hZbBN4f8of4R75jd1xW7h37nnsxvhYguK0pzFK-XokCjZJ_eB9bTiMVOqujEftAlIBppc1CYioaWLoMC17yE2UqzWksMk7Ow4_Evxl1M4Og6vNv_ZIhfkuXset37Lwmj4JphAJsc_VfBaMq3r6jOsvQFK7QPYjFVA3a3v2AeTgwnJGFasZ7DTuyMZnmIougsKiJJgxnAIL3oO4nK4uyaJTHaFVT7qFNIbr7gnQPpdf5KSPfG4no8EGUe_g7eANg2t3YPSzYKdiNzaIjhhEFbfZQuE8ycjIgNQNMTxPSXr4mVjp7baZPy8yyd_Dq_1onv6s-TGZYlHEf0_9bt11XXC7ISJCdQo%3D)
For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

[Privacy Policy](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=e9a95a7544964da089fee73a7378111f&_e=7zKdqXaK29RCvG56oTNNPx5DLTYfyhzb6ZGR3Qj55BWuSGNYNbGtpbHz4yl7eS2YMYfsdL3HoaadDLHGqkpDiaUwtfvG364fGEl0MP4mWJMDJc0eI7EKiq5gDNiygjPihG7BDSsuO-wO_3VhNAIYkpbj_Apk6gkrD35e-B2l-8mROYmrVLBuV0RuNooqaX7gtYH4awwlwyB20XTBC1z2YP3OzP9wdUl973VRwqhDmZV7m0vZqyUh5Xwt3-hd3cBiXVbAjF-UKJYoO9YDxnDs5clfQlC9NvpXhUscx5_4Pv9Q-Fc9eWLbDrUYbxsBMpbU)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: 50 Republican senators lined up against it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Democrats put voting rights legislation on the floor of the United States Senate. And when all 50 Republican senators lined up against it, we tried to block their filibuster. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40921136/326533067/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ2Z_FIL_E_20220121_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzM1MWUxYy1mMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nl6VE8lyQa4S-zoWA5h3P1gJ6Rge6TrStlp_9qaAmCs=&emci=0ccbc115-f37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=dc351e1c-f37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908)
---
Wednesday night was a tough loss. Democrats put voting rights legislation on the floor of the United States Senate. And when all 50 Republican senators lined up against it, we tried to block their filibuster. Then we came up short, by two votes. But I’m not giving up. The stakes are too high. And here’s the way I see it:
* Every single Republican senator is now on the record opposing widely popular legislation to protect free and fair elections. So we will make sure everyone knows what they just did. They will need to defend those votes.
* **We had 48 Democratic votes to get around the filibuster, so we know exactly how to win down the road: elect two more Democratic senators who support filibuster reform.**

In the days, weeks, and months ahead, I will keep pushing in every way I can to protect the right to vote and the right to have that vote counted. We didn’t want to be here. We wanted to have the Freedom to Vote Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act already in the bag. But this is the fight that’s in front of us, and this is the uphill path we can take to protect our democracy. Me? I’m going up that hill. **Tomorrow, and the next day, and the day after that, we get right back up and get right back in the fight to defend our democracy.** [_**Can you pitch in to support our campaign and help expand our Democratic Senate majority? $3 or any amount you can chip in would make a real difference right now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40921137/326533068/-237140144?refcode=EMZ2Z_FIL_E_20220121_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzM1MWUxYy1mMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nl6VE8lyQa4S-zoWA5h3P1gJ6Rge6TrStlp_9qaAmCs=&emci=0ccbc115-f37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=dc351e1c-f37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_
