clean_body: Democrats put voting rights legislation on the floor of the United States Senate. And when all 50 Republican senators lined up against it, we tried to block their filibuster. | | | Wednesday night was a tough loss. Democrats put voting rights legislation on the floor of the United States Senate. And when all 50 Republican senators lined up against it, we tried to block their filibuster. Then we came up short, by two votes. But I’m not giving up. The stakes are too high. And here’s the way I see it: Every single Republican senator is now on the record opposing widely popular legislation to protect free and fair elections. So we will make sure everyone knows what they just did. They will need to defend those votes. We had 48 Democratic votes to get around the filibuster, so we know exactly how to win down the road: elect two more Democratic senators who support filibuster reform. In the days, weeks, and months ahead, I will keep pushing in every way I can to protect the right to vote and the right to have that vote counted. We didn’t want to be here. We wanted to have the Freedom to Vote Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act already in the bag. But this is the fight that’s in front of us, and this is the uphill path we can take to protect our democracy. Me? I’m going up that hill. Tomorrow, and the next day, and the day after that, we get right back up and get right back in the fight to defend our democracy. | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | We just need to gain two more seats. We’re going to do this — together. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: JB Pritzker
subject: Important status update:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JB for Governor
body:
|
---
Good afternoon, friend — I want to take a few minutes to share how we're putting Springfield back on the side of working families and give all of our valued supporters a chance to respond.

**[I'd appreciate if you read this entire message, but you may click here right away to share your thoughts with me, Juliana, and our campaign team>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40921173/326533538/-974760404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWQ2MjlhOC1mMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4zQucijtx88GaGD3PYXXgZL_NTpIJGdUSn4Pj8HOLE=&emci=23c0d8ee-d57a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=cad629a8-f37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=13891383)**
| | [Share Your Thoughts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40921174/326533539/-974760404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWQ2MjlhOC1mMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4zQucijtx88GaGD3PYXXgZL_NTpIJGdUSn4Pj8HOLE=&emci=23c0d8ee-d57a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=cad629a8-f37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=13891383)
---

It's widely understood that we inherited a state in serious fiscal distress after years of mismanagement by the previous administration. I take pride in being able to say we are now paying our bills on time, saving taxpayers hundreds of millions of dollars, and creating an economy where **small businesses** can flourish.

For years, the interests of working-class Illinoisans were ignored. Now, we've expanded access to high-quality, affordable **health care** and passed a **living wage** in Illinois, giving 1.4 million people a raise.

We just enacted the Climate and Equitable Jobs Act to address the urgent crisis of **climate change** while ensuring the creation of good-paying jobs. I recently attended the COP26 summit in Glasgow, Scotland, to share this major accomplishment with our global partners.

Our **infrastructure** is finally getting the attention it deserves. In 2019, we enacted our bipartisan Rebuild Illinois plan to help us repair crumbling roads, bridges, and schools statewide while creating and supporting hundreds of thousands of jobs.

Lastly, I want to make one thing very clear: We are only able to make this progress because of the support of Illinoisans like you. From the bottom of my heart — thank you.

**[We've gotten so much done already, but we have more work to do. And your support is going to make all the difference over the course of this campaign. Now, please let us know how you think we're doing:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40921175/326533540/-974760404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWQ2MjlhOC1mMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4zQucijtx88GaGD3PYXXgZL_NTpIJGdUSn4Pj8HOLE=&emci=23c0d8ee-d57a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=cad629a8-f37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=13891383)**
| [Share Your Thoughts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40921176/326533541/-974760404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWQ2MjlhOC1mMzdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4zQucijtx88GaGD3PYXXgZL_NTpIJGdUSn4Pj8HOLE=&emci=23c0d8ee-d57a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=cad629a8-f37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=13891383)
---

My best to you and your loved ones in this new year.

Onward,

JB
| | Paid for by JB for Governor

name: The Doug Collins Podcast
subject: An update from Doug Collins
body:
You'll want to read this...

| [Having trouble viewing this email? Click here to see it in your browser.](http://click1.srnemail.com/ViewMessage.do?m=ymbqqkbbf&r=cqpllggpgdpm&s=hnsfcwllcdsddplssgvmdjchwjjdqwgpjqs&q=1642798433&a=view)
---
| [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/ktvpvsbbvzrjzzqbjrrgljfzwvjdswwzhsgqwhrhpsshmd_zrsllbbpbmpfkrlbmwfdbpp.html)
---
**SUBSCRIBE TO DOUG'S PODCAST:
**[Apple Podcasts](http://click1.srnemail.com/mwtpndzznjtljjvzlttkclsjmnlbdmmjqdkvmqtqpddqys_zrsllbbpbmpfkrlbmwfdbpp.html) [Google Podcasts](http://click1.srnemail.com/edyqbhvvbctfccwvfttkrfpcjbfzhjjcshkwjstsqhhsyq_zrsllbbpbmpfkrlbmwfdbpp.html) [Spotify](http://click1.srnemail.com/eprqbhvvbctfccwvfttkrfpcjbfzhjjcshkwjstsqhhstd_zrsllbbpbmpfkrlbmwfdbpp.html)
| Dear Patriot,

We have accomplished great things for this country in the Conservative movement. During the Presidency of Donald Trump we were able to lower taxes, remove burdensome regulations from our small businesses, and bring our country to energy independence.

HOWEVER, in his last year Joe Biden and his administration are bent on not only turning around these victories but leading our country down a path of socialism and dependency.

I AM NOT TAKING IT and I NEED YOUR help in fighting for the conservative causes that we believe in. Lisa and I know that you want to be a part of our coming conservative victory in the country.

I do believe however, that we must be prepared to take our message to everyone we can find to insure that the LIBERAL press and Democratic Congress are kept in check.

Since leaving Congress, I have not slowed down, I have sped up and want help lead the conservative resurgence!

I have **[written a BOOK.](http://click1.srnemail.com/jfsnvmzzvptwppkzwttdbwfpcvwqmccprmdkcrtrnmmrtb_zrsllbbpbmpfkrlbmwfdbpp.html) **It describes the Democrat obsession with Donald Trump and how they damaged the institution of Congress in the process.

Also, I am taking to the airwaves to give you the information and facts you need to help win the battle for the direction of our country. I am very excited to announce that I now have a brand-new podcast. three days a week where I dismantle the normal rhetoric, talk about subjects outside of politics, and interview some friends that you've all seen and heard of before.

In addition, we are announcing the launch of a **[new website](http://click1.srnemail.com/mbppndzznjtljjvzlttkclsjmnlbdmmjqdkvmqtqpddqtq_zrsllbbpbmpfkrlbmwfdbpp.html)** ([https://TheDougCollinsPodcast.com](http://click1.srnemail.com/nrjkdpccdbtnbbmcnttzqnjbgdnrpggbypzmgytykppytf_zrsllbbpbmpfkrlbmwfdbpp.html)) where you can keep up with my show, news articles, books, and more about what we are doing to keep up the fight. You'll also be receiving "The Collins Collective" where I'll be sending my favorite news items of the week as well as the latest episodes and insider updates.

These are your tools to use to take the fight to the left. We must stay engaged and always fighting. Just as you saw me fight the liberal mob of NADLER, PELOSI, SCHIFF, and SCHUMER I am fighting everyday to give you information you can use.

WILL YOU FIGHT with ME? **[Get a copy of the BOOK](http://click1.srnemail.com/jqqnvmzzvptwppkzwttdbwfpcvwqmccprmdkcrtrnmmrtt_zrsllbbpbmpfkrlbmwfdbpp.html)** or subscribe to the Podcast today.

I am thankful for your continued support. Don't forget to keep your eyes open for the "The Collins Collective" and [**visit our new WEBSITE**](http://click1.srnemail.com/fgnyjnccjpbwpplcwbbfdwrptjwgnttpsnfltsbsynnsbj_zrsllbbpbmpfkrlbmwfdbpp.html) where I will be sharing with you regular communication that will go more in depth on various topics and giving you even more ways to win the political battle ahead of us.

Keep Fighting!

Doug Collins
---
---

I do believe however, that we must be prepared to take our message to everyone we can find to insure that the LIBERAL press and Democratic Congress are kept in check. Since leaving Congress, I have not slowed down, I have sped up and want help lead the conservative resurgence! I have It describes the Democrat obsession with Donald Trump and how they damaged the institution of Congress in the process. Also, I am taking to the airwaves to give you the information and facts you need to help win the battle for the direction of our country. I am very excited to announce that I now have a brand-new podcast. three days a week where I dismantle the normal rhetoric, talk about subjects outside of politics, and interview some friends that you've all seen and heard of before. In addition, we are announcing the launch of a () where you can keep up with my show, news articles, books, and more about what we are doing to keep up the fight. You'll also be receiving "The Collins Collective" where I'll be sending my favorite news items of the week as well as the latest episodes and insider updates. These are your tools to use to take the fight to the left. We must stay engaged and always fighting. Just as you saw me fight the liberal mob of NADLER, PELOSI, SCHIFF, and SCHUMER I am fighting everyday to give you information you can use. WILL YOU FIGHT with ME? or subscribe to the Podcast today. I am thankful for your continued support. Don't forget to keep your eyes open for the "The Collins Collective" and where I will be sharing with you regular communication that will go more in depth on various topics and giving you even more ways to win the political battle ahead of us. Keep Fighting! Doug Collins | SUBSCRIPTION INFO This e-mail is being sent due to your subscription from TheDougCollinsPodcast.com or in the Salem National network OR a friend might have forwarded it to you. We respect and value your time and privacy. You may unsubscribe at any time using the link below. Friends --

Our right to vote is under assault. Across the country, Republicans are trying to make it harder to vote by enacting barriers aimed at Democratic voters.

**Right here in Wisconsin, a conservative group was successful in eliminating all absentee-ballot drop boxes!**

And now, the Senate refused to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.

It’s disappointing, but our fight isn’t over. We need to protect and expand our Democratic majorities in Congress so we can protect voting rights once and for all.

But if Brad doesn’t win this race, Democrats will lose the House! We can’t let that happen.

The landmark decision put our democracy up for sale — giving corporate interests an open window to funnel unlimited, undisclosed dark money into our elections and drown out the will of the people. | POLL:

| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40921569/326536944/504963145?ms=em22_220121_ecupol_e1srv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220121_ecupol_e1srv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220121_ecupol_e1srv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_ecupol_e1srv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=NvoJxhvNFgUKvTdTvvz6HWMiVCZ6qqanKvFDk2hAmxnT3HsqWSkjufWxkM6SM9I8BkR7%2BqKymiQoxKOHmLoaq4HgXG163tv06ZwNItd2nHbi87qHq78%2FzHqXUOVBmM7uhRytRze93R8GDYU%2Fk0QstwYAiXqYdsKFZOuP4lRvUWA%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjEzNjViNS1mNDdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MD4PgQ1sHUGnr0kFWtCnPpt6kqJmQqPotEVPT7OBaxw=&emci=5817e5e7-e07a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ab1365b5-f47a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=18659593)
Today is the 12th anniversary of the Supreme Court case _Citizens United v. Federal Elections Commission_. The landmark decision put our democracy up for sale — giving corporate interests an open window to funnel unlimited, undisclosed dark money into our elections and drown out the will of the people.

Here in Wisconsin, we've seen more than our fair share of corporate influence buying elections. That’s why we are proud to keep this promise during our campaign: **No corporate PAC money. Ever.**

Our average online contribution over the past year is just $24.70 — a number we are very proud of. We are running a grassroots campaign powered by people like you because Sarah believes corporate interests have corrupted our politics and poisoned our democracy for too long.

But fixing this broken system will require action from Congress to make sure our government works for people, not big money donors and corporations who cut campaign checks.

Our democracy shouldn’t be up for sale. Sarah will fight to overturn _Citizens United_ and put voters back in charge — but she wants to know what you think:

**[Do you support overturning _Citizens United_ and getting dark money out of our political system? The landmark decision put our democracy up for sale — giving corporate interests an open window to funnel unlimited, undisclosed dark money into our elections and drown out the will of the people. | POLL: Should Congress overturn Citizens United and stop the flow of corporate money into our elections? | | Today is the 12th anniversary of the Supreme Court case Citizens United v. Federal Elections Commission. The landmark decision put our democracy up for sale — giving corporate interests an open window to funnel unlimited, undisclosed dark money into our elections and drown out the will of the people. Here in Wisconsin, we've seen more than our fair share of corporate influence buying elections. That’s why we are proud to keep this promise during our campaign: No corporate PAC money. Ever. Our average online contribution over the past year is just $24.70 — a number we are very proud of. We are running a grassroots campaign powered by people like you because Sarah believes corporate interests have corrupted our politics and poisoned our democracy for too long. But fixing this broken system will require action from Congress to make sure our government works for people, not big money donors and corporations who cut campaign checks. Our democracy shouldn’t be up for sale. Sarah will fight to overturn Citizens United and put voters back in charge — but she wants to know what you think: Our government should work for people, not the dark money groups trying to buy influence in our elections. That’s why we are proud to be running a campaign that isn’t beholden to corporate interests, and your generous support makes it all possible. Thank you for your feedback. — Team Sarah Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

name: Giffords.org
subject: Ghost guns continue to make headlines – help us get these dangerous weapons off the streets
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is a serious public safety threat.
#

Friends,
Earlier this month, a Rhode Island man was arrested for conspiracy to traffic firearms while trying to sell _over_ 100 ghost guns produced at his home.
_Here’s why these ghost guns are so dangerous:_
1. Ghost guns are do-it-yourself firearms often made from kits bought online—no background check required.

2. Buyers who aren’t required to pass background checks can quickly and easily convert these unfinished parts into fully functional firearms using common household tools.

3. They lack serial numbers, so they cannot be traced by law enforcement after they are recovered from a crime scene.

We MUST close the regulatory loophole that allows this to happen and ban these dangerous ghost guns. We anticipate a decision any day now from the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) so this could not be more urgent.
[**Sign our petition: Add your name to tell the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) to ban ghost guns.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/ghost_guns_petition?source=em220121-1-subs&t=1&akid=1466%2E3935704%2E3ITZPm)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/ghost_guns_petition?source=em220121-1-subs&t=2&akid=1466%2E3935704%2E3ITZPm)**
Ghost guns are increasingly being used in violent crimes. They pose extreme hurdles for law enforcement, and are frequently made and sold by traffickers because they are easier to obtain and harder to track than traditional firearms.
**We have to ban these weapons now.** Ghost guns make it easier for violent crimes to be committed with zero risk of traceable accountability. We’ve been leading the effort to ban ghost guns and need your help to continue the fight.
Thank you for stepping up to save lives.
Sincerely,
The team at Giffords
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/ghost_guns_petition?source=em220121-1-subs&t=3&akid=1466%2E3935704%2E3ITZPm)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1466%2E3935704%2E3ITZPm) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Team Holly
subject: Marge's hypocrisy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter – despite Marjorie Taylor Greene facing disciplinary action on all fronts, she continues to spew her hateful and treasonous rhetoric. I don’t know about you, but we’re sick and tired of it.
In another push to tear our country apart, Marjorie Taylor Greene periodically suggests national divorce while also stating that “Americans who move to conservative states from California and New York should have a ‘cooling off’ period before being allowed to vote.”
This treasonous and anti-democratic rhetoric poisons our national discourse and damages our longstanding democracy.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s actions prove time and again that she is more interested in her ultra-conservative donors than her own constituents. Unlike Marge, Team Holly is in the community everyday trying to unite us on the issues that matter, rather than the issues that tear us apart.
We don't need a national divorce, we just need a divorce from Marjorie Taylor Greene . We deserve a representative who supports our democratic values and supports their constituents. Chip in $12 to put an end to her treasonous rhetoric. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0119]
We are in this together,
Team Holly.

name: Dr. Kathleen Harder
subject: PSA: The supply cannot meet the demand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kathleen Harder for Congress
body:
https://www.drkathleenharder.com/ [https://www.drkathleenharder.com/]Folks,
January 2022 marks the 52nd anniversary of National Blood Donor Month – a time to recognize the significance of giving blood and platelets and encourage new and lapsed donors to give blood during one of the most challenging times to maintain a sufficient supply – winter.
This year, the American Red Cross is seeing its most drastic blood shortage in the past ten years and could force hospitals to delay essential blood and platelet transfusions.
On Monday, Jan. 17, all hospitals and blood banks are now assigned a daily maximum. The shortage should concern everyone. Blood donors of all blood types – particularly type O blood – are needed now to give blood or platelets to help meet daily hospital demands.
This is a true CODE RED, and we are calling on ALL DONORS to take action.
Learn more about where to find a blood bank near you: https://www.redcross.org/give-blood.html [https://www.redcross.org/give-blood.html]
Thank you,
Dr. Kathleen Harder

clean_body: [, January 2022 marks the 52nd anniversary of National Blood Donor Month – a time to recognize the significance of giving blood and platelets and encourage new and lapsed donors to give blood during one of the most challenging times to maintain a sufficient supply – winter. This year, the American Red Cross is seeing its most drastic blood shortage in the past ten years and could force hospitals to delay essential blood and platelet transfusions. On Monday, Jan. 17, all hospitals and blood banks are now assigned a daily maximum. The shortage should concern everyone. Blood donors of all blood types – particularly type O blood – are needed now to give blood or platelets to help meet daily hospital demands. This is a true CODE RED, and we are calling on ALL DONORS to take action. Learn more about where to find a blood bank near you: [] Thank you, Dr. Kathleen Harder Follow Dr. Harder Online: [] [] Paid for by Dr. Kathleen Harder for Congress Dr. Kathleen Harder for Congress P.O. name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: I'm not a self-hating Hispanic.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Democrats often call me this because I'm a proud Republican who nearly won a seat in Congress in 2020. I'm running again and asking for a moment of ti I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9cc9dc5c3d4f40ef8b47b01adf0dba91&_e=wrtAAw2VixAu5gC-CROrbhwF9XitTIAROci_03ACbynerOWj0fr7jwG7cGnL1TOCt_qq73-tDyWBADeaAMgEla5VHvtgbg0trOdDKqVyIertbL2EEVpSV5bGOaiQJ_CCuDZRz0TGpiLt-bS2a2WJF7m8saUL5k-jecIPhk-o9Bhw7X_tXXIUAvA1_Kkc8j6WlBb2sGgv61sasTMwtNUPkRIcAYMOWn2QLjhhSyUrxcAmX7J56V7rC59d2TSVGOjZdGDsDh4IV2mqTWWWgsCjl_D1dfXo1qKCDg5iLdwv0Pwd7YzRhe46M06Rqe2CqR6bxqR49rkfG8qlPyzv5dg_e0bQLmIup_82UntokqWE9cvp76v_mypvSj7CWmjze7OyVQf-GwA4LPpevBptO9nNKUu1SCZyRauoa-UZB_2UAkY5b_hq0XpzGDLYCYCaoJDH9EBACskFk12RsMCcuHvPZoMrpYS9Fu2fVkv7HNsTmnMV_x4MAQDbvKHDSemn3TFj)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a HispanicRepublican from TEXAS!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9cc9dc5c3d4f40ef8b47b01adf0dba91&_e=wrtAAw2VixAu5gC-CROrbhwF9XitTIAROci_03ACbynerOWj0fr7jwG7cGnL1TOCt_qq73-tDyWBADeaAMgEla5VHvtgbg0trOdDKqVyIertbL2EEVpSV5bGOaiQJ_CCuDZRz0TGpiLt-bS2a2WJF7m8saUL5k-jecIPhk-o9Bhw7X_tXXIUAvA1_Kkc8j6WlBb2sGgv61sasTMwtNUPkRIcAYMOWn2QLjhhSyUrxcAmX7J56V7rC59d2TSVGOjZdGDsDh4IV2mqTWWWgsCjl0n0l7Z3WkZBTv4UTbaqAJaLdOMK1qc_WVZzN3Id0NUXSourvxVjCrwZocy7X97bhIrw4cHzT5zUJe5xd33KUVQxgQGfaF7YlQ5rVF3oouxLIqEpKIQQBoiCnLi9YWxM9ex5TfbRUmmy7Sqa43-2FZYu6hnlZPbPhwBXwd8nnDrLVTAONxypLxm3meyJG5JDbdivwuK4DfTs2gGCtWgJtGYspLPbVIe4-cFiczdaz1lS)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9cc9dc5c3d4f40ef8b47b01adf0dba91&_e=wrtAAw2VixAu5gC-CROrbhwF9XitTIAROci_03ACbynerOWj0fr7jwG7cGnL1TOCt_qq73-tDyWBADeaAMgEla5VHvtgbg0trOdDKqVyIertbL2EEVpSV5bGOaiQJ_CCuDZRz0TGpiLt-bS2a2WJF7m8saUL5k-jecIPhk-o9Bhw7X_tXXIUAvA1_Kkc8j6WlBb2sGgv61sasTMwtNUPkRIcAYMOWn2QLjhhSyUrxcAmX7J56V7rC59d2TSVGOjZdGDsDh4IV2mqTWWWgsCjl-rv5OBArWxwbsXIx2MMrg_3LSAFaSg7ieeETnaRRelJ4EWsaXDSidmvFesMKMkRB4KPZflpRFQ1tDUBo4mVDTGEmZFnLkH8dVrt4BcQcxkgrGgtjbhGutE23q20hlHlDbYDNd4w-JLy3p3Tsv19o0oCNYJ5_LxvJ9a00gge6Kb9aLVVkO7qXlBXpvM9CxAIrjU8PuteUnPixzGtEP4JrAR5iPz7HGf60Txkvt9K4cuJ)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9cc9dc5c3d4f40ef8b47b01adf0dba91&_e=wrtAAw2VixAu5gC-CROrbhwF9XitTIAROci_03ACbynerOWj0fr7jwG7cGnL1TOCt_qq73-tDyWBADeaAMgEla5VHvtgbg0trOdDKqVyIertbL2EEVpSV5bGOaiQJ_CCuDZRz0TGpiLt-bS2a2WJF7m8saUL5k-jecIPhk-o9Bhw7X_tXXIUAvA1_Kkc8j6WlBb2sGgv61sasTMwtNUPkRIcAYMOWn2QLjhhSyUrxcAmX7J56V7rC59d2TSVGOjZdGDsDh4IV2mqTWWWgsCjl0L8BBAl8B7Jb1fsJ0kuMLd8wlgvQHlMRLm_Wh3QOpn-fZdIhF_CU9AG4yQmuudJEUS6CFxH9jLjS_AQjiBQUWjju-4BOk8alSUeoy3bWjP_gWXwAVqtEk4MeusZQpJWRWAcr6b1yAR3mNYGw36W5nKZEDPehKDjxQUiI4KL40eI-ghe_vlrnos1Cm5P5EAw8E1bXuQ7fWInsJW0Yzl7VdwQ2JBm6ZzmJF2s-jC5wIik)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9cc9dc5c3d4f40ef8b47b01adf0dba91&_e=wrtAAw2VixAu5gC-CROrbhwF9XitTIAROci_03ACbynerOWj0fr7jwG7cGnL1TOCt_qq73-tDyWBADeaAMgEla5VHvtgbg0trOdDKqVyIertbL2EEVpSV5bGOaiQJ_CCuDZRz0TGpiLt-bS2a2WJF7m8saUL5k-jecIPhk-o9Bhw7X_tXXIUAvA1_Kkc8j6WlBb2sGgv61sasTMwtNUPkRIcAYMOWn2QLjhhSyUrxcAmX7J56V7rC59d2TSVGOjZdGDsDh4IV2mqTWWWgsCjlwXwk2xQty560dmFwKBrcFtcGEpTQzlM6pE6KyNgh56vOobT1YNUe6IqoisIHhGKMCULYhxLdziHoBYA2EZvrgiqFpqC33CF92sf9wp65RxsLMoaluxtbPSmUw2cHW5vhwqBT_ev-IOpphLa10uH5qEGdEBRizFgHNAjq39pMMzeL-GjIyJbfazkmQprxQWRW_wZvTtkpyoEh-uBwaoMTA5XJSxZyK3QE2BbC9UZfUyC)
Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9cc9dc5c3d4f40ef8b47b01adf0dba91&_e=wrtAAw2VixAu5gC-CROrbhwF9XitTIAROci_03ACbynerOWj0fr7jwG7cGnL1TOCt_qq73-tDyWBADeaAMgEla5VHvtgbg0trOdDKqVyIertbL2EEVpSV5bGOaiQJ_CCuDZRz0TGpiLt-bS2a2WJF7m8saUL5k-jecIPhk-o9Bhw7X_tXXIUAvA1_Kkc8j6WlBb2sGgv61sasTMwtNUPkRIcAYMOWn2QLjhhSyUrxcAmX7J56V7rC59d2TSVGOjZdGDsDh4IV2mqTWWWgsCjlyfVyGsNmIYU9w8npUPttBA8ebflXvwb4H2yvnXa3p9pHND0oonTGJbWBTE71bQ5bG2amLtkGvx7oOo5zWLgNMg0D777HKHFmgUfWzMxABI-SePKLoIr1QeNo8nL_6r-o96tV4Crvfy89wOIihQl4TCJDSnAlcQ4HMGYdtSU0kAm8QyKEG0etRAENZbj3crDAYbTPP7lA4x8insQicBfyzMjJwdfDTtSWIu-6yaou-EE)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Hispanic Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9cc9dc5c3d4f40ef8b47b01adf0dba91&_e=wrtAAw2VixAu5gC-CROrbhwF9XitTIAROci_03ACbynerOWj0fr7jwG7cGnL1TOCt_qq73-tDyWBADeaAMgEla5VHvtgbg0trOdDKqVyIertbL2EEVpSV5bGOaiQJ_CCuDZRz0TGpiLt-bS2a2WJF7m8saUL5k-jecIPhk-o9Bhw7X_tXXIUAvA1_Kkc8j6WlBb2sGgv61sasTMwtNUPkRIcAYMOWn2QLjhhSyUrxcAmX7J56V7rC59d2TSVGOjZdGDsDh4IV2mqTWWWgsCjl4uhxsx6pJxo5tephCaIOE_SQI9yZzRAlClgKI_oDN1YNkJJj0YwHbZbEAUia-0OiuH8lrZ_cPYeg5qSVWXdLfiwmKds0pAopP_WE_MaZJtCLENyBwF3JTWXfmqO_Ad0KJO_vbFfiC9FDJP5gyzGRPtFRoyIG728stKITIX55rPeNiP9H-O_4LpV-2gDaA822QzGauimz16UtDg2BFUfGXX_fXBir_hCIZmDTZHjDxzJ)

My name is Monica De La Cruz, a proud Hispanic Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY. Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by just 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. Monica De La Cruz Republican for Congress | Paid for by Monica for Congress 1317 W Frontage Rd, Suite A, Alamo, TX 78516 Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: sharing this quick photo of my mom and dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter – I grew up in Sherrill, a small rural town in Dubuque County, Iowa. When I say "small", I really mean it – today there are less than 200 people living there. That's where my parents taught me the power of hard work and the importance of public service.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40921918/326538975/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk565-fr-nd_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTFhY2Y2NS1mNTdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TEuUCS6PjWVgwFQH08MxtISyWx-9v9RRo7gwLR132Mw=)
My mom worked in public schools, and my dad was a union pipefitter-welder who worked tirelessly. Public service is a value I grew up with – and it's why I'll never stop fighting for Iowa's working families.
I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley because working families like the one that I come from need a real fighter in Washington. I promise you that I will fight every single day to bring back good-paying jobs, to protect our unions and to give working family kids the bright future and good life they deserve.
**But this is a truly grassroots campaign, and I can't defeat Sen. Grassley without your help.[That's why I've got to ask: Please, will you make a $5 donation right now to defeat Sen. name: John Fetterman
subject: Anything?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I hope you can see why this is *so* important.
#
Derek,
**_Did you know?_** 1️⃣ Pennsylvania is the #1 swing state likely to flip on CNN’s top 10 list. 2️⃣ We’re the only Democratic campaign with a consistent record of beating every Republican opponent in every public poll -- **_and the only Democrat in the race who has won statewide office._** 3️⃣ We could be heavily outspent if we don’t see a surge in donations soon. Republicans and their super PACs have already spent a mind-boggling $11.4 million on TV ads.
---
What do you think, Derek? **[Can I count on you making your first $5 donation today? Every donation helps, no matter the amount.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41216?refcode=ema20220121-4274&t=26&akid=4274%2E434096%2E5JgFLc)**
**[I'm ready to give»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41216?refcode=em20220121-4274&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=27&akid=4274%2E434096%2E5JgFLc)**
But if that didn’t get you to chip in, spare me one more minute of your time.
**_Well, what if I told you this?_** 4️⃣ Senate control is in danger in 2022. But if we flip Pennsylvania, our Democratic majority is virtually guaranteed. 5️⃣ The last time this seat was up, it set the record for the most expensive Senate race of ALL TIME. 6️⃣ We don’t accept any corporate PAC money. We’re funding this campaign with grassroots donations collected over simple emails like this one.
---
**[Ok, now that I’ve said all that... can I get you to chip in your first donation? It would make a big difference just months from our primary election.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41216?refcode=ema20220121-4274&t=28&akid=4274%2E434096%2E5JgFLc)**
**[I'm ready to give»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41216?refcode=em20220121-4274&t=47&akid=4274%2E434096%2E5JgFLc)**
If none of that convinced you, or if you can’t give at all, I get it. It’s a tough time and not everyone has extra money to donate to political campaigns. But if you are in a position to give, right now is the best time to do so.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220121-4274-footer&t=48&refcode2=4274_434096_5JgFLc&akid=4274%2E434096%2E5JgFLc)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=49&akid=4274%2E434096%2E5JgFLc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=50&akid=4274%2E434096%2E5JgFLc)

name: Jeff Bartos
subject: The frontrunner is…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bartos for US Senate |
body:
My name is Jeff Bartos—I’m a husband, a father, a lifelong Pennsylvanian, born and raised in Berks County, PA, and I’m run
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zakvim05h4vn4fjiujrtqupa3an8p68agc6fluk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieaoj4c3h2bs) | |
---
[**> > HELP JEFF PUT PENNSYLVANIA FIRST AGAIN <<**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztm42gv2ugv1dtkfted3mcecojtj7ribb6me53bo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieaoj4c3h2bs)
|
---
Hi friend,

My name is Jeff Bartos—I’m a husband, a father, a lifelong Pennsylvanian, born and raised in Berks County, PA, and I’m running as a Republican for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.

I recently came in first place in the Central Caucus Straw Poll, a strong indicator that my campaign's Pennsylvania First message is the way forward for our Commonwealth. I’m honored to be leading the pack in this most crucial of races and that so many people are resonating with my campaign.

Do you know the reason I’m leading in this fight?
* **I’m actually from Pennsylvania, lived here my whole life** , not a bored celebrity from NJ or a lost opportunistic Californian.
* I’ve spent countless days and miles traveling to every Main Street, every village, and every town, of our great commonwealth and talking with voters, which means **I know the issues that Pennsylvanians care about**.
* **I have an actual plan to ‘Put Pennsylvania First Again,’** not just a list of Fox News talking points.

That’s why I’m the right guy for the job.

I'm from here, I care about PA, and I know what it’s going to take to fix it, but I also have no desire to stay in Washington longer than it takes to get the job done, **that’s why I’ve signed the U.S. Term Limits Pledge to limit myself to****2****Terms in the Senate.**

**Friend, all I need is your help to get there and ensure this seat doesn’t fall into the wrong handsー** _[**can I count on your support with a small donation today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcd335g2r14j7dsgfme3olmdnmm6vkkmtoavgmrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieaoj4c3h2bs)_
[**PUT PENNSYLVANIA FIRST AGAIN!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd56dglevdla0d1h5jh8q8i0gdbl6ptl2666fcr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieaoj4c3h2bs)
I know you’re probably wondering who I am and why this politician is emailing youー _**well, that’s the great thing, I'm NOT a politician!**_

_Let me tell you how this political outsider came to run for office and why I’m the right choice to take on the Washington machine._
I’m not a career politician who has spent their life in Washington.

I’ve spent my life _building businesses_ , _creating jobs_ , and _carving out my own American dream_.

I’m proud to have created tons of great jobs right here in Pennsylvania and help other PA families realize their own American dream.

That’s why I’m offended to see celebrities and opportunists walk into our state and try to take advantage of this race.

In the GOP Primary for Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate Seat, I stand alone as the only candidate with meaningful ties to the state and a proven conservative record.

My proven conservative credentials and long history in the state make me stand out in a crowd of carpetbaggers with no history of standing up for the conservative positions they now claim to espouse.

Further, I'm the only candidate actually from PA which means I have a real-world understanding of Pennsylvania’s communities to offer a cohesive plan for the state.

While other candidates move here, treating our seat like an At-Large district, I know Pennsylvania is unique, and I’m prepared to lead. **_[Pitch in to help me Put Pennsylvania First Again >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsapnibsbn07lppfiffqkd26tden8oalpmpcn080_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieaoj4c3h2bs)_**
[**PITCH IN $10**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsri33ftlh2qrq8n1o3ql16cg3l0krdq50207c90_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieaoj4c3h2bs)
[**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk0uq347qkoaml0j80kuvlp966jqkbddhat5q9ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieaoj4c3h2bs)
[**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhvdsg1nbb1nr4rgeqmn3ci01tuvv7534dbv2pr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieaoj4c3h2bs)
[**PITCH IN $75**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0hjl7oe04fhv40ink85qn0pu9e21t7vlf7609p8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieaoj4c3h2bs)
[**PITCH IN $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6otnunp52f49slkaoqujqq1lkqucvs5gsli3k58_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieaoj4c3h2bs)
Thank you for your support. I hope that you’ll choose to stand with me today.

Thank you,
Jeff Bartos
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z16r8bd9r8u6obnpggmnus6tjumrk5b0d8pn2so8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieaoj4c3h2bs)

name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c27c51cb79941155/3fb365eb7faf627ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, It's been another B.I.G. week for our campaign! We're continuing to travel across Georgia and we're earning support in every corner of the state. It wouldn't be possible without your help, and if you haven't contributed yet to help ensure we have the resources to win, [**I hope you'll do so here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c27c51cb79941155/d80a848b88f7028cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_Georgia Sheriffs_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c27c51cb79941155/fa840a1c9f9593b6c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
This week, I joined the Georgia Sheriffs' Association and was proud to share our message of standing with law enforcement. These heroes are on the frontlines of keeping our communities and families safe. I'm proud to call them friends, and honored that 76 sheriffs across Georgia have endorsed our campaign. They deserve a champion who will always have their backs — and that's what I'll be in the Senate.
---
---
# **_Walton County GOP_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c27c51cb79941155/e27b599cad30ab37c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
It's always great to be back in Walton County, and this week with the Walton County GOP was no exception. Grateful to everyone who joined us. Georgia Republicans are fired up and ready to send a message that this is still a RED state in November!
---
---
# **_Ft. Oglethorpe_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c27c51cb79941155/2cc0e4ed1578f107c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Enjoyed meeting voters in Ft. Oglethorpe this week! Team ’22 is fired up and ready to fire Raphael Warnock in November. Grateful to Park Place Restaurant for hosting us!
---
---
# **_What It Takes To Win_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c27c51cb79941155/dc648f28300c965ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Raphael Warnock is not going to be defeated by a candidate who only leaves his basement to give paid speeches. Defeating Warnock is going to take criss-crossing Georgia, shaking every voter's hand, answering the tough questions, and having vigorous debates. I'm all-in, and I've got nothing to hide. [**Read more here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c27c51cb79941155/3a6a3966c1771e34c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_March for Life_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c27c51cb79941155/0cc31fef03f64bb8c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Today, millions of Americans have gathered in Washington to march for life and to stand with the unborn. We stand with them, and come November Georgia will have a U.S. Senator who stands with them too.
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c27c51cb79941155/45a97bc961024041c3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c27c51cb79941155/ee6576b0b5d88ceec3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c27c51cb79941155/ac76031218af86d7c3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! We've hit the ground running to start 2022, but in order to keep up that momentum, we must finish the month with a strong showing. [**I hope you'll consider contributing whatever you can here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c27c51cb79941155/e1aa6809cafe3265c3d6b838967d376c/37793) Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support!

I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.

clean_body: | | | Friend, It's been another B.I.G. week for our campaign! We're continuing to travel across Georgia and we're earning support in every corner of the state. It wouldn't be possible without your help, and if you haven't contributed yet to help ensure we have the resources to win, Georgia Sheriffs | | This week, I joined the Georgia Sheriffs' Association and was proud to share our message of standing with law enforcement. These heroes are on the frontlines of keeping our communities and families safe. I'm proud to call them friends, and honored that 76 sheriffs across Georgia have endorsed our campaign. They deserve a champion who will always have their backs — and that's what I'll be in the Senate. Walton County GOP It's always great to be back in Walton County, and this week with the Walton County GOP was no exception. Grateful to everyone who joined us. Georgia Republicans are fired up and ready to send a message that this is still a RED state in November! Ft. Oglethorpe Enjoyed meeting voters in Ft. Oglethorpe this week! Team ’22 is fired up and ready to fire Raphael Warnock in November. Grateful to Park Place Restaurant for hosting us! What It Takes To Win Raphael Warnock is not going to be defeated by a candidate who only leaves his basement to give paid speeches. Defeating Warnock is going to take criss-crossing Georgia, shaking every voter's hand, answering the tough questions, and having vigorous debates. I'm all-in, and I've got nothing to hide. March for Life Today, millions of Americans have gathered in Washington to march for life and to stand with the unborn. We stand with them, and come November Georgia will have a U.S. Senator who stands with them too. One More Thing Please follow our campaign's , , and pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! name: Eric Greitens
subject: re: Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U

body:
Did you see the email I sent you earlier this week about the Democrats’ scheme to hide their bill to federalize our elections in an obscure NASA bill?
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/99q7XhcMpvAdJdYcvdXJOA/qN8yDVgHE5mmZ4RpijETkA) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Laura Loomer for Congress.

| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/99q7XhcMpvAdJdYcvdXJOA/qN8yDVgHE5mmZ4RpijETkA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/99q7XhcMpvAdJdYcvdXJOA/qN8yDVgHE5mmZ4RpijETkA) Did you see the email I sent you earlier this week about the Democrats' scheme to hide their bill to federalize our elections in an obscure NASA bill?

If you did, then you should be surprised that Joe Biden actually told the truth about it.

Yesterday was the one-year anniversary of his inauguration, and earlier this week, Sleepy Joe gave a press conference and was asked:
"Speaking of voting rights legislation, if this isn't passed, do you still believe the upcoming election will be fairly conducted and its results will be legitimate?"
Biden's response was shocking:
"It all depends on whether or not we're able to make the case to the American people, that some of this is being setup to **alter the outcome of the election**."
Wow. And he's absolutely right!

The hidden Democrat bill will federalize our elections, allow illegals to vote and provide six-to-one campaign donation matching with YOUR tax dollars!

That means that with each $10 donation that AOC gets, she'll get slipped $60 from the Federal Treasury - right out of your pocket!

We need fighters like me in Congress who will stamp this out and SHOW UP every day to be the resistance against the communists in Congress, and the White House!

[**Help me get there today!**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/99q7XhcMpvAdJdYcvdXJOA/qN8yDVgHE5mmZ4RpijETkA)

My RINO opponent, Do-Nothing Daniel Webster was one of only nine Republicans who didn't bother to show up to work last week and vote against the federalization of our elections!

That's just shameful!

[**Help me defeat him today**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/99q7XhcMpvAdJdYcvdXJOA/qN8yDVgHE5mmZ4RpijETkA), and you have my word that I'll fight to my last breath to preserve our Republic and stop Democrats from stealing our elections a second time!

[**Please back my campaign today with your most generous donation.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/99q7XhcMpvAdJdYcvdXJOA/qN8yDVgHE5mmZ4RpijETkA)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer | [**DONATE NOW**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/99q7XhcMpvAdJdYcvdXJOA/qN8yDVgHE5mmZ4RpijETkA)

name: Kevin Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Sign the pledge to stop the unlawful COVID-19 vaccine mandate
body:
I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 v
_Sponsored message_
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjnsjd91cl2tqa82nig80c47otfeidpmp29skjr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieeo34c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, Please allow me to introduce myself as the new President of The Heritage Foundation. I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 vaccine mandate, my work to defend your conservative values has been cut out for me from the very moment I arrived at Heritage. **But the good news is, I’m leading a team that fights back whenever your freedom is threatened.** I’m extremely proud to share with you that Heritage has filed a federal lawsuit challenging the Biden administration’s unlawful mandate. Because we recognize this vaccine mandate as exactly what it is: a dangerous level of government overreach attempting to strip your foundational liberty to make your own personal medical decisions.

At Heritage, we are focused on returning power to the people. We are working to preserve and defend your individual liberties guaranteed in U.S. Constitution. We are standing rock solid in defense of the very values that make America great. We are fighting this government power grab and protecting the rights and freedoms of all Americans. But we’re looking for the support of proud American citizens like you. And today, I need to know that you are standing beside us as we fight back. [**That’s why I’m asking you to sign our Pledge to Stop the Unlawful Vaccine Mandate.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbia7apt87tkfk9e99cvp1nc9agt2og3gebacm88_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieeo34c1h2bs) It’s urgent that we know you are with us. I would be honored to see your name added to the pledge.
**You can sign the pledge right now using this link:**[**https://secured.heritage.org/vaccine-mandate-pledge/**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z740l6m1ha260q92vvpr6k973ogrqinv68som49g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2ctieeo34c1h2bs) And you are more than welcome to share it with everyone you know. If we want to stop this violation of your freedom and privacy, we need as many people as possible to stand up against a mandate the Department of Labor has no authority to impose. **Please don’t delay. Be sure to add your name to the pledge right now.** Sincerely yours, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

body:

New York City will now allow more than 800,000 non-citizens to vote in their elections.
SERIOUSLY?!
We must stop this far-left SOCIALIST plot to destroy our elections!

clean_body: Sorry to interrupt, but this is important... | Peter, We know that you are one of the most ACTIVE and DEVOTED Republican Patriots in Englewood, FL. And we also know that you’re determined to reclaim the Republican Majorities in the House & Senate in next year’s Midterm Elections. We are so humbled by your hard-work and dedication to the America First movement. Because of Patriots like you from all across the country, we have a real chance to win back control of Washington and put a stop to Joe Biden’s march towards socialism. But unfortunately, everything we’ve achieved is at risk of slipping away if we fail to meet our January Fundraising Deadline. | | | | | Unless we see a surge of support ahead of our deadline, we’re going to fall short of our goal. | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

body:
Become an advocate >>> Peter, **As a Christian and as a mother, I am****unapologetically pro-life.** Today is the annual March for Life in Washington, D.C. clean_body: Become an advocate >>> Peter, As a Christian and as a mother, I amunapologetically pro-life. Today is the annual March for Life in Washington, D.C. Although I cannot be there in person this year, I will fight tirelessly for the RIGHT to LIFE as Alabama’s next U.S. Senator. Human life is a SACRED gift from God, and I am PROUD to be an advocate for those who cannot fight for themselves. Today and every day, we’re fighting together for the rights of the unborn in Alabama and across our country. Thank you, Katie Britt Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Jessica Semachko, Tom Perez for Maryland
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, January 21st for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
#

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, January 21st, 2022**
Peter,
We hope you and your family are staying safe and well.
Before we get into our weekly updates from our campaign, we recognize that this was a difficult week for many here in Maryland and across the country.
The right to vote is our most sacred right. Over the last century, people have put their lives on the line to protect it. But this week, the United States Senate failed to defend access to the ballot amid efforts by states across the country to turn back the clock on voting rights, especially for people of color.
While we are frustrated and disappointed, the fight is far from over, and we musn’t lose hope. We must continue to speak out, organize, and hold our leaders accountable to protect the right to vote for every American.
Our democracy depends on it.
Many thanks,
Jessica Semachko
Campaign Manager
Tom Perez for Maryland

* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
As Dr. Martin Luther King once said, “The time is always right to do the right thing.” When the Senate began to consider voting rights legislation this week, Tom took to social media in a video telling the American people to urge their Senators to do the right thing and pass voting rights legislation with the fierce urgency of now. You can find that **[video here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40922973/326543966/234812458?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2QxZGE3My1mYjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p65ImqJaKaHR6e2-vseiO7mwBUEDX2aZcwZ5gGPu3tU=&emci=f6ddc649-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=73d1da73-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)** and you can find Tom’s full statement on the issue **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40922974/326543967/-690211531?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2QxZGE3My1mYjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p65ImqJaKaHR6e2-vseiO7mwBUEDX2aZcwZ5gGPu3tU=&emci=f6ddc649-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=73d1da73-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)**.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40922975/326543968/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2QxZGE3My1mYjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p65ImqJaKaHR6e2-vseiO7mwBUEDX2aZcwZ5gGPu3tU=&emci=f6ddc649-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=73d1da73-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)
Here at Team Tom, we know that we wouldn’t be where we are today without the support of our grassroots supporters like you. That’s why Tom hosted a Zoom event to thank our outstanding supporters and volunteers, answer questions, and share what the road ahead looks like as we race toward the finish line. He was joined by special guests Senator Joanne C. Benson, Senator Cory McCray, Montgomery County Council Vice President Evan Glass, and Jessica Hack of UFCW Local 27, who all shared why it is so important that we continue to work together to elect Tom to be our next Governor.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40922976/326543969/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2QxZGE3My1mYjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p65ImqJaKaHR6e2-vseiO7mwBUEDX2aZcwZ5gGPu3tU=&emci=f6ddc649-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=73d1da73-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)
Tom joined the Fair Funding Coalition for their candidate’s forum on tax reform, budgets, and the state budget surplus. As Tom always says, “budgets are moral documents,” and he outlined his bold plan to ensure every Marylanders has access to jobs, justice, and opportunity. Thank you to Rev. Dr. Kevin Slayton for inviting Tom to participate and also for dedicating your life to fighting for change in our state. You can watch the forum **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40922983/326543974/-190404700?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2QxZGE3My1mYjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p65ImqJaKaHR6e2-vseiO7mwBUEDX2aZcwZ5gGPu3tU=&emci=f6ddc649-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=73d1da73-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)**.
* * *
**Social Media Action Alert**
We are so excited to share the strength of our grassroots movement, **but we need YOUR help to spread the word!**
**[Would you retweet our fundraising announcement to show your support for #TeamTom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40922995/326543983/-1359968806?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2QxZGE3My1mYjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p65ImqJaKaHR6e2-vseiO7mwBUEDX2aZcwZ5gGPu3tU=&emci=f6ddc649-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=73d1da73-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40923004/326543999/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2QxZGE3My1mYjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p65ImqJaKaHR6e2-vseiO7mwBUEDX2aZcwZ5gGPu3tU=&emci=f6ddc649-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=73d1da73-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)**
* * *
**In the News**
**[Tom Perez Statement on United States Senate Failure to Pass Voting Rights Legislation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40923006/326544001/-690211531?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2QxZGE3My1mYjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p65ImqJaKaHR6e2-vseiO7mwBUEDX2aZcwZ5gGPu3tU=&emci=f6ddc649-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=73d1da73-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)**
_“I’m profoundly disappointed in this result and the fact that 52 Senators chose to be complicit in these attacks. While we are frustrated and disappointed today, the fight is far from over. I’m proud of the 48 Senators, including Senators Cardin and Van Hollen, who voted to protect our voting rights. Let’s join them in speaking out, organizing, and holding our leaders accountable to protect the right to vote for every American.”_
**[Tom Perez Statement on Hostage Situation at Congregation Beth Israel in Colleyville, Texas Over the Weekend](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40923008/326544003/-128774034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2QxZGE3My1mYjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p65ImqJaKaHR6e2-vseiO7mwBUEDX2aZcwZ5gGPu3tU=&emci=f6ddc649-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=73d1da73-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)**
_“Antisemitism is a stain on our nation and on our world, and no one should ever feel unsafe to worship. We must come together to support our Jewish communities, uplift organizations working to protect the freedom to worship, and root out hatred and bigotry wherever it exists.”_
**[African American leaders support Perez for Governor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40923010/326544005/1053469183?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2QxZGE3My1mYjdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p65ImqJaKaHR6e2-vseiO7mwBUEDX2aZcwZ5gGPu3tU=&emci=f6ddc649-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=73d1da73-fb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)**
_“Tom’s life’s work has been to get stuff done and fight for justice and jobs. Which is why he has early endorsements from African American leaders from across Baltimore City and Maryland.”_

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, January 21st, 2022 Peter, We hope you and your family are staying safe and well. Before we get into our weekly updates from our campaign, we recognize that this was a difficult week for many here in Maryland and across the country. The right to vote is our most sacred right. Over the last century, people have put their lives on the line to protect it. But this week, the United States Senate failed to defend access to the ballot amid efforts by states across the country to turn back the clock on voting rights, especially for people of color. While we are frustrated and disappointed, the fight is far from over, and we musn’t lose hope. We must continue to speak out, organize, and hold our leaders accountable to protect the right to vote for every American. Our democracy depends on it. Many thanks, Jessica Semachko Campaign Manager Tom Perez for Maryland On the Campaign Trail As Dr. Martin Luther King once said, “The time is always right to do the right thing.” When the Senate began to consider voting rights legislation this week, Tom took to social media in a video telling the American people to urge their Senators to do the right thing and pass voting rights legislation with the fierce urgency of now. You can find that and you can find Tom’s full statement on the issue . Here at Team Tom, we know that we wouldn’t be where we are today without the support of our grassroots supporters like you. That’s why Tom hosted a Zoom event to thank our outstanding supporters and volunteers, answer questions, and share what the road ahead looks like as we race toward the finish line. He was joined by special guests Senator Joanne C. Benson, Senator Cory McCray, Montgomery County Council Vice President Evan Glass, and Jessica Hack of UFCW Local 27, who all shared why it is so important that we continue to work together to elect Tom to be our next Governor. Tom joined the Fair Funding Coalition for their candidate’s forum on tax reform, budgets, and the state budget surplus. As Tom always says, “budgets are moral documents,” and he outlined his bold plan to ensure every Marylanders has access to jobs, justice, and opportunity. Thank you to Rev. Dr. Kevin Slayton for inviting Tom to participate and also for dedicating your life to fighting for change in our state. You can watch the forum . Social Media Action Alert We are so excited to share the strength of our grassroots movement, but we need YOUR help to spread the word! In the News “I’m profoundly disappointed in this result and the fact that 52 Senators chose to be complicit in these attacks. While we are frustrated and disappointed today, the fight is far from over. I’m proud of the 48 Senators, including Senators Cardin and Van Hollen, who voted to protect our voting rights. Let’s join them in speaking out, organizing, and holding our leaders accountable to protect the right to vote for every American.” “Antisemitism is a stain on our nation and on our world, and no one should ever feel unsafe to worship. We must come together to support our Jewish communities, uplift organizations working to protect the freedom to worship, and root out hatred and bigotry wherever it exists.” “Tom’s life’s work has been to get stuff done and fight for justice and jobs. Which is why he has early endorsements from African American leaders from across Baltimore City and Maryland.” ICYMI Our webstore is now live! Visit to let everyone know you're on . Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer. Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

name: James, Campaign Manager
subject: Wesley's Op-Ed: Joe Biden’s Jim Crow Fantasy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e4faccfc0e334ae6b655cb6738dfe550&_e=zIU1zCrrkv0AUDZk_KqgrA-wpmUvthINfT2J8LYupJrZBHuGPCs79pkCRCxkR_vnC-KLJxv1OncPaA_QAdjbjtl1_pZ_7yOXYSOJ72jwhwoZIT2OG5ZYTZ0eNDBtNOIK1LtHZPIzjXebWdZGJeM6FF4fbpHiWxr-jU92RWzTm10vWYEx4C8I0_WCi1OZXZ0lrrslDTdU0gzl90AlTMSAjIMppIjJfX9mzOsRyyHvnGq0yvWMvZ4vbRlwIEAvISaAEvMbtBEygX5P2WrG9dhAjFhuA-BkgfPp7IAdBK3_1MTftQtjhHWqHO6uNiWs72DovYZQAQKB5of0V0k2oUrmsJ4mkj7PHYN0-YLtpsX1z6LvgNzFj67rAM8IrFC4L_aCoGbKjdvldKvujuAh1al_I3bwY0Cyan6cfH6IhWwTRgXLrU96fx5Buz2Tna_qcHlF)

Friend,

Did you see Wesley's recent Op-Ed in Townhall regarding Biden's Jim Crow 2.0 Fantasy? If you haven't read it yet, you can find it [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e4faccfc0e334ae6b655cb6738dfe550&_e=zIU1zCrrkv0AUDZk_KqgrLp6UlgCEIUIvkZdPO1PhPBc9jNavhbNe8vPg9LJE7uEAN0aKSKAl5lMVH0MH5IZpGDOQfRDBek5P19DkoOtWZ5qZ8nEC9vArLlvE0wNipPmA0tAL2yOx1BQywjZ-RmuuC8mnhf9qhlK_Cg3Lo0d3vFn2CHG8VuDvb6IJYO4zqP-YuN8wCZ8jMJi1k4U_58gaEkojP3rZgB4krqPWEEXTmCH-U2D4R1rWG3dfd3_fEW7pckMFqGbiFqAR1-0S7UWcKoM86ePfJn911Q_ZTliwglO5Ezt1_ZfmITFvD5jKgaj1Ie7XDL7uqig8C5IZRcBgG357k-L25naL1mt5VUyvm8%3D) or read it below!

Sincerely,
James, Campaign Manager
**Joe Biden's Jim Crow Fantasy**
By Wesley Hunt | January 20th, 2022
President Biden has built a catalog of racist and offensive statements about black Americans and members of other minority communities throughout his career. However, Biden’s latest political stunt comparing the resistance to voting for a federalized takeover of our elections, to a sequel of Jim Crow, takes the cake.
In his own words, Biden claimed opposition to the Freedom to Vote Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act was, “Jim Crow 2.0.” Biden also claimed that this new Jim Crow 2.0, is because of voter suppression and election subversion.
It strikes me as odd that a President who grew up during segregation, would suddenly claim that Jim Crow has made a comeback and federal overhaul of our elections is necessary to save our democracy.
Was it not Joe Biden and the Democrats who proclaimed that the 2020 Presidential Election was the safest and fairest Presidential election ever conducted? So what changed? The Democrat Party’s grip on power.
Joe Biden’s poll numbers have fallen into the political basement and the last chance Democrats have to prevent a red wave in November is to rig the game before it is played. That is why in the midst of the midterms, Biden is using the race card to get what he wants.
I cannot imagine that Joe Biden actually believes the United States is once again caught in the grip of Jim Crow, but the mere insinuation of it is not only insulting to black Americans across the country, but also to those who struggled in the segregated south during Jim Crow.
This revisionist take on America’s true struggle for progress is an assault on the legacy of civil rights leaders who marched in the face of fire hoses, dogs, and the threat of death. It’s an insult to the memory of people like Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., Emmett Till, and Rosa Parks, just to name a few.
Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi should be ashamed of themselves for attempting to make this comparison. Have the three most prominent Democrats in the country, all of whom were alive during Jim Crow, forgotten the progress we have made in just a half century?
It certainly seems that way after President Biden denigrated MLK’s legacy by suggesting George Floyd had a “greater impact” on civil rights than Dr. King had. “Jim Crow 2.0,” is another example of Biden playing fast and loose with race for political expediency.
Let me be clear, the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act is not intended to help advance civil rights, but instead to help Democrats win future elections and ensure their stronghold over our federal government. Their argument for shoving this bill through the Senate is that racist Republicans across the country have instituted anti-voting policies, like requiring an I.D. to vote, that disenfranchise black voters.
Does Joe Biden, who championed the 1994 Crime Bill that led to the mass incarceration of black people, think so little of us that he and his Democrat allies really believe we can’t obtain a photo ID to vote Apparently, yes.
Here in Houston, Democrats called Republicans racist for canceling Harris County’s 24-hour voting method that was implemented during the Covid-19 pandemic, despite voters having the ability to vote by mail, and having two weeks of early voting. I can assure you that black people can just as easily vote within an allotted time period as any American.
I lost 14 of my West Point classmates during the Global War on Terror. These brave soldiers and thousands of others didn’t die for white people, or black people, or asian people, or Hispanic people. They died for Americans. Their sacrifice didn’t discriminate; it was for all of us. And as the direct descendant of a slave who grew up on a plantation near Baton Rouge, I am unequivocally proud to say that the United States is the greatest country in the world and, despite what Biden may tell you, we have made historic progress.
As we finish honoring and celebrating the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. this week, we must continue to remind ourselves that yes, there will always be room to improve our society, but there is no single better country on earth than America.
Joe Biden’s plan to divide America on racial lines will not work. We are not living in an era of Jim Crow 2.0, precisely the opposite, and the story of my family and my candidacy for United States Congress is evidence of that.

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
---

| Friend, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

body:
Do you know a young person who wants campaign experience? Let me know. | | | Peter -

**This is Jon, Garrett Soldano's Political Director.**

_Our team is looking for motivated students across Michigan to serve as campaign interns._

Interns will have the opportunity to play an instrumental role in electing the next Governor of Michigan.

[**_Click here for more information_**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=67ca2a0362&e=fe4b890356).
---
| [Learn More](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5d2f32eb05&e=fe4b890356 "Learn More")
---
| _**Who Can Apply?** _
Any college or high school student looking to gain grassroots campaign experience.

**Qualifications** \- Ability to meet goals and adhere to deadlines
\- Strong written and verbal communication skills
\- Strong organizational skills
**Internship responsibilities: ** \- Learn the in's and out's of organizing a grassroots campaign
\- Organize and implement field operation programs in your area
\- Recruit, train, and execute voter contact as directed by campaign staff

If you know any young patriots who would be interested in joining our team, please share this link: [GarrettforMichigan.com/intern](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=8c44f46c08&e=fe4b890356)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Katzenmeyer?=
subject: The Informed Voter: Voting Rights, Navient, and COVID-19 Tests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Katzenmeyer for Wisconsin
body:
Your weekly roundup of important stories you may have missed | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jessicaforwis/the-informed-voter-voting-rights-navient-and-covid-19-tests?e=42a933bda9)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# Hello!
Here's your weekly roundup of important stories you may have missed both locally and nationally!
---
|
---
|
## [**Democrats unable to get enough votes to pass bill on voting rights**](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=fae7454645&e=42a933bda9)
---
| [ ](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=7c5cf1c146&e=42a933bda9)
---
| On Wednesday, Senate Democrats were blocked while trying to move forward on voting rights legislation. They failed to secure the 50 votes needed with a 48-52 vote opposing this legislation change. President Biden was quoted stating, “I am disappointed — but I am not deterred. My Administration will never stop fighting to ensure that the heart and soul of our democracy — the right to vote — is protected at all costs. We will continue to work with allies to advance necessary legislation to protect the right to vote. And to push for Senate procedural changes that will protect the fundamental right to vote." Democrats were hoping to implement what was coined a “talking filibuster” for voting rights legislation. This would require a 51 vote majority rather than the usual 60 after senators had used their opportunities to speak to filibuster the bill.
---
|
---
|
## [**Covid-19 Rapid Antigen Tests - Free to all US households**](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=33c7a373c8&e=42a933bda9)
---
| [ ](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=5871306d56&e=42a933bda9)
---
| This past Monday, covidtests.org went live, allowing all US households to order 4 at home rapid antigen covid tests free of charge. The website states that the tests will ship within 7-12 business days and encourages those who are in immediate need of a Covid-19 test to find a local free testing site in their local area. The process is simple: a few clicks, input your contact and mailing information and the tests will be on their way to you via USPS. It takes less than 5 minutes to order these tests to keep you and those in your household safe. Make sure you log on and get your tests today.
---
|
---
|
## [**NAVIENT to settle, with nearly $24M headed to Wisconsin**](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=90ea44556e&e=42a933bda9)
---
| [ ](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=73d1929f62&e=42a933bda9)
---
| It was announced late last week by Attorney General Josh Kaul that Navient, a student loan servicer, will provide $1.85 billion to resolve allegations of unfair and deceptive student loan practices. Navient was proven to have steered borrowers into costly long-term forbearance, rather than counseling their borrowers about more affordable options to repay their loans. The Wisconsin settlement will include $1,110,265 in restitution to more than 4,000 borrowers. Just under 1000 more borrowers will receive $22,776,612 in private loan debt cancellation. This settlement also requires Navient to hold additional trainings and will prohibit incentives for customer service agents who have been previously encouraged to minimize time spent counseling borrowers.
---
|
---
| If you have stories you'd like us to share next week, email us at info@jessicaforwis.com.

Have a great rest of your week and keep up the good fight!

Sincerely,
**Team Katzenmeyer**
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE TODAY!](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=7e999449ab&e=42a933bda9 "CONTRIBUTE TODAY!")
---
| **Follow us for updates!**
---

---
[](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=0cfaa28fab&e=42a933bda9)
---

This is a trip of a lifetime, friend, and all you need to do is enter! MEMBER ID:2022127-45 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT ENTRY STATUS: INCOMPLETE** Don’t wait, enter to win NOW! When I receive the updated list of entries tomorrow morning, I’ll look for your name! ** Thank you, Kelly for Alaska Republican for U.S. Senate | | | | ==
