**All he wants for his 38th year is to bring new leadership to Florida’s 15th District, so we want to raise $3,800 by the end of the weekend. Now, Eddie _insisted_ that we _completely_ ignore his birthday and _not_ make a big deal out of it. So, of course, we are now obligated to make it a Thing.
But in all seriousness, Eddie’s giving it all he has to serve his home district. He’s in this race for all the right reasons: because he cares about you, your families, and the future of our communities. He never complains about what it takes to keep this fight going, but we thought it would be good to rally a little more encouragement, especially ahead of what will be a tough — but winnable — election in November.
So, we're asking those who can to help us surprise Eddie with an influx of campaign contributions for his birthday. **Ideally, we'd like to tell him we raised $3,800 from people who believe in him by midnight on Sunday.[Can you chip in and help us hit this goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40923367/326545635/2068940174?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220121bdayrs_TE_op_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzI3YjYxNy1mZDdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=agZ2XM0YEkeQ50T7lDwhHdER3QOJizYOvfcGMzv0L5Q=)**

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: 12 years since the disastrous Citizens United decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Twelve years ago today, the Supreme Court made the disastrous Citizens United decision which unjustly ruled that corporations and foreign governments are people. Since then, our democracy has been left vulnerable to the influence of dark money. | Team, the 1960s were a brutal era in American history for civil rights and white supremacist segregation.

Thanks to heroes like Martin Luther King, Jr. and John Lewis, our country emerged stronger from that unrest and oppression.

[But this week, just days after the anniversary of Dr. King’s birthday, the GOP teamed up with moderates to _crush_ our last hopes at federal voting rights legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40923988/326547742/325075449?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmMyY2JlYi1mZDdhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfueNtvHgEtiGxFni6lgztUFFOrXFEH9QF8kzBeuDoQ=&emci=efb6e8d6-287a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a2c2cbeb-fd7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26828920)

Fellow patriot,

As our country remains in shock over the tragic event that occurred over the weekend in Colleyville, Texas, I feel the need to condemn in the strongest possible terms, the actions of hate and antisemitism taken by an armed terrorist-assailant against the Jewish community and the Congregation Beth Israel Synagogue.

Members of the Jewish faith should not have to think twice about attending services at any synagogue - anywhere - period. Synagogues around the nation have had to take measures like hiring security guards to protect their congregants...

America is a place of love and unity, not antisemitism and hate. Antisemitism has no place in this country. It is unacceptable and unfortunate that many religious institutions are forced to seriously contemplate having armed security to protect their congregation. We are a nation of tolerance, not intolerance.

As an attorney, former official in the Trump Administration and current candidate for the U.S. House, I very much look forward to reviewing the results of the FBI and Joint Terrorism Task Force investigations.

The questions we should all be asking right now is how did the Biden national security team let a British citizen, a known terrorist sympathizer and anti-Semite, slip into the country without being flagged?

Who is going to take responsibility for letting this attack happen? In the coming days and weeks, we should all be demanding resignations at the highest levels.

I’m thankful to the law enforcement officers and first responders who acted heroically. I am also thankful that all hostages were reunited, unharmed, to their families.

God bless all those involved and affected. Our thoughts and prayers are with you.

Best,
Rod

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=74222946ce40426a9b680fbb9176722b&_t=XvvV11lZjdgEl3IHks6ZoZBw9LAf6eiZUC9g3qGJ4q0WAxMyZtJrYqgpNoYiSFVTIptuZJczvhxWyAUSFJAkfv9SBbwTQBfyuE8ug2PjZgH0xNUmSI2FqtzyCjVqPi2s64Gh2Is_KVU33PWwkX0Zd5cE1WWA-J4TNC7oQWxRYz0%3D).

| | | Fellow Conservative,

Gov. DeSantis reached out to top state Patriots – you were of them.

Did you get his message?

\--------Forwarded Message---------
Subject: This isn’t a fair fight
From: Gov. Ron DeSantis
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3c6o5-1udpt-4qqlpo7/ "%%Email__c%%")**

---
I cannot stress this enough – electing strong GOP leaders is crucial to defending our states from the Left’s liberal takeover. Look at what’s happening in blue states – businesses are shuttering, rights are being revoked, and Americans are fleeing to states like freedom-loving Florida.

**[I’m asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms – in _ANY_ state – to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3c6o5-1udpu-4qqlpo8/ "I’m asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms – in ANY state – to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.")**
---
| | | [>> RESTORE GOP STATE MAJORITIES <<](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3c6o5-1udpv-4qqlpo9/ "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
I won’t lie to you, it’s not going to be easy.

We’re fighting against the entire liberal machine – the White House, the biased corporate media, and big tech tyrants are all coming after us, Fellow Conservative.

This isn’t a fair fight – they’ve got more power, more money, and a liberal army of activists ready to revoke our rights. State GOP are the last line of defense against the Left’s tyrannical agenda, and we’ve never waivered. **[Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can’t do it without your help. All I’m asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great country.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3c6o5-1udpw-4qqlpo0/ "Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can’t do it without your help. All I’m asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great country.")**

If you can, please chip in today to fuel our fight before the Left’s policies destroy any more states.
---
| | | [>> RUSH $14 NOW <<](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3c6o5-1udpx-4qqlpo1/ "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
Thank you for stepping up,

Ron DeSantis
---

body:
Week 2
---
| | | | | | 2022 Session Update Week 2
---
| VA Delegate John McGuire (Navy SEAL - Father - Business Owner)
---
|
---
| The General Assembly convened on January 12, marking the beginning of the 402nd legislative session of the House of Delegates.
---
| New Day in Virginia
---
|
---
| Governor Youngkin kept his Day 1 campaign promises by ending mask, vaccine mandates, banning CRT in classrooms and firing the parole board.
---
| Winsome Sears
---
|
---
| Lt. Governor Winsome Sears made history by presiding over the Virginia State Senate as the first black woman to do so!
---
|
"Top Cop" Jason Miyares
---
|
---
| Jason Miyares, our newly sworn in Attorney General made history as the first Latino to hold a Statewide Office in Virginia. He has filed several lawsuits.
---
| 2022 McGuire LEGISLATION

Bills:

| Martin Luther King Jr.
---
|
---
| We honored and remembered Dr. Martin Luther King Jr on Monday. Our country has come a long way since he said: "I have a dream that my four little children will one day live in a nation where they will not be judged by the color of their skin but by the content of their character." Isn't it great we live in a country where a man or a woman of any race religion or creed can work hard and achieve just about anything?

| Repeal HB 257 "Predator Protection Act"
---
|
---
| Repeal the "Predator Protection Act": I serve on the Education Committee and our first order of business on Monday will be to vote on my bill to repeal HB257. HB 257 is a Democrat Progressive Bill that allowed the Loudoun County School Board to cover up stalking, abduction, and sexual battery of children. Our children are #1 and it is unconscionable to think that School Administrators would sweep this conduct under the rug, instead of informing Law Enforcement.

clean_body: Week 2 | | | | | | 2022 Session Update Week 2 | VA Delegate John McGuire (Navy SEAL - Father - Business Owner) | | The General Assembly convened on January 12, marking the beginning of the 402nd legislative session of the House of Delegates. | New Day in Virginia | | Governor Youngkin kept his Day 1 campaign promises by ending mask, vaccine mandates, banning CRT in classrooms and firing the parole board. | Winsome Sears | | Lt. Governor Winsome Sears made history by presiding over the Virginia State Senate as the first black woman to do so! | "Top Cop" Jason Miyares | | Jason Miyares, our newly sworn in Attorney General made history as the first Latino to hold a Statewide Office in Virginia. He has filed several lawsuits. | 2022 McGuire LEGISLATION Bills: == This bill will be seen first thing Monday in Education Committee == This bill passed sub committee Counties Cities and Towns Thurs 9-0. == == == == == a voter ID to vote. == == This bill passed Commerce and Energy Thurs 22-0. bill eliminates CRT in the classroom. taxes on military retirement pay. == == Public Procurement Act. | Martin Luther King Jr. | | We honored and remembered Dr. Martin Luther King Jr on Monday. Our country has come a long way since he said: "I have a dream that my four little children will one day live in a nation where they will not be judged by the color of their skin but by the content of their character." Isn't it great we live in a country where a man or a woman of any race religion or creed can work hard and achieve just about anything? | Stop Anti-Semitism | == | We must stand together to fight Anti-Semitism. The hostage crisis in Texas is just another example of why we must stop hate in all our communities. This is why I've introduced legislation to ensure Virginia's government doesn't contract work with any business that currently, or plans to take part in, the Anti-Semitic Boycott, Divestment, and Sanctions (BDS) Movement. I will always stand with Israel and the Jewish people here at home and abroad. == Public Procurement Act. | Youngkin Speech on Youtube | == | Happy Birthday Former Virginia Governor Wilder | | Former Governor L. Douglas Wilder #66 turned 91 this week. Happy birthday and thank you for your service to our Commonwealth. | | | | Repeal HB 257 "Predator Protection Act" | | Repeal the "Predator Protection Act": I serve on the Education Committee and our first order of business on Monday will be to vote on my bill to repeal HB257. HB 257 is a Democrat Progressive Bill that allowed the Loudoun County School Board to cover up stalking, abduction, and sexual battery of children. Our children are #1 and it is unconscionable to think that School Administrators would sweep this conduct under the rug, instead of informing Law Enforcement. | General Williams | | It was great to see fellow Delegate Jason Ballard at the Military Caucus. Congratulations to General Timothy Paschal Williams on his Reappointment as the Adjutant General of Virginia. He commands the Virginia Army National Guard, Virginia Air National Guard, and the Virginia Defense Force. Also, Congratulations to Daniel Gade, our new Commissioner of Veteran Services. | Goochland GOP | | I attended the Goochland GOP meeting and gave our team a legislative update. I encourage you to attend your next GOP meeting. | HB 60 Passed Sub Commitee | | Success, my bill passed! HB 60 passed County, Cities and Towns Sub Committee 9-0. This bill will give the town of Louisa flexibility with regard to the number of members required to do work on the Economic Development Authority Board. | Virginia Sheriffs Association | | It was a nice surprise this week when I received a special visit from the Goochland County Sheriff's Office including Sheriff Stephen Creasey and several Deputies. To all our men and women in Law Enforcement, we appreciate your service. | Rural Caucus | | Proud to attend the Rural Caucus with Legislators at the General Assembly including special guests Speaker Todd Gilbert and Members of Youngkin's Administration. Agriculture and Forestry make up the largest industry in Virginia with a 70 billion dollar fiscal impact and providing 450,000 jobs! | Food For Thought | If there's no critical race theory in our schools, why are Democrats so angry about efforts to remove it? Democrats once again insist that you must have proof of vaccination to work, but no proof of who you are to vote. | THANK YOU! | I am committed to adhering to the principal duties of Government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, the protection of life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness. I look forward to seeing you in the District. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov or 804-698-1056. | | | | | God Bless, Delegate John McGuire Virginia House District 56 900 East Main Street Pocahontas Building, Suite E213 Richmond, VA 23219 Phone: 804-698-1056 == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA | | | STAY CONNECTED | == == == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, 11357 Nuckols Road # 156, Glen Allen, VA 23059 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

clean_body: Skyrocketing gas prices are a serious emergency that threatens the biggest advantage we have over the Left – MOBILITY! Skyrocketing gas prices are a serious emergency that threatens the biggest advantage we have over the Left -- our MOBILITY | Peter, Our Bikers rolled up in force to Pres. Trump’s Arizona Rally and made it clear - President Trump and his supporters will not be canceled by Leftist thugs! We’re the only grassroots organization with the determination to take on the violent Left at a moment’s notice. Now we’re being called to rally behind Trump and his supporters in Texas in less than 8 days! Peter, we have a major problem. After Arizona, our Bikes are running on empty. If we can’t keep our gas tanks filled, our Bikers aren’t going anywhere. Because of Bidenflation, our biggest cost is the gas to fuel up our Bikes. Skyrocketing gas prices are a serious emergency that threatens the biggest advantage we have over the Left - MOBILITY! Do not ignore this email! We have less than 8 days to plan, organize and fuel up our Bikes for Texas to fulfill our Pledge to President Trump. Democrats think they can flip Texas and deny President Trump another major victory in the state. name: Peter Thomas
subject: 𝗥𝗲: FEC reporting deadline tonight at midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Our campaign has an important deadline we're facing this evening. We need your help.
Hi,
Thank you for receiving e-mails from Dr. Bob Lorinser. As you know, we try to keep you well informed of the issues with every send - and revolve our fundraising outreach around topical news and essential campaign information.
Tonight, I extend a direct ask to you. At midnight, we report our fundraising for the last quarter to the FEC. While all the donations are in and accounted for (We met our $100,000 goal for the previous quarter), we need to know we still have this momentum. If you can contribute tonight ahead of a new direction in our fundraising efforts next week, it will go a long way in our next report.
Fundraising is going well. So far, nearly 100% of our donations are coming from small, individual contributions with a grassroots effort - and we're competing well.
As you may have noticed, Dr. Bob is massively and rapidly expanding outreach efforts. Our campaign needs to grow, and we have six events before Feb. 5, and it all costs time, money, resources, travel, staff, and volunteers to keep it going.
We're confident we can unseat Jack Bergman and know that money isn't the only route to victory, but it sure makes our jobs easier. With the expansion of the district, we're looking at campaigning in new counties with a total of over 25,000 sq. miles of coverage.
It takes a lot of effort. We're working extremely hard, spending money wisely, and are so grateful to have you in our corner. If you can contribute tonight of $100, it will set a good, new pace for this first quarter and get Dr. Bob in front of more people.
We're confident if we can get Dr. Bob an audience with as many voters as possible, we can convince and convert enough people to vote for him to flip the First District of Michigan. For the first time since Bart Stupak, Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula can send a Democrat to Congress.
But, we need you. If you can swing it tonight, we would greatly appreciate a contribution.
Thank you for your donations and hard work.
Dr. Bob always says, "I won't win this election –** _ _** we will." With you, we've got a winning team.
Here's a link to donate - [bit.ly/FundDrBob.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40924722/326551205/-1190522591?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDIyZDQxNC0wMjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMEs5xR4tvnPw2ixG2MGNVifMA-MUSot4AWHqFLp4Qw=&emci=3d103ffd-fe7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6022d414-027b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427)
Equally important - please let me know if you would like to get on Dr. Bob's calendar for some one-on-one time. We're glad to schedule you the opportunity to chat with him directly on the phone and discuss anything you wish before giving.
Thank you,
Peter
Friends of Dr. Bob Lorinser | Volunteer
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

subject: I fear tomorrow could be the last anniversary where Roe v. Wade is the law of the land
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor

Friend,

Tomorrow is the anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ ... but I fear it could be _the last anniversary where Roe v. Wade is the law of the land._

This summer, if the U.S. Supreme Court shreds decades of legal precedent and overturns _Roe v. Wade_ , the issue of reproductive rights will fall to the states. And we already know Gov. Ron DeSantis is excited to restrict those rights.

But when I’m governor of Florida, **_I will defend a woman’s right to choose with everything I’ve got. That’s my promise to you._** **[So, if you can, please help me defeat Gov. **Gov. DeSantis’s track record on choice is extreme and far-right:**
• He’s already asked the Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.
• After Republicans in the Florida Legislature introduced a 15-week abortion ban (similar to the one in Texas), DeSantis indicated he _supported_ the bill.
We don’t need to guess what he’ll do if the Supreme Court strikes down _Roe v. Wade_. DeSantis has made his views crystal clear.

So let _me_ be clear: I find his views to be wrong and **_unacceptable_** , and I will do everything in my power to beat him in November and ensure Florida has a governor who’ll always protect a woman’s right to choose.

**[If you’re with me in this fight, I’m humbly asking for your help today. Please give what you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40924729/326551213/-2089030287?refcode=20220121_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYThjYmJmYS0wMTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=32VOL2yWqR4g9x6EhimDubav7vDvFsV0xsiM1O4Ny44=)**

Charlie

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Fwd: Friend, could I get your input on a few things?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Hi, Friend - I'm writing to make sure that you didn't miss my message. As we kick off the election year, it's so critical to have all hands on deck to build a strategy that is reflective of your passions, concerns, and future. That's why I'm still looking for 261 more Democrats to participate in our official election year survey.
---
Hearing what's on the mind of this grassroots team ensures we build and maintain a laser-focused strategy to protect the people of this great nation and ensure Mitch McConnell never takes control of Congress again. **[So please, before our next strategy meeting, can you please make sure you've submitted your feedback? Click here to take our election year survey right now.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-jan-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1122-su-nd)**
Thanks,
Dick

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Wed, Jan 19, 2022
Subject: Friend, could I get your input on a few things?

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=QFmeAYb46CJJtsD8xhc2X834d9bHbPtQ&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
We've officially entered an election year, and I'll be blunt: With the Republican Party dangerously beholden to Donald Trump - and our very democracy at stake - Democrats have zero margin for error.
**That 's why our campaign is going into overdrive to keep this seat, and I'm asking you to share your feedback right away - because I can only win this race with direct input from people like you.**
**[So please: Will you take a few moments to let me know what issues matter most to you this election year? It only takes a couple of minutes, and your input is essential to keeping me current on your priorities so I can do my best to fight for them and for you.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-jan-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1122-su-nd)**
I know you hear a lot from me about Senate control and what's at stake, but it's because I've seen the harm and obstruction of a Mitch McConnell-led GOP majority up close and personal. Their focus is not on you. Their eyes are on the beltway and halls of power. Mine are on you.
People's lives and livelihoods are at stake. Our fundamental civil rights are at stake. Our planet is at stake. I am here to serve you and make sure your voices are heard.
The Republican Party is united around defending Donald Trump, amplifying his lies, and obstructing efforts to investigate his potential criminal wrongdoing. They want to retake control and advance an extreme right-wing agenda. I'm focused on improving the lives of everyday Americans. Protecting our democracy from dangerous attacks at home and abroad. And making sure government, and those who lead it, are held accountable for their actions.
**My willingness to stand up has made me a target. I know I can only keep this seat if I have the best possible campaign strategy - powered by people like you.**
**[So please, before my team's next strategy meeting on Thursday morning, will you partake in our official campaign survey? I'd love 500 more members of this team to submit their feedback tonight.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-jan-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1122-su-nd)**
With gratitude,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=UEe6c6yklMy95KOpj5eRP834d9bHbPtQ&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Charles Graham
subject: Educators have always found a way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40924892/326552174/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzJkODg1ZS0wMzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYXes2wJ5ow_wpZyoeM2xwk2ojnr7kd2m_koQW2DZUI=)

| | Folks, Before I entered public service, I was a special education teacher. I saw firsthand how strapped my school was for resources, and how my fellow teachers were selling their own belongings to pay for their students’ school supplies, Part of why I’m running for Congress is to put education back at the forefront of our public policy – [**so, I’m coming to you as a former educator to ask if you’ll chip in $25 or more to my campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40924893/326552175/1028796401?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220121_FR_Education_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzJkODg1ZS0wMzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYXes2wJ5ow_wpZyoeM2xwk2ojnr7kd2m_koQW2DZUI=) | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40924894/326552176/1028796401?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220121_FR_Education_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzJkODg1ZS0wMzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYXes2wJ5ow_wpZyoeM2xwk2ojnr7kd2m_koQW2DZUI=)
---
I want to explain why education is so personal to me, so I’m going to share a quick story with you.
Throughout the 17th and early 20th century, Native American children were forcibly sent to boarding schools around the United States to become “civilized” and assimilate into Western, Euro-centric culture.
During this time, Lumbee educators decided to open the first school by and for Native Americans – the Croatan Normal School right here in Robeson County.
But the North Carolina General Assembly only awarded the school with _$500_ – so our community rallied together to raise the funds to build the school and provide it with books and other vital supplies.
**Educators have always found a way.**
The Croatan Normal School opened its doors in 1887. But even today in 2022, educators are still struggling to provide their students with the basic materials that they need to learn.
Teachers across the country have to buy their own school supplies for their students, are teaching from outdated textbooks, and in many cases have no choice but to teach in-person during a pandemic without proper PPE.
Our teachers deserve more. They are some of the most important figures in our children’s lives, and they are educating the future of our country. It’s past time that we treat educators with the respect they deserve, raise teacher pay, and provide them with all of the tools they need for success.
Kids and teachers are suffering right now, folks. They’re risking their lives every day to go to school during a deadly pandemic and many districts don’t have the resources for remote learning – let alone to pay their staff a living wage.
I’m running for Congress to provide our educators, schools, and students with the resources they deserve – but I need your help to get me there. clean_body: | = | | Folks, Before I entered public service, I was a special education teacher. I saw firsthand how strapped my school was for resources, and how my fellow teachers were selling their own belongings to pay for their students’ school supplies, Part of why I’m running for Congress is to put education back at the forefront of our public policy – = | | | = I want to explain why education is so personal to me, so I’m going to share a quick story with you. Throughout the 17th and early 20th century, Native American children were forcibly sent to boarding schools around the United States to become “civilized” and assimilate into Western, Euro-centric culture. During this time, Lumbee educators decided to open the first school by and for Native Americans – the Croatan Normal School right here in Robeson County. But the North Carolina General Assembly only awarded the school with $500 – so our community rallied together to raise the funds to build the school and provide it with books and other vital supplies. Educators have always found a way. The Croatan Normal School opened its doors in 1887. But even today in 2022, educators are still struggling to provide their students with the basic materials that they need to learn. Teachers across the country have to buy their own school supplies for their students, are teaching from outdated textbooks, and in many cases have no choice but to teach in-person during a pandemic without proper PPE. Our teachers deserve more. They are some of the most important figures in our children’s lives, and they are educating the future of our country. It’s past time that we treat educators with the respect they deserve, raise teacher pay, and provide them with all of the tools they need for success. Kids and teachers are suffering right now, folks. They’re risking their lives every day to go to school during a deadly pandemic and many districts don’t have the resources for remote learning – let alone to pay their staff a living wage. I’m running for Congress to provide our educators, schools, and students with the resources they deserve – but I need your help to get me there. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = – Charles | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. Our first major test as a campaign is just on the horizon, team. **We’re less than four months away from Ohio’s primary election!** May’s primary election will be giving all eyes watching a measure of how strong our campaign is going into the first milestone of 2022. If we can maximize our voter turn out for Chelsea, then Ohioan Republicans will have something to seriously be worried about. The stakes are high, and we can’t miss this opportunity to flex our campaign’s strength. That’s why we’re gearing up to mobilize supporters, recruit volunteers, and rush past the first goal post to Chelsea becoming Ohio’s next Secretary of State! [**We’re ready to get started on the next stage of our campaign. Dear Team, I am incredibly proud of all the work Team Kina has been doing in January. We are knocking thousands of doors, and building a field operation on a scale this district has never seen. clean_body: Will enough people know they have a choice? | | | Dear Team, I am incredibly proud of all the work Team Kina has been doing in January. We are knocking thousands of doors, and building a field operation on a scale this district has never seen. At every door we knock, we seem to find voters who are fed up with the same old politicians, and are ready for something new. That’s very exciting, but it’s also scary, because it means if we lose, it will be for only one reason: That not enough people knew I was running. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We will keep knocking on thousands of doors, but we’re up against a corporate-funded incumbent. This campaign needs to raise enough money—$1 at a time—to send mailers, run digital ads and radio ads, hire communications staff, and reach every voter in the district. In order to win, we need to put all the pieces together. We’ve already proven this is the most serious primary challenge IL-7 has ever seen. We know what we need to do to change this district forever. Thank you, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

I ran for Governor to make Nevada a place of opportunity for everyone – and I’m proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish.
**We’ve fought back against Republicans’ voter suppression tactics** by permanently expanding mail-in voting.
**We’ve jumpstarted Nevada’s recovery from the pandemic** by following evidence-based measures and ensuring folks have access to the vaccine.
**We've stood with workers and labor unions** by building an economy that uplifts working families, and supports small local businesses.
**We’ve increased access to public health services** by becoming the second state in the nation to pass a public health care option.
**We’ve strengthened our public education system** by increasing funding and ensuring teachers and students have access to the tools they need to thrive.
**I’ll be honest. I’m not the most polished speaker or savviest politician. But I love this state, and when I see something wrong – I fight like hell to make it right.**
These accomplishments have made a difference in the lives of thousands of working Nevadans, and I’m asking for your help to continue this fight for progress. clean_body: | | | | | Folks, this is going to be a long email, but it’s really important to me that you read it. I’m in a tough reelection battle against 6 MAGA opponents and the GOP has already spent over $2 million against me. The stakes are too high for us to lose this seat to a Republican who will roll back all of the progress we’ve made since 2018. | | | | | | | | | | | | | I ran for Governor to make Nevada a place of opportunity for everyone – and I’m proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish. We’ve fought back against Republicans’ voter suppression tactics by permanently expanding mail-in voting. We’ve jumpstarted Nevada’s recovery from the pandemic by following evidence-based measures and ensuring folks have access to the vaccine. We've stood with workers and labor unions by building an economy that uplifts working families, and supports small local businesses. We’ve increased access to public health services by becoming the second state in the nation to pass a public health care option. We’ve strengthened our public education system by increasing funding and ensuring teachers and students have access to the tools they need to thrive. I’ll be honest. I’m not the most polished speaker or savviest politician. But I love this state, and when I see something wrong – I fight like hell to make it right. These accomplishments have made a difference in the lives of thousands of working Nevadans, and I’m asking for your help to continue this fight for progress. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for chipping in, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. Box 850 Las Vegas, NV 89125 mailto:info@stevesisolak.com | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Sisolak for Nevada, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Mullin?=
subject: This week in the U.S. Senate…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am outraged and disappointed. | | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

I am outraged and disappointed.
On Wednesday, the U.S. Senate debated the most consequential package of voting rights legislation in a generation – **and Senate Republicans blocked it from even seeing a vote.**

Bringing badly needed reforms to our broken elections system and protecting the right of every voter to vote has been central to my service in the California Assembly. Why? **Because our democracy is under assault, we need more bold leaders in Washington with the experience and record of results to fix it.**

As California Assembly Speaker pro Tem, I wrote the landmark DISCLOSE Act, one of the nation’s toughest laws for fighting the influence of dark money in our elections. And I am proud to have authored California’s first law for all vote-by-mail elections, so every voter automatically gets a ballot in the mail. And as a result, California elections have seen record participation and turnout. So, what’s the takeaway? **When we make voting access fairer, easier, and more equitable, great things happen and more people than ever before participate in their own democracy. **

In Congress, I will continue to defend our democracy from far right Republicans who ignore or obstruct the will of the people and the rule of law – and I’ll do everything in my power to fight Jim Crow-type laws being advanced in states across our Union with the sole aim of disenfranchising minority communities and keeping Black and Brown voters from the polling place.

What we witnessed from Senate Republicans was unspeakable, shameful, and cowardly and history will remember how these Senators refused to stand up for the integrity of our elections when it mattered most.

[We can change this, but only if we work together and turn up the pressure for real change. Are you with me?](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=dec3b9ac7f&e=292fde286a)

— _Kevin_

Copyright © 2022 Kevin Mullin for Congress, All rights reserved. You are signed up to receive emails from Kevin Mullin for Congress. Our mailing address is: Kevin Mullin for CongressPO Box 869Belmont, CA 94002 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: the weekend is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/7u0U2Uco9AmlqV4vn8KfrEegaebu8VfN3S0KVk43voo=/ExRaESHV1vSwFnp3gie90ADp-cINnY6BM0ZjiLmQ33w=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220121-1-EM)
---
| Peter,

We made it to the weekend! While I will continue to work hard on the campaign trail and meet with voters across the district, I am also looking forward to spending time with my grandson, Stanley III.

I hope you get some time to relax and refresh this weekend. And most of all, I hope you stay safe as we deal with winter weather here in North Carolina. [_**But before you sign off of email for the weekend, will you please consider contributing to my campaign for Congress?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/7u0U2Uco9AmlqV4vn8KfrEegaebu8VfN3S0KVk43voo=/ExRaESHV1vSwFnp3gie90ADp-cINnY6BM0ZjiLmQ33w=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220121-1-EM)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/7u0U2Uco9AmlqV4vn8KfrEegaebu8VfN3S0KVk43voo=/ExRaESHV1vSwFnp3gie90ADp-cINnY6BM0ZjiLmQ33w=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220121-1-EM)
---
This is a grassroots campaign, and we rely on small-dollar donations to power us forward. I am amazed by how much progress we've made in the months since we launched this race -- it's an honor to see how our movement has grown.

But we have plenty of work to do if we want to win this race, and that's why I need your support. Even a $5 donation gives us the resources we need to reach more voters. [_**So please, will you chip in what you can now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/7u0U2Uco9AmlqV4vn8KfrEegaebu8VfN3S0KVk43voo=/ExRaESHV1vSwFnp3gie90ADp-cINnY6BM0ZjiLmQ33w=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220121-1-EM)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/7u0U2Uco9AmlqV4vn8KfrEegaebu8VfN3S0KVk43voo=/ExRaESHV1vSwFnp3gie90ADp-cINnY6BM0ZjiLmQ33w=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220121-1-EM)
---
I'm in this race because I believe it's time to put the people ahead of the politics and take away the bitterness from the word compromise.

I'm in this race because I know that I can make a positive difference for my community. [_**And if you believe so too, I hope you 'll consider donating to my campaign.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/7u0U2Uco9AmlqV4vn8KfrEegaebu8VfN3S0KVk43voo=/ExRaESHV1vSwFnp3gie90ADp-cINnY6BM0ZjiLmQ33w=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220121-1-EM)

Have a relaxing and safe weekend,
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7u0U2Uco9AmlqV4vn8KfrEegaebu8VfN3S0KVk43voo=/ExRaESHV1vSwFnp3gie90ADp-cINnY6BM0ZjiLmQ33w=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220121-1-EM)

Every donation comes from people across this state, in the times of a pandemic, and in the toughest of economic times! Thank you to every one of these donors! BUT!! I need just a little ($480) more to pay for the Ballot fees. The March dead line is approaching fast! And I am confident to say that the donations will help get a Green Party Candidate on the California Ballot for US Senate! Thank you! I have dedicated my life as a voter to the Green Party and I feel a great sense of integrity. To not be attached to corporate donations. To not be a part of a party that would vote for war, racism and gender discrimination. I owe the Green Party a lot, which is why I have decided to run, as a Green, and to promote the Green Party Principles. I have been endorsed by the Green Parties of Los Angeles and Sacramento Counties. For more information, please write me at henk4senate@gmail.com Please donate today! Five ($5) or Ten ($10) dollars today Time is running out. Thank YOU! Henk Conn

name: Herschel Walker
subject: In their own words
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
With the help of well-known Democrats like President Obama, our opponent is raising more than $100,000 per day! With the help of well-known Democrats like President Obama, our opponent is raising more than $100,000 per day! |
---
Fellow American,

Our Democrat opponent sends a lot of emails asking for money. In fact, he sent more than 15 since the beginning of last week. That means he knows he's in trouble of losing re-election in next year's pivotal Georgia Senate race.

The race is a dead heat according to a new poll. Our opponent and national Democrats are concerned, so they're rolling out the big guns.

The Democrat Senatorial Campaign Committee has now enlisted President Obama, along with other national Democrats, to come to their aid.

_Here's a graphic from the Democrats' recent email:_

[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9bebef36c4b54005bc2a00fff7cd6542&_e=6U6wOimzL8SxS3IcEctfAXIOBUxvW-4RID5rs_PYSdjFsA-oekpt2zTiXHdMNPbWrtI7s2VQdITWA6URy040nOlQO_jgTkLcdJdamMeeo-4Z1utY5ZKIymzcu-BVczfpz2PpTIu7BPx2xx6RCPiAhecS9m0IzQBkr-f69iBbtwiPv8qQdOwBcyKgbZbuAoelJ3HwBk6WdIXJXcY8FMpp2BTaR7bL0cpcNFnMquUUc_oKntRzoaV0aR3FMHBiSsTchfTha4uy2dBNXKofph4jw93bg0hl36FC5ZJPVqOQSsER8Fu9QP2LCb3oXrQ3I5tfjVAKXCq20oS14XdYy3adyjmu7YeGk8mSAz42kPEHknpMglbrgBAj4dl0yvul7lZdzwh5G0bmGfJm1KvXFhvC-4Evw3K5Q0mI0tQEHNGaxLvXPEzBT_joskcry82jtvVitIx-Gwa2s9QStXBfs2smxw%3D%3D)
With the help of well-known Democrats like President Obama, **our opponent is raising more than $100,000 per day!**

With the highest inflation in 40 years from massive increases in the price of gas, food and rent, families are struggling to make ends meet. We know there are more important things than making political contributions. But if you can spare even $3.40 for #34 (my old jersey number), I'd be incredibly grateful.

I'm not a politician, and we don't have special interests bankrolling our campaign. Instead, we're counting on a grassroots army of conservative patriots to rise up and help us win the Senate race in Georgia.

[** I'm ready to stand up **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9bebef36c4b54005bc2a00fff7cd6542&_e=6U6wOimzL8SxS3IcEctfAXIOBUxvW-4RID5rs_PYSdjFsA-oekpt2zTiXHdMNPbWrtI7s2VQdITWA6URy040nOlQO_jgTkLcdJdamMeeo-4Z1utY5ZKIymzcu-BVczfpz2PpTIu7BPx2xx6RCPiAhecS9m0IzQBkr-f69iBbtwiPv8qQdOwBcyKgbZbuAoelJ3HwBk6WdIXJXcY8FMpp2BTaR7bL0cpcNFnMquUUc_oKntRzoaV0aR3FMHBiSsTc5HOoY16qBivPQoLSJ3Kw6vW7XVGVMFvXSK99sIUGOSIgq4Nfm1PXbvjytbc9BcTmnypEHc7CsjmkOagP_RnoIjsqxB4M981ycC7wWSRfC_1ujMy24Tf1ILYlM1VHaAs8wBjoX5o8gLhHCSJs_1xgFM95TRHIyEPuvvLqHUyCeqxx4FswLBT2Zq_5yWTNLGnXc2HAv2hO9-EkkS0FLSlclw%3D%3D)
We cannot let the Democrats continue to dominate fundraising in this race, so it's essential we pick up the pace. _**[That's why before the end of the day today, we need 450 conservatives to chip in $3.40 or more to help us level the fundraising field.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9bebef36c4b54005bc2a00fff7cd6542&_e=6U6wOimzL8SxS3IcEctfAXIOBUxvW-4RID5rs_PYSdjFsA-oekpt2zTiXHdMNPbWrtI7s2VQdITWA6URy040nOlQO_jgTkLcdJdamMeeo-4Z1utY5ZKIymzcu-BVczfpz2PpTIu7BPx2xx6RCPiAhecS9m0IzQBkr-f69iBbtwiPv8qQdOwBcyKgbZbuAoelJ3HwBk6WdIXJXcY8FMpp2BTaR7bL0cpcNFnMquUUc_oKntRzoaV0aR3FMHBiSsTcZvyGhi7Uml0QM3AH6drzfpmBhxg74QPI45uas-AqYeHwi-aB1LEoCqNs8BB5kc_WJ6xclp0TfzDbN7NNl-Ut2DDjIZjMANXhlLFsTnZ4uhJbnQQo_RkzO8XJZvx5Nlmkc-r19vzeDCoDdkKa26AOFaOpXb3Dz9IetK3sxLne1NMvjHNasEEvlrjTSHOS_Zt6JcU_434VxWeyTNDOnwbDRA%3D%3D) **_

clean_body: We don’t know much yet about what is happening. But voting starts in less than four weeks. | | | Peter, Yesterday the news broke that Henry Cuellar is under investigation by the FBI and Department of Justice’s Public Interest division. And since then, we haven’t heard much from him. But today, he made time to receive an award from the anti-choice movement and speak to the nation’s largest anti-choice rally on the evening of a SCOTUS decision that could end abortion rights. It’s no longer a secret on where Henry Cuellar stands on the right to choose. After Texas’ Republican leaders passed S.B.8 — our Congressman refused to defend us and our reproductive rights. In fact, he doubled down by voting “no” to pass the Women’s Health and Protection Act (WHPA), a bill that would codify Roe v. Wade into federal law. But once Jessica is elected to Congress, she will work overtime to ensure abortion rights are fully protected. Because she understands that quality healthcare — including access to reproductive healthcare — is necessary to achieve justice and economic security for low-income Black and Latino people, who face more roadblocks in order to access contraception. In the last election, anti-choice special interests like the Koch brothers’ empire and the banking industry’s major PACs, flooded into our race to defeat us. But now that we’re just 39 days from the TX-28 Democratic Primary, we must ramp up our efforts to garner enough support we need to defeat Cuellar. Together, Regina M. Campaign Manager Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Nina Turner
subject: Kyrsten Sinema
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
#

I've got a question for you today. Which do you, personally, think is more important?
Protecting the right to vote.
-OR-
The filibuster, a relic from the Jim Crow era that’s been overruled and ignored literally hundreds of times for purposes as mundane as expanding the debt ceiling.
I know where I stand here, and I think I know where you stand too. But just to be clear, I’ll say it again: _Voting rights are more important than preserving an archaic Senate rule._
**Let me repeat that: the filibuster is a rule. It’s not in the Constitution, and it’s not a right like the right to vote. It is a rule, and it can be changed. But frankly, there are two Senate Democrats who are standing in the way of that change.**
Now, we know Republicans have lost their ever-loving minds here. We can’t count on them. But Democrats need to wake up to the reality we’re facing and do everything they can to pass some bills and protect the right to vote. And yes, that includes changing the rules of the Senate and getting rid of the filibuster.
Because the truth is, we are running out of time. Republicans in state legislatures across the country have already passed laws restricting access to the ballot, with more to come before November.
The time to act is now.
But Kyrsten Sinema has continued to side with Republicans on this issue, even proudly shaking their hands on the Senate floor after blocking voting rights legislation.
**Enough is enough. If Kyrsten Sinema won’t act to protect voting rights, we need to replace her with someone who will.**
So I am asking:
**[Can you please split a donation between our movement and Change for Arizona 2024 PAC, which will be used to support grassroots organizing groups working to hold her accountable? Democrats who won’t support voting rights need to know there are consequences, and that we will NOT accept continued inaction on an issue as important as the right to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926312/326557857/1133723079?refcode2=2a63825b-087b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220121-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTYzODI1Yi0wODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V07aFjDAzNhrrxaO_pcSSOR_2gwN-IDfoOYvaPzUh2w=)**
With these hands,
Nina Turner
**[SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926313/326557858/1133723079?refcode2=2a63825b-087b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220121-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTYzODI1Yi0wODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V07aFjDAzNhrrxaO_pcSSOR_2gwN-IDfoOYvaPzUh2w=)**

* * *

Cleveland, OH 44101

clean_body: | | | | | | == | | | Dear Peter, This weekend is going to be HUGE! In case you missed my earlier emails, we have three campaign meet and greets across the 8th district this weekend... Please see the details below for the event in Cypress tonight with Rafael Cruz, and the two events tomorrow in Livingston and Montgomery with Senator Ted Cruz, and let me know if you and your family can make it by clicking the RSVP buttons! | == | | | == | | | | == | | | == | | | | == | | | == | I am proud to be endorsed by Senator Ted Cruz and his incredible father, Rafael Cruz and am thankful for their support of me and this campaign. I hope you can join us at one of these events this weekend! | Thank you, Christian Collins | | | == | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | Christian Collins for Congress | P.O. | [**_I have an incredible opportunity to win my race in just a few short months and be the Democratic leader that PA-18 deserves. But I’m still $2,836 short of my weekly goal, so I’m asking you to rush $15 to close the gap >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926334/326558099/-2096412469?refcode=20220123_em_fr_b1_peoplelike_15op&amount=21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmUyZDNjZS0wODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-kVvHI9eOAvVZNMVjo0Fs6GVsEOwMeMlKbDN6bApNg=) Listen, I’m running because I’ve seen first hand the people in my life suffer at the hands of the GOP. We cannot wait to fix the broken systems that set up everyone, but the very wealthy, to struggle, not thrive. [**People like my parents.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926335/326558100/-2096412469?refcode=20220123_em_fr_b1_peoplelike_15op&amount=21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmUyZDNjZS0wODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-kVvHI9eOAvVZNMVjo0Fs6GVsEOwMeMlKbDN6bApNg=) My mom suffered a stroke and my dad was diagnosed with cancer. The crippling weight of healthcare costs almost destroyed our family. It is horrifying to watch Republicans in Congress continue to push for less access to healthcare at the expense of American families. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926336/326558101/-2096412469?refcode=20220123_em_fr_b1_peoplelike_15op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmUyZDNjZS0wODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-kVvHI9eOAvVZNMVjo0Fs6GVsEOwMeMlKbDN6bApNg=)
_Jerry and his family_ [**People like my brother Jamal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926337/326558102/-2096412469?refcode=20220123_em_fr_b1_peoplelike_15op&amount=21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmUyZDNjZS0wODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-kVvHI9eOAvVZNMVjo0Fs6GVsEOwMeMlKbDN6bApNg=) He faced childhood trauma, poverty, and homelessness. He struggled with addiction and was ultimately arrested and charged with several misdemeanors. While incarcerated he felt dehumanized by a justice system designed to shame him and lacking the help and healthcare he needed to create a better life for himself and break the cycle. clean_body: People deserve real leadership. | | | | = | = Listen, I’m running because I’ve seen first hand the people in my life suffer at the hands of the GOP. We cannot wait to fix the broken systems that set up everyone, but the very wealthy, to struggle, not thrive. = My mom suffered a stroke and my dad was diagnosed with cancer. The crippling weight of healthcare costs almost destroyed our family. It is horrifying to watch Republicans in Congress continue to push for less access to healthcare at the expense of American families. = Jerry and his family = He faced childhood trauma, poverty, and homelessness. He struggled with addiction and was ultimately arrested and charged with several misdemeanors. While incarcerated he felt dehumanized by a justice system designed to shame him and lacking the help and healthcare he needed to create a better life for himself and break the cycle. = I represented her when she was facing eviction from public housing. | | Peter,

You spoke up and we listened! Here are your top five priorities:
| **1\. Protecting voting security
2\. Protecting our environment
3\. Ensuring affordable health care for all Americans
4\. Ensuring equal rights for ALL
5\. Gun violence prevention**
---

My team and I have noticed that an overwhelming portion of the responses focused on protecting our liberty and democracy – and that is exactly what we plan to do this year and onwards.

In the midst of an ongoing historical pandemic, there has never been a more important time for us to course-correct our politics. Thanks to your response, we have a clearer picture of what you would like us to act on first.

Thank you for taking the time to fill out our priorities survey and if you didn’t have the opportunity but would like to do so, please [**click here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926332/326558052/982764432?refcode=MT_EM_EN_NL_220121_1_1&refcode2=10e2d3ce-087b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGUyZDNjZS0wODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IU8zN2LCOwEnC_RGbgcUqZk_ukRwQCr7SFOsvzFaS1w=&emci=2a94ffe1-f07a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=10e2d3ce-087b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2678920)

Donald J. Trump January 20th, 2022
My phone call to the Secretary of State of Georgia was perfect, perhaps even more so than my call with the Ukrainian President, if that’s possible. I knew there were large numbers of people on the line, including numerous lawyers for both sides. Although I assumed the call may have been inappropriately, and perhaps illegally, recorded, I was not informed of that. I didn’t say anything wrong in the call, made while I was President on behalf of the United States of America, to look into the massive voter fraud which took place in Georgia. Just last week, it was further determined that they are looking into ballot harvesting in Fulton County, after supposedly watching tapes of it actually taking place. This alone could be tens of thousands of votes. What this Civil Special Grand Jury should be looking into is not my perfect phone call, but the large scale voter fraud that took place in Georgia. Then they would be doing a great job for the people. No more political witch hunts!

# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
Donald J. Trump January 21st, 2022 So let me get this straight, I am being investigated in Georgia for asking an Attorney General with many lawyers and others knowingly on the phone to look for corruption, which definitely took place in the Georgia Presidential election—but the people who committed the crime are in no way, shape, or form under investigation and are instead being protected? The people looking for the crime are being hounded and the people who committed the crime are being protected. This is not the American way. | [View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkM1uwyAQhJ8G32zBYhv34EPTKOqt6qm5WQSwTYrxDxDLb1-SOj1UQiDm2x3trKyZpFySRNeAATABQhgwXGSY45yVpcQFoUAqgnIsRuvUcuNe35QLVnslMzEmfS1UWUjghKoSClW1QvIKXrCo2javWooTU_feTw7RVwSneNZ1zeRouZFXv4RhijZDlK1a3f6kbhP9wuaZfWNET8EPzaCkDgOiRzVwbRCUd9GNYREqilaYhg-T0e22IxG_XHc2wme29Mpt4MvWAHG-CZPkXj2rR-uV9b9O6fx-CV8nJwsacWONlhH8E3stY6Ij7rr-wl6SpZbTqo3RrmRxWd19yHuuZJ-qRuyAAB5dAI9VAJw_2yubOzqnh_M5zT-wvTN4i7ffJvVXuHtke3RA7PgDDDeMvw)

Donald J. Trump January 21st, 2022
Meat Loaf was a great guy—got to know him very well doing Celebrity Apprentice. He was smart, talented, open, and warm.

His success was enormous—we all loved him. Meat Loaf will be greatly missed!
[View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkEGPgyAQhX8N3jQwiLQHD9s2vW731N4MCioG0QrW-O8Xu-4eNiEQ3jfzMm9kziUVkkQ6BwyACRDCgWOWYIFTnmUSM0KBHAhKcTVYp6aX8Pql3Gy1VzKphqjNgaVVeWSUE654zeShlEd6DH6gUpYyEpm89X50iH4guIazLEsiByuM7Pw092Ow6YNs1eL2J17KbmTNMkONEb3Ovi96JfXcI3pRvdAGQbaJbpinSgXRVqYQ_Wh0ve6oCl-hGxvgb7a4E3YW01oAcb6YRym8-q0erFfW_zjF6-3lfHs_328BF9ZoGcA_sdUyJLrgpmlLfoymXI6LNka7jIdlNduQW65onypH_IQA3l0A71UAPL7qjj8b-oxPj0ecfmK7MTiH26-j-ivcPZI9OiB--Qbc9YxW)
---
Donald J. Trump January 20th, 2022
My phone call to the Secretary of State of Georgia was perfect, perhaps even more so than my call with the Ukrainian President, if that’s possible. I knew there were large numbers of people on the line, including numerous lawyers for both sides. Although I assumed the call may have been inappropriately, and perhaps illegally, recorded, I was not informed of that. I didn’t say anything wrong in the call, made while I was President on behalf of the United States of America, to look into the massive voter fraud which took place in Georgia. Just last week, it was further determined that they are looking into ballot harvesting in Fulton County, after supposedly watching tapes of it actually taking place. This alone could be tens of thousands of votes. What this Civil Special Grand Jury should be looking into is not my perfect phone call, but the large scale voter fraud that took place in Georgia. Then they would be doing a great job for the people. No more political witch hunts!

You and I have fought together for freedom for years now. T**he increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America,** which is why they are directing all their resources towards breaking the 50-50 Senate tie and increasing their power in Washington.

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=f9f8746dd81046a380d740ff8aaeade4&_e=7kNKuSn3JFXpE-7oaf4qWNwzwfoXdnXNEs161su66L9rX6WPcAQt3Fr8k0i3bJ2FPebDGkfrPFrmFQCydvJWvk4VASOAkzc2BBK4-zVJLGxU7OgVUuZUGYP5bblGf8gWX-7RBvx1FbqgXGbna7bsNziuKhLkhjFaRclGWI5O4n-lxUP0yiRPdISNttd642ALS_pbDM4Qjo2bSPbhxirlcZAMZW8o2lRugB5kt-ZRGudMHWXx36pHXFXJv1AHJSEt6DT82SW70VdUYojCfVJ039ipZIOxSIoUqDd0PZajHeBV0pPnnywMmECeGPOysxURMwkvNl0RcRFXB1QXqzySD0Z-Pa-Opx1E5OHgL9bzERW_v0VYezrK43VyyGGSwC0JHUEKSaKsYdUJ0Zk4JJTQTAec2SODmdeLD7dVmgNshtVH0acjWE1l0pj3CjDJARhNIfIMrtIpXfq9arawjNmFlw%3D%3D)
From day one in Washington, **Billy fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States.** He has cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. Billy is a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement. **His loyalty to the American people has never wavered.**

_I’m writing to tell you this:_ **If we put Billy Long in the U.S. Senate, we won’t have to worry about him giving into the swamp.** His vote will be for you. What you see is what you get. He’s been in Washington for 10 years, **but he’s never been of Washington.**

He’s not just talking the talk, like the power-hungry Democrats do. Billy passed legislation to release Missourian workers from unnecessary government regulations, improving their economic situation and quality of life.

_Sounds like the opposite of what the radical-Democrats are doing in Washington, right?_ **Because unlike Joe Biden, Kamala Harris or Chuck Schumer, Billy understands that Americans should ALWAYS come first.** That’s the type of Republican we need fighting for us, Fellow Conservative.

This race is going to be competitive and it will certainly be one of the most expensive battles we see this cycle. clean_body: The increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America, which is why they are directing all their resour | No longer want to receive emails from Billy Long for Senate? You may . Fellow Conservative, You and I have fought together for freedom for years now. The increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America, which is why they are directing all their resources towards breaking the 50-50 Senate tie and increasing their power in Washington. Their top target? Missouri’s soon-to-be vacated U.S. Senate seat currently held by a Republican. America, and Missouri, literally cannot afford for the Democrats to come in and take this seat. We must band together and support a rock-solid conservative who is prepared for the job - Missouri’s own, Congressman Billy Long. Your support is vital to not only Billy Long, but the Republican Party in what’s set to be one of the TOUGHEST Senate races in the country. From day one in Washington, Billy fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States. He has cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. Billy is a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement. His loyalty to the American people has never wavered. I’m writing to tell you this: If we put Billy Long in the U.S. Senate, we won’t have to worry about him giving into the swamp. His vote will be for you. What you see is what you get. He’s been in Washington for 10 years, but he’s never been of Washington. He’s not just talking the talk, like the power-hungry Democrats do. Billy passed legislation to release Missourian workers from unnecessary government regulations, improving their economic situation and quality of life. Sounds like the opposite of what the radical-Democrats are doing in Washington, right? Because unlike Joe Biden, Kamala Harris or Chuck Schumer, Billy understands that Americans should ALWAYS come first. That’s the type of Republican we need fighting for us, Fellow Conservative. This race is going to be competitive and it will certainly be one of the most expensive battles we see this cycle. Even President Trump is confident that we can and will take back the Senate, but that plan becomes increasingly difficult if the Democrats swoop in and buy and lie their way into one of our red-state seats. Let me tell you, Democrats already have their eyes and pocketbooks set on Missouri. They aren’t wasting any time using big corporations and dark-money donors to pad their campaign accounts. Thank you, Kellyanne Conway Former Counselor to President Donald J. Trump | | PAID FOR BY BILLY LONG FOR SENATE

body:

| | **\- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Set to Begin -** It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. To do that, Indiana Democrats will also begin its biennial tradition of approving a party platform that includes all voices across the state. The State Party will soon announce a series of open hearings where Hoosiers can join us to learn more about our platform and ask questions about the top issues facing families with key party stakeholders. Hearing dates and locations will be announced soon and will be available on the party’s website. Until then, please take a look at a draft of the Indiana Democratic Party’s 2022 Platform, “[The Hoosier Promise](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926608/326559180/-1920848487?FFF.01.14.22=FFF.01.14.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWI5ZTlhNy0wOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gE514bHD47x--FBQHTqpiLwb-MGvONW2e7P1ZGmrHj4=&emci=cba6e812-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4eb9e9a7-097b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4925535)” and consider submitting your suggestions online. Your ideas are valued and important and we’d like to craft a strong platform – with your help – and spread the news across the state this election year.
**\- Todd Young Caught Touting The Jobs Act - Despite “NO” Vote and Dramatic Flip-Flop on the Law -** U.S. Senator Todd Young is celebrating President Joe Biden’s Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with some of the state’s top stakeholders. The problem: Young [flip-flopped](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926609/326559181/1697189899?FFF.01.14.22=FFF.01.14.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWI5ZTlhNy0wOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gE514bHD47x--FBQHTqpiLwb-MGvONW2e7P1ZGmrHj4=&emci=cba6e812-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4eb9e9a7-097b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4925535) on his support for the law and voted “NO” last fall. The Senator (via staff) [sent an email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926610/326559182/2003224299?FFF.01.14.22=FFF.01.14.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWI5ZTlhNy0wOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gE514bHD47x--FBQHTqpiLwb-MGvONW2e7P1ZGmrHj4=&emci=cba6e812-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4eb9e9a7-097b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4925535) to the Indianapolis Airport Authority in December to notify the municipal corporation about the Jobs Act’s $65.6 million investments for city airports. In fact, Young’s office said they were “pleased” about the investments delivered by the law that only Indiana Democrats supported. Here’s the problem with this hypocrisy: Todd Young has often used his office to slam Democrats’ economic record that includes transformative investments in broadband, roads/bridges, and airports – calling it a “[socialist agenda](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926611/326559183/2117937824?FFF.01.14.22=FFF.01.14.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWI5ZTlhNy0wOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gE514bHD47x--FBQHTqpiLwb-MGvONW2e7P1ZGmrHj4=&emci=cba6e812-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4eb9e9a7-097b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4925535)”. Young’s email continued a long pattern by the Indiana GOP of trying to have it both ways with the Democrats’ economic success. [INGOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926612/326559184/-1180238315?FFF.01.14.22=FFF.01.14.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWI5ZTlhNy0wOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gE514bHD47x--FBQHTqpiLwb-MGvONW2e7P1ZGmrHj4=&emci=cba6e812-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4eb9e9a7-097b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4925535) and [Congressional Republicans](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926613/326559185/-237124388?FFF.01.14.22=FFF.01.14.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWI5ZTlhNy0wOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gE514bHD47x--FBQHTqpiLwb-MGvONW2e7P1ZGmrHj4=&emci=cba6e812-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4eb9e9a7-097b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4925535) call programs like the American Rescue Plan and The Jobs Act “socialism” despite touting the state’s READI and Next Level Connections programs (which are fully-funded by the Rescue Plan). Todd Young - like the rest of the Indiana Republican Party - show Hoosiers every day their culture wars and extreme partisanship come before everything else, even Indiana’s future.
**- Indiana House Passes HB 1001, Effort to Discredit the COVID-19 Vaccine - ** Indiana Republicans this week continued their partisan effort to discredit COVID-19 and the only ticket out of this pandemic: the life-saving vaccine. The Indiana House of Representatives passed House Bill 1001, making it clear Republicans do not value science or telling their voters the truth. In fact, they only care about their extreme culture wars. Here’s what HB 1001 does: Gives a person any exemption to not receive a vaccine, forces employers to pay for COVID-19 testing (creating unsafe workplaces), and provides folks unemployment benefits for choosing to leave their jobs. The Indiana GOP’s partisanship is not just a culture war - it’s become hypocritical from their words just last year. If you remember, Republicans denied unemployment benefits to Hoosiers who lost their job during the pandemic. Now, they want to protect their base who willingly lose their job over the vaccine. House Bill 1001 is opposed by the Indiana Chamber of Commerce and business owners across the state. But, and like Democrats have said consistently, the Indiana Republican Party’s culture wars and misinformation will always come before common sense, the truth, and Indiana’s economic future. _The INGOP’s culture war hypocrisy you need to know_ _[Indiana GOP in 2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926614/326559187/1933412499?FFF.01.14.22=FFF.01.14.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWI5ZTlhNy0wOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gE514bHD47x--FBQHTqpiLwb-MGvONW2e7P1ZGmrHj4=&emci=cba6e812-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4eb9e9a7-097b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4925535): Gov. Holcomb: Indiana to end federal pandemic unemployment benefits_ _[Indiana GOP in 2022](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926615/326559188/-1711052239?FFF.01.14.22=FFF.01.14.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWI5ZTlhNy0wOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gE514bHD47x--FBQHTqpiLwb-MGvONW2e7P1ZGmrHj4=&emci=cba6e812-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4eb9e9a7-097b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4925535): Indiana legislation would ensure unemployment benefits for those who refuse vaccines_
**\- We Want You: Run for Office in 2022 - ** New year, new vibe: Democrats are calling on leaders to step up and join us in the effort to elect hard working leaders up and down the ticket. That means we need real public servants to run for office everywhere – and at every level. Hoosiers can formally file their candidacy for office right now. Democrats are looking to build its bench from the ground up, and whether you’re running for precinct committee person, state delegate, or state office - we want you to help us create a better future for Indiana, our communities, and our families. Go to the Indiana Democratic Party’s [website for more information](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40926616/326559189/-1757003383?FFF.01.14.22=FFF.01.14.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWI5ZTlhNy0wOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gE514bHD47x--FBQHTqpiLwb-MGvONW2e7P1ZGmrHj4=&emci=cba6e812-fc7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4eb9e9a7-097b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4925535). The deadline to file for office is NOON on Friday, February 4. We look forward to having you be the difference maker for your community.
