clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Set to Begin - It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. To do that, Indiana Democrats will also begin its biennial tradition of approving a party platform that includes all voices across the state. The State Party will soon announce a series of open hearings where Hoosiers can join us to learn more about our platform and ask questions about the top issues facing families with key party stakeholders. Hearing dates and locations will be announced soon and will be available on the party’s website. Until then, please take a look at a draft of the Indiana Democratic Party’s 2022 Platform, “” and consider submitting your suggestions online. Your ideas are valued and important and we’d like to craft a strong platform – with your help – and spread the news across the state this election year. \- Todd Young Caught Touting The Jobs Act - Despite “NO” Vote and Dramatic Flip-Flop on the Law - U.S. Senator Todd Young is celebrating President Joe Biden’s Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with some of the state’s top stakeholders. The problem: Young on his support for the law and voted “NO” last fall. The Senator (via staff) to the Indianapolis Airport Authority in December to notify the municipal corporation about the Jobs Act’s $65.6 million investments for city airports. In fact, Young’s office said they were “pleased” about the investments delivered by the law that only Indiana Democrats supported. Here’s the problem with this hypocrisy: Todd Young has often used his office to slam Democrats’ economic record that includes transformative investments in broadband, roads/bridges, and airports – calling it a “”. Young’s email continued a long pattern by the Indiana GOP of trying to have it both ways with the Democrats’ economic success. and call programs like the American Rescue Plan and The Jobs Act “socialism” despite touting the state’s READI and Next Level Connections programs (which are fully-funded by the Rescue Plan). Todd Young - like the rest of the Indiana Republican Party - show Hoosiers every day their culture wars and extreme partisanship come before everything else, even Indiana’s future. - Indiana House Passes HB 1001, Effort to Discredit the COVID-19 Vaccine - Indiana Republicans this week continued their partisan effort to discredit COVID-19 and the only ticket out of this pandemic: the life-saving vaccine. The Indiana House of Representatives passed House Bill 1001, making it clear Republicans do not value science or telling their voters the truth. In fact, they only care about their extreme culture wars. Here’s what HB 1001 does: Gives a person any exemption to not receive a vaccine, forces employers to pay for COVID-19 testing (creating unsafe workplaces), and provides folks unemployment benefits for choosing to leave their jobs. The Indiana GOP’s partisanship is not just a culture war - it’s become hypocritical from their words just last year. If you remember, Republicans denied unemployment benefits to Hoosiers who lost their job during the pandemic. Now, they want to protect their base who willingly lose their job over the vaccine. House Bill 1001 is opposed by the Indiana Chamber of Commerce and business owners across the state. But, and like Democrats have said consistently, the Indiana Republican Party’s culture wars and misinformation will always come before common sense, the truth, and Indiana’s economic future. The INGOP’s culture war hypocrisy you need to know : Gov. Holcomb: Indiana to end federal pandemic unemployment benefits : Indiana legislation would ensure unemployment benefits for those who refuse vaccines \- We Want You: Run for Office in 2022 - New year, new vibe: Democrats are calling on leaders to step up and join us in the effort to elect hard working leaders up and down the ticket. That means we need real public servants to run for office everywhere – and at every level. Hoosiers can formally file their candidacy for office right now. Democrats are looking to build its bench from the ground up, and whether you’re running for precinct committee person, state delegate, or state office - we want you to help us create a better future for Indiana, our communities, and our families. Go to the Indiana Democratic Party’s . The deadline to file for office is NOON on Friday, February 4. We look forward to having you be the difference maker for your community. \- Opportunities - \- "Persuasion Messaging" Communications Training - | 7pm EDT \- National Democratic Training Committee (NDTC) Bootcamp- Join the Indiana Democratic Party and the National Democratic Training Committee for a Virtual Bootcamp on Saturday, January 29th from 11:00 am – 4:15 pm ET! If you are running for office, working on a campaign in 2022, or are a part of your local Democratic party’s leadership, precinct leader, or local leader; our Virtual Bootcamp will prepare you with the tools you need. The agenda for the bootcamp will be added soon. Have accessibility questions? Reply to your registration email to confirm your requirements or request more information. 11a-4:15pm EDT ### | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46202 (317) 231-7100 | ---|--- | | Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Remember this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
What we need to get done in the year ahead.
#
Peter, remember this?
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/inauguration-survey-2022/?source=em20220121-976&t=1&akid=976%2E420207%2EMJgTMd)
President Biden was inaugurated one year ago! With Donald Trump defeated and voters across America delivering Democrats the House and Senate, we were ready to deliver for the people.
Over the last year, we’ve accomplished some big things in the face of special interests and corporate spending — but we know that there’s still so much more we need to get done. And in less than a year from now, a new Congress will be sworn in. Before that happens, we must do everything in our power to deliver for our communities while protecting our Democratic majorities.
[**So, we want to know what you think is the most urgent priority for President Biden and our Democratic majority to get done this year. Can you take our quick survey and let us know what’s at the top of your list for our most critical fights?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/inauguration-survey-2022/?source=em20220121-976&t=2&akid=976%2E420207%2EMJgTMd)
**[Start the survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/inauguration-survey-2022/?source=em20220121-976&t=3&akid=976%2E420207%2EMJgTMd)**
Together, we will keep fighting to pass legislation that makes a difference for working families AND protects our majority in the House and the Senate. And your input helps us focus our work and prioritize our battles in the days ahead.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220121-976-footer&t=4&refcode2=976_420207_MJgTMd&akid=976%2E420207%2EMJgTMd)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9cfa12h4s53rokm0jiobeivlclasegdulpb1eu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3g62oj2chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2adregl7nbdap6ajauqcu9m9moqih47q0bke0o8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3g62oj2chh2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjn83u5q3n3c8bud8b40sb13mq2cda1uajvi4m0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3g62oj2chh2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central

1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6gn7t8keepbkgslfde6cjldp8vhqjjqm4bofte8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3g62oj2chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Peter, Kyrsten Sinema is directly hurting Mark Kelly’s reelection chances. Senator John Cornyn – Mitch McConnell’s #2 in Republican leadership – recently made clear the GOP will use Sinema’s words to attack Kelly this fall. "I think there's going to be a big contrast in Arizona” between Sinema and Kelly, he said. Translation: The GOP is using Sinema’s pro-filibuster stance to attack Mark Kelly and other Democrats in this year’s midterms so that Republicans can regain Senate control. In fact, the Republican Senate campaign arm has already been using Sinema’s quotes to attack Kelly online. **[Will you help us fight back? Split $3 or any amount between us and Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. Kyrsten Sinema has taken millions from corporate PACs. Mark Kelly says lowering drug prices is one of his top priorities. Kyrsten Sinema has gone to bat for Big Pharma — and been rewarded accordingly. And most importantly...Mark Kelly voted to protect democracy and advance voting rights, while Sinema sided with the Republicans to protect the Jim Crow filibuster. **[If you’re angry at Kyrsten Sinema directly hurting Mark Kelly’s re-election and threatening our majority, the best thing you can do today is split a donation between the Primary Sinema Project and Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSUPZQVlu6RqJM_F5El2eZemaHPmoCmNekl5HYQjDC-f0G-QWkgmX9yKlyiGvhK0b1ubX9aHSS6x-FrwAfeqI4wCW0xlqbJvuXe5V-3qtXyO9GISWmQ7gRnd-LfEY9uGcVHpSRjCh5fI0jOr1POMT-l9Ty2VSqLviz_IStLER37_T3VV2ypbc6tSz7pwMz7PO2uWhKBRwJtMWYtxrRatDC8z8mg_GQZwMS3Nr5Iud3obChCeuZzQLUeK-bSHKKl5Veqh423WwQiLO0K2sZAt5CYKM1yAEomplaIECtt9hvUpXtfJb63HbaTj0T0B1PyBWf/3iw/bsZefY_qRQO-TpQc-LfLdw/h3/UbTUSXVM4LwWhKhyUZ7lmLufnCzvXuAO4h-TRDu2mOg)** Let’s put it this way: We urgently need to protect our Democratic Senate majority while minimizing the harm that Kyrsten Sinema can do in the time she has left. clean_body: Will you help us fight back? | | | Peter, Kyrsten Sinema is directly hurting Mark Kelly’s reelection chances. Senator John Cornyn – Mitch McConnell’s #2 in Republican leadership – recently made clear the GOP will use Sinema’s words to attack Kelly this fall. "I think there's going to be a big contrast in Arizona” between Sinema and Kelly, he said. Translation: The GOP is using Sinema’s pro-filibuster stance to attack Mark Kelly and other Democrats in this year’s midterms so that Republicans can regain Senate control. In fact, the Republican Senate campaign arm has already been using Sinema’s quotes to attack Kelly online. Mark Kelly has given us plenty of reasons to support him — and has made his differences with Sinema clear: Mark Kelly is about to join Jon Ossoff to propose a ban on all corporate PACs. Kyrsten Sinema has taken millions from corporate PACs. Mark Kelly says lowering drug prices is one of his top priorities. Kyrsten Sinema has gone to bat for Big Pharma — and been rewarded accordingly. And most importantly...Mark Kelly voted to protect democracy and advance voting rights, while Sinema sided with the Republicans to protect the Jim Crow filibuster. Let’s put it this way: We urgently need to protect our Democratic Senate majority while minimizing the harm that Kyrsten Sinema can do in the time she has left. You can be part of the grassroots movement to defend his seat — and replace her. More soon, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . | In the year since President Biden took office, Democrats have been working hard to rebuild and restore trust in our democracy. We know that democracies don’t sustain themselves — they have to be defended and I take that responsibility incredibly seriously.

At the heart of our democracy is the right to vote, which has been under attack for far too long. That’s why I was so proud to vote last week for the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act alongside my Democratic House colleagues.

clean_body: At the heart of our democracy is the right to vote, which has been under attack for far too long. | = | In the year since President Biden took office, Democrats have been working hard to rebuild and restore trust in our democracy. We know that democracies don’t sustain themselves — they have to be defended and I take that responsibility incredibly seriously. At the heart of our democracy is the right to vote, which has been under attack for far too long. That’s why I was so proud to vote last week for the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act alongside my Democratic House colleagues. I am committed to continuing the pursuit of voting rights for every American, and I’m hoping you can show that you have my back on this crucial issue by= | = The strength of our democracy depends on the ability of every American to vote. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support. Together, we can build a nation that works for all of us. With appreciation, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

| Friend,
---
| Today is the 49th annual March for Life in Washington, DC, where thousands of pro-life Americans will demonstrate their commitment to protecting the unborn. They are marching with more hope than ever before.
---
|
---
| With strong young women like these Iowa ladies I had the honor to meet with, we will win the fight to protect life!
---
| Thanks to the conservative justices appointed by President Trump, there is a very real chance that the Supreme Court will finally overturn Roe v. Wade, allowing states to put an end to abortion. There is no way to undo the damage caused by rampant abortion on demand since the Roe debacle, but we can rededicate our nation to the sanctity of life with a new pro-life era. Even if you can’t be there today, you can make your voice heard. [Sign my pro-life petition and tell the Supreme Court it’s time to overturn Roe v. Wade.](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=ZMyLy4zTjFw1WJ7BA4MeVPVpdcq5xYCo9Ek7%2FSdkhLb8B2bZmLukDfsOl%2BlrX4NVgH1Z6PK9TkRnHbvP%2Br2OJngYxCVStlJh%2BogxGFh88k0ibyO473%2BAKw%3D%3D&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FJSBQG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3D8hFlEyn7lmsoL2PJUFBm0SnMUDI9TF7mAmpbH8nAFEyUySvzwGaPNYK8dP8UrmSx0&I=20220121174815.000000262df5%40smtp-ad1-43-phx&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjI0NDA5NTk3NjU7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE5MjA3NTE5Mzs%3D&V=3&S=Mha7oR7_CXAFgveKUOAx6oVdxMhaSNIthooCsM6L53s) Randy

I need to tell you what happened in D.C. two nights ago. **Kevin McCarthy held a fundraiser at the Trump Hotel where he raised $9.5 million.** Each person who attended was asked to contribute $100,000 each. The poverty rate in Kern County — which makes up a majority of California’s 23rd District — is 12% higher than the national average. Do you think most people in our district have $100,000 to spend on a campaign contribution? **I don’t think so.** You’ll never catch me asking for $100,000. We have something better than the over fifty corporate PACs and wealthy donors who were at that fundraiser: you. **[**All I’m asking is for you to chip in just 0.01% of $100,000 — $10 to be exact — and help us keep building this people-powered campaign to defeat Kevin McCarthy, flip this seat, and elect someone who actually wants to work for the people of the Central Valley.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHYb6qt1TAUebfw33ZXgcRYp0AQZBJxg00xsUe8l25ylDOnC78dnj9UblwdSc1m4RT-l4KNRTAMOrf5Rp3xLeInV-Dwnf66gZZsRAPRlZUAstOdekwJkvjBR34xFm_Rvjh-Hzu_QB3Bhl8J92muN_6wQ_GAO_pcPCZlZbTbvzu3obUCW-TiFnDc6yFVlV2co2X1fen7hA4K1obA4t2zTLkUNy9tI0v69b_En9_XMpuC8YKR2EsF7e5xlYMbnmPac6cQ/3iw/QvNEDXCOTJumNMlKrBXwMg/h1/1KJyvf5AYEWgPZwjWnwCwAIv8H2GMGUZ-pzmnl5q-tU)** [Contribute $10 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHaI7dHMu9bCcWJORFMO0uQ7GVq5iLyWeCLzL9sMCQaXBE-hq1imoPSjFo5aWZj99wNOOfbnDw9MIrIwvRZ_FaqJn6W9sFBOl1-VccZ5plOAo0jm2S2mJeUaPXXiwNLtyFUrJqKJUf35bT79FaXBeSzQIFXZl0h5dvYvGDBFFUrPRdXpD5xh5ik3xh4X1HhYnNI9xChPpctbKL7qUCZAup_p2TwzP57l-Q-jmeCyUxzAnPKnqx8u6CPjL8i5u_L0IKQ/3iw/QvNEDXCOTJumNMlKrBXwMg/h2/eJMcMfFTmlEtYamTbALp9TK03qi02xy9XZBALLOmkak) I know we may never raise what Kevin McCarthy raked in on Wednesday night during our entire campaign. We don’t have the corporate backers waiting in the wings to throw their money at our campaign. We just have folks like you. And that’s all we need. **Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District.** Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. [**Make a contribution today of whatever you can afford and help elect Bruno to Congress.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wdVjEO4QrP5WbNA1-PnVdBnvp_KLEZiSdZOzE0WIPVJYhJ1u3P3jsS9nfSK9wV8mzfl5uBh86ZCyADQZwwgB8BNNEj4F6yfzaaoo91Q5xLxuGlIif4uFwe5cMidB8HWpXO5tK1iUqJ0U1NEgWIhLfkO8mZ5PZKRVffzYAM_uCIkWd2bCMeHX-vpRKQMZkbe6ut0j9S2t8mYj028CgpMQJjZOUoPE9IjrHVuBtNYfuTvbL_oZdenhWCS2YlDGdQIdEa3R6mtGmfzPnJ4QgOf_fDzPRBePX-MKJk-hBkbwT3jA/3iw/QvNEDXCOTJumNMlKrBXwMg/h7/L3ZMYPaZrUsaKisHaNzDh98LSuWJQYesscJHGBHTHDU)

clean_body: | | | I need to tell you what happened in D.C. two nights ago. Kevin McCarthy held a fundraiser at the Trump Hotel where he raised $9.5 million. Each person who attended was asked to contribute $100,000 each. The poverty rate in Kern County — which makes up a majority of California’s 23rd District — is 12% higher than the national average. Do you think most people in our district have $100,000 to spend on a campaign contribution? I don’t think so. You’ll never catch me asking for $100,000. We have something better than the over fifty corporate PACs and wealthy donors who were at that fundraiser: you. I know we may never raise what Kevin McCarthy raked in on Wednesday night during our entire campaign. We don’t have the corporate backers waiting in the wings to throw their money at our campaign. We just have folks like you. And that’s all we need. Let's do this, Bruno (Democratic candidate for Congress in CA-23 and the guy who didn’t fundraise in the Trump Hotel) | | ---|--- Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District. Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

name: Doug White
subject: We can’t let Loren Culp win this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doug White for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93505/images/White-FullColor-Logo-RGB.jpg]

Friend,
As you may know, one of our Republican opponents in this race is Loren Culp — the former Police Chief of Republic who lost the 2020 election in the worst landslide in the state in over 20 years.
After the 2020 election, Culp alleged the election was fraudulent, and even threatened to sue Washington’s Republican Secretary of State. Like Trump, Culp undermined our election process with a disinformation campaign and induced fear and distrust among the people of Central Washington.
Over the years, Culp has built a radical Republican following and has been named one of the front-runners in this race in 2022. He has proven to be both a good vote-getter and fundraiser among the Republican base. If he is able to succeed in winning the race for the 4th District this year, he is going to fall right in line with other radical Republicans like Marjorie Taylor-Green and Lauren Boebert.
We can’t afford to give up this rare opportunity. We have to flip the 4th District blue and not let Loren Culp win this race. We are in the process of building a successful grassroots campaign right now, but we can’t afford to fall behind. We are now in the Election Year, and people are starting to pay attention.
Can you chip in $50 or $100 to my campaign today to help us kick off the year right and make sure we are hitting our first monthly goal of 2022? This will help ensure we secure a victory in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dougwhiteem]
Thank you so much for your consideration. This race is too important to ignore.
Doug

name: NextGen America
subject: What is the WHPA?
body:
| | Friend, You’ve heard about it on social media, from politicians and organizations, and on the news, **but what exactly is the Women’s Health Protection Act (WHPA)?** Simply put, **the Women’s Health Protection Act is historic federal legislation that enshrines the right to abortion care — no matter where someone lives in the United States — into law.** Here’s how the WHPA protects our right and access to abortion care:
* Upholds the right to access abortion **throughout the United States.**
* **Protects against bans and medically unnecessary restrictions on abortion,** including mandatory waiting periods, biased counseling, mandatory ultrasounds, and more.
* **Establishes a statutory right for health care professionals to provide abortion care** and the right for their patients to receive care.

The WHPA has already passed in the House, and **now it faces the Senate.** [Act now: Your senators need to hear from you! Write to your senators now and urge them to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40927132/326561810/1287069492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTdlYjZkOC0wZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ikwpfv4uXBaddQy9Grl5jAW8oqVnP6JWv9jy8309qJg=&emci=2d9997a8-427a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e17eb6d8-0d7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6787172) This summer, the Supreme Court is set to rule on a case that directly challenges Roe V. Wade — _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_. And as anti-abortion state lawmakers across the country continue to pass hundreds of laws greatly restricting abortion care, **we need the WHPA now more than ever.** The WHPA not only strengthens reproductive justice but **economic and racial justice, too.** Those hurt most by abortion restrictions — including Black, Indigenous and people of color, women, trans men, nonbinary folks, low-income, and young people — already face a number of obstacles when accessing health care. **The WHPA will decrease the burden on the shoulders of those who need it most by protecting their right to abortion care through federal law.** So, now you know all about the WHPA. Ready to make sure the WHPA passes in the Senate? **Write to your senators and urge them to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act to ensure everyone has the ability to access abortion care — no matter where they live.** | [Write your senators](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40927137/326561818/-1038594872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTdlYjZkOC0wZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ikwpfv4uXBaddQy9Grl5jAW8oqVnP6JWv9jy8309qJg=&emci=2d9997a8-427a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e17eb6d8-0d7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")
---

NextGen America

clean_body: | | Friend, You’ve heard about it on social media, from politicians and organizations, and on the news, but what exactly is the Women’s Health Protection Act (WHPA)? Simply put, the Women’s Health Protection Act is historic federal legislation that enshrines the right to abortion care — no matter where someone lives in the United States — into law. Here’s how the WHPA protects our right and access to abortion care: Upholds the right to access abortion throughout the United States. Protects against bans and medically unnecessary restrictions on abortion, including mandatory waiting periods, biased counseling, mandatory ultrasounds, and more. Establishes a statutory right for health care professionals to provide abortion care and the right for their patients to receive care. The WHPA has already passed in the House, and now it faces the Senate. This summer, the Supreme Court is set to rule on a case that directly challenges Roe V. Wade — Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization. And as anti-abortion state lawmakers across the country continue to pass hundreds of laws greatly restricting abortion care, we need the WHPA now more than ever. The WHPA not only strengthens reproductive justice but economic and racial justice, too. Those hurt most by abortion restrictions — including Black, Indigenous and people of color, women, trans men, nonbinary folks, low-income, and young people — already face a number of obstacles when accessing health care. The WHPA will decrease the burden on the shoulders of those who need it most by protecting their right to abortion care through federal law. So, now you know all about the WHPA. Ready to make sure the WHPA passes in the Senate? Write to your senators and urge them to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act to ensure everyone has the ability to access abortion care — no matter where they live. | "CTA Button" Thank you, NextGen America | NextGen America** 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

This week, Claudia Tenney released her latest fundraising numbers, and it showed some good news and some bad news for us.

Claudia Tenney raised about $370,000 between October and December of last year, compared to about $416,000 that we raised in just two months. _Our campaign is one of the only Democratic challenger campaigns in America to outraise a Republican incumbent._

clean_body: This week, Claudia Tenney released her latest fundraising numbers, and it showed some good news and some bad news for us. | = | Peter, This week, Claudia Tenney released her latest fundraising numbers, and it showed some good news and some bad news for us. The good news: We raised more money in less time than Claudia Tenney, and we did it without accepting any corporate PAC money. Claudia Tenney raised about $370,000 between October and December of last year, compared to about $416,000 that we raised in just two months. Our campaign is one of the only Democratic challenger campaigns in America to outraise a Republican incumbent. Now, the bad news: Claudia Tenney now has over $1.15 million cash-on-hand, and she continues to amass a colossal war chest. The next Governor has some major issues to tackle. From the crisis in our schools, to growing our economy, there are no easy solutions to the problems we’re facing. State leadership has let these problems fester long enough, and I’m proud to be planning a campaign that’s laser focused on the issues and how we can solve them together.
I’m working late nights and early mornings to do my day job serving the people of Oregon while also sharing my vision for the future of our state, but I can’t do this alone.
I have one of the best teams out there, and we need your help to run the campaign we need to win this thing.
**[Your contribution today will go a long way in this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40927493/326563194/990444423?refcode=em012122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjkxMWE4NS0wZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A01e25ayk-vypGxmSM_LLVMiHM1Dcy3sx-N5EeXieyg=)**

clean_body: I’m asking you to invest in our primary planning efforts today to make sure we stay on track. | | Dear Peter, As you know, the race for Governor is heating up, and while the primary might seem far off, in campaign time it’s coming up fast. So we need to act now to make sure that our fundraising doesn’t fall behind at such a crucial time. I spoke with my team about all of the things we’re doing to build our campaign this month, and every dollar we raise now will amplify our message throughout the campaign. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = The next Governor has some major issues to tackle. From the crisis in our schools, to growing our economy, there are no easy solutions to the problems we’re facing. State leadership has let these problems fester long enough, and I’m proud to be planning a campaign that’s laser focused on the issues and how we can solve them together. I’m working late nights and early mornings to do my day job serving the people of Oregon while also sharing my vision for the future of our state, but I can’t do this alone. I have one of the best teams out there, and we need your help to run the campaign we need to win this thing. = Thank you, * | = | | | | | | | | | Friends of Tobias Read PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States

body:
I want to tell you a story about the first protest I ever led.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40927684/326563886/-1590707639?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220121-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTUyOGM2Mi0wZjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VVHbsI4PtM06pfaGspiX7hY0K9UHnDTJuZ20qfvm-tk=)
---
| Hi Peter,

You may have heard me say before that, for most of my life, I never thought I would get involved in politics. **But I have always been committed to fighting for what is right, and I want to tell you a story about the first protest I ever led.**

When I was 16 years old, I was a student at Burke High School here in Omaha. One day, my friends and I noticed that someone had written a racial slur against Black people in the girls’ bathroom. But when we brought it to the attention of our administration, they did not take action and left the upsetting word on the wall for several days.

**That’s when we knew we had to do something bigger:** we called local media and told them we would be staging a peaceful protest against the school, and when the day came, we walked out of the school building and told the reporters waiting outside about the situation. **The next day, the word had been painted over and we created cultural opportunities to learn about each other.**

This was one of the first times I realized how much power a small group of people can have if they work together, and it is that same faith in movement-building that fuels our campaign. I know that I can flip this seat blue and become Nebraska’s first Black Congresswoman, as long as I have folks like you on my side. clean_body: I want to tell you a story about the first protest I ever led. | = | Hi Peter, You may have heard me say before that, for most of my life, I never thought I would get involved in politics. But I have always been committed to fighting for what is right, and I want to tell you a story about the first protest I ever led. When I was 16 years old, I was a student at Burke High School here in Omaha. One day, my friends and I noticed that someone had written a racial slur against Black people in the girls’ bathroom. But when we brought it to the attention of our administration, they did not take action and left the upsetting word on the wall for several days. That’s when we knew we had to do something bigger: we called local media and told them we would be staging a peaceful protest against the school, and when the day came, we walked out of the school building and told the reporters waiting outside about the situation. The next day, the word had been painted over and we created cultural opportunities to learn about each other. This was one of the first times I realized how much power a small group of people can have if they work together, and it is that same faith in movement-building that fuels our campaign. I know that I can flip this seat blue and become Nebraska’s first Black Congresswoman, as long as I have folks like you on my side. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Anything you can spare will make a big difference. Thank you, = * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

| Peter -
It has been one year since Joe Biden took office and dismantled President Trump's border-security agenda.
Biden canceled the wall.
Biden ended the Remain in Mexico Policy.
Biden stopped basic enforcement of our immigration laws.
Biden ended the Trump policies that finally got illegal immigration under control.
As a result, we've seen the worst border crisis in decades on Biden's watch.
The Biden Border Crisis has allowed more than 1.7 MILLION illegal immigrants to flood across our southern border during his first year in office.
Border Patrol estimates that there are approximately 1,000 illegal immigrant getting away EVERY. SINGLE. DAY.
This illegal immigration crisis has endangered Americans and allowed dangerous drugs like fentanyl to spread into our communities.
---
| Since Joe Biden took office and enacted his open-borders agenda, I've fought back.
As the first member of Congress to visit the border to get a firsthand look at the Biden Border Crisis, it's clear to me what is driving this crisis. Joe Biden and his socialist allies in Congress have advocated for an open-border agenda and are doing everything they can to tear apart President Trump's border security policies.
We need to re-implement basic border security, including finishing the wall, re-implementing the Remain in Mexico Policy, and enforcing America's immigration laws.
But none of this will happen unless we take back the House from Nancy Pelosi.
I am committed to this fight, but I can't do it without you. I need you to get off the sidelines and get into this fight with me to 1) FIRE NANCY PELOSI 2) Take back the House 3) Put Trump's policies back in place to secure our border. [Will you please donate to this effort? Any amount helps whether it's $100, $50, $25, or even $5. Can I count on you?

| Peter,

I am incredibly disappointed and angry that the Voting Rights Act was blocked in the Senate this week. Every day, we see headlines proving just how desperately we need to protect access to the ballot box, especially in rural communities.
---
| | **Plans to close all but one polling place in a rural Georgia county reverberate through a battleground state**

_-CNN, 1/20/22_

name: Susan Wild
subject: my opponents didn’t like that….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
That’s right: they are upset that I am committed to ensuring the right to vote for every American.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40927848/326564610/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220121-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWMxNzU4MC0xMDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JJLSzoYfemnaw15NCMF-Xu_UY19I-uXnkX9PtP_nOJo=)

| Peter,

Last week, after President Biden delivered a powerful speech on the need for voting rights reform, I emailed you to express my support for this crucial issue. I also passed along some of the lines from the address I found most meaningful, including “Do you want to be on the side of Abraham Lincoln or Jefferson Davis?”

**My Republican opponents didn’t like that. That’s right: they are upset that I am committed to ensuring the right to vote for every American.** Check out what they’re saying to their supporters: _“Our congresswoman from PA-07 is fundraising off Biden’s message, calling it “a powerful speech” and repeating its most offensive lines in an email to supporters.”

“It could not be more clear that we need a new Congresswoman to represent Pennsylvania, one who will fight against Joe Biden’s agenda.”_ If they’re waiting for me to stop fighting for fundamental civil rights, they’ll be waiting a long time. But here’s the thing: these Republicans and their deep-pocketed donors will do anything to stop me from fighting.

**That’s why I’m coming to you today, Peter.[_Can you show you have my back and ensure I have the resources to fight off these Republican attacks with a contribution of $5 or more right away?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40927849/326564611/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220121-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWMxNzU4MC0xMDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JJLSzoYfemnaw15NCMF-Xu_UY19I-uXnkX9PtP_nOJo=)**

clean_body: That’s right: they are upset that I am committed to ensuring the right to vote for every American. | = | Peter, Last week, after President Biden delivered a powerful speech on the need for voting rights reform, I emailed you to express my support for this crucial issue. I also passed along some of the lines from the address I found most meaningful, including “Do you want to be on the side of Abraham Lincoln or Jefferson Davis?” My Republican opponents didn’t like that. That’s right: they are upset that I am committed to ensuring the right to vote for every American. Check out what they’re saying to their supporters: “Our congresswoman from PA-07 is fundraising off Biden’s message, calling it “a powerful speech” and repeating its most offensive lines in an email to supporters.” “It could not be more clear that we need a new Congresswoman to represent Pennsylvania, one who will fight against Joe Biden’s agenda.” If they’re waiting for me to stop fighting for fundamental civil rights, they’ll be waiting a long time. But here’s the thing: these Republicans and their deep-pocketed donors will do anything to stop me from fighting. That’s why I’m coming to you today, Peter.= | | | = | = | = | = | = With you on my team, I know I can defend my seat and stay in Congress to fight for Pennsylvanians and all Americans. = | = Thank you, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. | | ---|--- Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. subject: Defending Roe v Wade
body:
| |

| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=651fd1f1ce&e=4712f71bea)

|
## **[Defending Roe v Wade](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=11b8b97d5a&e=4712f71bea)**

Friends,

Tomorrow, January 22, marks the 49th anniversary of _Roe v Wade_ , the landmark Supreme Court case that cemented a woman's right to choose.

**It is established law. **
---
|
---
| [Donate to Defend Roe v. Wade](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=93584c92ad&e=4712f71bea "Donate to Defend Roe v. Wade")
---
| But today it's under attack, in Texas and in the Supreme Court.

As a lawyer, I deeply understand the importance of precedent and established law: They're the root of our justice system.

As a women... well, don't get me started.
---
| **In this Congressional race, my opponent Ronny Jackson couldn't care less about a woman's right to choose.

Just look at his Twitter:**
---
| [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=a289a356bc&e=4712f71bea)
---
| We need to defend established law. I'll never stop fighting to defend _Roe v Wade_.

Can you contribute to my campaign so I can keep fighting?

Kathleen.
---
| [Donate to Defend Roe v. Wade]( "Donate to Defend Roe v. Wade")
---

Ronchetti’s background as a TV meteorologist from Albuquerque, the state’s biggest media market, provides him with name recognition and communications skills.... [Ronchetti has] a winning profile in New Mexico.” _** There are now multiple national pundits who have said the same thing -- since our entry into the race, Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham has never seemed more vulnerable! But we need your help today to win. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Yesterday marked one year since Biden became President. Let us know what grade you'd give him. | | | |
---
| | | Patriot,

Yesterday marked one year since Biden was sworn in as President.

Throughout his first year in office, we've seen countless crises, but **Biden and Democrats are on a _Victory Tour_ touting their radical agenda as the only way forward.**

We want to hear from you: **How would you grade Joe Biden's first year as President?**

[Fill out Biden's Report Card now.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e1c697eb64&e=1050d051da)

Not that you need to be reminded, but here are just a few of Biden's "_accomplishments"_ over the last year:
1\. **Creating a border crisis.** 2\. Massive spending that is causing**the worst inflation in 40 years.** 3\. _**Cowering to China and Russia**_ in the face of repeated cyber attacks.
4\. **_Leaving Americans stranded in Afghanistan!_**
5\. Gas prices **rising for an entire year.**
6\. Creating a reliance on foreign countries for energy.
7\. **Forcing an unconstitutional vaccine mandate upon millions of Americans.**
8\. Appointing _**unqualified, radical liberals**_ to critical positions.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=3af9d57a30&e=1050d051da)
---
| Biden and his fellow Democrats can continue trying to pass the buck, but we know the truth.

**Democrats have had control of the entire federal government for a full year, with only a long list of crises to show for it.**

But together, **we can and will beat them this November.**

There's only one way to make sure Biden can't continue his radical crusade: We must Take Back the House from Nancy Pelosi and the Socialist Squad.

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

name: Herschel Walker
subject: So much for uniting the nation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I thought he was supposed to bring people together. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6a45bc167a204058b114b5fa9227c022&_e=PKzLdUngkQlGQEsm1Vbw46kKc1U9tic1T6ZQ4WvIgxJLtE-SBPSrQoGH-ZKYvHCIEHVzk3ve7sM7A_Ba05TQHzI1k6YtprCfCWjOblPdvKb0gqd_aHc5Enq2sjIQGbEahx2PbKVUtzAK6WA1aa4cW55ByEqDIaZkm8u59tC4oT-WdpiQBrBUitaPu9fskyers4WBqOcsE2c-gGdgVSsBSncd_yc8i6ohM4XcvrMskCtximo_t9Jjo49_DZcoxu1Vptd1bwL5WHjTu2hG02uicDOMf3w7n-QE2jwFEXXHxVNifnrqF6HJok0QDfxHhq9KgqNEN97nFg7aYLLv-Q5k9v-P9glwY3wEMzAjQZN4U1-IA33KwdL2wb7V1rZkNIiEQllf8VpI_LWmI29NGlQnqIUDiKgf-4uyB9AE5IBPjQVt0cCCZ86J9rZQaAzfZgNf-UqWHGlNCjTeCE09xGCRcw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Unlike President Biden, I was born in the deep South nearly 60 years ago. Back then, Dixiecrats - conservative Democrats - as they were known then, controlled nearly every aspect of government in Georgia and many states across the South. These politicians were opposed to racial integration.

**They were Democrats.**

So when President Biden visited Atlanta last week to give a fiery speech on election reform, I was stunned at what he said. He argued people who don't support the Democrats' voting legislation are like former segregationists Bull Connor and George Wallace.

**In other words, anyone who disagrees with him is a racist.**

On Wednesday, Democrats in the Senate - including my opponent - responded to Biden's siren call by holding a vote, which they knew would not pass, that would federalize our elections. As expected, it failed.

They even tried to change the Senate's filibuster rule to ram through the legislation, which they knew would not succeed. As expected, it failed too because they couldn't get all Democrats to agree.

**Sadly, this was all a political game.** President Biden used outrageous rhetoric, and Senate Democrats pushed forward with doomed legislation, simply to keep their base happy.

**Unfortunately, that's how Washington works these days, and it's why we need to change who we send to Washington.**

**[If you believe that we need elected officials who will support voter ID laws and common-sense election reforms- not the federalization of elections, then I'm asking you to chip in $5 to my Senate campaign today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6a45bc167a204058b114b5fa9227c022&_e=PKzLdUngkQlGQEsm1Vbw46kKc1U9tic1T6ZQ4WvIgxJLtE-SBPSrQoGH-ZKYvHCIEHVzk3ve7sM7A_Ba05TQHzI1k6YtprCfCWjOblPdvKb0gqd_aHc5Enq2sjIQGbEahx2PbKVUtzAK6WA1aa4cW55ByEqDIaZkm8u59tC4oT-WdpiQBrBUitaPu9fskyers4WBqOcsE2c-gGdgVSsBSncd_yc8i6ohM4XcvrMskCtximo_t9Jjo49_DZcoxu1VftaGQliSIIoAd-XxKOgScuetP_AWN1lpmLhoFdhxnrWHQODIQ0LuoVHw64P3BeRvkHh7uOso4NJ5T8YluO6xk4owuTVKUoNUlMTEBKSYFZh1J5tKyV4yqk5xCyLy1nlnwEWjDtDsS7Ms-EBFwXKOo-MkXKDnHQ-WbKXsUHgFS5DZ7jKwXF1qRJ4DnnWNc12wlh0YsUcrldeN8AP2CJ03lQ%3D%3D) **

clean_body: I thought he was supposed to bring people together. | Fellow American, Unlike President Biden, I was born in the deep South nearly 60 years ago. Back then, Dixiecrats - conservative Democrats - as they were known then, controlled nearly every aspect of government in Georgia and many states across the South. These politicians were opposed to racial integration. They were Democrats. So when President Biden visited Atlanta last week to give a fiery speech on election reform, I was stunned at what he said. He argued people who don't support the Democrats' voting legislation are like former segregationists Bull Connor and George Wallace. In other words, anyone who disagrees with him is a racist. On Wednesday, Democrats in the Senate - including my opponent - responded to Biden's siren call by holding a vote, which they knew would not pass, that would federalize our elections. As expected, it failed. They even tried to change the Senate's filibuster rule to ram through the legislation, which they knew would not succeed. As expected, it failed too because they couldn't get all Democrats to agree. Sadly, this was all a political game. President Biden used outrageous rhetoric, and Senate Democrats pushed forward with doomed legislation, simply to keep their base happy. Unfortunately, that's how Washington works these days, and it's why we need to change who we send to Washington. President Biden and our Democrat opponent want the country to believe Georgia's updated voting laws are nearly identical to ones in place during the Jim Crow era that disenfranchised black voters. Mr. President, that's absurd. I don't support your federal voting legislation, and I'm not a racist. The sad truth about Democrats today is that if they don't get the outcome they want, they accuse Republicans of being bad actors out to destroy America. Until we can figure out a way to put a lid on that kind of talk, our country is not going to heal. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: Get your free COVID tests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Let’s take care of ourselves and each other.
#
Hi Derek, it's Gisele! ❤️
Did you know the Biden Administration has made it possible for Americans to order a set of 4 FREE at-home tests for your household?
**[If you haven’t yet, place your order for 4 free COVID tests with the USPS now →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41225?t=1&akid=4285%2E434096%2Eco3LLQ)**
Testing is a really important tool to help reduce the spread of Covid-19 here in PA. Right now, the experts are recommending that all Americans use at-home tests if:
1. They begin to have symptoms at least five days after coming in close contact with someone who has COVID-19 OR
2. They are gathering indoors with a group of people who are at risk of severe disease or unvaccinated.

**[So make sure you have at-home tests on hand by placing your order on the USPS website right now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41225?t=2&akid=4285%2E434096%2Eco3LLQ)**
Let’s take care of ourselves, our families, and our fellow Pennsylvanians by doing our part to reduce the spread.
With love,
Gisele ❤️
Gisele Barreto Fetterman
Second Lady of Pennsylvania
SLoP

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220121-4285-footer&t=3&refcode2=4285_434096_co3LLQ&akid=4285%2E434096%2Eco3LLQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=4&akid=4285%2E434096%2Eco3LLQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=4285%2E434096%2Eco3LLQ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Henry Cuellar's FBI entanglements
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, here’s what
we know about Henry Cuellar:

The FBI raided his home and office as part of an investigation led by the
DOJ team that handles issues related to bribery, corruption, election
crimes, and more. That investigation is related to ties between U.S.
businessmen and Azerbaijan.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90024?refcode=em20220121-21599&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=21599%2E1203867%2EJOt6M7 ]Two FBI agents outside Henry Cuellar's house

We separately also know the ties between Cuellar and a dark money
anti-abortion group could violate federal election law, according to
investigative reporting at The Intercept. A close aide to Cuellar launched
the dark money group and is spending money to defeat Justice Democrat
Jessica Cisneros.

Ryan Grim [2]Verified @ryangrim
[3]@ryangrim Henry Cuellar is in a lot of trouble, and this could be
more:

His longtime aide teamed with abortion ban zealots to
launch a dark money group in September that is spending
big in the race, likely breaking the law

Jessica is locked in a primary election battle with Cuellar, where Cuellar
has millions from corporate PACs and lobbyists. These revelations about
Cuellar could push Jessica to victory, but only if we all lift Jessica up
at this critical moment. It seems like Cuellar is still planning to run,
but Jessica has the momentum. The election is on March 1 and in-person
early voting starts in just 24 days.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90024?refcode=em20220121-21599&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21599%2E1203867%2EJOt6M7 ]Can you split a $3 donation to Jessica’s campaign and
Justice Democrats today? Every dollar right now helps us capitalize on
this moment and add Jessica to the Squad in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90024?refcode=em20220121-21599&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21599%2E1203867%2EJOt6M7 ]Contribute $3

Since the Cuellar news dropped, folks like you helped Justice Democrats
raise $17,302 from 545 donations for Jessica’s campaign — that’s an
average donation of $31.74 (just a bit over the magic number $27). And
Jessica’s campaign raised more than $70,000.

Peter, this is
how a grassroots campaign can defeat a corporate-backed incumbent like
Cuellar. He’s got millions in the bank and ties to the biggest corporate
interests in America: Big Oil, private prisons, Wall Street, and more. But
we have momentum right now and need to keep it going. It’s the ONLY way we
can defeat such a powerful, well-funded incumbent.

Last time, Jessica lost by only 2,746 votes — just 3%. This time, we can
seal the deal and elect another fighter for working families to the U.S.
House.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90024?refcode=em20220121-21599&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21599%2E1203867%2EJOt6M7 ]Can you chip in a $3 split contribution to Jessica
Cisneros and Justice Democrats right now so we have the resources we need
to reach as many voters as possible?

Thanks for everything you do for our Justice Democrats
slate, Peter.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=21599%2E1203867%2EJOt6M7 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=21599%2E1203867%2EJOt6M7 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220121-21599-footer&t=1025&refcode2=21599_1203867_JOt6M7&akid=21599%2E1203867%2EJOt6M7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=21599%2E1203867%2EJOt6M7

10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a39776b04eec/businesswoman-jennifer-strahan-announces-challenge-to-marjorie-taylor-greene-in-ga-8803565?e=daf3f68050)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Jake Monssen, jake@strahanforcongress.com
---
| | **NEW POLL: EMBATTLED GEORGIA CONGRESSWOMAN IN DANGER OF LOSING **
---
| **DALLAS, Ga** : A new [poll](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=50b2026cc7&e=daf3f68050) in the House race for Georgia's 14th Congressional District highlights Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene's vulnerability. The results show an even 41-41 split with Greene’s opponent Jennifer Strahan on the informed ballot question.

"These polling numbers reflect what we hear from voters: people are tired of Rep. Greene's ineffectiveness in Congress," said Strahan. "We are traveling the district, meeting with voters, and working hard to get our message out. Most Georgians agree we deserve leaders who are focused on getting things done for Georgians, not incompetent politicians who are only focused on serving themselves."

As _The Jewish Insider_ reported:
"But when voters were informed, among other things, of Greene's history of incendiary comments, including 'a number of anti-Jewish statements' as well as her support for the Nation of Islam, the poll showed that Strahan was statistically tied with the freshman congresswoman at 41%."

"The poll was commissioned by 'a group of Georgia Republicans who want to show that there is a viable, conservative alternative to' Greene, according to a Republican political consultant and fundraiser in Georgia who spoke with JI on the condition of anonymity."
---

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

body:
We need to expand the Democratic majority

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929082/326569225/1918576256?refcode=EM_FR_220120Ryan_N_TR_90DO_11_NG_TESTB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNkYjQzYy0xNjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzSA-rgjWDF1u3HboBmRQ60i4TB_OaetKgn6HFCjRX4=) Peter,

**A 50-50 Senate isn’t cutting it. If we want to actually get stuff done, we need to expand the Democratic Senate majority. And political experts say Ohio is our best shot.**

[**_Will you rush a split donation of $5 or more between my campaign and Shontel Brown's right now to help us flip Ohio blue and expand the majority? We’re coming up on our first deadline of the year and this is a make-or-break moment for our campaign._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929084/326569229/1918576256?refcode=EM_FR_220120Ryan_N_TR_90DO_11_NG_TESTB_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNkYjQzYy0xNjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzSA-rgjWDF1u3HboBmRQ60i4TB_OaetKgn6HFCjRX4=) [DONATE $5 TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929086/326569231/1918576256?refcode=EM_FR_220120Ryan_N_TR_90DO_11_NG_TESTB_b1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNkYjQzYy0xNjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzSA-rgjWDF1u3HboBmRQ60i4TB_OaetKgn6HFCjRX4=) Joe Manchin is blocking the Build Back Better Act while the hardworking people of this country overwhelmingly support this bill.

This legislation will put money in the pockets of our families by extending the child tax credit, lowering prescription drug costs, creating universal Pre-K, and rebuilding the middle class.

It’s crystal clear that we can’t pass the bills we need to with a 50-50 Senate split. If we want to make progress, we can’t let a single Senator have all the power and stand in the way.

**We need to expand our Democratic majority now. If you’re going to make a donation to a Senate campaign today, donate to ours. Here’s why:**

[**_Ohio is our best chance at picking up a Democratic Senate seat and expanding our majority—that’s why the Wall Street Journal called me “the Democrats’ most important candidate.” Can you chip in a split donation of $5 between my campaign and Shontel Brown's to help us flip this seat blue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929088/326569233/1918576256?refcode=EM_FR_220120Ryan_N_TR_90DO_11_NG_TESTB_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNkYjQzYy0xNjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzSA-rgjWDF1u3HboBmRQ60i4TB_OaetKgn6HFCjRX4=) [DONATE $5 TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929090/326569235/1918576256?refcode=EM_FR_220120Ryan_N_TR_90DO_11_NG_TESTB_b2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNkYjQzYy0xNjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzSA-rgjWDF1u3HboBmRQ60i4TB_OaetKgn6HFCjRX4=) Working people need a break and I’m not giving up on them. When we expand our majority, I’m going to do everything in my power—even if it means standing up to my own party—to cut workers in on the deal.

I’m sick and tired of Congress prioritizing the top 1% while hardworking Ohioans get the short end of the stick. That’s why I’m running for the Senate.

**But we’re up against a ton of GOP mega-donors and billionaire funded super PACs—the only way we’ll win this is with a surge of grassroots support.**

clean_body: We need to expand the Democratic majority = Peter, A 50-50 Senate isn’t cutting it. If we want to actually get stuff done, we need to expand the Democratic Senate majority. And political experts say Ohio is our best shot. = = Joe Manchin is blocking the Build Back Better Act while the hardworking people of this country overwhelmingly support this bill. This legislation will put money in the pockets of our families by extending the child tax credit, lowering prescription drug costs, creating universal Pre-K, and rebuilding the middle class. It’s crystal clear that we can’t pass the bills we need to with a 50-50 Senate split. If we want to make progress, we can’t let a single Senator have all the power and stand in the way. We need to expand our Democratic majority now. If you’re going to make a donation to a Senate campaign today, donate to ours. Here’s why: = = Working people need a break and I’m not giving up on them. When we expand our majority, I’m going to do everything in my power—even if it means standing up to my own party—to cut workers in on the deal. I’m sick and tired of Congress prioritizing the top 1% while hardworking Ohioans get the short end of the stick. That’s why I’m running for the Senate. But we’re up against a ton of GOP mega-donors and billionaire funded super PACs—the only way we’ll win this is with a surge of grassroots support. = = Let’s do this! —Tim | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Dear Patriot,

Every day, I wear a pin on my collar that represents the exact size of a baby’s feet 10 weeks after conception.

Just as this pin serves as a daily reminder of my commitment to life, my **A+ scorecard from Susan B. Anthony's list** serves as a benchmark that I am fulfilling that commitment.
[](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=f1574c61fa0d4533985c378e9b74a47b&_e=CkA6CHnQaUQCrITLUrSmvEYEAHV8yaaDxbZqCFYzuw19FcTX5xHjey9kxkklSbcDr28lfW-30ABOsPB716Od5t9I9vH7wn1UxXM7Vc-LJMIAjy1PqLVWYi2U_B2Xbf9Syrm8eXc7sM7sxS_DOf41MWJkWy0q7SYLJIRc17DHqQQFlv-bRpw3sKJzCzhO62ghBRmhISaCdcA3htdsD-ykErtkCfR1VfbCaZcisflxhLKd-3wear0m49Hwn_7BkLbHj_FvddMRHrmGtXM96izohDhicUKi8QHrm8dnU-lBeYam9EhyPlPif9toKvlSg0lg_ZHl069oAe_Zq7nBLmNv7D8SNF0smfl29RSFSoJP8KvEUfYTXxMSOHkeW3OSN3CfxhCJR9ttejKz4Wpdl7S9vGFwCgLtyZ2HTeRcvVd1KsvO9jIuQbKvAV6olv4l1xuQ7N7rZ9C4RUo58NSnEEHLUVPsIxCZRr3GfIoWuquLGVqTdOIrEjf32l4y23o0PZFw)
The day we begin to neglect the gift of life is the day our fundamental American values go straight out the door. Our country must protect the unborn and ensure that no life is neglected.

clean_body: We must fight to protect the gift of life | | | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Every day, I wear a pin on my collar that represents the exact size of a baby’s feet 10 weeks after conception. Just as this pin serves as a daily reminder of my commitment to life, my A+ scorecard from Susan B. Anthony's list serves as a benchmark that I am fulfilling that commitment. The day we begin to neglect the gift of life is the day our fundamental American values go straight out the door. Our country must protect the unborn and ensure that no life is neglected. God Bless You, Congressman Fred Keller Fred Keller (Taking the values of PA's 12th District to Congress) Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress Our mailing address is: PO Box 61893 Harrisburg, PA 17106 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

subject: Bill McSwain: DA Larry Krasner must be removed from Mumia Abu-Jamal appeal
body:
Bill McSwain called for the removal of DA Krasner and the appointment of a special prosecutor in the appeal of Mumia Abu-Jamal. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-da-larry-krasner-must-be-removed-frommumiaabu-jamal-appeal?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**January 21, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# **Bill McSwain: District Attorney Larry Krasner must be removed from Mumia Abu-Jamal appeal**
**_Conflicts within Krasner's office warrant the appointment of a special prosecutor _**
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain, Republican Candidate for Governor, today called for the appointment of a special prosecutor to defend the conviction of Mumia Abu-Jamal in his upcoming appeal hearing, scheduled for March 2nd. Abu-Jamal was convicted and sentenced to death (later changed to life imprisonment) for the 1981 murder of Philadelphia Police Officer Daniel Faulkner and has repeatedly appealed his sentence over the years. Faulkner's widow, Maureen Faulkner, has filed a petition to disqualify Krasner's office from handling the defense of the conviction, citing Krasner's ties to organizations sympathetic to Abu-Jamal, as well as the previous representation of Abu-Jamal by one of Krasner's current employees.

McSwain expressed his support for Faulkner and her petition, and called for the appointment of a special prosecutor:
---
|
> **_"There are numerous conflicts of interest that prevent Larry Krasner or any member of his office from honestly defending the conviction of cold-blooded murderer Mumia Abu-Jamal. For Krasner to participate in this case despite his bias in favor of Abu-Jamal would violate his duty as District Attorney, as well as insult Maureen Faulkner and the entire Faulkner family.
>
> Abu-Jamal has had his time in court, and then some. He should, at the very least, remain in prison for life. I am calling for the appointment of a special prosecutor so that Krasner does not usher onto the streets yet another obviously guilty, convicted murderer. As Governor, I will do everything in my power to ensure that justice prevails and Abu-Jamal remains in prison until his final breath, and will also support the death penalty for any future criminal convicted of killing a police officer. Maureen and her family, and police families, deserve nothing less."_**
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **

Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=9b3c1cf174&e=b1ec95759b)

| | This year, more anti-abortion laws have been passed in states than ever before. In 2022, the Supreme Court is more likely than ever to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ because of Donald Trump's handpicked justices. Our freedom and bodily autonomy are under attack and it's terrifying. I know how important reproductive justice is. **I'm proud to say that I helped pass the most progressive reproductive health equity act in the nation.** It ensures that every person in Oregon who needs an abortion has access to one. But not everyone lives in a place like Oregon. Many folks across the country will have little to no access to reproductive health care if _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned. We've got to fight back. **These right-wing activists, empowered by GOP lawmakers, want to outlaw abortions, and this is the year they may succeed.** They want to outlaw essential health care. Left unchecked, they will continue to pass these abhorrent laws and chip away at access to abortions. Here's the good news: We can stop this, but it won't be easy. It's going to take a grassroots movement like we've never seen before. **[Take the first step and sign the petition demanding that Congress protect the right to abortion health care in all 50 states.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929533/326575201/-1304818250?source=2022AbortionWNReach_AS&referrer=group-andrea-salinas&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-andrea-salinas-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-01-abortion-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2Y3YzgwNi0xODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3QOVosG4qbcWB9U8l0TPn4KfojqXMplxryMDmDFLmc=&emci=e8cd759a-6779-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=d7f7c806-187b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5643047)** We must show the Supreme Court and legislators around the country that the American public supports _Roe v. Wade_ and abortions for all who need them. More folks want to protect _Roe v. Wade_ than want to tear it down. We need to organize! Let's make our voices heard. We won't go down without a fight. **[Sign the petition and show your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929534/326575202/-1304818250?source=2022AbortionWNReach_AS&referrer=group-andrea-salinas&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-andrea-salinas-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-01-abortion-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2Y3YzgwNi0xODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3QOVosG4qbcWB9U8l0TPn4KfojqXMplxryMDmDFLmc=&emci=e8cd759a-6779-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=d7f7c806-187b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5643047)** name: Fred Guttenberg, Jaime and Jesse's Dad
subject: I am all too familiar with the cowardice of Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
He refused to work with Parkland survivors
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929521/326575026/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2186-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTQxMDFhMi0xNzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BY5Fb2UrfUvp0d-MB4AYkhzk5UwYI46uGSVI7Tt7I7M=)Friend, I am all too familiar with the cowardice of Marco Rubio. Just one week after my daughter Jaime was murdered at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida, I confronted Marco Rubio at a town hall on gun safety. He couldn't even look at me. He refused to work with Parkland survivors to make it more difficult for people to access assault rifles – weapons of war – like the one that killed my Jaime. He has continued since the Parkland shooting to politicize any efforts to reduce gun violence. I will do anything I can to ensure Marco Rubio is no longer in the Senate, because we need an advocate like Val Demings, with her strength and integrity, to replace him. **[Will you join me in supporting Val Demings by rushing a contribution of $5 or more right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929522/326575027/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2186-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTQxMDFhMi0xNzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BY5Fb2UrfUvp0d-MB4AYkhzk5UwYI46uGSVI7Tt7I7M=) **
Since the beginning of her service in Congress, just months after the mass shooting at Pulse nightclub in her Orlando-based district, and especially after the shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglass High School, Val Demings has been one of the strongest fighters for gun safety reform.
I'm reaching out asking you for dollars to meet this goal, but it's about the people we can save. It's about creating a gun safety majority in the Senate that will enact the urgent change our country needs – change to prevent families like mine from going through any more senseless tragedy. But incompetent Marco Rubio is backed by the nearly $30 million campaign war chest of the Senate Republicans. In fact, NRA-loving Republicans have already funneled tens of millions of dollars into Florida to defend Rubio.
Val Demings can only win with the grassroots support of people like you and me, which is why I'm personally reaching out. I told the congresswoman I'd help raise $20,000 today for her Senate race – a race that experts are saying could decide Senate control. **[So please, can I count on you to donate $5 or more to help Val Demings win in Florida and make real progress on gun safety? Every dollar you give will build up grassroots resources that Congresswoman Demings needs to compete against massive amounts of GOP money.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929523/326575028/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2186-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTQxMDFhMi0xNzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BY5Fb2UrfUvp0d-MB4AYkhzk5UwYI46uGSVI7Tt7I7M=)**
I can never get my Jaime back, but helping changemakers like Val Demings – a leader who has passed lifesaving gun safety legislation – gives me the purpose I've needed since her murder. Thank you for doing your part to help.
Fred Guttenberg
Gun Violence Survivor
Jaime and Jesse's dad
