clean_body: He refused to work with Parkland survivors | | | , I am all too familiar with the cowardice of Marco Rubio. Just one week after my daughter Jaime was murdered at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida, I confronted Marco Rubio at a town hall on gun safety. He couldn't even look at me. He refused to work with Parkland survivors to make it more difficult for people to access assault rifles – weapons of war – like the one that killed my Jaime. He has continued since the Parkland shooting to politicize any efforts to reduce gun violence. I will do anything I can to ensure Marco Rubio is no longer in the Senate, because we need an advocate like Val Demings, with her strength and integrity, to replace him. = Since the beginning of her service in Congress, just months after the mass shooting at Pulse nightclub in her Orlando-based district, and especially after the shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglass High School, Val Demings has been one of the strongest fighters for gun safety reform. I'm reaching out asking you for dollars to meet this goal, but it's about the people we can save. It's about creating a gun safety majority in the Senate that will enact the urgent change our country needs – change to prevent families like mine from going through any more senseless tragedy. But incompetent Marco Rubio is backed by the nearly $30 million campaign war chest of the Senate Republicans. In fact, NRA-loving Republicans have already funneled tens of millions of dollars into Florida to defend Rubio. Val Demings can only win with the grassroots support of people like you and me, which is why I'm personally reaching out. I told the congresswoman I'd help raise $20,000 today for her Senate race – a race that experts are saying could decide Senate control. = I can never get my Jaime back, but helping changemakers like Val Demings – a leader who has passed lifesaving gun safety legislation – gives me the purpose I've needed since her murder. Thank you for doing your part to help. Fred Guttenberg Gun Violence Survivor Jaime and Jesse's dad | | = | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Hey folks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929561/326575961/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDBlZmE1NS0xODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wPAzSuLUpzpsRlJZthZeip74vFwWuJQNVXy1avbnhSw=)
Hey folks, John here! I wanted to reach out for the first time this year as Michael’s team ramps up their work ahead of the election. You may not know this, but Michael Bennet is truly one of my best friends. He helped me during my successful run for mayor of Denver and then served as my chief of staff. Anyone who knows Michael knows that it’s impossible to overstate his love for our state or his determination to make a difference in the lives of Colorado families. I’ve watched him fight to protect the public lands we love so much. I’ve seen firsthand how his experience in education helps him better serve our kids. And over the last few years, I’ve watched Michael fight to address our nation’s greatest challenges — from combating climate change, to fighting child poverty, to ensuring working families and small businesses have the support they need throughout the pandemic. We need to keep Michael in the Senate, but I won’t sugarcoat it — he’s got a tough re-election battle ahead. Mitch McConnell will do (and spend) whatever it takes to defeat Michael and reclaim the Senate majority this year. In 2020, Michael and this incredible grassroots team helped me win our competitive race to flip Colorado’s second Senate seat blue. Now, it’s my turn to help him protect his seat, and the entire Democratic majority with it. That’s why I’m personally asking: **Will you split a contribution between Michael Bennet’s re-election campaign and our work to protect the Senate majority? clean_body: | = Hey folks, John here! I wanted to reach out for the first time this year as Michael’s team ramps up their work ahead of the election. You may not know this, but Michael Bennet is truly one of my best friends. He helped me during my successful run for mayor of Denver and then served as my chief of staff. Anyone who knows Michael knows that it’s impossible to overstate his love for our state or his determination to make a difference in the lives of Colorado families. I’ve watched him fight to protect the public lands we love so much. I’ve seen firsthand how his experience in education helps him better serve our kids. And over the last few years, I’ve watched Michael fight to address our nation’s greatest challenges — from combating climate change, to fighting child poverty, to ensuring working families and small businesses have the support they need throughout the pandemic. We need to keep Michael in the Senate, but I won’t sugarcoat it — he’s got a tough re-election battle ahead. Mitch McConnell will do (and spend) whatever it takes to defeat Michael and reclaim the Senate majority this year. In 2020, Michael and this incredible grassroots team helped me win our competitive race to flip Colorado’s second Senate seat blue. Now, it’s my turn to help him protect his seat, and the entire Democratic majority with it. That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you split a contribution between Michael Bennet’s re-election campaign and our work to protect the Senate majority? Anything you can give would make a huge difference for our teams. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to John Hickenlooper and Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for pitching in today, if you can. More soon! — John Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929723/326578427/1035481494?refcode=ea.28ec9d66-197b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.28ec9d66-197b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGVjOWQ2Ni0xOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EekifzUw9ZcS0WMU-GJaHc_cMTbUA8HmSM94nzEZOl8=&emci=41068960-197b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=28ec9d66-197b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5944225)

| | Peter,

My name is Abigail Spanberger, and I represent the 7th Congressional district in Virginia. I’m thrilled to endorse my friend and fellow public-servant-turned-candidate Deb McGrath. I hope you’ll read on to learn some of the reasons why, **[but if you’re ready to make a contribution that Deb and I will split across our swing districts you can do so below.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929724/326578428/1942408499?amount=20&refcode=ea.28ec9d66-197b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.28ec9d66-197b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGVjOWQ2Ni0xOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EekifzUw9ZcS0WMU-GJaHc_cMTbUA8HmSM94nzEZOl8=)** | ****[SPLIT YOUR DONATION HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40929725/326578429/1942408499?amount=20&refcode=ea.28ec9d66-197b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.28ec9d66-197b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGVjOWQ2Ni0xOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EekifzUw9ZcS0WMU-GJaHc_cMTbUA8HmSM94nzEZOl8=)****
---
Let me tell you why I’m honored to support Deb:
1. **Deb has dedicated her life to public service.** She’s an Army veteran and, like me, she’s a former CIA officer! Our former line of work required a level head and principled leadership as we worked to solve our country’s most pressing national security challenges. Deb’s mission, focus, and desire to understand and solve problems is exactly what we need in Congress.

2. Much like central Virginians, **western Wisconsinites need access to affordable health care, job security, support for their small businesses, and opportunities for their families to succeed** \- starting with a quality education for our kids. And we need Deb in Congress, working to understand and solve the challenges facing Americans across our country.

3. **We must hold the House majority.** If a Republican wins either of our races, we could very likely lose the House and lose ground on the issues that matter most.

4. **Deb can - and will - win this race and keep this swing district blue.** I flipped my seat in 2018, and I know what it takes to win in a swing district. It takes a dynamic, compassionate, and dedicated leader to keep purple districts from falling into the hands of extremist opponents. In swing districts like ours, we win by ensuring people know who we are and how hard we will work for them.

The list could go on, Peter, but I’m thrilled to endorse Deb, and I hope we have your support, too. The truth is we can’t win our races without grassroots support from people like you in Wisconsin, Virginia, and everywhere in between. **[Can Deb and I count on a split contribution from you today? clean_body: | | Peter, My name is Abigail Spanberger, and I represent the 7th Congressional district in Virginia. I’m thrilled to endorse my friend and fellow public-servant-turned-candidate Deb McGrath. I hope you’ll read on to learn some of the reasons why, = | **= Let me tell you why I’m honored to support Deb: 1. Deb has dedicated her life to public service. She’s an Army veteran and, like me, she’s a former CIA officer! Our former line of work required a level head and principled leadership as we worked to solve our country’s most pressing national security challenges. Deb’s mission, focus, and desire to understand and solve problems is exactly what we need in Congress. 2. Much like central Virginians, western Wisconsinites need access to affordable health care, job security, support for their small businesses, and opportunities for their families to succeed \- starting with a quality education for our kids. And we need Deb in Congress, working to understand and solve the challenges facing Americans across our country. 3. We must hold the House majority. If a Republican wins either of our races, we could very likely lose the House and lose ground on the issues that matter most. 4. Deb can - and will - win this race and keep this swing district blue. I flipped my seat in 2018, and I know what it takes to win in a swing district. It takes a dynamic, compassionate, and dedicated leader to keep purple districts from falling into the hands of extremist opponents. In swing districts like ours, we win by ensuring people know who we are and how hard we will work for them. The list could go on, Peter, but I’m thrilled to endorse Deb, and I hope we have your support, too. The truth is we can’t win our races without grassroots support from people like you in Wisconsin, Virginia, and everywhere in between. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = With gratitude, Abigail = | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. body:
We send a number of fundraising emails, so today we thought it was important to show you why.
#

Friends —
We send a number of fundraising emails, so today we thought it was important to **show** you why.
See the chart below? That's how this campaign is funded. For every one large donation we receive, there are thousands of small ones. And when it’s all said and done, most of the money we raise to re-elect Mark comes from the people donating what they can, when they can.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220121-1-7&t=1&refcode2=1975_6688874_q816Z8&akid=1975%2E6688874%2Eq816Z8)
What you might not know is that most of those donations come in response to emails like this.
Mark made a bold decision early on to reject corporate PAC money. He hoped that people like you would come forward and fill the gap. Because that’s the only way. All these donations we receive every day add up. And we’re hoping today is the day you can add your first:
[**Can you please make your first $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign? The only way we reach our January fundraising goals and defend this seat is if everyone does a little bit as often as they can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220121-1-7&t=2&refcode2=1975_6688874_q816Z8&akid=1975%2E6688874%2Eq816Z8)

Team Kelly

name: Kelli Ward on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Your 2022 Second Amendment Survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KELLI WARD
body:
That’s why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment
Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link

Unsubscribe
[https://for.az.kelliward.com/unsubscribe.php?M=22208987&C=04032ac65d70499c58422a6a52349eb2&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=1040&N=145440&AGENCY=PMI]
View in browser
[https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145440&L=78327&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL2tlbGxpd2FyZC5jb20vZW1haWwtbGV0dGVycy9rdy1yZXYtYm0taGlsbHNkYWxlLTIwMjItMDEtMjE=]

[Header]

[Alternate text]
[https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145440&L=78328&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1LzJhLXN1cnZleS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yYV9zdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfS2VsbGlXYXJkMDEyMDIyMkFTdXJ2ZXkmc2M9TUsxMDIwRU0z]

Dear Friend of the Constitution,

The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s
history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on
eliminating the Second Amendment.

Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s SECOND AMENDMENT
SURVEY because you’re someone who understands that education is
essential to the defense of liberty.

We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the
importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even
ONE PENNY of government funding.

Could you take a few minutes to complete our SECOND AMENDMENT SURVEY
using the secure link below?

https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145440&L=58776&F=T&drurl=SFRUUFM6Ly9MUC5ISUxMU0RBTEUuRURVLzJBLVNVUlZFWS8=
[https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145440&L=78328&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1LzJhLXN1cnZleS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yYV9zdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfS2VsbGlXYXJkMDEyMDIyMkFTdXJ2ZXkmc2M9TUsxMDIwRU0z]

Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of
our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of
liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment.

There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in
its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is IGNORANCE.

Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty
since the College was founded in 1844.

Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety
of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment.

As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_, our
digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second
Amendment is an expression of FIRST PRINCIPLES.”

This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of
freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will
eventually lose our freedom.

This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university
campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and
shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example...

Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional
21-gun salute on Veterans Day.

Why?

The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those
who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom
would cause “panic” among the student body.

Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to
illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics
education in America.

BUT INSTEAD OF JUST TALKING, IT’S MORE IMPORTANT TO DO SOMETHING
ABOUT IT.

That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach
efforts on behalf of liberty.

And this work continues today.

That’s why I would like your answers to our brief SECOND AMENDMENT
SURVEY. You can complete the survey today at this secure link:

https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145440&L=58776&F=T&drurl=SFRUUFM6Ly9MUC5ISUxMU0RBTEUuRURVLzJBLVNVUlZFWS8=
[https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145440&L=78328&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1LzJhLXN1cnZleS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yYV9zdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfS2VsbGlXYXJkMDEyMDIyMkFTdXJ2ZXkmc2M9TUsxMDIwRU0z]

We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the
preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is
never more than one generation away from extinction.”

Do you agree? I hope so.

This is why we REACH and TEACH millions of Americans about the
principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need
your help today.

As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government
funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting
federal regulation.

Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely
dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand
the importance of education to liberty.

It also means your gift really matters.

TODAY, YOU HAVE A GREAT OPPORTUNITY TO HELP PRESERVE
LIBERTY—INCLUDING THE SECOND AMENDMENT—FOR FUTURE GENERATIONS.

After completing your SECOND AMENDMENT SURVEY, please join me in the
cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today.

And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special,
limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you.

This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the
organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to
represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But
hurry—supplies are limited!

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving

We cannot afford to fall any further behind. | Fellow American, Now that the election year is here, I wanted to personally reach out and give you an update on where our campaign stands. Our Democrat opponent's fundraising is SURGING. He's OUTRAISING our campaign by MILLIONS. In fact, he's the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. It's critical that we pick up the pace and ramp up our fundraising so we can WIN this Senate race in Georgia. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | Fellow American, national Democrats have made winning this race their NUMBER ONE PRIORITY this election. They know the results in Georgia WILL DETERMINE the Senate majority. We cannot afford to fall any further behind our Democrat opponent. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | I'm not a politician, and our campaign doesn't have millions of dollars from special interests. Instead, we're counting on a grassroots army of conservatives to rise up and join Team Herschel. Will you stand with us? Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: My friend, Tim Ryan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2049%2E3611125%2EaY982g ][IMG]

Hello,

I’ve seen firsthand how my good friend, Tim Ryan, fights for Ohio. Every
day, he shows up for working families and that’s exactly the kind of
person we need to join Sherrod Brown in the Senate.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6501?t=1007&akid=2049%2E3611125%2EaY982g ]That’s why I’m personally asking you to join me in supporting Tim’s
campaign. Will you make a donation of any amount today to help us flip
Ohio blue? Tim’s campaign has a goal to raise $15,000 through the weekend.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6502?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2049%2E3611125%2EaY982g ]DONATE

Look, winning this race will take a whole lot of resources. Tim is up
against self-funding millionaires with billionaire backers. They have
virtually unlimited resources to attack him. On top of that, the margins
in the polls are razor-thin. Tim needs grassroots support to fight off
their attacks and pull ahead.

I can’t overstate how important winning this race is. If Tim flips Ohio
blue, Democrats are pretty much guaranteed to hold and expand the
Senate—which means we can finally pass important legislation like voting
rights, raising the minimum wage, and more.

But the GOP is planning to spend unprecedented amounts of money here in
Ohio. We can’t let them drown us out on the airwaves with nasty, false
attacks against Tim. Which is why I’m reaching out today:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6501?t=1008&akid=2049%2E3611125%2EaY982g ]We can flip this seat—but only if we have your support. Please, chip in
a donation today to help us win this competitive race. Anything you can
give makes a difference.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6502?t=1011&amount=25&akid=2049%2E3611125%2EaY982g ]DONATE

Thank you for everything,

Emilia Sykes
State Representative
Ohio’s 34th House District

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=2049%2E3611125%2EaY982g ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=2049%2E3611125%2EaY982g ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=2049%2E3611125%2EaY982g ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=2049%2E3611125%2EaY982g ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=2049%2E3611125%2EaY982g ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.timforoh.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2049%2E3611125%2EaY982g

subject: Mitch McConnell GONE?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | We can't believe our eyes.

We just read three critical polls showing that Republicans' Senate leads have completely EVAPORATED:

\-- We're _**AHEAD**_ in Arizona.
\-- We're _**AHEAD**_ in Georgia.
\-- And we're _**TIED**_ in Wisconsin.

This is our once-in-a-lifetime chance to BOOST our razor-thin Senate Majority and keep Mitch McConnell out of power for years to come...

_**... But ONLY if grassroots supporters like you rise up to take advantage of this HISTORIC swing in Democrats' favor.**_

Peter,

My name is Major General Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m a husband, a father, and a proud Arizonan.

I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man - [**and I need your support today in order to win this race and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ea611733a8b8431382bad5b22c6fa80e&_e=xIUogOi8ezPM1P4Cm__kZaggRJkDEuNcfX4-LWhm_KrP_o7rmijRfS5zyHew0vsI7GOCgGL2Dyt6U13Gu6Eqi8hnq-ERMEOG9XgjT0x2o2ZJoD8n7133VcNPTez5Lv2-wxlZBeTUNF6RVdZl_GXkKfMYHK-keR6Xcs36r5HtvSoLdYRnC__nqvps4Lht1Hw27GzrWaeZY-y5fBawOsVi1WYre9aUTEhWwjhzR6B4Cn1eZywAndhIULZOHIEP9flTseeHMuWmTPOd3j12bZQ9FjfApv5TNzoz_RtZ9RK-ryMRQjTvN8m-Sok6-ONs9bG34sEKnyVzAwPBfhaVmT0hT52IuNmBIQprqCNpdjHbeSa6UiAuo2tzJGo5EwroHxmuga_L-xSbMcJp1RJBJiLV22e8KKiZ7vbUd2mN8mU1Fmk%3D)

[** ****JOIN MY TEAM ➤ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ea611733a8b8431382bad5b22c6fa80e&_e=xIUogOi8ezPM1P4Cm__kZaggRJkDEuNcfX4-LWhm_KrP_o7rmijRfS5zyHew0vsI7GOCgGL2Dyt6U13Gu6Eqi8hnq-ERMEOG9XgjT0x2o2ZJoD8n7133VcNPTez5Lv2-wxlZBeTUNF6RVdZl_GXkKfMYHK-keR6Xcs36r5HtvSoLdYRnC__nqvps4Lht1Hw2oeDEREdW1YukvImt42zotr2qnN-oNSvlOUkIY13z8JuaRLNKmK-jLsKhcvuVeYp-z8ZtvkHftKJjTjH6AFXzE1gZBvMKHZ8g1goOYoVrCpU76sC-rKssm-kAoczu5quUapZxoxp94I4_zQkuF197sGRf-h8FFYd08xFFsc_VHzGXMAguBWOnSZxUOBQqDa4CXZKoHMKmfOD2wxBJhqyhpXl6brB0donopXOd5pFOks8%3D)
Washington is broken. There are too many politicians who are only worried about making the right decision for THEMSELVES and NOT the American people they promised to protect.

As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and make split second decisions that is the difference between saving and losing lives.

I’m ready on day one to fight for YOU and for what’s right for this country. That means:
1. Securing our border
2. Standing for life
3. Protecting our First and Second Amendment rights and
4. Walking shoulder to shoulder with law enforcement.

Each day the Left pushes our country further left, and we need a Senator in Arizona who will be a vote for our conservative way of life. I’m that vote, Peter.

I can win this race, but I need to hear from you today. [**Will you make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate? It doesn’t need to be much - even just $5 or $10 will give my campaign the momentum it needs to build a winning foundation.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ea611733a8b8431382bad5b22c6fa80e&_e=xIUogOi8ezPM1P4Cm__kZaggRJkDEuNcfX4-LWhm_KrP_o7rmijRfS5zyHew0vsI7GOCgGL2Dyt6U13Gu6Eqi8hnq-ERMEOG9XgjT0x2o2ZJoD8n7133VcNPTez5Lv2-wxlZBeTUNF6RVdZl_GXkKfMYHK-keR6Xcs36r5HtvSoLdYRnC__nqvps4Lht1Hw2VTG5iZZ3s5aEZX9Uh3JSEMKdOqVc4211ZzVwjWBZbm4OUC-XW437WfKY_gcFsVBOdsHWUIwHFPPU0NBRyjcV1Xysjpn9OyY1FBAIicybLkzhw6O12cK_Q7Wlughjf-mqP_3Bxqiiam43dpxNFleQ6Gd082UIfnl-Sxpwyyrl5GCRMrxP7XVhJZiY-nvcAQwAczM3NYYXfjQY0q_76J4_3SQk-iontAJqDxiYlzQGNN8%3D)

Washington needs to STOP the games and fight for what’s right.

If I’m lucky enough to be the next U.S. Senator from Arizona I will ALWAYS fight for YOU, protect our values, and stand up for what we believe in.

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: My Final Blog Post?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
| [ ](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziook9GM6ZCJmtpUFYCf-NUON&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=test_2_non_donor&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Thank you for being a loyal subscriber to my blog. If elected to Congress, I will continue writing it from inside the Capitol in D.C. But I can’t report to you on the corruption unless I make it there. And our opponents are intent on stopping us. They've already launched a smear campaign and begun spending heavily. My posts will always be freely available to the public. But if you appreciate the information I provide, and would like it to continue, [please consider a donation in an amount that works for you](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=test_2_non_donor&n=2). Corrupt politicians hate that I expose the truth. They hate that we reject the cozy “go along to get along” culture of the swamp. They hate that we spoil their racket. What they really hate is that we fight back. I believe sunlight is the best disinfectant. Spreading the truth is how we make change happen. As one of my loyal readers, you’ve been helping me spread the truth. I’m counting on you now more than ever. [If you believe in truth and accountability, I humbly ask for your support today](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=test_2_non_donor&n=3). With humility and gratitude,
Kevin
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=test_2_non_donor&n=4).

name: Team AOC
subject: New York City’s deadliest fire in three decades
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We must come together to support the families devastated by the fire and help them get back on their feet.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220121-2746-header&t=1&akid=2746%2E2526796%2EmgiUvX)
Twelve days ago, a massive fire in an apartment complex in the Bronx killed 17 people – making it the city’s deadliest fire in three decades.
More than 60 people were hurt and dozens were hospitalized in critical condition.
While we work to ensure that all measures are taken to mitigate future disasters like this one – **we must come together to support the families devastated by the fire and help them get back on their feet.**
[Can you chip $3 – or anything you can afford – right now to help provide relief for the families impacted by this tragedy? Together we are raising funds to support these families with food, furniture, rent support, and other essentials. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10374?t=2&akid=2746%2E2526796%2EmgiUvX)
**[Donate to fire relief](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10374?t=3&akid=2746%2E2526796%2EmgiUvX)**
_100% of your donation will go directly to the Mayor’s Fund to Advance New York Bronx Fire Relief Fund._
The 120-unit building was repeatedly cited for safety violations, including issues that ultimately appear to have contributed to the spread of the fire. While the investigation is still ongoing, this event is a stark reminder of the consequences of delayed maintenance and disinvestment in our housing.
Everyone has a right to live in a safe environment and we will continue to fight for the right to dignified housing for all.
[**If you’re able to help, please chip in to support the Mayor’s Fund to Advance New York Bronx Fire Relief Fund which is providing direct relief to families impacted by the fire.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10374?t=4&akid=2746%2E2526796%2EmgiUvX)
It’s up to us to take care of our community members when they need help the most. That's the New York spirit and what makes our community strong.
Holding all of the families impacted in our thoughts.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20220121-2746-P_FND_CHA_DIR&t=5&refcode2=2746_2526796_mgiUvX&akid=2746%2E2526796%2EmgiUvX)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220121-2746-P_FND_CHA_DIR&t=6&akid=2746%2E2526796%2EmgiUvX)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=2746%2E2526796%2EmgiUvX) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=2746%2E2526796%2EmgiUvX) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=2746%2E2526796%2EmgiUvX)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jihun?=
subject: FWD: We are SO close to our goal
body:
Will you join me today and help stop Pelosi? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9a7776889114/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-6702918?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | **[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=15d52de503&e=c87c5d8d97)**
---
| Friend,

It’s Jihun here. Did you see Lori’s last email? If just 50 of you donate to our campaign today, we can meet our fundraising goal and ensure that Republicans take back the House in 2022 and retire Nancy Pelosi once and for all!

We need your help. We just found out that Nancy Pelosi has made our district her number one priority and will soon be flooding in dark horse money from liberal elite donors. It is up to us to fight back against the Democrat Fundraising machine. We must fight fire with fire.

That is why Lori asked me to reach out to you specifically today. You have supported us from the beginning and we are so grateful for your support. Your support today could be the difference between two more years of Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House. Together, we will defeat Nancy Pelosi and the Democrat machine and make a real difference for the people of Oregon on day one. **[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=abd081b35f&e=c87c5d8d97)** Thank you,

Jihun
Campaign Manager

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Lori Chavez-DeRemer <info@lorichavezderemer.com>
Date: Friday, Jan 21, 2021 at 10:11 AM
Subject: We are SO close to our goal
To: <info@lorichavezderemer.com>
---
| Peter
We are So close to hitting our goal. If just 50 people pitch in and join my team today, we can ensure that Republicans RETIRE Nancy Pelosi and put an end to the disastrous Biden agenda when we retake the Majority.

Just this year, Joe Biden and his allies in Congress have created the highest inflation in 40 years, record high gas prices, a Border crisis, a crime crisis, debt crisis, energy crisis, and national security crisis.

However, they are just getting started. Nancy Pelosi and the House Democrats have dozens of destructive bills they are attempting to send to Joe Biden’s desk, but if you join me today, we can kill this anti-American agenda and put this country back on the right track.

[**Can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today so we can hit out January goal and take back the Majority? >>>**](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=17a980bc37&e=c87c5d8d97) **[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=375c806a37&e=c87c5d8d97)**
**[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=1dfcbadfbc&e=c87c5d8d97)**
**[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=8e36ae4a6c&e=c87c5d8d97)
[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=4690ab9083&e=c87c5d8d97)** I can’t put this country back on the right track without you. Nancy Pelosi and her fundraising machine are doing everything they can to keep the House in her hands. Our country can not afford to continue on this track, and it is up to you and I to stop it. [**Donate any amount today, and we will Save America! >>>**](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=69d123b227&e=c87c5d8d97) **[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=5a9adf55de&e=c87c5d8d97)**
Thank you,

[****](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=c5f9fb6aea&e=c87c5d8d97)

Lori Chavez-DeRemer
_Republican Candidate for Congress_

---
| [****](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=578903eec1&e=c87c5d8d97)

---
| | [****](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=e0649df94d&e=c87c5d8d97) **[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=7a7f029c54&e=c87c5d8d97) [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=aba1dbba07&e=c87c5d8d97)**

****

name: ProtectVoting.org
subject: Re: The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This moment demands YOUR attention >>
| | _**Did you see this, Team?**_ **“History Is Watching Us”: Democratic Senators Go All In for Voting Rights** | [**Team, we have ONE LAST CHANCE to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act! PLEASE – help us do our part to pass this bill and SAVE voting rights. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5268?t=6&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo)
---
**IN 2006:** The Senate voted **98-0** to reauthorize the Voting Rights Act...

**NOW:** The entire GOP stands opposed to the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, showing just how extreme they have become.
[**This can’t wait. Rush $5 IMMEDIATELY to Save Voting Rights! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5268?t=7&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo)
---
*** DEADLINE: SUNDAY AT MIDNIGHT || GOAL: $15,000 ***
**IF** we can’t pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act...

**THEN** we will have no chance to defend our razor-thin majorities in Congress...

**WHICH MEANS** ALL of our progress will be DESTROYED by Mitch McConnell’s far-right GOP! We can’t let them get their grimy hands on the gavel!

But Mitch McConnell knows if this bill passes, Republicans will NEVER hold the majority again._So his GOP goons are desperate to permanently kill block this bill!_

[ **WE DON’T HAVE ANOTHER SECOND TO WASTE: Rush a $5 donation before MIDNIGHT on Sunday to Voter Protection Project to help us smash our $15,000 goal and PASS THIS CRITICAL BILL! »** ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5268?t=8&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5269?t=9&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5270?t=10&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5272?t=12&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5268?t=13&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo)
_\-- Team VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1151%2E878179%2EFDzzjo)

name: Larry Elder
subject: Can you get behind this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR AMERICA
body:
We started a movement, Peter, and now we’re going to put it to work for the American people! | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ea1e1407fde6410dbec200e8784afe38&_e=-X3poFwVUKFCHE1nt4httL2m3_uszCTNCyjxwaLP0j05eeKTcnMUvjt4xQ5iSMNj-rFe4IqwYGLTOrylg9Y5CaOh9B-SOpNJ38IQNb29YmRiqI--s-932dcb_R2q7QfQXm6BFfmzX1apOwoKxCE3mZRsDwg8De1brHxjIkTgnw3woRgRYS3V40Fkry0u4-jTXPFMZ8bk_k6gEa7K54ihASBnE2B2EXfK_eTZfvqaiwjeN771dmATvPhOnR3dsKKOS-xebMHklR5WZVmh7jcxDFHIKDUtdFPmHZya4lEVuoLGEvMTcISZY-r5Uid8VnWfG9Cl40ifw3nOXlu5HrsYN9tw_iSjNmuSf3wlp7h2uq_Fu1sUjm7gexGjk28dxzERvkRVghh6HPyYGT_G5nciuTQvrfVqyPcj9t3UzTGNroAJ8IAx41H45v19ZzLcc4ZU)
---
Peter,

When I launched my 2021 campaign for Governor of California against Gavin Newsom, I was ready for the tough fight to come. But what I wasn’t ready for was the overwhelming support I received from all over the country.

**We started a movement, Peter, and now we’re going to put it to work for the American people!**

As you probably saw, I launched [**Elder for America PAC**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ea1e1407fde6410dbec200e8784afe38&_e=-X3poFwVUKFCHE1nt4httL2m3_uszCTNCyjxwaLP0j05eeKTcnMUvjt4xQ5iSMNj-rFe4IqwYGLTOrylg9Y5CaOh9B-SOpNJ38IQNb29YmRiqI--s-932dcb_R2q7QfQXm6BFfmzX1apOwoKxCE3mZRsDwg8De1brHxjIkTgnw3woRgRYS3V40Fkry0u4-jTXPFMZ8bk_k6gEa7K54ihASBnE2B2EXfK_eTZfvqaiwi1hpi4tlb3oOBNI3WdYZ41V5L0U1qD18YEWMGcrKc5qgeeYo8iIp9UDA9ZeJHpRErZE-UvEBw44v83GFoEvYBSgz8-IgqGURWp3jjO-k2mLw8gtKmm3KYkBkSaTRWkaZF94FJg1WTBjK9V3sIdC5IzXR4WGStshnUTb_A65L59Y2PqtWgy2-YXKXUlhSyVQaCfArfILghXHO-eqKMQhV6-) earlier this month to help support Republican candidates in target races around the country to help win back the House and Senate.

[**HELP LARRY ELDER SAVE AMERICA -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ea1e1407fde6410dbec200e8784afe38&_e=-X3poFwVUKFCHE1nt4httL2m3_uszCTNCyjxwaLP0j05eeKTcnMUvjt4xQ5iSMNj-rFe4IqwYGLTOrylg9Y5CaOh9B-SOpNJ38IQNb29YmRiqI--s-932dcb_R2q7QfQXm6BFfmzX1apOwoKxCE3mZRsDwg8De1brHxjIkTgnw3woRgRYS3V40Fkry0u4-jTXPFMZ8bk_k6gEa7K54ihASBnE2B2EXfK_eTZfvqaiwgHqr_cZxzSkQQKYH4igymyfcoXfGj4dh68n0mkqd8Z1OqWfJ5Nm6hy0bTrFIUcKojcatQ8-bNGwMrVQYWOPrYW8R5kklDciug2hsX6OPxSQtGvxUw5-fttPhVNb7t9i8vvFSb1EkdH9gKlicdYEXd0RGeIHV846tfDCLqbRfpvPSGBMJH6Nb_Go2Jslp2dvTyf5vOd85GzotzbqCxUDZ7x)
But it doesn’t stop there. Along with winning back Congress, Elder for America PAC is going to take on these fights at the local level:
1. Campaign for school choice.
2. Campaign against Critical Race Theory.
3. Campaign to get rid of soft-on-crime District Attorneys.
4. Campaign against early release of violent criminals.

[**If these are fights you can get behind, then I urge you to join me. Please take $25, $50 or more right now and put it in the Elder for America tip jar because, Peter, WE’VE GOT A COUNTRY TO SAVE!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ea1e1407fde6410dbec200e8784afe38&_e=-X3poFwVUKFCHE1nt4httL2m3_uszCTNCyjxwaLP0j05eeKTcnMUvjt4xQ5iSMNj-rFe4IqwYGLTOrylg9Y5CaOh9B-SOpNJ38IQNb29YmRiqI--s-932dcb_R2q7QfQXm6BFfmzX1apOwoKxCE3mZRsDwg8De1brHxjIkTgnw3woRgRYS3V40Fkry0u4-jTXPFMZ8bk_k6gEa7K54ihASBnE2B2EXfK_eTZfvqaiwgh0uT7Iqo5CWxlKvLnBMJGw65eXi4Av2MksJl6WLKP4fKhlnRyJYrtqpIkw8sWnVATGrYNsiIaSUQ_SQ3hv9MPIXkcb3PfLxVyqbhRGEe9KnJSrA1JAqeZPKhrcJJIcswVXjwFgQDMnvYnsRjdz-lXDsIJmtPDEGx39nw0UZKZDSvf_-lj61JbX1CYZKMhiWFp9ZzkQQ2fUtagH0RSB7aj)

[**HELP LARRY ELDER SAVE AMERICA -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ea1e1407fde6410dbec200e8784afe38&_e=-X3poFwVUKFCHE1nt4httL2m3_uszCTNCyjxwaLP0j05eeKTcnMUvjt4xQ5iSMNj-rFe4IqwYGLTOrylg9Y5CaOh9B-SOpNJ38IQNb29YmRiqI--s-932dcb_R2q7QfQXm6BFfmzX1apOwoKxCE3mZRsDwg8De1brHxjIkTgnw3woRgRYS3V40Fkry0u4-jTXPFMZ8bk_k6gEa7K54ihASBnE2B2EXfK_eTZfvqaiwj0eLXSevBJ6u2DdOQd_r7CrUcPy88W5RGvF6QNv13XWaTDnDuDV214D31coCCHxs8JBDA0vbMBeCRNrbF4AjhzpayTjFLnczX8Yj9Sm-092emDEoBT3DxYveXYP6dZX8kakiSgG8kdn-X_tXCflS7SZfykky8jnPIs1uvIKJkpEom8NRexf6k_IG32T0MXEK55ZhWGqvCten_-vShHV1ms)
Thanks,

Larry Elder

---
| Dear Peter,
My friend and colleague Congressman Gosar is one of my strongest allies in Congress and he is at the top of the list now to be targeted by the democrats.

[Just like they did to Marjorie Taylor Greene, these despicable Democrats have now kicked Rep. Gosar off his committees](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=a955ee44ea&e=645b3b1338).

[Paul needs our help more than ever. Please contribute to him today!](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=22a604b1ae&e=645b3b1338)

The country saw the ridiculous lengths the far left will go to to destroy a patriotic family man. The liberals not just censured Rep. Gosar for a cartoon—they are censoring his message to America. Everyone who actually saw the cartoon knows that is was described as “silly” or “funny” but no one seriously saw any “threat” in the cartoon. That won’t stop the leftist loons from shrieking however. I stood on the floor of the House in solidarity with Paul. He is my friend and a proven America First fighter.

* Paul has a 100% NRA, GOA Second Amendment record;
* Paul has a 100% National Right to Life rating;
* Paul has never voted for a tax increase; and
* Paul fights to reduce spending every chance he gets.

He is one of us.
---
| [HELP PAUL NOW! DONATE TODAY!](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b94cf39b94&e=645b3b1338 "HELP PAUL NOW! DONATE TODAY!")

Paul is Congressman who is highly respected in Arizona, strong on crime, borders, our military, and our veterans. He continually fights for lower taxes, less regulation, and our great, but under siege Second Amendment."_** **_"Paul Gosar has my complete and total endorsement."_** **_\- President Donald J. Trump, November 18, 2021_** [I am asking you to stand with him as well. He is under sustained attack and the democrat socialists want to keep him out of of Congress](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=dc31c2bafb&e=645b3b1338). name: Team Harder
subject: one of the worst Supreme Court decisions ever
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/xZG-r91nRzU20pPCtd4wggayQGnxpsiu-KNOXrOKTcc=/JZMHNZhVCC0lZLQfPwjm0CNFHc5sdLUB39-Wy6HhWFI=?source=direct_link&referrer=group-josh-harder-for-congress-2) | Peter, Today marks 12 years since the Supreme Court made the disastrous decision in _Citizens United_ to open the floodgates for shady, unlimited outside money to penetrate our elections. In just 2021 alone, Corporate PACs spent over $400 million to bully elected officials into doing their bidding. And we expect 2022 to be even worse as more extreme QAnon candidates run for office than ever before. [**This is why we must pass a Constitutional Amendment to overturn Citizens United. We are not done waging this fight, so please add your name to this petition so we can end Citizens United and eliminate corporate influence in our elections!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xZG-r91nRzU20pPCtd4wggayQGnxpsiu-KNOXrOKTcc=/JZMHNZhVCC0lZLQfPwjm0CNFHc5sdLUB39-Wy6HhWFI=?source=direct_link&referrer=group-josh-harder-for-congress-2) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/xZG-r91nRzU20pPCtd4wggayQGnxpsiu-KNOXrOKTcc=/JZMHNZhVCC0lZLQfPwjm0CNFHc5sdLUB39-Wy6HhWFI=?source=direct_link&referrer=group-josh-harder-for-congress-2) Because Josh has been a vocal advocate against corporate PACs and even wrote the bill to ban them once and for all, he has also been a victim of millions of dollars of their attacks. And we know this year is going to be no different because his district is one of the most competitive seats in California, and it is critical to make sure we protect our House majority. Josh knows what it's like to beat the corporate PACs and win competitive races but if we want real reform, we need to pass a constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United._ [**So on the 12th anniversary of one of the worst Supreme Court decisions ever, will you please add your name to this petition and join us in this fight?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xZG-r91nRzU20pPCtd4wggayQGnxpsiu-KNOXrOKTcc=/JZMHNZhVCC0lZLQfPwjm0CNFHc5sdLUB39-Wy6HhWFI=?source=direct_link&referrer=group-josh-harder-for-congress-2) We won't give up this fight! \- Team Harder

clean_body: | | Peter, Today marks 12 years since the Supreme Court made the disastrous decision in Citizens United to open the floodgates for shady, unlimited outside money to penetrate our elections. In just 2021 alone, Corporate PACs spent over $400 million to bully elected officials into doing their bidding. And we expect 2022 to be even worse as more extreme QAnon candidates run for office than ever before. Because Josh has been a vocal advocate against corporate PACs and even wrote the bill to ban them once and for all, he has also been a victim of millions of dollars of their attacks. And we know this year is going to be no different because his district is one of the most competitive seats in California, and it is critical to make sure we protect our House majority. Josh knows what it's like to beat the corporate PACs and win competitive races but if we want real reform, we need to pass a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United. We won't give up this fight! \- Team Harder = =

name: Team Cheri Beasley
subject: Will you take our January issues survey and let us know your priorities?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We’ll be going over the results and reviewing them with Cheri, so it’s important we hear from as many supporters as possible.
#

Friends -
We’re reaching out to some of Cheri Beasley’s top supporters with a quick but very important request to start 2022.
Will you take our January issues survey and let us know your priorities? Here’s the link to share your opinion:
**[https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2022-Survey](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/jan_issues_em/?source=em220121-1-t1&refcode2=285.357359.17O2Dt&akid=285%2E357359%2E17O2Dt)**
We are running a people-focused campaign. So we want to know which issues you care about most and affect your life most directly.
It’s important to Cheri that our campaign listens to and fights for the people — not wealthy special interests or well-connected insiders.
Most people only need about one or two minutes to complete the survey, and it’ll be a massive help to our campaign as we kick off our general election.
**[Please fill out our January issues survey today. We’ll be going over the results soon, so it’s important that we hear from as many supporters as possible.](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/jan_issues_em/?source=em220121-1-t1&refcode2=285.357359.17O2Dt&akid=285%2E357359%2E17O2Dt)**
Thank you for sharing your thoughts!
\- Team Cheri Beasley
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/jan_issues_em/?source=em220121-1-t1&refcode2=285.357359.17O2Dt&akid=285%2E357359%2E17O2Dt)**

name: Kia Guarino via PattyMurray.com
subject: a world without Roe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
On the eve of the anniversary of the historic decision, Roe v. Wade may not reach its 50th year.
#
Peter,
As the Executive Director of Pro-Choice Washington, I am keeping a close eye on the anti-abortion legislation around the country, including the Mississippi law at the Supreme Court.
On the eve of the anniversary of the historic decision, Roe v. Wade may not reach its 50th year.
**[There has never been a more important moment to support leaders like Patty Murray who will always fight for our reproductive rights. Contribute $5 now directly to her reelection campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40930603/326597937/-126434323?refcode=pm_em_220121_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGJjZGYwMC0yNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RErKTheFrG1lTCu6hmE-a2a6ZYW8SKsmICh6Z6OWcQ=)**
Even though the vast majority of the American public think abortion should be a right, we could be looking at a future without the basic protections of Roe v. Wade. Without the Roe precedent in place, at least 22 states will outlaw abortion immediately – making states like ours, where abortion is still legal, places where the number of patients seeking abortion care will increase dramatically.
Washington state is a model for reproductive freedom policies, and I’m so glad we have a champion like Patty Murray in the Senate who we can count on to stand up for abortion rights.
But even here in Washington state, abortion access remains inequitable. We must continue our work eliminating barriers to abortion care like limited access to transportation, service costs, lack of insurance coverage or child care, and more. And we must continue to strengthen abortion infrastructure across the state by supporting clinics, providers, abortion funds, and patients – those who live in Washington state and those who will seek care here in a world without Roe.
**[Patty Murray will never stop fighting for abortion rights at the federal level in the Senate, but she needs us to have her back. Will you pitch in $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40930604/326597938/-126434323?refcode=pm_em_220121_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGJjZGYwMC0yNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RErKTheFrG1lTCu6hmE-a2a6ZYW8SKsmICh6Z6OWcQ=)**
Thank you,
Kia Guarino
Executive Director
Pro-Choice Washington
** **
** **
** **

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40930605/326597939/-126434323?refcode=pm_em_220121_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGJjZGYwMC0yNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RErKTheFrG1lTCu6hmE-a2a6ZYW8SKsmICh6Z6OWcQ=)****

clean_body: On the eve of the anniversary of the historic decision, Roe v. Wade may not reach its 50th year. Peter, As the Executive Director of Pro-Choice Washington, I am keeping a close eye on the anti-abortion legislation around the country, including the Mississippi law at the Supreme Court. On the eve of the anniversary of the historic decision, Roe v. Wade may not reach its 50th year. = Even though the vast majority of the American public think abortion should be a right, we could be looking at a future without the basic protections of Roe v. Wade. Without the Roe precedent in place, at least 22 states will outlaw abortion immediately – making states like ours, where abortion is still legal, places where the number of patients seeking abortion care will increase dramatically. Washington state is a model for reproductive freedom policies, and I’m so glad we have a champion like Patty Murray in the Senate who we can count on to stand up for abortion rights. But even here in Washington state, abortion access remains inequitable. We must continue our work eliminating barriers to abortion care like limited access to transportation, service costs, lack of insurance coverage or child care, and more. And we must continue to strengthen abortion infrastructure across the state by supporting clinics, providers, abortion funds, and patients – those who live in Washington state and those who will seek care here in a world without Roe. = Thank you, Kia Guarino Executive Director Pro-Choice Washington **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._ PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

body:
Failure is not an option.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4266?t=2&akid=12936%2E53494%2Ex-C3GE) Friend, Big news: This week, President Biden stated in his press conference that it's "clear that we would be able to get support" for the climate provisions of the Build Back Better Act. Biden is exactly right— _even Senator Manchin supports the transformative climate components of the Build Back Better Act!_ **We can't lose this momentum: We need to turn up the pressure on the Senate to pass these climate investments ASAP, especially because senators are about to leave for recess. We have to contact them TODAY.** [**_Sign our petition demanding the Senate take up the Build Back Better Act's transformative climate investments, then call your senators and make sure they get the message before they leave town. (It'll take just a minute, and we even provide a script.)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4266?t=3&akid=12936%2E53494%2Ex-C3GE) | [SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4266?t=4&akid=12936%2E53494%2Ex-C3GE)
---
Right now, these climate investments have more momentum and support than ever. All Senate Democrats support them. They're fully paid for and urgently needed. And now, in light of Biden's comments this week, it's time for the Senate to seal the deal and get this bill across the finish line.
A number of Democratic senators have made it clear that they understand the urgency of this moment—but we need every single Democratic senator on board. **That's why we need you to contact your senators right now, before they leave town, to make sure they know how important this is to you.**
[**_Add your name to our grassroots petition and then call your senators today to make it clear: The Senate must pass these climate investments immediately._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4266?t=5&akid=12936%2E53494%2Ex-C3GE)
It's time to make these climate investments a reality. Failure is not an option.
Jamal Raad

* * *
Peter,
Today marks twelve years of Citizens United, one of the most impactful – and controversial – decisions the Supreme Court has ever made. While wealthy donors, corporations, and special interest groups have long had an outsized influence in elections, that sway has dramatically expanded since the Citizens United decision, with negative repercussions for American democracy and the fight against political corruption.
As long as Citizens United stands, money equates to speech. And corporations are entitled to First Amendment rights to use their money as political speech via campaign contributions. As a result, American politics is awash in dark money and corporate donors that are able to control campaigns, politicians, and legislation.
**[Citizens United has benefited folks like Matt Rosendale with his wealthy out-of-state donors. So we’re calling on you to add your name to our petition here if you believe that Citizens United must be overturned.](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=160a52b27dd6442ba4e646fcfcd2e842&_e=YDnCFeo3JI41kaM0qaNIs-hL6EbzzJypNzDDEDnJQapfYBdPTLv-Ext54NrJieiqVe_j_k96IrvEvCwfQ7m8mSYpJk061N7yzlPg5d-R1GmWXAr2ukRmhe97uzs5nwNFB0tO7qxXl4gozNUaesqbanYbR7ISao8a1kWrQnUlUPvuxnKacmHx1Rj6wcZMn6mkiDZTHpgxtop-lWuR7OCp2VAxsEStrgLsb-O1U8BdKO_wprazm_qWugA304ro7lp6LKU-BV-zNalsaOsZphWPYVyzez7x82ES-EkFsX7NTv6m4eXEosRkLD0eO8FKMjVlO7t02lDDGii5whmsV5ZiBwtqmYwZITXkn0p61uRARF7unMNyS-0DzO5KV6J816Rq)**

---
**As a Christian, mother of an adopted son, and aunt to a Down Syndrome niece, you can count on me to defend babies. **
| Life is worth protecting. As a proud mother of two children (one biological and one adopted) and the aunt of a niece with Down Syndrome, you can count on me to defend life in the womb! My pro-life positions are paramount to who I am. The science is indisputable that life begins at conception. Amid our cultural chaos, I will remain relentlessly dedicated to promoting a culture of life. I’m a founding board member of a crisis pregnancy home. Dan and I financially support several organizations whose mission is saving babies from abortion and showering young women with love and support. Sometimes this support includes post-abortion counseling, another important part of our cause. In Congress, I will proudly support the longstanding and bipartisan Hyde Amendment which ensures federal funds are not used to pay for abortions. The Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act and Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act are two proposed bills that need to become law. Both these bills have strong support from Americans, yet they always meet resistance from the Planned Parenthood loyalists on The Left. I will work tirelessly to advance these humanitarian bills that are long overdue.
---
| **Join the fight. Join my team!

**
**Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Congress, VA10**

clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER Katie on China Hosting the Winter Olympics This is not a mistake. The Chinese Communist Party cannot be trusted to host the Olympics. **Katie on the Campaign Trail Enjoyed visiting Columbiana this week! It’s always great to be in Shelby County. Thanks to everyone jumping on-board our grassroots team! We are going to fight tirelessly for Alabama’s Christian conservative values in the Senate. Katie Connects with Franklin County Voters Another great write-up about our recent trip to Franklin County — “This was my first chance to meet Katie in person and hear her share [her] conservative, Christian message. She is truly a fighter for American values, and she has a passion for our state.” Republicans Defend the Filibuster This week, two Democratic Senators joined with every Republican to save the filibuster and save the Senate. This protects Alabama's voice and is what our Founders intended. I will always fight to save the country we know and love from the radical left. Katie Reflects on the March for Life As a Christian, being pro-life isn't about politics. It's recognizing that God knew us before he formed us in the womb and that all life is sacred. I will never stop fighting for the unborn. Have you gotten your limited-edition blue Katie Britt hat? ACT FAST to get your hands on the official hat and show your support for Katie in 2022! ---
| This election is incredibly important. Unless we win big this November, we're going to see **Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and the Squad empowered to continue their reckless and destructive agenda.**

The only chance we have to get this nation back on track is with Republicans stopping Joe Biden from abusing his power.

**That's why we must Take Back the House and retire Nancy Pelosi.**
---
| [What do you want to see accomplished this year?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=548f4d5eba&e=1050d051da "What do you want to see accomplished this year?")
---
| We can see their desperation. They know we're winning because of strong supporters like you. That's why **26 House Democrats have decided to retire.**

_**Let's Take Back the House, and show these Democrats what Republicans can accomplish.**_

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner
---

subject: Continuing Our Commitment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
As you'll read further down in the newsletter... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indgop/continuing-our-commitment?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Continuing Our Commitment_**
---
|
---
_Chairman Kyle Hupfer and our Director of Diversity & Engagement, Whitley Yates, pose for a photo with presenters at the first class of the 2022 Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. _
| As you'll read further down in the newsletter, this week, we announced the second class of our Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. This is an outstanding group of Hoosiers, and I'm excited to get to know them.

For those of you that don't know, this series was born out of my remarks at our state convention in 2018. At that time, I called for action to grow our party and increase minority participation, and I am proud of the progress we've made so far.

As we have seen recently, Democrats' electoral success is limited more and more to urban communities and college towns. And as these areas continue to grow, it's important that we are committed and engaged to spreading our message of what the promises of limited government and freedom and individual liberty can deliver.

Democrats have offered empty promises for years. And as we've shown time and time again, we are the party that delivers for all Hoosiers.

Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend.

Best,

Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| **_Dr. King's Light_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b481234f39&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| On Monday, **Governor Holcomb** released a message honoring the light, life, and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. "Like few others in history before, he took action...bravely and boldly. Carrying a message of love. A message of liberty and of justice for all." You can listen to his full message by clicking on the video above. Last week, **Gov. Holcomb** spoke at the 31st annual Martin Luther King, Jr. Celebration. You can read more about that [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9fe2042982&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| _**Recent Statements by Chairman Kyle Hupfer**_
---
| **INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (Jan. 20, 2022)** – Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer released the following statement on the actions taken by the U.S. Senate last night:

"Last Tuesday, Joe Biden labeled millions of Americans who support voter ID laws, including millions of Hoosiers, as 'domestic enemies.'

"That same day, he instructed Senate Democrats to ram through partisan legislation that would federalize Indiana’s elections, eviscerate our common-sense photo ID laws, and send taxpayer dollars to political campaigns. They were even willing to change a centuries-old rule to make it happen.

"Thankfully, both actions failed last night.

"Every American has the right to vote and access the ballot – it’s never been easier than it is now. Instead of creating fake hysteria regarding voting, Senate Democrats should be focusing on issues that really matter to all Americans, like inflation and the chaos at the southern border." _### _
---
|
---
| **INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (Jan. 18, 2022)** – Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer released the following statement on Cyndi Carrasco filing to seek the Republican nomination for Marion County Prosecutor: "Under total Democrat leadership, Indianapolis is in the midst of a public safety crisis. Cyndi Carrasco is the right candidate at the right time to bring balance, stability, and strength to the position of Marion County Prosecutor.

"Cyndi has an impeccable record as a leader in justice and ethics at the state level. And as prosecutor, I am confident that she will bring the much-needed solutions to the public safety issues facing Indianapolis and will work to hold bad actors accountable." _### _
---
|
---
| **INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (Jan. 14, 2022)** – Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer released the following statement on the Supreme Court's decision to block Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate: “I am relieved to see that the Supreme Court has blocked Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate for private businesses. If it had been allowed to go into effect, the mandate would have further weakened our fragile supply chains, kept shelves empty, and worsened our already critical labor shortage.

"As the general counsel of the RNC, I am proud of our team for filing one of the lawsuits challenging the reckless Biden Administration. We will continue to stand up and fight for workers and businesses.” _###_
---
|
---
| _**Indiana Republican Party Announces Members of Second Diversity Leadership Series Class**_
---
| This past Tuesday, we announced the members of the second class of our nationally-recognized Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series, a seminar and leadership training program that will provide the preparation and resources needed to increase the engagement of minority Republican leaders throughout Indiana.

“With the success of our inaugural class, I’m beyond excited to welcome this outstanding group of Hoosiers to the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series,” stated **Kyle Hupfer** , chairman of the Indiana Republican Party. “With their vast range of experience, I know they’ll dive right into the program and position themselves as leaders to make a real difference in their communities.”

Read the full release and read the biographies of our newest members by clicking the button below.
---
| [Read the Full Release](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3fb0cfbcc2&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read the Full Release")
---
| [Read the RNC's Coverage](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5dc8e58771&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read the RNC's Coverage")
---
|
---
| _**And the Winner is...**_
---
|
---
| We asked you to help use choose Biden's Biggest Blunder of 2021, the only 'BBB' he has to show for after a year in office.

Well, the votes have been tallied and the winner is...
_**The Southern Border Crisis**_
Joe Biden has attempted to rescind President Trump's "Remain in Mexico" policy, twice. Since then, our southern border has been in complete chaos. According to the latest Customs and Border Protection report, 173,000 illegal immigrants crossed the southwest border in November, more than double the previous record for the month. Moreover, 13, 959 unaccompanied minors were apprehended.

The December Customs and Border Protection report will likely show the situation worsening.
---
|
---
| _**2022 Congress of Counites**_
---
|
---
| Registration is **open** for the Indiana Republican Party's 2022 Congress of Counties!

This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates, and grassroots activists is scheduled for Friday, February 25 through Saturday, February 26, 2022, at the historic [French Lick Resort](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=df55cfac81&e=1acd9bb3d6) in French Lick, Ind.

**Thankfully** , general admission for the event was **not** impacted by **Bidenflation** and remains at [$100 per person](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dbfa716146&e=1acd9bb3d6).** **

In addition to registering online prior to the event, **in-person registration** will be available **prior to the event** on Thursday, February 24 from 2 - 8 p.m.

You'll want to experience the 2022 Congress of Counties to kick off the election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics to help you and your county party **win** and keep Indiana on the **right** track. The** deadline **to book a room at our **special rate** is **Friday, Feb. 4. Don't miss out!**
---
| [Register Now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=954c7821f6&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Register Now")
---
| [View the Tentative Agenda](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6805213618&e=1acd9bb3d6 "View the Tentative Agenda")
---
|
---
| _**2022 Indiana Republican Party State Convention**_
---
|
---
| The 2022 Indiana Republican Party State Convention will take place on **Saturday, June 18, 2022** , at**** Indiana Farmer's Coliseum in Indianapolis, Ind. for the purpose of nominating a candidate for secretary of state, auditor of state, and treasurer of state.

For hotel accommodation information and delegate counts by county, click the button below.
---
| [More Information]( "More Information")

|

| | **Chairman Hupfer's Social Media Highlights**
---
|
---
---
| Stay up-to-date on the latest from Chairman Kyle Hupfer by following him on Facebook and Twitter.

**This week:** Calling out Sen. Elizabeth Warren's economics nonsense and U.S. Senate Democrats' fake hysteria over the filibuster.
---
| | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=705f79e11f&e=1acd9bb3d6)

---
|
---
| **_Upcoming Republican Events_**
[Saturday, January 29](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fc5be37d22&e=1acd9bb3d6): Rush County Lincoln Day Dinner
[Sunday, February 6](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a733bdf7e3&e=1acd9bb3d6): The Great Chili Out (Jefferson County)
[Friday, February 25 \- Saturday, February, 26](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1584a63433&e=1acd9bb3d6): 2022 Congress of Counties
[Friday, March 4](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=924208d989&e=1acd9bb3d6): Hancock County Republican Lincoln Day Dinner
[Saturday, March 12](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=94c6b9ee20&e=1acd9bb3d6): Miami County Lincoln Day Dinner

**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**** **[speaks at the Indiana Farm Bureau Legislative Forum](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=66c2bb8ace&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell**** **[attends the State of the State address](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=934bcf6dd6&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Secretary of State Holli Sullivan**** **[celebrates a record number of new Hoosier businesses](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=478e03eacb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Attorney General Todd Rokita** [secures funds on behalf of the Indiana Medicaid program](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=726096836d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young**** **[meets with Governor Holcomb](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4c3d196641&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun** [holds event for veterans and active military ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d3df7d44e5&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**C****ongressman Jim Banks **[speaks on the Ingraham Angle](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1e57fa95bf&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Team Renacci
subject: Join us for Team Renacci’s Super Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Renacci for Ohio
