name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: Help me become the first Republican since 1903 to win this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
As a Hispanic Republican woman, I'm thrilled at the prospect of being the first conservative to win in this district in 119 years I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e240afd6efa6418495a6c7c215f3e68f&_e=huWNI_45ihobt8e9w2WV_49ZkkXs1Qou3yyX03Qlxbd91pQyF0-Lqc_P5hQtotM4RDO_Xx0DCTzA_L4XJ3BPGKcYodcU5QGodhDi5dNn35ZeWzJ3ozH3f5Zw6KQwj1e1F2_tbkIuTmh5Z_M2UMu4E4UXTmgxqQHCAkGa28RRjP-cBVKiCPfJPNS31G7b0BiepRSS3vpLuUwNGErCBJ8fDlor7djG224JCqW79zB8YhUwT0rRazI9rFWPKnmG5-TDM_dQ4Id8BboQ2ANJZHRB578aMbQ0yeTvipsv6pMU6ZEhw6fjZhKyumucXmvFVmM_qx7zUfvNVK3cA2ARKztETw-0JdlnwlkGnlm43dwHiXcAn4s1rLUTzN7w_ivawXzz_ei_awqsLcvPf9Df0c6Pqxp17PItR-sEBIEBO-efNMlA5SLBGJCOjwvLPdis0kx_5fxbyQ7slL8V96XPaxCffWW2Uriw1sktreBrBsyIrPOdTrMfa78YwIulrYNwzdx3)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a HispanicRepublican from TEXAS!**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e240afd6efa6418495a6c7c215f3e68f&_e=huWNI_45ihobt8e9w2WV_49ZkkXs1Qou3yyX03Qlxbd91pQyF0-Lqc_P5hQtotM4RDO_Xx0DCTzA_L4XJ3BPGKcYodcU5QGodhDi5dNn35ZeWzJ3ozH3f5Zw6KQwj1e1F2_tbkIuTmh5Z_M2UMu4E4UXTmgxqQHCAkGa28RRjP-cBVKiCPfJPNS31G7b0BiepRSS3vpLuUwNGErCBJ8fDlor7djG224JCqW79zB8YhUwT0rRazI9rFWPKnmG5-TDM_dQ4Id8BboQ2ANJZHRB578aMbQ0yeTvipsv6pMU6ZEbO19Suz8fVkC9nZdKC215pYC2dPDnc65vJtTO6Dttap6YSEYll3jwk2XOJG0ssD2mV6Zeu9oqZmtYUC01vD74rihpiwHdxnNhRf1TSKZYXbliuzP_6RXG2dp4WNP_eeJgBVtbkqQEHc9ZfZg33O5QWAvWXBqY8OL4QPwkIpnPu9htL_-5xdyDFUTvmY_Ai9COQ2vBysk2PTey3HkqoXD2)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics⇒ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e240afd6efa6418495a6c7c215f3e68f&_e=huWNI_45ihobt8e9w2WV_49ZkkXs1Qou3yyX03Qlxbd91pQyF0-Lqc_P5hQtotM4RDO_Xx0DCTzA_L4XJ3BPGKcYodcU5QGodhDi5dNn35ZeWzJ3ozH3f5Zw6KQwj1e1F2_tbkIuTmh5Z_M2UMu4E4UXTmgxqQHCAkGa28RRjP-cBVKiCPfJPNS31G7b0BiepRSS3vpLuUwNGErCBJ8fDlor7djG224JCqW79zB8YhUwT0rRazI9rFWPKnmG5-TDM_dQ4Id8BboQ2ANJZHRB578aMbQ0yeTvipsv6pMU6ZHIPpcqq7ANZ5B2tCR8Br5heaGxSFx1wjAisU8E8CunHoJK5J4TXvKziHFrTizpO1el619-Ss9iQIxFJbXJKzLr5EA_UlcLtySoS5at8lSoJiheEM7q7Ly_jAB42OT4i3bDD9pnzxM4pizf1-pDbfy-vwFoDmEfXeNBH_kL0KZRJzQ-GHrri1WCu9Ig6yCUGa_9mLg9kfRy8mBb-OUIi1Li)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e240afd6efa6418495a6c7c215f3e68f&_e=huWNI_45ihobt8e9w2WV_49ZkkXs1Qou3yyX03Qlxbd91pQyF0-Lqc_P5hQtotM4RDO_Xx0DCTzA_L4XJ3BPGKcYodcU5QGodhDi5dNn35ZeWzJ3ozH3f5Zw6KQwj1e1F2_tbkIuTmh5Z_M2UMu4E4UXTmgxqQHCAkGa28RRjP-cBVKiCPfJPNS31G7b0BiepRSS3vpLuUwNGErCBJ8fDlor7djG224JCqW79zB8YhUwT0rRazI9rFWPKnmG5-TDM_dQ4Id8BboQ2ANJZHRB578aMbQ0yeTvipsv6pMU6ZHmWvqqEKYQqObf3hDsW9pgYhfgjFBSMlxb4gBLpwUWmCOv-MoLHIsGjFx3GTS2QUgqyfsa9Tar8UmIRI-6cn0eoBMau-14l0Ey-gE_dMWezjOqpEyVGcbCvtyEW_EemzcFtsdf19Nb6YcZ_ieGZY01RVf9Sx1yhUpWoxOnqWapLlYj8grV6WaoLDDITKGLJnR1y5Qm5w_gBpipB3mkmLX5)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics ⇒ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e240afd6efa6418495a6c7c215f3e68f&_e=huWNI_45ihobt8e9w2WV_49ZkkXs1Qou3yyX03Qlxbd91pQyF0-Lqc_P5hQtotM4RDO_Xx0DCTzA_L4XJ3BPGKcYodcU5QGodhDi5dNn35ZeWzJ3ozH3f5Zw6KQwj1e1F2_tbkIuTmh5Z_M2UMu4E4UXTmgxqQHCAkGa28RRjP-cBVKiCPfJPNS31G7b0BiepRSS3vpLuUwNGErCBJ8fDlor7djG224JCqW79zB8YhUwT0rRazI9rFWPKnmG5-TDM_dQ4Id8BboQ2ANJZHRB578aMbQ0yeTvipsv6pMU6ZFQ-IHmpYkLF9wCdlSOH1ZYC69uie5HJ4av-9penuxkPuRzj9xhlAT9h3jyPn1PFXpi9ULizrW56PQYvtY6mvHfElU2kmbJXPubdFyyidyafTmw_R72vP-nrupVB3m955NZKdPDcuCWIrkNMAo1ovxdTJ2318h7f5Fey8-W7x_13ixc188z4NLID8CKRoVykgVl1luP8Rv4mXLIgSA3BZN0)
Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e240afd6efa6418495a6c7c215f3e68f&_e=huWNI_45ihobt8e9w2WV_49ZkkXs1Qou3yyX03Qlxbd91pQyF0-Lqc_P5hQtotM4RDO_Xx0DCTzA_L4XJ3BPGKcYodcU5QGodhDi5dNn35ZeWzJ3ozH3f5Zw6KQwj1e1F2_tbkIuTmh5Z_M2UMu4E4UXTmgxqQHCAkGa28RRjP-cBVKiCPfJPNS31G7b0BiepRSS3vpLuUwNGErCBJ8fDlor7djG224JCqW79zB8YhUwT0rRazI9rFWPKnmG5-TDM_dQ4Id8BboQ2ANJZHRB578aMbQ0yeTvipsv6pMU6ZGAk_Z1BcS3ZQ1HCBNcOfhmWaAJYzBFyoCZd_cJhyVWKe_M-kiSYYkGnCDPvBO3dJ667iQZ11Ul3bIlywEfYrM5-Om7DvjB2CFu1LoE1pOVGH9mtFhAvYEgqsXzxzcJ5uTE0VX-jkkI2U-aFldVHzlXfjRz2Uev524J-TA0WxraD9s74TEPyztYqyPZvAd5bN1lTJJz38P0VSj3OlyPkS_r)

clean_body: As a Hispanic Republican woman, I'm thrilled at the prospect of being the first conservative to win in this district in 119 years I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | Fellow patriot, Not too long ago, Hispanics were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican. I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Hispanic,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, a proud Hispanic Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY. Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by just 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. Monica De La Cruz Republican for Congress | Paid for by Monica for Congress 1317 W Frontage Rd, Suite A, Alamo, TX 78516 Don't want to receive our emails?

subject: Wow, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Wow, Peter.

After our Charles Booker for Senate yard sign mock-ups came in, we
launched our Yard Sign Fund: $16 per yard sign so we can send Charles
Booker yard signs all across Kentucky to whoever wants them.

We launched this just two days ago,
Peter, and the response has been
overwhelming. So far, more than 300 people donated, often $16 or more, to
this fund. This is what the grassroots are all about.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220121?refcode=em20220121-1479&amounts=16&t=1001&refcode2=1479_346206_7a3aG8&akid=1479%2E346206%2E7a3aG8 ]We’re building on this momentum and kicking off a 24-hour campaign to
raise $10,000 for our Yard Sign Fund — or 625 yard signs, so that we can
begin to cover every inch of our Commonwealth with a Charles Booker for
Senate sign. Will you please chip in $16 (or more!) to this fund right
now?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220121?refcode=em20220121-1479&amounts=16&t=1002&refcode2=1479_346206_7a3aG8&akid=1479%2E346206%2E7a3aG8 ]Picture of thermometer to goal

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220121?refcode=em20220121-1479&amounts=16&t=1003&refcode2=1479_346206_7a3aG8&akid=1479%2E346206%2E7a3aG8 ]Contribute $16

Every day, we’re fighting to make sure every voter in Kentucky knows that
Charles is the candidate that will transform our future.

Now, with these new signs, we’re so excited to fill up ALL the yards,
gardens, fields, and windows in Kentucky to remind people that better
leadership is possible in our Commonwealth.

But we can’t do it without your help, which is why we have to ask one last
time:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220121?refcode=em20220121-1479&amounts=16&t=1004&refcode2=1479_346206_7a3aG8&akid=1479%2E346206%2E7a3aG8 ]Please chip in at least $16 or more right now to our Yard Sign Fund and
help us buy enough yard signs for anyone who wants them in Kentucky. Every
dollar you give directly powers our grassroots movement to replace Rand
Paul!

Thank you for all that you do,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220121-1479-footer&t=1005&refcode2=1479_346206_7a3aG8&akid=1479%2E346206%2E7a3aG8

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1479%2E346206%2E7a3aG8

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 01/21/22
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_21&n=1)
---
Friend, I love Illinois, but I don't love what J.B. Pritzker has done to it. As I travel the state each week, I have the pleasure of talking to voters all across Illinois. There is one common theme that I hear: everyone has been impacted by the failures of our current Governor. This week, I had the pleasure of touring Black Fabrication, a metal working and welding plant, in Hillsdale, Illinois. It reminded me just how devastating the designation of businesses as "essential" or "nonessential" during the pandemic was. Every job is essential to the person who relies on it. But that is just one of the many failures of our government. Illinois needs a new start. It's time for commonsense, conservative leadership that we can trust. Carolyn and I are working hard each week to bring that to you.
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** This week's volunteer to highlight is our Randolph County Director, Patrick Mueller. Thanks to Pat's efforts we have 17(!) large signs up in Randolph County with still more coming soon. Thanks, Patrick, for your hard work, but, more importantly, your friendship! [If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_21&n=2)
* * *
**Social Media Spotlight** **Join us in the fight to return Illinois back to you!** **Watch our announcement video ⬇️⬇️** [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAz368Ey5A_-7AOWQV-kh7VoNxueGLQp93P6X9AgSKQzw&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_21&n=3) [Comment, share, or like our post here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAz368Ey5A_-7AOWQV-kh7VoNxueGLQp93P6X9AgSKQzw&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_21&n=4)[
](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_21&n=5)
* * *
**Get Involved** Petition circulation has begun and we need your help securing our spot on the ballot! **Even if you are only able to collect a few signatures, any amount will be a big boost to my campaign.** Again, you can [click here __ to download my petition](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=9g-hQKRcSqWoOTpvxkNQHxn3i1LqqUTzTetgJNEvAi0oOUVR0SUwW9SvyYA55ousIR97Gn686DanKy_vJiDs3DLorBq0lUGjGH1YrsZt9hECm0dCGdzygdJKua6DT3W5&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_21&n=6) and [here __ to download instructions](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=GcXJViS5uWLVlPDTVbxjZGqms1hw5waDRvdeiHfbzoK7VSZmLZDBTtS1oNAnHHDSD24Sr_H9qJh5-5SPSCjDdTy9PhqiTE1-3HGV1lexGZf7hzZBEaS55iwkAdRAEIzgRJSUaPdbJVdJmIrkl1rd67W9JisL4YCo_WWa9bADCN0&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_21&n=7) for petition signers and circulators. S/F, Paul Schimpf
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to us or one of our friends.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_21&n=8).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_21&n=9) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_21&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_21&n=11), software for leaders.

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, Did you see this? As millions of Americans get ready to march for an end to abortion today, I wanted to make sure you got this email to remind you WHY WE FIGHT. We can never give up this fight. Thank you, Vice President Mike Pence \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Vice President Mike Pence Date: Wed, Dec 8, 2021 at 5:13 PM Subject: I am outraged To: Fellow Conservative, I am absolutely OUTRAGED. A Supreme Court JUSTICE compared a baby in the womb to a DEAD BODY. It’s never been clearer. The abortion fight is a fight between a pro-life and a pro-DEATH side. WeCANNOT ALLOW the pro-death side to win. I’m reaching out to pro-life PATRIOTS because I need as many people as possible to stand with me and DEFEND LIFE. Fellow Conservative Donor File CAN I COUNT ON YOU TO RUSH IN $15 OR ANY AMOUNT TO DEFEND LIFE? Thank you for choosing to stand for LIFE. Vice President Mike Pence Paid for by Great America Committee and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not tax-deductible. Wyoming Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives, Harriet Hageman, today issued the following statement regarding President Joe Biden’s 1-year anniversary as president:
“We knew Joe Biden would be a terrible president for [_Wyoming_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=s0AEtEaIpshapt9Xu8LFfsDNvMm2mWEtLHGkZhNoK3essNIODZCR8QgwAPj8QnLUJ_g9_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6Mc6fSmCfQf4n9Xk41-2FAEp7KToTKxoMZEwPZ-2Fka3hxtuz14SMIMMEAvOzwtm9mrL2lKo9jVrSNm2jNR7T-2Bg6O8Y3pehe5im6Ba2Da5ceFqxmY9DrlYNbvjaYxz-2FlVFRFTUihtOC5eD8XD-2BjWlc06OAfNAGVapU6GrwlH6nojMDhBrK0Wc1BTu-2FG7-2FWNVlt4lDJz7yMIwwaYgZoN-2FpfhhiipKtDxS8TJV07qxB2qgSq6vqUb0wMdWHE-2FI0w3mw9ZILQyv0FRBeVw-2FsSFDuxLEwO9JBb4XyX8Nc-2B40zmyjNefojSK6lvg6aL9X6tpd9P4xoMeCXAevA1T2qzqg9ftA8kXS9rOa65-2FBQNY0hEgIMtjrSKaOFnzxgXoW-2FXASObrVzYuxOxyx3Uwcp-2BxdSfMKi7a4NmskRO-2FzTZlExWXXgGCvx8fyOztMjYTwKYVTH49KbZHm4GwY7TiYGRjdKFsGobUhDW30xMHwtfoDaLL0iO0FGgj7RVK4-2BJNtfb6VfS26WDTj0IfRJHGnpLqoC8sUyrZaungqJ-2BmieRW1r4vKkDGoWUHQNLFOKi-2FghyqsTOPAPm-2FmF2RTDxiaNIm7VfL7xVil8532eqGkd6B96vTzvBKq5Pzc1gj2CVh7fNxW8v7UONXmgsjUbBf91cnZIC2NtoKximUeceH8Scp-2B7Kvi6HujSJtqQTLa4rX5NKfSXSLY-2FJbeBF7l7y-2Byar-2BTwK-2FETKeRsznegR8H-2Fx9LPZeL63h5j9HCTJPbYN9LShnVYm6Bna1acWBBv1RjjTo-2BYKxKDz3hdjneJZfpJHivvQosfu5CGY98t2uUajqmq5GbaCXO4QHPIBd9zab5sP0kEp7xyIg-3D-3D) , but I don’t know if anyone thought he would be this bad.

“Inflation is rising out of control, our energy independence is a thing of the past, our southern border with Mexico has been wiped away, the Afghanistan withdrawal cost 13 American lives and left the Taliban in possession of American military equipment, and the COVID pandemic is worse than it has ever been. Joe Biden is ruining this country and our allies have no faith in American leadership on the world stage.

“Through it all, we would expect that our representative in Washington, D.C., Liz Cheney, would be fighting tooth and nail against the disastrous Biden administration, but she is not. She spends every ounce of her energy fighting her personal war with President Donald Trump, aiding the Democrats in their scheme to divert attention away from the smoking wreckage of Biden’s presidency.

“Wyoming deserves a member of Congress who actually looks out for Wyoming. When I’m in Congress, that’s exactly what I’ll do.”

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Another great week on the campaign trail continues to point to Jane Timken being well-positioned to win this Primary in May and march to victory in November. Jane’s America First message is resonating with voters throughout Ohio as she proves that she will fight for their families and way of life. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Third Poll Confirms Jane Timken is Surging** A new survey released Wednesday by Kellyanne Conway shows that Jane Timken is tied for the lead against career politician Josh Mandel. Whether you look at our internal polling, the Mandel-aligned Club for Growth Polling, or Kellyanne’s polling, it all points to what we already knew, Ohio voters are clearly responding to Jane Timken’s strong record of leadership and authentic America First record. Jane’s continued growth comes despite the fact that she is being outspent on the airwaves by her opponents. No matter whose polling you look at, one thing is clear: Jane Timken is the clear alternative to Josh Mandel who can win in May and November. **From the Trail** Last Saturday, our "Parents for Jane" coalition held an event in Berlin Center to discuss how Democrats have used COVID as an excuse to keep kids out of school, exert power over health decisions, and push ideology. Ohio parents rightfully want a voice in their child's health and education and that will be Jane's priority in the U.S. Senate. [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b1a60c6662f14368b8bb5776dedb2acd&_e=x4oGdDMuKtGJiVVdlXZ9ITDgqiaWuHtLQ3mJ8YyE_2UfTlC5dRPN-DEux2-i0wJkxjqm8vcGY_fE8VyxX-0ll6SUtaZUBcpjZ2SPEncAvhFwinoKOIyjmDfYUbzDcol_UzpNZzsyiYUEZhx3SkN_BMO82RFStPp2obH0wa6I-YNVRa0Fs5b08Q8dIqw6AXZI0PY6qX5L3FMOHr6CJMwACDlfUwfgB9VlrGUIpcTbBPZ3ZHj8NUauaIrdgkBO3M2lsV_JPRdcePLS_Pjg3xCAbBHjv3XEb_Qmv5jXf9KLVNralUqTgJOfVR1iG6Tbdw5VDP5LJmouIu1lK7hXM7YWAg%3D%3D) On Wednesday, Jane joined Dayton Right to Life and 40 Days for Life to pray for those marching in our nation's Capitol today and mark the anniversary of the terrible Roe decision. Every life has value and dignity! clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, Another great week on the campaign trail continues to point to Jane Timken being well-positioned to win this Primary in May and march to victory in November. Jane’s America First message is resonating with voters throughout Ohio as she proves that she will fight for their families and way of life. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. Third Poll Confirms Jane Timken is Surging A new survey released Wednesday by Kellyanne Conway shows that Jane Timken is tied for the lead against career politician Josh Mandel. Whether you look at our internal polling, the Mandel-aligned Club for Growth Polling, or Kellyanne’s polling, it all points to what we already knew, Ohio voters are clearly responding to Jane Timken’s strong record of leadership and authentic America First record. Jane’s continued growth comes despite the fact that she is being outspent on the airwaves by her opponents. No matter whose polling you look at, one thing is clear: Jane Timken is the clear alternative to Josh Mandel who can win in May and November. From the Trail Last Saturday, our "Parents for Jane" coalition held an event in Berlin Center to discuss how Democrats have used COVID as an excuse to keep kids out of school, exert power over health decisions, and push ideology. Ohio parents rightfully want a voice in their child's health and education and that will be Jane's priority in the U.S. Senate. On Wednesday, Jane joined Dayton Right to Life and 40 Days for Life to pray for those marching in our nation's Capitol today and mark the anniversary of the terrible Roe decision. Every life has value and dignity! Media Roundup Jane's focus on being the pro-family, pro-Ohio values candidate continues to make headlines. Check out some recent pieces featuring Jane's "Parents First" priority and her efforts in the race. Read and watch below: Youngstown Vindicator: Spectrum News: Jane also joined the Boxer Show on 610 WTVN Columbus and talked with Jon Bozeka on WQKT in Wooster about her agenda and how she will combat inflation and solve our workforce crisis. You can listen to the and watch below for more with Jon Bozeka: "Fight Back" Be sure to check out Jane's latest ad released this week highlighting how she will "Fight Back" against the Biden agenda of runaway inflation and CRT in schools. Ohio families are struggling under the weight of Democrat policies, and we need a United States Senator who is not afraid to fight back. I hope everyone has a great weekend. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | ---|---

name: Team Matt and Cynthia
subject: Corporate candidates are raking in the campaign cash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Team,

Matt and Cynthia are running this campaign the right way, by meeting
voters where they’re at, listening to communities, and remaining
uncompromising in their fight for a Rhode Island for all.

Their campaign is not taking a penny of corporate PAC, corporate lobbyist
or fossil fuel money. But to continue to build this people-powered,
grassroots movement we need resources to invest in organizing events and
talking to voters.

While our opponents are taking checks from fossil fuel executives or
spending hours pandering to corporate lobbyists, Matt and Cynthia are
working hard to build out our movement. But our opposition is raking in
the corporate cash — career corporate executive Helena Foulkes just
reported raising $1 million dollars from her deep rolodex of wealthy
donors.

Foulkes is the epitome of a corrupt, corporate Democrat — she’s spent her
career prioritizing profits over people’s health and well-being. She’s
donated to Mitch McConnell, and she has continued to support CVS’s PAC
even after it gave $35,000 to Donald Trump.

Your grassroots donations can fight back against the flood of corporate
cash pouring into the campaign accounts of conservative Democrats.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3493?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220121_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=414%2E43343%2Ec2M4pn ]If you’re able to, please contribute right now to support our campaign
today. Your donation powers our on-the-ground organizing and will help
fund the resources we need to fight the corporate establishment. Pitch in
now:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3437?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220121_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=414%2E43343%2Ec2M4pn ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3439?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220121_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=414%2E43343%2Ec2M4pn ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3440?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220121_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=414%2E43343%2Ec2M4pn ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3441?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220121_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=414%2E43343%2Ec2M4pn ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3436?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220121_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=414%2E43343%2Ec2M4pn ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

We have a real opportunity to mobilize organizers, activists, and
community leaders to build a progressive government that will work for all
Rhode Islanders.

Your support helps us take action on the issues that matter — from passing
a Green New Deal to building tens of thousands of affordable homes to
passing policies for racial and economic justice.

Thanks for all you do.

— Team Matt and Cynthia

name: Team Hageman
subject: Federal judge blocks Biden vaccine mandate, validates Harriet Hageman's challenge
body:
| | | |
---
[](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfgGVbKZ9eZlB4bXGborabS10-2FniOvlnW10W1ummvvW8hNY3T_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6Mc6fSmCfQf4n9Xk41-2FAEp-2BqBO8TmnnRodIqk219GNN8kRQ0JFbgPF7rlu2GKOnio-2BP8F5MXAuoPdelLsBAcPIAQlQc6WgwarMWLONrLQVfLvgRihPWdsSDN76rW5OHmtw92C6tJcZhqA0Hzugjc0BeGo4ru7rgcjN-2FMrewEK3xKtQh6rmThvnDyMEJ42ORG5vobwlktCKV-2Bem3-2BUkybgvL48a3sXW0k4oMCMM7Yam4uroZ1vb2fNd7X-2B6jA4zHOy9-2Fb2U0Yx3SXUrLTy6mggiAya7e3f4Mav0bDrlsEP08vFY-2BxrVRZNKn-2Bsozs3Rp2Br1XjdID5TqgSGRvu3ux45o4sqK2ej-2FgCMFMewuZxaFnUb1OEOEACsrRTPWObUJecBa2aaHmYD87xR3bgrasg69j9oT9-2FU-2FGrVhMuSZ48-2FhBreNtUGXqtKkSGgDxxZfveTYaD0tduGdO-2FeL0i-2FkYflfMa2a8dznriwQGqIvCneeSY-2BdT9SF69pYZyuRljjsudLtJoA-2B-2BmghFWjnTY-2B5UjrykMU7TFmX0aOiQ16y9YcE8TmQZpbcz-2FjS1MBRvNOFgpx7UuKM-2FvJgIVMBOKRpTJvunEid7KBynMEiqEqM-2BECSH3EIr2Y-2F80nyZBptYPQ0zEi8RRYDhECM71kPS7iFXCiTsTaML3qv3RHB-2FGjBL0325GLc9mWiyq1l9YvyYpXstxF5O9VX5COqvzBlHnTGOqn5-2Bgw-2BP91A8jsHGLplzmvpsITVtomUJjoIIQ3XZCQkRJm-2BvxTNcEhjz0mKv9XiTPCqtvSFAkGLNvHK9jEG3yR98haky6rYhG8ig75u7I-2BTQsIIC0OIokun4Rwpv4JAyylw-3D-3D)
---
Federal judge blocks Biden vaccine mandate, validates Harriet Hageman's challenge
---
A federal judge has agreed with the same arguments Harriet Hageman has been making in court that President Joe Biden does not have the authority to order federal employees to take the coronavirus vaccine. The judge has [_**temporarily blocked**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfiyBr4xDmakS6HSfRvBifejARuOsKj3jciqRPo2RbJvOXSkHFrn97fuFSNE-2BYaK7-2B3fK9u6NHi-2B23n2EDQWvMVJumfy3Gr2jy623no4h4ZOsu1-Y_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6Mc6fSmCfQf4n9Xk41-2FAEp-2BqBO8TmnnRodIqk219GNN8kRQ0JFbgPF7rlu2GKOnio-2BP8F5MXAuoPdelLsBAcPIAQlQc6WgwarMWLONrLQVfLvgRihPWdsSDN76rW5OHmtw92C6tJcZhqA0Hzugjc0BeGo4ru7rgcjN-2FMrewEK3xKtQh6rmThvnDyMEJ42ORG5vobwlktCKV-2Bem3-2BUkybgvL48a3sXW0k4oMCMM7Yam4uroZ1vb2fNd7X-2B6jA4zHOy9-2Fb2U0Yx3SXUrLTy6mggiAya7e3f4Mav0bDrlsEP08vFY-2BxrVRZNKn-2Bsozs3Rp2Br1XjdID5TqgSGRvu3ux45o4sqK2ej-2FgCMFMewuZxaFnUb1OEOEACsrRTPWObUJecBa2aaHmYD87xR3bgrasg69j9oT9-2FU-2FGrVhMuSZ48-2FhBreNtUGXqtKkSGgDxxZfveTYaD0tduGdO-2FeL0i-2FkYflfMa2a8dznriwQGqIvCneeSY-2BdT9SF69pYZyuRljjsudLtJoA-2B-2BmghFWjnTY-2B5UjrykMU7TFmX0aOiQ16y9YcE8TmQZpbcz-2FjS1MBRvNOFgpx7UuKM-2FvJgIVMBOKRpTJvunEid7KBynMEiqEqM-2BECSH3EIr2Y-2F80nyZBptYPQ0zEi8RRYDhECM71kPS7iFXCiTsTaML3qv3RHB-2FGjBL0325GLc9mWiyq1l9YvyYpXstxJwOVN3qzN-2BdIHJUXja1-2Fjwk0IOQ-2Fjec650P-2FkJ-2FBMuyxEhanq8OJC97BmhU7BiHyzU8FbviMdM0pDOFMtXB8p5Kps0QYmRUFp6ZLuE5T1ET98WYZF8ln5pL-2BOWHZTx6G2VsKaAbe6sr6daUUmsjUgQ-3D-3D)**** President Joe Biden’s vaccine mandate for federal employees, saying the president did not have the authority to order the workers to take the shot “with the stroke of a pen and without input from Congress.” The ruling is a preliminary injunction against the mandate while litigation continues. This follows the U.S. Supreme Court’s ruling last week that Biden exceeded his authority when he ordered large private-sector employers to require their workers to be vaccinated. Hageman, Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives in Wyoming, [_**is serving as co-counsel in a similar case**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfkewfiDPKfU9D9F-2FVWX0dQG0hYQnJq7-2FieU1MsjeQgPHsk8ok3ct9avurAM4FOE66MSYb3RZBN9EClLUz0Y7yYbehfqgJzsbswvaBBX0FesO-2FcMEJfuKl8b9u9PeeYYOLxBiENuPqNVtZ9ozZu55vaOOTOeOC-2F245x3KzWUj5Z9PhJlQ_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6Mc6fSmCfQf4n9Xk41-2FAEp-2BqBO8TmnnRodIqk219GNN8kRQ0JFbgPF7rlu2GKOnio-2BP8F5MXAuoPdelLsBAcPIAQlQc6WgwarMWLONrLQVfLvgRihPWdsSDN76rW5OHmtw92C6tJcZhqA0Hzugjc0BeGo4ru7rgcjN-2FMrewEK3xKtQh6rmThvnDyMEJ42ORG5vobwlktCKV-2Bem3-2BUkybgvL48a3sXW0k4oMCMM7Yam4uroZ1vb2fNd7X-2B6jA4zHOy9-2Fb2U0Yx3SXUrLTy6mggiAya7e3f4Mav0bDrlsEP08vFY-2BxrVRZNKn-2Bsozs3Rp2Br1XjdID5TqgSGRvu3ux45o4sqK2ej-2FgCMFMewuZxaFnUb1OEOEACsrRTPWObUJecBa2aaHmYD87xR3bgrasg69j9oT9-2FU-2FGrVhMuSZ48-2FhBreNtUGXqtKkSGgDxxZfveTYaD0tduGdO-2FeL0i-2FkYflfMa2a8dznriwQGqIvCneeSY-2BdT9SF69pYZyuRljjsudLtJoA-2B-2BmghFWjnTY-2B5UjrykMU7TFmX0aOiQ16y9YcE8TmQZpbcz-2FjS1MBRvNOFgpx7UuKM-2FvJgIVMBOKRpTJvunEid7KBynMEiqEqM-2BECSH3EIr2Y-2F80nyZBptYPQ0zEi8RRYDhECM71kPS7iFXCiTsTaML3qv3RHB-2FGjBL0325GLc9mWiyq1l9YvyYpXstxwP1G6rFRYZlglgl0TCdGZ-2BJmY7xvrOFvYP-2BjGW1NXb4RP0w-2BcB9tRImcLwWPhIZXLxMYe1xSGnw8dTE6g8wBr5XUwzH3IRlbqtYqPez-2FViqzk-2BwTjH0FNuQSaGDlvg1veFqQ26VNlxgKVf-2BnE0jftw-3D-3D) also filed in the same court, the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of Texas. Under the Biden vaccine mandate, federal employees – regardless of natural immunity status – were required to be vaccinated and face disciplinary action, including the possible loss of employment, if they failed to comply. The order is a violation of the constitutional rights to bodily integrity and to decline medical treatment. The mandate is also a violation of the federal Emergency Use Authorization law, which specifies that patients have a right to informed consent and may decline receiving a drug approved under the statute. Hageman today issued the following statement: “President Biden’s been smacked down again, and this is an encouraging ruling because the mandate, like his other ones, is a clear violation of the federal employees’ constitutional and statutory rights and personal autonomy. The vaccine mandate is unconstitutional, unlawful, and would have no impact on public health because the plaintiffs in my case have already acquired natural immunity. Biden is having to be taught lesson after lesson that he is not a dictator and must abide by our laws and by our Constitution.” ###

clean_body: | | | | Federal judge blocks Biden vaccine mandate, validates Harriet Hageman's challenge A federal judge has agreed with the same arguments Harriet Hageman has been making in court that President Joe Biden does not have the authority to order federal employees to take the coronavirus vaccine. The judge has **** President Joe Biden’s vaccine mandate for federal employees, saying the president did not have the authority to order the workers to take the shot “with the stroke of a pen and without input from Congress.” The ruling is a preliminary injunction against the mandate while litigation continues. This follows the U.S. Supreme Court’s ruling last week that Biden exceeded his authority when he ordered large private-sector employers to require their workers to be vaccinated. Hageman, Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives in Wyoming, also filed in the same court, the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of Texas. Under the Biden vaccine mandate, federal employees – regardless of natural immunity status – were required to be vaccinated and face disciplinary action, including the possible loss of employment, if they failed to comply. The order is a violation of the constitutional rights to bodily integrity and to decline medical treatment. The mandate is also a violation of the federal Emergency Use Authorization law, which specifies that patients have a right to informed consent and may decline receiving a drug approved under the statute. Hageman today issued the following statement: “President Biden’s been smacked down again, and this is an encouraging ruling because the mandate, like his other ones, is a clear violation of the federal employees’ constitutional and statutory rights and personal autonomy. The vaccine mandate is unconstitutional, unlawful, and would have no impact on public health because the plaintiffs in my case have already acquired natural immunity. Biden is having to be taught lesson after lesson that he is not a dictator and must abide by our laws and by our Constitution.” ### | | | |

| | | Peter - I just announced my campaign for re-election.

While it might seem like now is the time to celebrate, that is not the case. I preferred to serve a final term and go home, but the state of our country is APPALLING.

The direction of America under Democrat control is worse than I could have ever imagined. This is all because of the radical Dems in Congress and Joe Biden. This campaign isn't about winning another term - it's about saving AMERICA.

clean_body: Peter – I need you to listen to me | | | | Peter - I just announced my campaign for re-election. While it might seem like now is the time to celebrate, that is not the case. I preferred to serve a final term and go home, but the state of our country is APPALLING. The direction of America under Democrat control is worse than I could have ever imagined. This is all because of the radical Dems in Congress and Joe Biden. This campaign isn't about winning another term - it's about saving AMERICA. The future of our children and grandchildren are at stake. "Will you join me in this battle to save America, Peter? " | | | "SAVE AMERICA" Thank you, Ron Johnson | | | | "RonJon Announcement" | Peter, It’s Ron Johnson. I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate. I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster. This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to SAVE AMERICA from the Democrats. "Please click here to donate now"** | | | "SAVE THE SENATE" | | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc. PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159 Text RonJon to 47682 for mobile alerts! If you would prefer to donate by mail, please send your contribution to the following address. RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC. PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

| | | We’ve got incredible momentum in our race to elect Melanie D’Arrigo as the first woman ever to represent New York’s 3rd District.
**Join the fight to hold this MUST-WIN open Democratic seat and stop Republicans from taking over the House. We’re inviting activists nationwide to our virtual events below!**
##

| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
AZ-04 congressional candidate Tanya Contreras Wheeless continues to hit the campaign trail with a jam-packed schedule. Tanya had a great time meeting everyone who came out to see us at the Maricopa County Republican Committee Mandatory Meeting earlier this month. Today she joined the Light Beer and Dark Money podcast. Tanya and her team will be at the Arizona GOP Mandatory Meeting tomorrow as Tanya takes every chance she can get to get out and meet residents of the East Valley. Come out and see us!

**Come Meet Tanya**
Stop by our table at the Arizona GOP Meeting on Saturday. Tanya will be there starting at 7 AM and we will be passing out campaign swag. Look forward to seeing you there!

**Arizona GOP Mandatory Meeting
Saturday, January 22, 2022**
Dream City Church
13613 N Cave Creek Rd
Phoenix, AZ 85022

clean_body: \------- 2022 ------- | Friend, After such a strong start to our campaign in 2021, thanks to grassroots conservatives like YOU, I was hoping to postpone our official 2022 Membership program until next month. But with Tony Evers already reporting over $10.5 MILLION in cash on hand to attack us, we can’t waste another minute to marshal the resources we need to fight back. 2022 Election Year Membership Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com Status:[Pending] When I’m sworn in as your next governor, you can rest assured I’ll know exactly who to thank for our victory... ...My 2022 Members who stood by my side all year long. This will no doubt be a race that comes down to the wire, Friend – and we can’t afford to give Evers the upper hand this early with his cash on hand advantage. Which is why I’m kicking off our official 2022 Membership program starting TODAY. But our membership program will only be as strong as the patriots who take part. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: ICYMI: A Republican group with $20M is backing Bill McSwain
body:
Commonwealth Partners has endorsed Bill McSwain for Governor of Pennsylvania | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/commonwealth-partners-endorses-bill-mcswain-for-governor-of-pa-8807644?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**January 21, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# ICYMI: Philadelphia Inquirer - A Republican group with $20 million is backing Bill McSwain

One of the most influential Republican groups in Pennsylvania politics has endorsed former U.S. Attorney Bill McSwain for governor, a significant development in [a GOP primary campaign](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=bc8b45c381&e=b1ec95759b) that includes more than a dozen candidates. The endorsement Thursday by Commonwealth Partners Chamber of Entrepreneurs almost certainly means McSwain will have the financial resources to make a serious bid for the nomination. A political action committee affiliated with Commonwealth Partners reported having $20 million in cash as of late November — and the group’s CEO said “all of that money is at our disposal” in the race. “We intend to win the May 17 primary,” Commonwealth Partners president and CEO Matt Brouillette said in an interview. “Of course, we hope that all the other candidates will focus on beating [state Attorney General] Josh Shapiro and make the case why they are the best to do that, so that we have the best opportunity to spend our resources in winning in November. But we’ve shown we know how to win races.” The Commonwealth Partners PAC’s biggest source of cash is Jeffrey Yass, the Bala Cynwyd-based billionaire investor. In a state with no limits on contributions in statewide elections, Yass has donated millions of dollars over more than a decade supporting candidates and causes that favor school choice. The group, which promotes free markets, helped the GOP retain its majorities in the legislature in 2020 and elect state Supreme Court Justice Kevin Brobson last year. It contributed $2 million to Brobson’s campaign, the most he received from any single donor. Brouillette said it also is raising millions more from donors outside the state. “People recognize how important Pennsylvania is,” he said. The endorsement of McSwain, he said, “is based upon who we believe will not only be able to win the election, but for us, it’s who will actually be able to govern and turn Pennsylvania around from being a state that’s losing population, losing congressmen, losing businesses, failing to improve our schools, rescuing kids that are trapped in violence and underperforming schools.” McSwain, the top federal prosecutor in the Philadelphia region during the Trump administration, said he’s grateful for the endorsement. “Together, driven by our shared priorities of a robust economy, public safety, school choice for all families, and a reinvigorated energy industry, we will work towards victory in November and a freer, safer, more prosperous Pennsylvania for years to come,” he said in a statement. Campaigns must file their latest fund-raising reports by the end of January, offering an early glimpse into the candidates’ competitiveness. Candidates and outside groups are expected to spend tens of millions of dollars through the general election. Other GOP candidates in the gubernatorial race include former U.S. Rep. Lou Barletta, State Senate President Pro Tempore Jake Corman, State Sens. Doug Mastriano and Scott Martin, former Delaware County Councilman Dave White, former U.S. Rep. Melissa Hart, and former Chester County Chamber of Business and Industry CEO Guy Ciarrocchi. Shapiro is the only major candidate in the Democratic primary.
---
| _Note: This article was originally published in_ The Philadelphia Inquirer _on January 20, 2022. It is available on their[website here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=94b0bc3a3b&e=b1ec95759b) _
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=ebb4e4b197&e=b1ec95759b)
###
---
| |
---

---
| | [](billmcswain.com)
---
|

clean_body: | | Peter, This campaign is a grassroots, corporate-free effort to challenge the status quo and bring power back into the hands of the people. I don't have a warchest of political party coffers to raid to help us get this message out to New Yorkers. What I do have is you, and, honestly, I think I have the better end of that deal with you in my corner! As you know, I'm running to unite us around common goals. And I'm also running to be a voice that speaks truth to power, regardless of party or political ideology. One of the best ways you can support this effort, Peter, is by helping to amplify our voice, our message, and this campaign. Please take a few seconds to follow us on social media and to forward this email to your friends and family who might want to keep in touch via this newsletter or our social media accounts. ~ ~ You are so much a part of what makes this campaign worth the effort, Peter, and your continued support--whether by sharing our social posts on ~ and ~ by ~~ or by forwarding this email to five people--is what will ensure we are successful in this effort to build a brighter future that works for all of us. _Let’s be clear about one thing - Dr. Fauci is causing**significantly** more harm than good._

[**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT TO KEEP AMERICA OPEN AND FREE**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=2d4fdab5a0fa40098b9e9598be3028ac&_e=LT6SsjUOna4PqArDeS0oHzSn-9PjUWChFhn3eY2C5bI3j_svY3XpGk8eQ0F1xrin__r721imWNJvPE6Y4BsVOMRkxIV0_l0sGzvUBisfXRjqc_cRgCjM4qVrSfdSrQ5tlmQb1gy5zi6R1J6QAh4_2YPZBs9uI6wqotlcdviXZQqvG9pDFk0WUCbh4VvMKC-HEjDXK4YwcmgdoVpLREKt9YVQinwgOwpiXEcIRDp7wG-G_ilS11urZfT1M_OA0SoW-8DGyGx3Ov7nlBobSm-UKanfSjhusYbjBMHVOSZC23pkQr79ykl5BRnKJSr65RFq_LxsqaZ4IwLR6VRDyd87uXFOibZr-rFuinh05VdUGcKn1KCv4ClG-2kFMcVX-BkQhG9VycJS5dOwB_OL0yZlY7s2ZpEpNlwVavgVu3i7ZOS41zvlENifktPMK555upQ0IxrG3VWsiYm6d3nUOTfd6EHEANY_Vcqi7UDjzktivLNl75KePTi5zrYUn-9TGW1T9p0iaEBrKt7ffWEL85mIqR9XnEdWIfRk0PA3GDHsuajreuwIkSKQMwaD5ZeyZqEZ)

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: An outrage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
Hi there,

This is an outrage. Joe Biden said a year ago that he would stop arming Saudi Arabia's war on Yemen.

Instead last month, the Biden administration pushed through another sale of missiles to Saudi Arabia.

And this morning, the Saudi-led coalition attacked a prison in Yemen, killing over 70 people, and later attacked a telecommunications facility, killing three children who were playing soccer.

This is all that’s been on my mind since I read it.

This endless, bloody thirst for war has to end. The U.S. should promote peace, not war. Life, not death. Healthy children, not funerals.

As a candidate, I suppose I should ask for money right now, but today I can’t.

If you’re looking for a way to help, I’d recommend calling your members of Congress and asking them to support or introduce a bill blocking weapons sales to Saudi Arabia.

Stay safe and healthy,

-Rebecca Parson
Candidate for Congress, WA-06

Rebecca Parson for Congress
PO Box 111388
Tacoma, WA 98411
United States

Paid for by Rebecca for Washington

name: Jesse Jensen
subject: Your endorsement is the only one that matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress
body:
This is a people-first campaign, NOT a lobbyist-first campaign Peter, The primary is coming up fast, and endorsements from obscure organizations and unknown so-called 'prominent leaders' are going to start flying at you non-stop. Although honestly, I'm not too focused on those types of endorsements, the only endorsement I really care about – and the only one that matters – is _yours_ , Peter. So, will you officially endorse me for Congress? [**OFFICIALLY ENDORSE ME**](http://links.jessejensen4congress.com/u/click?_t=786fb8edbf8a46a08085e4b6fadd3f18&_m=7e220485a7704a2aab91f4466eb50646&_e=e5BGhfRiRKiJ9-4DjbOSvIjz5kgOv1jo7pmq_KVW_YPqRXYMfsTviECUFnckN5SsfFmsFa0uF0YJXa9eqMSSsHpVEMUmfZLpNuzVeCewiXHt3dEUmvG44pn6IMQFUvIELut36YT8zAEV2Z3i03WypWT8D23qT2VoVps7Yu4aMzPUKX2Tg4VNauIhC1hsM-xH1zshPcxcKAsubLMLgQV85JZr22m3Hg0DRDd3Qm-2hZwzr0JStBFP5eDpXMAp46VzAwH62StnPcPjEX-EkUkkMjA0iIUX-l8-4U1K2wR8ID8uT8bn287xaWbU_QcqDZNkAL6CVIpi285Yfcoc97LelAw2XB7reWuZ-a5D2pzQcyBVVIuVIibLz296JR52KygGTnZGg8xofq9bK8rKiHuieE2JbY6ZhlDXII5ZXH-O--xouc3lySROFd0dn-Zs-KfxQZ6sBtlTnoPbU6zGDp4Krg%3D%3D) And if you're** _just as excited as me_** about the change we're going to bring to Washington, I would be honored if you could help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 2 of your friends. name: Tim Burchett
subject: Standing For Life 👶
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**

TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. **Standing For Life 👶**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c1e12ec0fc8048a19c68ad566d9f9b7c&_e=GLkVEda2krGJO2mFo6luAy1k2bl1bNPpNJF-no7lRQuDJOkBa9QvRcbYeMyZKWm2ZwR9LfYbBTvxY-A7I5rp9zgNcJYkoCby6lxeoDF66tqugQW1SbJ1-mOEGom-o1OvCqLMFTZ-wLI7fo1NvGg_ZhLzHRC5kClZMl9Ng9PWQvt2EXxZ-eoyh8iSfp-gVISJpBq-sv0Qo8PSGrtLjuVCqEjOadxY8J-7cNzcEXkVNezX1J-D1d0AIsHqlR2mx9bLuDSeyRzgQnqH9ZmzpqdrXvAWZv-eDrJ6FLjk54YREpzy-2Wtx8zp_yCCy9DskPCl4jJBKCm0feaoOI_bZEMvqj9heh0_DY6Nbk06NfAPtDuicGDpeuyXJnMPuepaFX4tBUsT-T6W2n-BflR5GlghYDFFAbLDbGfaE1GJYOpHah4%3D)
_Image from Twitter_
Today, thousands of Americans joined together to stand for the unborn in the March for Life. Forty-nine years after the tragic decision in Roe v. Wade, [62 million](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c1e12ec0fc8048a19c68ad566d9f9b7c&_e=GLkVEda2krGJO2mFo6luA2220Ki-eHmI6xmLXnbWkTJJ9c8_GS8k2Qs8PeNtD0Moo_eTJqEw55KQkBnE30XrhPItLrS04em7E--ahOlx_VS6crJR6B4aCeiC19d3peKcwyUN3y69AE5DVedzG7w1qvvXPDw13rvZZxFEJc5FmsfOkyu0A0bZKF0AW9oJPMlLNp4eY1xpapRujU9QN4RAH-zerFDgg49PzBb82CSWXlruR27UYy9bQgILaZCe5icvH3oY8-eRhoNyOLONlpKr_A%3D%3D) innocent, unborn lives have been lost to abortion.

The March for Life is a protest, but it is also a celebration of life. The thousands of people who marched on the National Mall today come from all different walks of life, with their own personal stories, and they are all marching because they believe in choosing life.

We should also celebrate the advancements in medicine that allow premature babies to survive and thrive. In 2020, little Curtis Means was [born](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c1e12ec0fc8048a19c68ad566d9f9b7c&_e=GLkVEda2krGJO2mFo6luAyuvbvS016JMce2IJFj78EgNQACOpW60NF-atZPKssiHGaMbyFkDei7wBoozb8De-AuaNMC06-MORMgpNAkojHwBwAlfZ9rTnSOR7zCaMtAuqOg3C-hzlGU0hOOwDbMGBQhHOOKf35KfdRfNq6LdXFEywgmZCHmTZdxLW8qVvrCI7Gcii_LBKeO5e7PWSwa92uttbVFU9Q2sjLuuvoDEMSvtvMDIyMSZB6vtHVUPHDFKBX_rRDpEYpPtLtcb4K0g9BNa7lXXBqQd-_JF28k2YLinyCUrslrIsrLA1EFgF1rXDzyb43b6IPlkIGo-FVVRmoP8U0E4gpWSxlPidEPV67HfUlInGQecVZfzbBS_0spZ) at 21 weeks, weighing only 15 ounces with less than a 1% chance of survival. He survived. The world is a better place because some people—doctors, moms, adoptive families—refused to give up on life.

We can all stand for life in our own way. I’m proud to support pro-life policies at the state and federal levels. I’m also proud to receive an A+ rating from the [Susan B. Anthony List](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c1e12ec0fc8048a19c68ad566d9f9b7c&_e=GLkVEda2krGJO2mFo6luA-v0eWceXMHEmqkisHiyw7yYeuXlP9p2JwkVj9RYaF6_3IbdDzjB6QxFTlS1fbw4Tt9J3Cxch2PNQ6xVB6nQZG0LSDhExnCmtAR9N4GwWe1FF2TJ0FgRHyNKzoI-B-ngq9SzHFqrbuHEZ9IYT3fz0OTCN2i7R-pUeMJiq0G0nhR-lM4ICmzcBNOoRL0ONRM3DwFay37wG2o7NLief0PDItO4za32Y1M4EcoQTHjX1VjEJhlhgS0-Yl20wxPXnzFYy4ajwXIgp8d8RthHxHyDeOU%3D), one of our nation’s premier pro-life organizations.

I hope you will join me in standing up for life by [signing my petition](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c1e12ec0fc8048a19c68ad566d9f9b7c&_e=GLkVEda2krGJO2mFo6luAy1k2bl1bNPpNJF-no7lRQuDJOkBa9QvRcbYeMyZKWm2ZwR9LfYbBTvxY-A7I5rp9zgNcJYkoCby6lxeoDF66tqugQW1SbJ1-mOEGom-o1OvCqLMFTZ-wLI7fo1NvGg_ZhLzHRC5kClZMl9Ng9PWQvt2EXxZ-eoyh8iSfp-gVISJP9ndL_8kWw14rlYSKtGnI6senMoz8OytO3Dz97rYV-VqKH5EtvCZz-Wc0RKpSOwBMeAR9_hYKupH1PCdeaTBkKwywv8qcpWFJyT2kTD_KzXUkaK_p3AELGKDT6-Auoi2Y8ShImzdOJgTvEYjy-0ewuPlDh1uSIsc4QXC02ZE51EZTaWCtcTeYxAUpDmMVfnwCeJpfbN_-QxX0ML_8r79gb5X5d0xc6tGryJnZgv2Wyk%3D) and making your voice heard.
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c1e12ec0fc8048a19c68ad566d9f9b7c&_e=GLkVEda2krGJO2mFo6luAy1k2bl1bNPpNJF-no7lRQuDJOkBa9QvRcbYeMyZKWm2ZwR9LfYbBTvxY-A7I5rp9zgNcJYkoCby6lxeoDF66tqugQW1SbJ1-mOEGom-o1OvCqLMFTZ-wLI7fo1NvGg_ZhLzHRC5kClZMl9Ng9PWQvt2EXxZ-eoyh8iSfp-gVISJOQQxawJHTmOdCUZSkVvvgQHHnWKNQ5l8rjY22YGY8b1Uj-bsYbFXKcFk7mZUwSQXOXFLnuLW6xA2Np5is8S-dMcg8UoA-ccjTmMF5jxBd0rTv7S0UVsUJErBiWv44ZtwBI88yJDjHjDoq7wtiL8qAKwaG96mjxbArlGO1GrN22CYEAIL1Ms1hNfPZ-lSsHu6JRk-ueNx0RQkV_uUBgD6aZD8qvWCU3LTUb7DydwojYo%3D)

**An Awesome Act Of Kindness In Knoxville 😇**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c1e12ec0fc8048a19c68ad566d9f9b7c&_e=GLkVEda2krGJO2mFo6luA_iiOAjmOzbtbCJCzKEY2DuaHwqd1SsmO3BvZVrkpAcpkdzzbNGqltJzvSNMDpKgdVd6u78g_iqqD5xuABxPjriounSgrvOSM0ikRNMIMfR2hyUg5ebE7u638G7a7v17Xysf0TV5fxU3IDeeJCseQiFWNxDYBN-j8WJMIlaDwBIo__tSbmiocu_2ljvCYNgwdrqi72W5IY_04hNFuQkWf3KozC3RvgBrnMKl6E2VKc6qsuuIP0-o78XHS_v2Agvqvq-8u7puz0HqCJ1pRzHqZOnDP_yBHwr3VedZyrwaErJM_YM6eap66syZsHjJuTl2TSiIeSfXtt0t2UCJfodWU-k%3D)
_Image courtesy of WBIR_
When you work in the food industry, a generous tip can go a long way. Just ask the staff at Halls Deli and Cuban Cafe in Knoxville. A customer left a [$1,000 tip](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c1e12ec0fc8048a19c68ad566d9f9b7c&_e=GLkVEda2krGJO2mFo6luA7LfnUZ5oO37TNMphcB1pwcFPj1BQV_HPKuKen_HtLYepYM9A0xofUQ_VQld7HV0vDxXDswDcxRF6WNnHqR-uEnLDf4wUmnBF1VvD2Rx5RypjDpeki4iTVWm25n1V41Hp9vAXkrF6QXLgLDgwqlFcmxrTdlhGGvDAdgF0tAVIlwUra8emtphBLmvaDqLqxMkGIqxKhdI0iDzdDPDCxNCF7V4LZsDyHB1D8zp7eShwQUidwtY8pNqw8Lau5X4cMClnv6GYy8f5Ije_QUxXf17XvbWk_WV1pVqWiklldnWYekHjd2I0ALMlGiWDFfXkZEZgCPqI_uTH87iYmYVYpQAD5Dlj1pBqVyn7FRClLeUvpr44g6E1r4v5merqN0s2tOuRUpDthRC6J7vkVmt7rd1pEo%3D) on his $20 lunch. Forget the suggested 20% gratuity. That’s a nearly 5,000% tip.

Halls Deli owner, Oscar, goes out of his way to support the Halls community when there are people in need. There’s no one more deserving of this generosity.

At a time when the food service industry faces extra challenges and worker shortages, an act of extraordinary kindness can make all the difference.
|

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Please open this email (I’ll explain in a moment)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
I have a special request.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/65?t=1004&akid=8%2E5257348%2ECJjj9v ]Will you click this link to help my campaign show Gmail and other email
service providers that you’re still interested in receiving our emails?
(The link will take you to a video we put out on Facebook in the 2018 Blue
Wave election when we won back our House Majority).

Opening this email might not seem like such a big deal to you — but today
it’s hugely important. Just give me a moment to explain.

Recently, some changes to Apple’s privacy policy have made it harder for
us to determine who’s actually reading our emails. We don’t want to be
piling up in your spam folder. So the best way we can decide who to
contact is to see how many people not only open our emails, but also click
on the links within them.

You see, this may come as a surprise, but I actually personally write,
review and edit every single email my team sends to you. I don’t take this
tool that allows me to communicate with folks all across the country for
granted — not for one instant.

You are an important part of our team, and talking with you, and hearing
your priorities, is very important to me.

But there are plenty of folks who will open and close an email just to
clear out their inbox. Again, nothing wrong with that. But I want to make
sure you want to stay involved in what we’re building here, and you can
demonstrate that by clicking this link:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/65?t=1005&akid=8%2E5257348%2ECJjj9v ]Click to watch this get out the vote video my team posted on Facebook
two days before the 2018 election, when we flipped 41 seats and won the
House majority.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/65?t=1006&akid=8%2E5257348%2ECJjj9v ][IMG]

We’ve been using the same tool to send you emails for years now, but
recently we moved to a new platform. Email providers like Gmail need to
see that folks are opening and clicking our links so they don’t mark us as
spam in your inbox.

Look, this may sound hyperbolic, but I promise you it’s not. The
difference between a healthy email list and one where we end buried with
junk mail is the difference between a successful campaign and one that
falls short.

With your participation, I’m able to raise the resources not only to hold
my own seat in Congress, but to support so many other important Democratic
incumbents and challengers around the country. I also like to share my
personal thoughts with you on breaking topics and big issues coming before
Congress with you as they happen.

A lot of my colleagues spend their days cold calling wealthy donors from a
windowless room to raise money for their campaigns. It is endless,
grueling, discouraging work and it’s the furthest thing from how Members
of Congress should be spending their time.

But because of you, I can stay focused on doing my job and fighting for
the big priorities that really matter. And again, I need this one small
favor if we intend to keep it that way.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/65?t=1007&akid=8%2E5257348%2ECJjj9v ]So can you click this link to make sure Gmail and the other big email
providers don’t mark us as spam? It’ll take you to our Facebook page where
you can watch our 2018 GOTV video — an election where we flipped 41 seats
in the House, took back the majority, and put us on the path to the
Democratic majorities that are delivering for the American people today.

Thanks for clicking. You are an important part of my team, and it means a
lot to have folks like you who I can count on.

More soon, and all my best,

Adam

P.S. — Thank you for engaging with our campaign. And if you have some
thoughts to share, please do so. Thanks again.

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1001&akid=8%2E5257348%2ECJjj9v ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1002&akid=8%2E5257348%2ECJjj9v ]Privacy Policy

clean_body: I have a special request. [ ]Will you click this link to help my campaign show Gmail and other email service providers that you’re still interested in receiving our emails? (The link will take you to a video we put out on Facebook in the 2018 Blue Wave election when we won back our House Majority). Opening this email might not seem like such a big deal to you — but today it’s hugely important. Just give me a moment to explain. Recently, some changes to Apple’s privacy policy have made it harder for us to determine who’s actually reading our emails. We don’t want to be piling up in your spam folder. So the best way we can decide who to contact is to see how many people not only open our emails, but also click on the links within them. You see, this may come as a surprise, but I actually personally write, review and edit every single email my team sends to you. I don’t take this tool that allows me to communicate with folks all across the country for granted — not for one instant. You are an important part of our team, and talking with you, and hearing your priorities, is very important to me. But there are plenty of folks who will open and close an email just to clear out their inbox. Again, nothing wrong with that. But I want to make sure you want to stay involved in what we’re building here, and you can demonstrate that by clicking this link: [ ]Click to watch this get out the vote video my team posted on Facebook two days before the 2018 election, when we flipped 41 seats and won the House majority. [ ][IMG] We’ve been using the same tool to send you emails for years now, but recently we moved to a new platform. Email providers like Gmail need to see that folks are opening and clicking our links so they don’t mark us as spam in your inbox. Look, this may sound hyperbolic, but I promise you it’s not. The difference between a healthy email list and one where we end buried with junk mail is the difference between a successful campaign and one that falls short. With your participation, I’m able to raise the resources not only to hold my own seat in Congress, but to support so many other important Democratic incumbents and challengers around the country. I also like to share my personal thoughts with you on breaking topics and big issues coming before Congress with you as they happen. A lot of my colleagues spend their days cold calling wealthy donors from a windowless room to raise money for their campaigns. It is endless, grueling, discouraging work and it’s the furthest thing from how Members of Congress should be spending their time. But because of you, I can stay focused on doing my job and fighting for the big priorities that really matter. And again, I need this one small favor if we intend to keep it that way. [ ]So can you click this link to make sure Gmail and the other big email providers don’t mark us as spam? It’ll take you to our Facebook page where you can watch our 2018 GOTV video — an election where we flipped 41 seats in the House, took back the majority, and put us on the path to the Democratic majorities that are delivering for the American people today. Thanks for clicking. You are an important part of my team, and it means a lot to have folks like you who I can count on. More soon, and all my best, Adam P.S. — Thank you for engaging with our campaign. And if you have some thoughts to share, please do so. Thanks again. 150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502 [ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ ]Privacy Policy PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS [ ]Adam Schiff for Congress You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

2022 is on track to be an absolute nightmare for Democrats.

Any way you square it, the path to a Senate majority—both for Democrats
and Republicans—runs right through this Senate seat in Ohio.

name: Rabine for Governor
subject: BIG WIN in the SCOTUS
body:
It's been an exciting week for Team Rabine! Gary won big in front of the United States Supreme Court and is the front runner for the Republican nomination for governor, per the WCIA television poll.It's been an exciting week for Team Rabine! Gary won big in front of the United States Supreme Court and is the front runner for the Republican nomination for governor, per the WCIA television poll.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_21_newsletter&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_21_newsletter&n=2) Dear Peter -- It's been an exciting week for Team Rabine! Gary won big in front of the United States Supreme Court and is the front runner for the Republican nomination for governor, per the WCIA television poll. A conservative that can win and can't be bought. Let's go!! Thank you for your support, Team Rabine **Pritzker enjoys ‘comfortable lead’ over GOP field,****_Rabine early Republican frontrunner_****, pollster says...Read the full article here:** [https://www.wcia.com/illinois-capitol-news/pritzker-enjoys-comfortable-lead-over-gop-field-rabine-early-republican-frontrunner-pollster-says/](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=WMWNRE5ROUdp2SS9BOl3_Ca4LHAZWI3kxk9IQiHbHiKtK5l56oKUD6Ag8qUPceEV8hw3vXapVZc66C5T2-JAYzmup3BgDlSjWLjD5Lkb6PNQkFOS9B8_48rmFPk7URurf1h-7nRh28t84uiEeYd2KP_zu4z4X_DWzWwn7eLDa84zbYEIeaJduAx3K2vriv0e&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_21_newsletter&n=3) **_A Message to the Biden and Pritzker Administrations from Illinois Small Businesses and the Job Creator’s Network_** Dear President Biden and Governor JB Pritzker, I am a founding Board Member of the Job Creators Network, a nonpartisan membership organization whose mission is to protect the 85 million people who depend on the success of small businesses in the United States. I am also a candidate for Illinois Governor. Several months ago, the Biden Administration issued a job-killing COVID vaccine mandate on small businesses across the United States. We immediately sued to stop what was an attempt at one of the largest government overreaches in our Nation’s history. It would have imposed billions of dollars in unrecoverable compliance costs and caused hundreds of thousands of employees to leave their jobs at a time when the economy is already stressed with supply chain issues, inflation, and other pressures. All of this layered over job-crushing, unilateral Executive Orders imposed by Governor JB Pritzker here in Illinois. After successes in the lower courts, the Sixth District Court of Appeals issued a rogue ruling and we immediately filed an appeal to the United States Supreme Court. On January 13, 2022, by a 6-3 vote, the Supreme Court soundly rejected the Biden Administration’s illegal power grab agreeing with our arguments at every step. In short: on every single issue at the Supreme Court, Job Creators Network won—and the Biden Administration lost. Notwithstanding the decisive loss at the Supreme Court, the Biden Administration and Governor JB Pritzker are contemplating trying again. Enough is enough. The Biden and Pritzker Administrations should stand back and let America’s small businesses give the nation’s economy a much-needed boost. But if the job-killing Democrats insist on moving forward with more harmful mandates, Job Creators Network stands ready to protect small businesses. Sincerely, Gary Rabine President and CEO Chairman/Founder Job Creators Network Rabine Group **Will you join our growing movement to defeat JB Pritzker?****** Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around! | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_21_newsletter&n=4 "Join Team Rabine") [Join Team Rabine](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_21_newsletter&n=4)
---

### Donley Auctions- Meet & Greet (1/22)

### Ela Township Candidate Meet & Greet (1/31)
Meet Gary Rabine & LT Gov. Candidate Aaron Del Mar, along with other Republicans, for a fun event in Ela Township!
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOW0sBt9I7Kev4s1liLBO-wZvmCtpx4LqXvQGdyoTVo0nZayYL3dOXpHo20-1I2pq8uxCAo8GPZAkK0MnQGnHiQTJ42VIpfWWZ3v5ddm6KujY88RpZWwC4ocbNGUuNQs1RK9tTU8zrW84ZEW_5H9wBFCOip4lYxb84q0p14rjAr99g&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_21_newsletter&n=9 "Event Details Here") [Event Details Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOW0sBt9I7Kev4s1liLBO-wZvmCtpx4LqXvQGdyoTVo0nZayYL3dOXpHo20-1I2pq8uxCAo8GPZAkK0MnQGnHiQTJ42VIpfWWZ3v5ddm6KujY88RpZWwC4ocbNGUuNQs1RK9tTU8zrW84ZEW_5H9wBFCOip4lYxb84q0p14rjAr99g&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_21_newsletter&n=9)
---
### **Illinois unemployment fraud numbers remain a mystery **
There could be as much as $430 million in unemployment fraud in Illinois since the onset of the pandemic, but no one knows for sure as the state has yet to provide numbers.
Other states have released information on fraud, yet Illinois has not.
Not only is fraud continuing to be an issue, but we can’t even get a straight answer on the extent of the problem. This is another example of JB Pritzker’s failed leadership. How can the Governor fix a problem his administration cannot even define? We need new and better leadership, and we need it now.
### New candidate enters Republican Gubernatorial Primary
Most of you probably have not heard a great deal about Aurora Mayor Richard Irvin. This is because he has spent most of his life as a Democrat.
Here is the statement I released upon Irvin’s declaration of candidacy.
“I would like to welcome Aurora Mayor, Richard Irvin, to the governor’s race and to the Illinois Republican Party. After years of pulling Democratic primary ballots in years when Pat Quinn, Hillary and Joe Biden were top of the ticket, I am interested to hear what changed your mind on party affiliation. Equally compelling will be your explanation on supporting sanctuary cities and your effusive praise for Governor Pritzker. But I guess that’s what campaigns are all about.
I am a life-long, conservative Republican. I am pro-life, pro-gun and a fiscal hawk. I founded my now nationwide business in Illinois shortly after I graduated from high school. I have supported the Republican Party, conservative candidates, and the promotion of fundamental freedoms for decades. Just last week, I was one of the lead plaintiffs in the lawsuit that successfully stopped the Biden Administration’s vaccine mandate in the United States Supreme Court. I was one of the largest donors in Illinois to the Trump campaign and I have never voted in a Democratic Primary.”
* * *

Gary won big in front of the United States Supreme Court and is the front runner for the Republican nomination for governor, per the WCIA television poll. | | | ---|---|--- Dear Peter -- It's been an exciting week for Team Rabine! Gary won big in front of the United States Supreme Court and is the front runner for the Republican nomination for governor, per the WCIA television poll. A conservative that can win and can't be bought. Let's go!! Thank you for your support, Team Rabine Pritzker enjoys ‘comfortable lead’ over GOP field,Rabine early Republican frontrunner, pollster says...Read the full article here: A Message to the Biden and Pritzker Administrations from Illinois Small Businesses and the Job Creator’s Network Dear President Biden and Governor JB Pritzker, I am a founding Board Member of the Job Creators Network, a nonpartisan membership organization whose mission is to protect the 85 million people who depend on the success of small businesses in the United States. I am also a candidate for Illinois Governor. Several months ago, the Biden Administration issued a job-killing COVID vaccine mandate on small businesses across the United States. We immediately sued to stop what was an attempt at one of the largest government overreaches in our Nation’s history. It would have imposed billions of dollars in unrecoverable compliance costs and caused hundreds of thousands of employees to leave their jobs at a time when the economy is already stressed with supply chain issues, inflation, and other pressures. All of this layered over job-crushing, unilateral Executive Orders imposed by Governor JB Pritzker here in Illinois. After successes in the lower courts, the Sixth District Court of Appeals issued a rogue ruling and we immediately filed an appeal to the United States Supreme Court. On January 13, 2022, by a 6-3 vote, the Supreme Court soundly rejected the Biden Administration’s illegal power grab agreeing with our arguments at every step. In short: on every single issue at the Supreme Court, Job Creators Network won—and the Biden Administration lost. Notwithstanding the decisive loss at the Supreme Court, the Biden Administration and Governor JB Pritzker are contemplating trying again. Enough is enough. The Biden and Pritzker Administrations should stand back and let America’s small businesses give the nation’s economy a much-needed boost. But if the job-killing Democrats insist on moving forward with more harmful mandates, Job Creators Network stands ready to protect small businesses. # Just a quick reminder!

The latest Oregon Catalyst gubernatorial straw poll is open for just FIVE more hours! (It closes at 9 p.m. tonight.)
